Comment: Soon prominent and went alongside with the winner to 200 M. Kept on but unable quicken to challenge.
In touch early. Dropped back steadily from 600 M and raced greenly throughout.
Slightly slowly away, was rear until making up a little late ground final 250 M.
Tardy start, at rear early. Made ground steadily to obtain 3rd approaching course proper. Went clear 400 M but no match with the winner.
Never far off. Ran on well from 5th at 500 M to just miss 2nd near finish.
Rear. Made up some ground from 400 M until one-paced final 200 M. (Hung in.)
Soon led and was holding narrow advantage to 200 M where he ran on well to win convincingly.
In touch to 200 M. No extra.
Settled in rear of midfield on rails. Angled out for a run upon straightening and quickened well inside final 300 M to assert authority closing stages. Readily.
Soon in rear. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Slowly away. Remained well back before producing moderate impression early in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Mostly around midfield. No extra inside final 200 M.
Travelled at the back. Made up a lot of ground down straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden early. Moved up to assume lead approaching home bend. Headed inside 200 M and soon found no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in 4th. Commenced move entering straight and ran on steadily to hit front inside 200 M but overshadowed nearing finish.
Settled in 3rd just behind leaders. Kept on before finding no extra closing stages.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace without quickening.
Mostly in midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Mainly worse than midfield to 600 M, then weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Well there, disputing lead turning in. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Began well. Settled in midfield. Gave ground from home bend.
Remained midfield before dropping back a little approaching 600 M. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Never in contention.
Prominent. Sat outside leader far side. Dropped to 4th or 5th final turn. One-paced in straight.
Slightly slowly away. At rear throughout.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Prominent, 3Ls 2nd turning in. Soon found no extra and faded final 200 M.
Rear. Made up good ground from outside passing 200 M.
Around midfield. Ran on final 250 M.
Towards rear. Was making ground final turn where he was steadied. Renewed effort to claim 3rd inside 300 M.
In touch to straight. Weakened final 200 M.
Soon 5th and shifted to inside from widest draw rounding stable bend. Ran on early straight to take lead 100 M out. Won going away. (Promoted.)
Slightly slowly away, recovered some ground to become midfield early. Soon remained in the rear group.
Never better than midfield. Slightly inconvenienced close home.
Soon led. Outstayed by the winner when headed approaching 100 M. Kept on. (Lame.)
Settled in last few. Ran on well down centre of straight to grab victory close home.
Slowly away. Never nearer.
Settled just better than midfield. Made headway approaching home turn. Unable to obtain clear passage in straight before finishing strongly inside final 150 M to reach 2nd place final strides.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made moderate progress in straight. Forced to ease over 100 M out.
Began fairly. Quickly improved to prominent position before home bend. One-paced in straight. Was beaten when clipped heels and knuckled badly over 100 M out.
Settled in midfield to straight. Ran on down centre of straight without threatening.
Trailed field to straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M despite forced to steady.
Settled towards rear behind main bunch. No clear run in straight until finishing race off strongly closing stages.
Well there to 250 M then weakened.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Went 1L clear inside 200 M but unable to sustain effort and overhauled passing 100 M.
Mostly in midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Jumped well. Settled in prominent position. Held some chance over 200 M out but soon overhauled.
Travelled just better than midfield to 600 M then dropped out.
Never far off. Failed to quicken to threaten inside final 200 M.
Soon towards rear.
Prominent to 400 M, came under pressure and weakened.
Mostly around midfield, hung out home turn and never likely.
Poor start, improved towards midfield 400 M out, ran on strongly home straight to only just fail.
Led to about 100 M out, then could find no extra.
Never a factor.
Prominent to 200 M, then weakened.
Around midfield, kept on home straight.
Behind midfield and never likely.
Tardy start, sent up towards midfield, unbalanced on turn from 600 M, ran on home straight.
In touch, ran on home straight to dispute lead 100 M out and just held on.
Lacked early speed, ran on from far back home straight.
Around midfield, kept on home straight.
In touch, under pressure turning in and soon beaten. (See Racing Incidents.)
In front of midfield and 3 wide. Found no more after straightening.
In front of midfield. Made ground early in straight. One paced final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Waited with until after straightening. Was held up for a run for some time after straightening. Made ground final 200 M.
Ridden to go forward. When unable to reach lead settled behind leaders. Gave ground from 400 M.
Began well. Settled behind leaders. Found no more after 400 M.
Led. Gave ground after 400 M.
Blundered at the start then soon improved to be midfield. Moved closer when taken into clear on home bend. Made ground to reach lead at 200 M. Just failed to hold on.
Midfield. Had difficulty obtaining clear running until after the 200 M. Finished fairly without ever looking likely.
Behind midfield. Near rear into home straight when failed to quicken at 500 M. Taken to outside and continued to make gradual ground in run to post. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden to go forward from wide gate. Did not show enough pace to take up position and settled wide in midfield. Widest turning in. Made little ground early in straight then no more.
At rear. Remained same into home straight. Was blocked for run early in straight. Made strong ground after the 300 M without ever looking likely.
Near rear. Improved through field after 400 M. Finished strongly but not threat to quinella pair.
Near rear. Moved away from rail at 500 M to improve. Asked for effort after 400 M and improved through field to reach lead just before line.
Hard ridden early and travelled outside leader. Went to lead at 400 M. Kept on strongly despite surrendering lead at 200 M.
Slowly away, steadily recovered to be behind midfield on stable bend. No further progress in straight.
Sent up to lead early. Sat outside leader from 1400 M. Prominent into straight, kept on one-paced before weakening inside final 100 M.
Better than midfield. Steady progress on home turn to lead on straightening. Sprinted well clear at 300 M, won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Ridden in behind midfield. Never in contention.
At rear. Never seen with a chance. (Demoted.)
Ridden to be prominent. Lost position to be midfield on stable bend and was given reminders. Dropped back further from 600 M. (Demoted.)
Ridden to be handy. Weakened steadily from 250 M.
Midfield. Moved a bit closer on home bend. Kept on one-paced final 300 M, becoming unbalanced in the run to the line and shifted ground.
Better than midfield to 600 M where it began to weaken.
Began well from widest draw, steadily dropping to behind midfield approaching stable bend. Closer order on home turn to be better than midfield turning in. Kept on one-paced, weakened closing stages.
Began awkwardly, last to 450 M. Ran past beaten horses in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there early. Better than midfield from 1300 M. Dropped back a bit into straight. Not a factor afterwards.
Well back despite being ridden along early. Switched out into the clear upon straightening. Made up a lot of ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Pushed along to take up narrow lead from 1400 M. Headed at 450 M, dropped out from 200 M.
Midfield or better covering ground on the outside. Kept on in straight before weakening final 100 M.
Crowded on jumping. Remained towards rear turning in. Ran on 300 M out until not quicken final 100 M.
Disputed lead early whilst hanging in. Headed 1000 M and remained in 2nd position to 200 M. Tired badly thereafter. (Bled.)
Midfield or better. Improved from 1000 M to 3rd position. Ran on well and led briefly 200 M out. Weakened and one-paced close home. (Hung in throughout.)
Midfield early but dropped to the rear from 1200 M. Crowded on straightening and became last. Recovered and made up some ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Niggled along in midfield. Steadied and lost position turning at 800 M. Ran on steadily 300 M out to be nearest at finish.
Soon moved across from widest draw to settle at the back. Trapped wide turning in. Ran on determinedly upon straightening and was just held off by the winner.
Ridden forward and disputed lead briefly before settling in touch. Weakened badly final 200 M. (Demoted.)
In touch early but inclined to over-race. Checked at 900 M and lost position to be in midfield or better. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Raced erratically early. Swift headway from 1200 M and took lead at 1000 M. Headed turning in. Kept on to 100 M. Weakened therafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or behind. Never a factor in straight.
Midfield. Kept on under pressure to 100 M. Weakened thereafter.
Never far off. Kept on in straight but got hampered 200 M out. Never recovered. (Demoted.)
Midfield early but dropped towards rear from 1100 M. Headway rounding home bend. Ran on well 400 M out to lead inside 200 M. Just held off challenge from the runner-up.
Soon towards rear. Dropped to last position rounding home bend and widest turning into straight. Kept on past well beaten runners.
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Gave ground early in straight.
Soon moved up to midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Ran on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled mainly in better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Led and then restrained in front. Headed 300 M out despite effort asked after straightening. Soon weakened.

Began well then held up in 3rd some 3Ls off pace. Moved closer rounding home bend. Quickened well upon straightening to hit front 300 M out. Never in danger thereafter despite racing greenly. (Promoted.)
Wide throughout. Settled around midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight. (Demoted.)
Held up some 4Ls off pace in 4th. Moved closer around home bend. Ran on steadily in straight. Winner too good.
Always in last few.
Settled in midfield from widest draw. Dropped away from home turn.
Did not jump cleanly. Remained in rear and wide turning into straight. Ran past beaten runners. (Rider dropped whip near 200 M.)
Ridden to muster early pace, then settled behind leader. Came under pressure to keep position upon straightening. Faded inside final 200 M.
Led until headed 300 M out. Dropped out quickly.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield approaching 800 M. Kept on in straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Prominent. Quickened to hit front approaching 200 M. Kept on to look like winner closing stages but was just caught final stride.
At the back. Taken to extreme outside upon straightening. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M, doing best work at finish.
Soon towards rear. Dropped to last rounding home bend. Shifted course to make ground when finding clear run final 200 M. Unable to proceed further closing stages.
Prominent early. Dropped to around midfield passing 800 M. Ran on a bit in straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Prominent before settled behind leader approaching home bend. Hit front briefly 300 M out. Soon weakened.
Soon towards rear. Was progressing when lack of room and steadied twice 200 M out.
In touch. Ran on in straight to become 2nd passing 200 M. Unable to quicken close home.
Worse than midfield. Made up good late ground through runners inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear early. Improved to just behind midfield rounding home bend. Ran on final 250 M without threatening.
Jumped best from widest draw. Prominent to straight. Clipped heels and knuckled 250 M out when giving ground. Faded. (Bled.)
Checked at start. Towards rear early. Improved to midfield or better approaching home bend. Ran on steadily final 300 M to just get up at finish.
Niggled along in rear. Moved closer rounding home bend and was widest turning for home. Made up good ground final 200 M to miss narrowly.
Midfield early, soon raced in rear. Only a little shift over concluding stages.
In touch. Dropped back to midfield when unbalanced passing 500 M. No further progress.
Lost ground at start, last to back straight. Given reminders near 700 M, improving to midfield upon straightening. Ran on well along rail to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and was squeezed. Remained towards rear, tailed off in straight.
Jumped well, settled along rail in midfield. Pushed along final turn, becoming 4th turning in. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield or better on outside. Weakened soon after straightening.
Midfield. Improved rounding home bend to be 3rd 400 M. One-paced final 100 M.
Led field to 600 M. Soon faded. (Demoted.)
Towards rear throughout. (Demoted.)
Prominent. Advanced to 2nd final turn. Kept on well but unable to catch the winner.
Pushed along from poor draw to sit behind leader soon after start. Took over passing 600 M, stayed on to hold off challenge in the straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Always towards rear. Found nil under pressure in straight.
Prominent early. Settled towards rear. Took closer order on outside at Rock. Kept on one pace without quickening in straight.
Slowly away. Always at the back. (Demoted.)
Travelled in 4th. Gained 3rd home bend. Made moderate progress down straight without threatening.
Chased leader to straight. One-paced.
Prominent. Dropped to 4th home bend. Faded further in straight.
Well back. Commenced run home bend and widest runner turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield, with short-lived effort around home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Soon led and made all.
Never seen with a chance. Tailed-off from home bend.
Close up when steadied and lost position passing winning post first time. Dropped to worse than midfield turning into back straight. Lost further ground home bend.
Tardy start, soon recovered good ground to become prominent. Looked like to have some chance turning in but effort not sustained.
Prominent. Took lead 1200 M. Faded out of contention when headed 200 M out.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Last and widest final turn. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Prominent before dropping back to 5th 850 M. Weakened steadily from 500 M. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield throughout.
Held narrow lead to 1200 M and remained prominent after. Kept on until one-paced closing stages. (Demoted.)
Jumped awkwardly, never a factor.
Never far off. Kept on well along rail in straight. Held 2nd from 150 M until becoming 3rd near finish.
Last to 600 M. Made good progress from outside rounding home bend to become midfield final turn. Ran on well to take control passing 200 M.
Around midfield throughout.
Towards rear, becoming last passing 600 M. Ran on steadily in straight to snatch 2nd close home.
In touch early, midfield from stable bend. Crept closer order final turn, found no extra final 200 M.
Raced keenly towards rear early stages. Not much room early in straight. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear. Effort rounding home bend but very wide turning in. Made up some ground under pressure in straight.
Restrained outside leader early. Took over entering back straight. Led until headed inside final 200 M. Kept on one pace.
In touch early. Settled in midfield far side. Made some progress early in straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Soon led before restrained to behind leader far side. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening in straight.
Never far off. Ran on final 200 M but no match with winner.
Wide in midfield to 250 M. Weakened.
Always at the back.
Settled just behind midfield. No clear run early in straight. No response when asked final 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Commenced move on outside rounding home bend to be some 3Ls off pace into straight when widest. Ran on well to clinch victory closing stages. (Promoted.)
Settled behind midfield. Disappointed for a run when crowded entering straight. Taken into the clear final 200 M and made some late progress closing stages.
Settled behind leaders. Dropped back to 3L 4th far side. Failed to hold position early in straight then soon faded.
Around midfield, inconvenienced 600 M, ran on strongly home straight to get up close home, despite difficulties in obtaining a clear run. (Promoted.)
Behind midfield, widest turning in and never likely.
Led to closing stages.
Forward midfield, one pace home straight.
Around midfield, gave ground from 200 M out.
Hampered at start, soon at rear and never likely.
Mostly forward midfield to 400 M, weakened home straight.
Behind midfield, ridden along 600 M out, kept on under pressure home straight.
Behind midfield, never looked likely and only ran past beaten horses home straight. (Lame.)
Always prominent, chased long time leader from 800 M to finish.
Towards rear, ran on along inner home straight.
Disputed lead to 1200 M, in touch to 400 M then gradually weakened.
Behind midfield. Carried wider on home turn. Kept on early in straight. No more final 150 M.
Followed leaders into home straight and gave ground shortly afterwards.
Free in early stages and was behind leaders. Gave ground quickly after 500 M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Heart irregularity.)
Midfield. Shifted out on straightening. Made a slight impression despite hanging out in straight.
Near rear. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
In front of midfield. Improved along inner to follow leaders into home straight. Taken into clear on straightening and responded well to score in last stride.
Behind midfield. Remained on inner. Made ground early in straight. Run end at 100 M.
Midfield. Wide throughout. Made some ground after 500 M. One-paced last 200 M.
Equal lead. Kept on strongly in straight. Just failed to hold off winner.
Did not stretch out and was tailed off throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield early. Improved to be in front of midfield at 700 M. Remained same into straight and continued to make gradual ground in run to post.
Equal lead after being ridden forward from outside barrier. Kept on strongly in straight.
Well there early. Steadily dropped to midfield rounding 1st turn. Ran on a little close home.
Always prominent. Inconvenienced in the run to the winning post after keeping on one-paced in home straight.
Began awkwardly, soon last, never in contention.
Ridden early to be prominent. Weakened gradually final 100 M.
Prominent. Dropped to midfield at 1200 M. One-paced.
Steadily dropped towards rear from wide draw. Made up a little ground closing stages.
Better than midfield early. Improved to be behind leader passing winning post the first time. Hit the front 250 M out, just overhauled by the winner close home.
Behind midfield or worse. Never seen with a chance. (See Racing Incidents.) (Heart irregularity.)
Mainly behind midfield or worse. Failed to quicken in straight.
Soon led. Headed 250 M out, kept on until gradually weakened inside final 100 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on well final 200 M to get up in the closing stages.
Well back and was obliged to travel wide without cover. Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Ran on well to make up good ground from 300 M. Just missed marginally.
Rear. Obliged to race wider before the turn. Never in contention.
Jumped well, prominent early. Dropped back steadily from 1000 M to be behind midfield turning in. Was steadied when improving early straight. Recovered some ground final 250 M.
Midfield or behind. Moderate improvement in the straight.
Sprawled at jump, towards rear. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Soon led. Was joined soon after straightening. Kept on to hold narrow advantage closing stages, just beaten near finish.
Pushed along to be prominent soon after start. Was 1L 3rd final turn. Ran on to go alongside with the leader, just got up narrowly close home. (Promoted.)
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on same pace throughout.
Made no show. (Hung out throughout.)
Not far off to straight. Weakened from 250 M.
Soon prominent. Raced 3-wide 2nd passing 1000 M. Held on until finding no extra final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Prominent 2nd, became 4th approaching 800 M. Kept on quite well in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out for a run early in straight and ran on steadily without threatening.
Prominently briefly, then mainly in midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Made all. Went clear early in straight and held on well. (Promoted.)
Slowly away but quickly recovered to 5th 2Ls off pace before home bend. Remained there to straight then gradually weakened.
Rear early. Made steady headway to be midfield rounding home bend. Ran on early in straight before one-paced closing stages.
Ridden early. Chased leader to straight. Failed to quicken to challenge and soon found no extra under pressure.
Settled just behind leaders. Came under pressure upon straightening and ran on to be nearest at finish without troubling winner.
Began from poor draw. Restrained to rear far side. No clear passage after straightening. Ran on well when clear inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Niggled along early but gradually dropped to worse than midfield. Wide turning into straight and kept on steadily past beaten runners down centre of track. (Demoted.)
Prominent to straight, then gradually faded.
Always at the back. (Demoted.)
Well back. Snuck up along rails turning for home. Produced late impression closing stages.
Began well. Settled behind midfield. Checked coming out of back straight. Made no show thereafter.
Midfield. Made ground steadily in straight without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly, was last early stages. Made steady ground far side to reach 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Tardy start, rear to straight. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Raced keenly, was in prominent position until dropping back when inconvenienced passing 900 M. Behind midfield home bend and no improvement thereafter.
Towards rear. Taken to outside turning into straight. Ran on well to take command closing stages. (Promoted.)
Behind midfield. Knuckled near 900 M and was inconvenienced shortly after. Remained similar position until staying on a bit final 250 M.
Towards rear. Made good progress rounding home bend to become prominent final turn. Stayed on without quickening final 200 M. (Hung out.)
Prominent from widest draw, settling just behind midfield. Crept closer order passing 600 M. Responded well in straight to lead inside 200 M. Held on well but was beaten near final 50 M.
Towards rear throughout. (Demoted.)
Prominent. Took lead approaching 800 M until headed 200 M. Found no extra.
Well there. Unable to hold position upon straightening. Soon faded. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. Weakened from 250 M. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group from 1400 M. Was last passing 900 M. (Demoted.)
Soon led. Was prominent when headed 800 M. Weakened out of contention final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear early. Gained midfield home bend. Ran on steadily down straight to claim 2nd place final strides.
Ridden early. Lost position 800 M out. Made no show thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down straight to grab victory closing stages.
Never nearer. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Close up, sharing pace early on. Weakened passing 200 M.
Joint leaders far side, gaining some 1L advantage home bend. Soon headed upon straightening and quickly weakened.
Travelled better than midfield and wide. Joint 4th into straight. Steadied over 200 M out but plugged on for 5th.
Never far off. Given reminders to keep with pace early in straight but forced to steady on rails 200 M out.
Always well there. Gained lead into straight, kicking some 1-1/2L clear 200 M out but quickly worn down close home.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out in straight.
Travelled better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Began awkwardly. Trailed field to straight. Made significant progress to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to home bend then faded.
Behind midfield, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never a factor.
In touch far side, then gave some ground before running on final 200 M.
Shifted in early to dispute lead, weakened final 200 M.
In touch middle of track, under pressure 500 M out and ran on without threatening winner.
In touch stand side, before running on well final 400 M to win comfortably.
Poor start and always behind midfield.
Midfield or better, kept on steadily.
Never a factor.
Disputed lead on inner before weakening about 100 M out.
Never a factor. (Demoted.)
In touch early, soon beaten.
Well back before running on final 300 M.
Dwelt at start. Soon improved to be wide in midfield. Improved gradually in straight to reach lead after 200 M and go on and win comfortably.
Behind midfield and never likely.
Followed leaders. Eased out to challenge on straightening. Made ground early straight. No more final 200 M.
Led. Gave ground after 400 M.
Behind midfield. Responded only fairly when asked to improve early in straight. Made fair ground late.
Rear. Remained on inner around home turn. Continued to make gradual ground in straight.
Prominent. Raced wide throughout. Kept on well in straight. Unable to match winner last 200 M.
Outside leader. Taken to clear lead after 400 M. One paced final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Travelled wide throughout. Responded strongly in straight to be doing best work at finish.
In front of midfield. One paced in straight.
Near rear. Widest turning in. Took time to gain momentum in straight. Doing best work last bit.
In front of midfield. Improved quickly early in straight. Reached lead briefly at 200 M. Kept on strongly.
Behind midfield. Made ground down running without ever threatening placegetters.
Followed leaders. Eased out to challenge on straightening. Made ground early straight. No more final 200 M.
Prominent briefly. Distant 3rd from stable bend. Improved to be in touch from 1400 M. Steadied when held for run before straightening. Ran on steadily without threatening placed horses.
Settled at rear. Last from 1600 M. Responded well upon straightening and took lead 200 M out. Held off challenge from the runner-up despite drifting out close home.
Towards rear. Ran on well final 400 M but was held off by the winner.
Disputed lead rounding stable bend before sitting outside leader. Ran on upon straightening and gained narrow advantage 300 M out. Weakened final 100 M.
Midfield or behind. Closer order rounding home bend. 3rd turning in. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening the first pair.
Ridden forward and took lead from stable bend. Kept on in straight. Headed 300 M and weakened final 100 M.
At rear. Never a threat.
Settled towards rear. Made moderate progress late.
Midfield. Clipped heels near 900 M and stumbled. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Sent up to lead. Joined at 900 M. Headed 200 M out and was hampered when inside horse tried to improve. Weakened afterwards.
Pushed along early to be handy. Shared lead at 900 M. Weakened gradually from 200 M.
Better than midfield. Held up for a run early in straight and again after 200 M when checked and shifted out. Did not recover.

Jumped awkwardly, settled at rear. Steady headway on home bend. Ran on steadily along rail from 400 M. Not much room from 300 M to 150 M and became badly unbalanced at 200 M. Ran on when got into the clear.
Crowded at start and was last to 450 M. Ran on strongly from 300 M to hit front 150 M out. Won comfortably.
Began well from widest draw, gradually dropping to midfield at 1100 M. Moved a bit closer on home turn, weakened close home.
Prominent to turning in. Kept on until weakened gradually from 200 M.
Ridden along early to be prominent. Held some chance 200 M out. No extra, kept on one-paced.
Close up early. Midfield from 1000 M. Made ground steadily final 200 M to claim 3rd close home.
Midfield or slightly better throughout. Kept on quite well in straight.
Behind midfield, became unbalanced at 900 M. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Sluggish at start. In rear. Effort rounding home bend but widest into straight. Made up good ground final 250 M, doing best work at finish.
Prominent from widest draw. Settled just behind leader rounding home bend. No response when asked inside final 300 M.
Began well. Settled in better than midfield. Steadied approaching 800 M. Responded well final 200 M to hold every chance but outsprinted close home.
Slightly slowly away. Pushed along early behind midfield. Made no show.
Settled at the back. Remained in last position until making moderate late progress closing stages.
Jumped very awkwardly, losing ground. Remained in last few throughout.
Settled in better than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Midfield. Faded inside final 300 M. (Demoted.)
Began well. Taken back towards midfield. Wide turning into straight. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Soon dropped behind midfield. Dipped twice approaching 1000 M. Towards rear turning into home bend. Kept on in straight.
Began well from wide draw. Well there before taking lead approaching 1000 M. Found no extra when headed inside final 200 M.
Held up in prominent position. Quickened well to hit front inside final 200 M despite shifting in. Fought on well to fend off runner-up's strong challenge. (Promoted.)
Sluggish at start. Soon moved up to behind midfield. Steadied approaching 800 M. No clear passage early in straight. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Moved up along rails to lead briefly passing 1200 M. Remained in prominent position until weakening final 300 M.
Mainly in prominent position. Dropped back to 6th near 800 M. Renewed effort to lead briefly passing 300 M. Kept on but failed to withstand quinella pair's challenge final 200 M.
Soon towards rear. Baulked early straight. Made ground 200 M out. Run ended when checked 100 M out.
Soon led. Headed passing 300 M and dropped out.
Better than midfield. Slightly improved rounding home bend. Wide turning in and gave ground.
Midfield. Wide and dropped back to the rear group turning into straight. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Wide throughout. Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back rounding home bend and was last turning in. Ran past a few beaten runners final 200 M.
Settled at the back from widest draw. Ran on inside final 300 M without threatening.
In touch. Crept closer order turning into straight. Found no extra final 200 M. Weakened close home.
Close up to 250 M. Weakened.
Midfield or behind. Made some progress final 250 M but found no extra closing stages.
Gradually moved up to behind leader. Dropped out soon after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch. Raced tightly and dropped to behind midfield approaching 800 M. Made ground on inside rounding home turn. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Settled in rear. Made progress rounding home bend to be just behind midfield turning in. Obtained clear run and ran on steadily final 300 M to claim victory near finish.
Restrained towards rear. Steadied and lost some ground passing 800 M. Ran on steadily along rail upon straightening to lead approaching 200 M. Was caught final strides.
Never a factor.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on well final 200 M.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Dropped back far side to become last from 500 M. (Hung out throughout.)
Prominent 3rd, was 2Ls behind winner home turn. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Remained 4th to straight. Unable to quicken inside 200 M.
Held 5th until weakening out of contention final 200 M.
Made all, holding 1L advantage final turn. Just held off runner-up's late challenges.
In similar position throughout.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning into straight. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Lost ground at start, remained at rear. Made ground steadily from 10th at 450 M, never nearer.
Around midfield throughout. (Demoted.)
Well there. Always held 2nd but lost a minor placing close home.
Rear early. Made moderate headway passing Rock. Forced wide into straight and inconvenienced. Kept on.
Travelled worse than midfield. Dropped out from home bend.
Midfield early. Hampered and dropped to rear approaching home bend. Gained midfield into straight saving ground on inside. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Began well and led early, then travelled in 2nd outside leader to 400 M and gradually faded.
Raced wide in last few throughout. Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly in midfield. Inconvenienced turning for home. Kept on steadily down straight.
Well there. Took over going up Rock. Seriously challenged in straight and fought on under strong driving to win by the narrowest margin.
Raced wide throughout. Never far off to straight then weakened.
Slightly slow into stride. Settled in midfield on rails. Commenced move and shifted out for a run entering straight. Ran on determinedly to be nearest at finish.
Began well. Settled some 2Ls off pace. Found no extra in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sluggish at start. Trailed field to 400 M. Ran on strongly down home straight to narrowly miss the placegetters. Did best work at finish.
Settled just off the pace. Improved upon straightening to join winner over 200 M out but pipped in the shadow of the post.
Prominent. Took lead from 450 M. Held on well along rail in straight.
Behind midfield. Improved slightly to 6th 600 M. Held on until finding no extra final 150 M.
Soon last. Crept closer order upon straightening. Ran on inside 200 M.
Always thereabout. One-paced.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Never in contention.
Led field until headed 450 M. Kept on but unable to re-gain advantage thereafter.
Better than midfield. Moved up to 4th 500 M. Found no extra final 200 M.
Midfield. Severely checked at 600 M. No improvement in straight.
Behind midfield. Tailed off when hanging out badly from 500 M.
Midfield or behind. Checked at 600 M. Ran on from 8th early straight to be nearest at finish.
Mostly 4th. Kept on without quickening.
Well there. Shifted inside to lead on rails rounding stable bend. Narrowly headed early in straight. Fought on doggedly final strides to just get up at finish.
Slowly away. Travelled in rear. Moved closer rounding home bend. Made up ground in straight, doing best work at finish.
Settled in midfield. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Led early from widest draw. In touch on outside until giving ground from home turn.
Never far off. Quickened to hold some chance 200 M out. Found no extra closing stages.
Always at the back.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground. Settled behind midfield. Came under pressure and moved closer rounding home bend. Ran on in straight.
Never far off. Effort rounding home bend to dispute 3rd turning into straight. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Prominent and wide early. Settled just behind midfield turning into back straight. Wide turning for home. One-paced.
Well there. Settled behind leader coming out of stable bend. Quickened to lead turning into straight. Hung on well to hold slender advantage until just pipped in a ding-dong battle close home.
Towards rear, gradually improved from 500 M and kept on home straight.
Led or disputed lead to about 300 M then weakened.
In touch back straight, under pressure 400 M, no extra home straight.
Always prominent, shaken up 500 M, kept on home straight to hit front close home. (Promoted.)
In touch, disputed lead from 600 M, led 200 M to closing stages.
At rear, under pressure 400 M out and ran on home straight.
Behind midfield, inconvenienced on several occasions before modest late recovery.
Around midfield, found nothing home straight.
Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield, attempted to improve along inner home turn, but soon beaten.
Mostly around midfield, beaten over 400 M out.
Mostly around midfield before weakening home straight. (Lame.)
Crowded at start and was then wide in front of midfield. Rider concerned with action at 600 M. Eased down. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
Followed leader. No response when placed under pressure at 500 M. Gave ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
In front of midfield. Taken into clear on straightening. Made some ground early in straight. One-paced last bit.
Followed leader. Commenced to give ground at 500 M.
Behind midfield. Improved gradually around the field from the 600 M. Widest turning in. Continued to make gradual ground in straight.
Led. Still held big lead 200 M. Began shortening stride soon after and was caught just before post.
Behind midfield. Remained on inner and saved ground on home bend. Kept on fairly without looking likely.
Midfield after crowding at start. Hung out and raced wide without cover. Gave ground from 600 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Near rear after being checked at start. Asked to improve wide on track after 700 M. Wide in midfield turning in. Kept on one-paced.
Near rear. Asked for effort at 500 M. Improved through field early in straight. Responded well but unable to catch quinella pair.
In front of midfield. Asked for effort after 500 M. Still gave leader big start at 300 M. Sprinted quickly final 200 M to reach lead concluding stages.
Sat back as gates opened and lost a lot of ground at start. Remained at rear and only passed tiring horses in straight.
Better than midfield. Made ground steadily from 200 M to claim 3rd close home.
Slowly away, pushed along at the back. Steady progress on home turn to be midfield entering straight. Made up some ground late.
Began awkwardly, settled in rear of midfield. Improved to midfield at 1200 M. Hung out on home turn, made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Handy to 200 M out. Steadily weakened final 100 M, checked near the winning post. (Demoted.)
Handy early. Settled in behind midfield from 1300 M. Ran on well along rail final 200 M to just miss.
Soon led from widest draw. Maintained 2Ls advantage from stable bend. Took a breather on home bend. Still 2Ls advantage 100 M out, just lasted.
Niggled along to sit behind leader. Kept on well in home straight until not quickened close home.
Settled towards rear. Closer order on home bend to be midfield turning in. Made up a little late ground.
Well back and wide. Widest into straight, never a factor.
Midfield to 600 M where it began to weaken. Wide and without cover throughout.
Settled at the rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Began awkwardly, never better than midfield. Dropped out in the straight.
Around 7th or 8th to straight. Slightly unbalanced when momentarily lost iron 300 M out. Recovered ground steadily afterwards.
Slowly away. Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Took narrow lead passing 350 M until inside 150 M. One-paced.
Just behind the main bunch. Crept closer order rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Prominent to 950 M, then dropped to around midfield. Kept on along rail final turn but unable to quicken final 200 M.
In touch early. Moved up to prominent position home bend. Dropped out upon straightening. (Hung out throughout.)
Led briefly soon after start. Was among leaders before headed early straight. Found no extra closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, rear to straight. Made up a little ground final 250 M.
Checked soon after start, remained in the rear group. Ran on well final 400 M to take command passing 150 M. Won convincingly.
Well there. Hung out from 450 M. Weakened from 300 M.
Always thereabouts. Kept on one pace. (Demoted.)
Well back until running on past beaten runners in straight.
Never far off to straight then gradually faded.
Jumped very awkwardly. Never in the hunt. (Bled.)
Chased leaders in 3rd position. Found no extra closing stages.
Midfield throughout.
Began well. Tracked leader. Came to challenge upon straightening but failed to peg back winner.
Ridden early and soon led. Hung on under pressure.
Midfield when steadied and lost position coming out of back straight. Made no show thereafter.
Towards rear most of way. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden far side improving gradually to be midfield home bend. Kept on steadily in straight without threatening.
Around midfield to straight then dropped out.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon in rear.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Led field to 300 M. Remained prominent until finding no extra closing stages.
Better than midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Steady progress from 850 M to be in touch, but was wide turning in. Kept on steadily in straight.
Settled towards rear and hung out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never in contention.
Midfield. Made no show final 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled 4th. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Slowly away, last to 400 M. Ran on well through runners to obtain a remote 2nd close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tracked leader before taking over passing 300 M. Won unextended. (Promoted.)
Held 3rd until finding no extra when hanging out upon straightening.
Slowly away, soon moved up to midfield or behind. Kept on same pace in straight.
Midfield. Dropped out in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Moved up to lead early in straight but quickly swamped inside 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Shifted out upon straightening and ran on to hold some chance over 200 M out. Soon outsprinted.
Held narrow lead until weakened passing 400 M.
Travelled in last few. Gained midfield on rails entering straight. Not much room early on before improving steadily inside final 200 M to claim 2nd final strides.
Prominent. Baulked early in straight. Produced shortlived effort over 200 M out but soon found no extra.
Settled in last few. Baulked for a run early in straight. Ran on past beaten runners closing stages.
Settled at the back. Obtained clear run only after 300 M and ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Began well. Settled worse than midfield to straight. One-paced.
Settled at the back. Made steady progress down straight despite finding not much room throughout.
Held up in midfield. No clear run early in straight. Responded well to hit front over 150 M out. Won well. (Promoted.)
Disputed lead to 400 M then dropped out.
Settled in midfield. Came under pressure entering straight. Made modest progress early on but could find no extra closing stages.
Well there to 600 M then gradually weakened.
Ridden to muster pace early. Raced wide and better than midfield to straight, then dropped out.
Forward midfield, moved closer 1000 M out, kept on home straight.
Around midfield, gave ground from 600 M.
Followed leader, under pressure 400 M and weakened final 200 M.
Went forward, led from 1200 M and never threatened.
Forward midfield, ran on home straight.
Rear and wide stable bend and never likely.
Around midfield, under pressure 800 M, found nothing home straight.
Around midfield, some improvement final 200 M.
Around midfield, niggled along 800 M out, inconvenienced 700 M, no extra home straight. (Rider dropped whip near 200 M.)
Tardy start, behind midfield, niggled along far out, plenty to do turning in, then ran on well.
Blundered start, recovered to forward midfield, under pressure far out and kept on.
Never a factor.
Never a factor. (Bled.)
Behind midfield, came under pressure home straight, failed to respond.
Soon with rear. Remained on inner and saved ground on home turn. Responded well in straight and not a lot of room to improve final 100 M.
Soon near rear. Made gradual ground in straight without looking likely.
Followed leaders. Taken into clear after straightening. Responded gradually to reach lead final stride.
Led. Hung out on home turn. Despite losing lead at 200 M kept on strongly.
Prominent and 3-wide without cover. Remained same into home straight. Gave ground from 350 M.
Prominent and four wide without cover. Remained same into home straight. Gave ground from 300 M.
In front of midfield. Obtained nice run through field after straightening and reached lead at 200 M. Looked winner but unable to hold off quinella pair last bit.
Around midfield. After having nice run was taken into clear at 300 M after being held for run around home turn. Responded well and continued to make ground in run to post.

Slow to begin. Quickly improved to be behind midfield. Was ridden to maintain position after 800 M. Made strong ground in straight despite having to change course several times. Just missed. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield and was free when forced to race wide without cover. Maintained same throughout.
Stood flat footed and was very slow to begin. At rear until improving wide on track after 500 M. Widest turning in and gave ground final 300 M. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Free early. Held position into home straight. Commenced to make ground after 400 M and was then steadied when disappointed for run at 200 M. Got going again last bit.
Followed leader. Maintained fence to rail through and join lead on straightening. Stayed on under hard riding until 200 M. Then gave ground.
Prominent and 5-wide without cover. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
Always handy. Kept on well.
Slowly away, at the rear throughout.
Led group on the inside. Steadily weakened final 100 M.
Midfield. Ran on final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield down centre of track. Steadily weakened final 200 M. (Hung in throughout.)
Began awkwardly, chased leader throughout but not much galloping room inside the 100 M. Kept on well.
Always prominent. Kept on well.
Crowded at start, then raced tightly early. Midfield throughout.
Settled in midfield or better. Ran on well final 200 M to claim 2nd closing stages.
Midfield or slightly behind throughout.
Travelled in midfield throughout down centre of track. Unable to quicken.
Always in command. Kept on well to the line.
Settled towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Well back. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
At back. Under pressure turning in. Made up good ground in the straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped best but soon settled outside leader. Ran on upon straightening and had brief advantage 300 M before headed final 200 M. Kept on until no extra close home.
Midfield or behind. Dropped back towards rear at 800 M. Made up a little ground 300 M out. One-paced final 100 M.
Midfield. Baulked at 800 M and checked at 700 M. Ran on steadily final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabout. Taken in at 800 M and dropped back to midfield. Kept on in straight until weakened final 200 M.
Mainly midfield. Slight improvement rounding home bend. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Never far off. Niggled along rounding home bend. Unable to quicken in straight. (Rider dropped whip near 200 M.)
Ridden forward and soon led. Headed 300 M out. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
Under restraint and dropped to the rear from wide draw. Headway from 900 M to behind midfield turning in. Failed to make any impression upon straightening.
Around midfield. Under pressure rounding home bend. Ran on steadily final 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Niggled early and mostly forward of midfield. Headway from 800 M to be in touch turning in. Ran on well and held narrow advantage 200 M out before being outsprinted by first pair close home.
At rear. Last from 600 M. Never a factor.
Towards rear. Never a threat in straight.
Soon moved up along rail to be in touch. 3rd or 4th turning in. Steadied and shifted out for a run early straight. Quickened well final 300 M and took lead in the closing stages. Held on. (Promoted.)
Settled in rear from widest draw. Effort rounding home bend and wide turning in. Kept on.
Soon towards rear. Made up good ground under pressure final 300 M despite having to change course inside 200 M, doing best work at finish.
Slowly away. Settled in rear. Commenced move rounding home bend on outside to be 3Ls off pace entering straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish but failed to peg back winner.
Never far off to straight. Kept on same pace.
Never far off, mainly in 3rd early stages. Effort rounding home bend to be outside leader turning in. Kept on until fading final 250 M.
Given reminders early and took up running turning into stable bend. Led until headed 600 M out. Weakened. (Demoted.)
Settled behind leader. Improved to lead 600 M out. Kicked some 2Ls clear 300 M out. Hung on well closing stages. (Promoted.)
Slowly away. Remained in rear until making steady progress inside final 400 M.
Reared at start, losing considerable ground. Trailed the field throughout.
Niggled along behind midfield. Made good progress in straight to be nearest at finish but unable to peg back quinella pair.
Settled behind midfield. Inconvenienced 800 M out. Made ground steadily in straight without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly. Pushed along early to be midfield. Effort around home bend to dispute 3rd turning in. Failed to make further progress and soon dropped out.
Settled in midfield. Gave ground early in straight and then eased down. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away. Given reminders early to be midfield. Took closer order far side. Failed to respond in straight. (Demoted.)
Midfield or behind. Made ground along rail to be 2Ls off pace into straight. Kept on until one-paced close home.
Trailed the field most of the way.
Pushed along to lead. Kept on well but headed approaching 200 M. Lost 2nd near finish.
Pushed along early to be in touch. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Took closer order turning in. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never far off. Progressed along rail to be 1/2L behind leader entering straight. Kept on well to hold some chance before finding no extra final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Towards rear. Made progress on outside rounding home bend and was widest turning in. Kept on under pressure early straight. Made no impression final 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind leader. Quickened to hit front approaching 200 M. Held on well but was just caught final stride.
Niggled along early in midfield. Dropped towards rear approaching home bend.
Soon towards rear.
Checked at start. Remained in rear until making up some ground final turn. No further progress when finding not much room in straight.
Settled in rear. Made ground along rail upon straightening. Ran on well closing stages to just get up at finish.
Raced keenly early stages and was in forward of midfield. Wide turning in. Ran on final 250 M.
Soon behind midfield. One-paced in straight.
Jumped very awkwardly, remained at rear until making up some ground in straight.
Held 3rd until weakening out of contention upon straightening. (Demoted.)
Always prominent, was 2Ls 3rd final turn. Ran on steadily to take over 200 M and never threatened thereafter.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield early, advanced to 2nd approaching 1000 M. Failed to hold place final 250 M.
In touch early, dropped to midfield or behind from 1000 M. No improvement. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never in contention.
Midfield. Crept closer order rounding home turn. Kept on.
Towards rear. Kept on well 400 M until one-paced closing stages.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to reach 2nd briefly inside 100 M. Effort not sustained.
Better than midfield. Progressed to 4th 450 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Became unbalanced early straight. Made up good ground final 250 M without threatening the winner.
Led field to 200 M. Weakened. (Demoted.)
Tardy start. Never a factor.
Settled just behind midfield. Failed to quicken to challenge in straight.
Held up towards rear. Came under pressure entering straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Never far off. Quickened well inside final 300 M to grab victory closing stages.
Held up in 2nd just behind leader. Kept on before finding no extra close home.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and worn down inside final 200 M.
Held up in midfield in bunched field. Made up some late ground closing stages doing best work at finish.
Always at the back. Inconvenienced early in straight.
Prominent until fading passing 300 M.
Settled in rear. Drifted out wide early in straight. Made good progress along grandstand rails to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or behind. One-paced.
Slowly away, last to 600 M. Ran on from outside to make up some ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or behind. Ridden along to become 4th final turn. Ran on well to assert authority closing stages.
In touch to home turn. Weakened.
Led field to closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear on outside. Made good progress rounding home bend to become midfield final turn. Made no show in straight.
Settled 5th. Made steady progress rounding home bend to be 3rd upon straightening. Quickened up final 200 M to achieve 2nd closing stages.
Prominent, 2nd from 850 M. Found no extra passing 200 M.
Around midfield before progressing to 5th 650 M. Weakened 300 M.
Better than midfield. Kept on in straight.
Towards rear. Advanced to midfield on inside turning in. One-paced.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from 800 M. Tailed off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Heart Irregularity.)
Jumped awkwardly. Remained in rear until making up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Knuckled and almost fell at start, losing considerable ground. Remained at the back and very wide turning into straight. Ran past a few well beaten runners.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out quickly. (Demoted.)
Led field to straight. Gave ground quickly.
Did not jump smoothly. In rear of main bunch when slightly inconvenienced on stable bend. Remained in similar position and kept on one pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Gradually dropped to last position far side. Remained at tail-end turning into straight. Ran past a few well beaten horses.
Tracked leader. Took over upon straightening before headed 250 M out. Found no extra closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Hampered and lost some ground about 800 M. Made moderate progress in straight until finding no extra closing stages. (Demoted.)
Forward of midfield. Made some progress holding some chance early in straight. Kept on closing stages.
Settled in rear. Took closer order approaching home bend. Kept on early in straight. Found no extra final 200 M.
Raced wide throughout. Settled in midfield far side. Came under pressure rounding home bend but soon dropped out. (Bled.)
Settled in just behind midfield. Made ground steadily without threatening in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Came under pressure turning in. Quickened to challenge throughout home straight but failed to peg back winner.
Raced wide rounding stable bend from outside draw. Settled in 3L 4th far side. Took closer order rounding home bend. Quickened to hit front 250 M out. Hung on well under pressure.
Well back, ridden along home turn then ran on.
Behind midfield, improved final 300 M.
Forward midfield, in touch turning in, weakened over 200 M out.
Midfield or better, caught several wide, found nothing home straight.
Sent along early to be midfield, attempted to improve along inner home turn, weakened over 200 M out.
Never a factor.
Led, kept on when challenged and then headed closing stages.
Forward midfield, kept on.
Midfield and outside of field, ran on home straight.
Tracked leader, ran on home straight to hit front closing stages.
Poor start, recovered to be close to midfield, unbalanced 800 M and lost position, never likely thereafter. (Demoted.)
Very slowly away, recovered to be behind midfield, under whip home turn and beaten far from home.
Prominent, attempted to challenge leader home turn, came under pressure, no response.
Never better than midfield.
Led until about the 200 M when unable to hold off the placegetters.
Followed the leaders. On straightening joined lead. Kept on one-paced.
Near rear throughout.
In front of midfield. Remained on inner and saved ground on home turn. Kept on early in straight then one-paced last bit.
Midfield. Gained nice run through the field after straightening to issue challenge after the 200 M. Just failed to hold second placing.
Outside leader. Gave ground from 500 M.
In front of midfield. Taken into clear shortly after straightening. Responded to hold some chance at 200 M. Kept on one-paced afterwards.
Prominent. Commenced to give ground shortly after straightening.
At rear and detached from field. Commenced to make ground from 500 M. Was widest turning in and continued to make ground in the run to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Hung in throughout. Kept on one-paced and was not ridden right to line when awkward on heels.
Taken back to behind midfield from widest draw. Was free early. Didn't quicken when asked to improve after straightening.
In front of midfield and wide. Made sustained run in straight to reach lead in concluding stages.
Behind midfield. Responded fairly after straightening and continued to make ground in the run to the line.
Behind midfield and wide. Improved gradually from the 600 M to be midfield turning in. Responded well in straight to just fail.
Towards rear. Moved a bit closer on home bend. Kept on one-paced in straight. (Bled.)
Tardy start, pushed along to be behind leader at 700 M. Weakened from 250 M.
Began well, hard ridden and prominent early. Dropped steadily to midfield at 700 M. Dropped out from straightening.
Slowly away, well back. Never in contention.
Midfield early. Dropped steadily to the back at 900 M. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slightly better than midfield. Crept closer on straightening. Kept on until no extra close home.
Began well from wide draw, ridden to take narrow lead and made all. (Finished 1st, placed 2nd.)
Prominent to 700 M. Dropped out steadily from home turn. (Demoted.)
Niggled along in midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M. Hung out on home bend and in the straight.
Niggled along in behind midfield. Made up a little ground turning for home. One-paced in straight.
Always prominent, checked and lost position near 700 M. Ran on again in straight, just failed. (Finished 2nd, placed 1st). (Promoted.)
Ridden along early to be better than midfield. Ran on steadily after straightening. Kept on well.
Jumped well from widest draw, well there early. Dropped steadily to midfield at 800 M. No further progress in straight. Wide throughout.
Ridden along to be 3rd. Lost position along rail after turning in. One-paced final 200 M.
Near rear, was last turning in. Made up good ground from outside final 250 M until one-paced when slightly inconvenienced close home.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Soon last. Made ground along rail 400 M before being checked approaching 200 M where he dropped back. Held on final 100 M.
In touch to 400 M out. Weakened. (Demoted.)
Soon led and maintained 2Ls advantage early straight. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Pushed along from widest draw to become 2nd from 1000 M. Kept on until failing to hold place inside 300 M.
Mostly 5th. Quickened up from 400 M, taking lead approaching 200 M. Kept on but unable to withhold winner final 100 M.
Ridden along to be better than midfield. Became over-raced and unbalanced passing 1200 M. Dropped to behind midfield early straight. Kept on closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear until running on under pressure final 250 M.
Midfield. Responded well soon after straightening. Ran on to take control inside final 100 M.
Towards rear. Kept on early straight until fading out of contention inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made good progress rounding home bend to be 4-wide 5th turning in. Kept on well final 200 M, never nearer.
Amongst leaders. Gradually faded closing stages.
With leaders. Unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Never better than midfield. Made some late impression closing stages.
Always well there. Hit front closing stages but pipped at post.
Always in last few.
Always in rear.
Began awkwardly. Soon improved to better than midfield ridden along. Ran on steadily closing stages without threatening.
Settled at the back. Ran on well inside final 400 M to just get up on line.
With leaders early. Dropped to midfield onto course proper. Lost further ground afterwards.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily.
Held slender lead until narrowly headed closing stages, but kept on well under pressure.
Never a factor.
Soon dropped last few.
Always in rear.
Held 2nd to final turn. Was still prominent until finding no extra 200 M out.
Midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
Better than midfield. Sustained effort final 400 M to take lead 200 M. Held on well to the line.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
Better than midfield, improved to 4th 800 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
In touch. Weakened from 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden along to become 3rd from 1400 M. Further improved to 2nd final turn. Ran on steadily to hit front briefly approaching 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Slowly away, last to final turn. Ran on strongly in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Dropped out 200 M out.
Soon led. Headed approaching 200 M. Found no extra.
Jumped awkwardly, near rear. Widest home turn when inclined to lay out. Responded well to make up good ground in straight.
Jumped very awkwardly. Soon recovered to midfield. Lost some ground 800 M out. Dropped out of contention home turn.
Restrained in first few far side, joining leader home bend. Kept on before finding no extra passing 200 M.
Always prominent. Not much room on rails early in straight. Ran on to hold every chance closing stages but winner too strong.
Settled just behind midfield. Made swift headway on outside home bend, joining leaders into straight. One-paced.
Began well. Settled at the back. Commenced run rounding home bend and made significant progress down centre of straight to snatch victory close home. Wide throughout.
Held up in midfield or better. 5th turning for home but soon faded.
Attempted to make all but failed to sustain effort under strong pressure and caught final strides.
Slowly away. Remained well back until producing good late impression closing stages.
Well back to straight. Made up good late ground to be nearest at finish.
Began well. Taken back to midfield before home bend. One-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
Settled just behind midfield. Took closer order on outside home bend. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Prominent far side. Held up and settled just behind midfield approaching home bend. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Restrained towards rear far side. Made short-lived effort early in straight.
Jumped very awkwardly and dropped to rear. After recovered to midfield, was hampered coming out of back straight and lost ground. In last few turning for home and made no show thereafter.
Followed leader, every chance turning in, led briefly, headed 200 M and no extra.
Behind midfield, niggled along far out, made progress under whip home straight.
Around midfield, some improvement along inner home turn, weakened 200 M out.
Rear early, improved to midfield 600 M, no extra final 200 M.
Around midfield and never likely.
Led to 300 M, then dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well back early, improved towards midfield, kept on home straight.
In touch, ran on inside 400 M, led 200 M and kept on.
Taken back from wide draw, plenty to do turning in, inconvenienced twice when making modest improvement home straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never a factor.
Tardy start, behind midfield, steady progress home straight.
Forward midfield, upsides winner turning in, no extra home straight.
Always prominent, every chance turning in, ran on home straight, but unable to contain winner.
Taken back to rear. Made some ground after 500 M. Widest turning in. Gave ground shortly afterwards.
Around midfield. Made some ground early in straight. One paced final 200 M.
Led until 200 M. Kept on well.
Behind midfield and 4 wide. Commenced to make ground after 500 M. Continued to make ground early in straight. One paced last bit.
At rear. Commenced to improve wide on track at 500 M. Made home turn wide. Responded well in straight. (Promoted.)
Followed leader. Taken into clear on straightening. Reached lead at 200 M. Went on to score comfortably. (Promoted.)
Behind midfield. No response when asked for effort after straightening. Eased down concluding stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Commenced to make ground after straightening then checked when disappointed for run at about 200 M. Doing best work at finish.
Midfield and 3-wide. Asked for effort after straightening and responded fairly without ever threatening.
Slow to begin. Remained near rear into home straight. No response afterwards. (Demoted.)
Began well and raced outside leader until giving ground shortly after entering home straight.
In front of midfield. Under pressure to hold position at 500 M. Renewed effort after straightening. Kept on well last bit.
Prominent and 3 wide. Moved closer on home bend. Gave ground final 300 M.
Midfield. Unable to hold position at 700 M. Made ground again approaching home turn. Had difficulty obtaining clear run in straight. Kept on fairly when clear.
Well there. Took lead from course proper. Kept on until headed final 100 M and weakened badly thereafter.
Well there to 300 M. Unable to quicken and kept on one-paced.
Towards rear. Awkwardly placed for some distance 300 M out. Made a little late impression.
Thereabout to 300 M. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Mostly midfield or better. Weakened final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon midfield or behind. Ran on without threatening placed horses final 300 M.
Mainly towards rear. Ran on final 300 M until not quickened close home.
At back. Shifted out to the outside 450 M and finished strongly from last position to win comfortably. (Promoted.)
Never far off. Ran on steadily final 400 M to just miss 2nd place.
Mostly in touch. Ran on well final 400 M and held narrow advantage 100 M out before being outsprinted by the winner close home. (Hung out throughout.)
Mostly towards rear. Last from 300 M and never a factor. (Demoted.)
Jumped awkwardly. Mostly midfield or behind. Made up some ground closing stages.
Checked at start. Soon recovered to be in midfield or better. Kept on final 400 M until weakened close home.
Soon led despite knuckling at the start. Headed at course proper. Remained in touch until no extra final 150 M. (Demoted.)
Jumped best from widest draw, led or disputed lead to 250 M. Weakened gradually final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Quickened well from 300 M to hit the front inside final 100 M. Won going away.
Better than midfield throughout. One-paced in home straight.
Settled towards rear. Made no progress in straight.
Behind midfield throughout. Unable to quicken in straight. (Lame.)
Jumped awkwardly, ridden to dispute lead. Sat behind leader from 900 M to 300 M. Dropped out from 200 M.
Prominent to 600 M. Midfield into straight. Weakened steadily final 300 M.
Began awkwardly. Towards rear early. Steadily improved to midfield at 1400 M. Ran on well from 300 M to hold every chance 150 M out. Kept on well when overhauled by the winner closing stages.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Close up. Ran on after straightening to hold some chance 200 M out. No extra final 100 M. Kept on one-paced.
Knuckled at the start, well back. Made up a little ground final 300 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily from 300 M. Kept on quite well.
Prominent until fading out of contention final 250 M.
Soon towards rear. Made up ground final 250 M. Never nearer.

Broke best. Raced keenly in front before restrained to outside leader approaching 1000 M. Improved to dispute lead after straightening. Steadied when finding no extra inside 200 M. Gave ground thereafter.
Did not stride out just after start, losing considerable ground. Remained at the back throughout.
Soon towards rear despite niggled along early. Made some short-lived effort rounding home bend. Dropped out badly over final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Never better than midfield. Made some short-lived effort early in straight.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M to hit front over 100 M out. Held on. (Promoted.)
Pushed along to muster pace early. Took up running approaching 1000 M. Challenged early in straight. Kept on till headed closing stages.
Slowly away. Settled in rear. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Gradually moved up along rails to prominent position. Failed to quicken under pressure early in straight. Gave ground over final 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on final 250 M without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly. Always at the back.
Midfield, racing keenly far side. Made short-lived progress final 250 M before failing to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled in better than midfield. Hampered and lost ground approaching 800 M. Checked when crowded 300 M out. Made good progress final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Towards rear rounding home bend. Made up a little ground 200 M.
In touch early. Taken back to midfield when racing keenly far side. Dropped towards rear approaching home bend. Made no show when hanging out in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Steadied when crowded turning in. Made no progress in straight.
Never a factor.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M.
Towards rear early. Pushed along the rail to soon be midfield. Remained there until giving ground final 250 M.
Pushed along early to be in touch. Weakened final 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly and checked shortly after start. Remained in rear until making progress on outside rounding home bend to be better than midfield turning in. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
Mainly better than midfield until finding no extra final 200 M.
Soon led and never headed. Won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Prominent early, then raced 2nd from 1100 M. Kept on early straight until finding no extra final 200 M.
Taken back to behind midfield when racing keenly early stages. Moved up rounding home bend to be 2L 3rd turning in. Kept on well without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there early. Gradually settled in midfield. Made moderate progress final 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Clipped heels and stumbled shortly after start. Remained at the back to straight. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Slightly impeded early straight. Kept on final 200 M.
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Raced towards rear. Taken into widest final turn. Ran on well to snatch victory near finish.
Soon led. Kept on when headed upon straightening.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order passing 400 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Jumped well and was prominent. Was wide in midfield final turn. No further progress.
In touch before dropping back to midfield home bend. Not a factor in straight.
In touch to 500 M. Hung out and weakened steadily.
Behind midfield. Moved to the inner home bend and improved to 5th early straight. Soon found no extra. (Bled.)
Slowly away. Never in contention.
In touch. Unbalanced around 600 M. Dropped back steadily. (Demoted.)
Midfield early. Pushed forward to become prominent rounding home bend. Took lead passing 200 M. Held on but was just caught close home.
In touch. Came to tackle leader home turn. Gained slender advantage early straight. One-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Checked final turn. Made up a little late ground final 250 M.
Settled in 4th in midfield. Commenced run entering home straight and ran on steadily to hold every chance throughout closing stages.
Made running. Came under pressure to keep position rounding home bend. Narrowly headed into straight but fought on doggedly to the line.
Around midfield. Ridden along when crowded and unbalanced 400 M out. Found nil in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tracked leader. Commenced move rounding home bend gaining slender advantage into straight. Just headed closing stages despite keeping on well.
Settled in rear of midfield mostly in 6th. Came under pressure rounding home bend and ran on from joint last into straight. Never troubled leaders.
Settled in 3rd never far off. Baulked for a stride early in straight then kept on steadily to the line.
Settled at the back. Made steady headway from Rock and ran on well down straight to hit front close home only to be caught final stride.
Settled in rear. Made significant progress inside final 250 M to just get up on line.
Missed the start. Raced behind midfield when impeded 1300 M. Remained in similar position throughout.
Midfield. Checked 1300 M. Crept closer order on inside turning in. Kept on well.
Better than midfield. Shifted in to the rail 1300 M. Ran on under pressure final 200 M without threatening.
Midfield to 1100 M. Dropped back steadily.
Mostly 4th to home turn. Ran on steadily in straight.
Rear. Improved from outside passing 600 M to be 8th early straight. No further progress.
Behind midfield. Improved on outside rounding home bend. Made ground steadily in straight.
Near rear. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Slowly away. Always at rear.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a little far side. Made no show in straight.
Led, still maintaining 1L advantage turning in. Found no extra when headed 200 M out.
In touch. Came to tackle leader final turn. Sustained effort to take control 200 M. Held on well.
Prominent. Sat outside leader from 1100 M. Unable to hold place on straightening.
Settled in rear of midfield. Steadied when crowded after straightening. Obtained clear run only inside final 200 M but just kept on to the line.
Soon in rear. Trailed field most of way.
Settled in mid-division. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight but unable to peg back winner.
Better than midfield. Kept on one pace closing stages.
Settled behind leader. Quickened to lead rounding home bend. kept on until headed 100 M out. No extra.
Pushed along early from widest draw to take up running turning into stable bend. Led until headed on home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Jumped very awkwardly. Towards rear throughout.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced keenly towards rear early. Dropped further back far side. Remained in rear until running past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Led early. Settled behind leaders in 3rd coming out of stable bend. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Kept on till finding no extra closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Widest runner turning into straight. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slow to begin. Settled in rear of midfield. Made moderate progress rounding home bend. Kept on well in straight.
Settled in forward midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 2L 3rd entering straight. Sustained effort to take charge 100 M out. (Promoted.)
Settled towards rear. Produced some short-lived effort final 250 M. Made no impression closing stages.
Soon in rear. Niggled along. Made ground on inside rounding home bend to be midfield upon straightening. Making progress when severely checked approaching 200 M. Not ridden out thereafter.
Never a factor. (Bled.)
Midfield or worse.
Forward midfield, improved along inner turning in, cramped on rail inside 200 M, then kept on.
Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.) (Sore.)
Behind midfield, some improvement from 600 M, kept on final 200 M.
At rear, switched out turning in and ran on strongly home straight.
Behind midfield, improved from 600 M, ran on well home straight to hit front inside 100 M. (Promoted.)
Soon led, headed top of home straight, then weakened.
Behind midfield, always towards outer, no extra home straight.
Well placed but niggled along 400 M out, soon beaten. (See Racing Incidents.)
Forward midfield, improved 600 M to dispute lead turning in, went ahead and only beaten closing stages.
Towards rear and under pressure far out.
Forward midfield, progress from 600 M, attempted to improve around horses turning in, no extra home straight.
Tracked leader, every chance turning in, no extra home straight.
Began awkwardly and was free in front of midfield. Lost ground when checked on straightening. Kept on one-paced.
Led until giving ground quickly final 250 M.
Midfield. Improved from 600 M, wide turning in. Made continual ground in run to line without ever looking likely.
At rear. Improved gradually from 600 M but remained behind midfield turning in. Made good ground in straight but unable to reach winner.
From wide barrier raced wide near the rear throughout.
Midfield early. Dropped to rear at 900 M. Stayed towards inner on home turn. Had difficulty finding clear running early in straight. Doing best work at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield and wide. Widest turning in then made strong run and continued to make ground in run to the line.
In front of midfield. Remained prominent into straight. Kept on well without threatening.
Midfield and wide. Swept to the lead after straightening following improvement from the 600 M. Unable to hold off placegetters final 150 M.
Near rear. Improved after 700 M to be midfield turning in. Sprinted quickly after straightening to reach lead after 200 M and held on well. (Promoted.)
Followed leader. Ridden to hold position after 600 M. Prominent into straight. Gave ground quickly final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Remained on inner and saved ground on home turn. Was crowded early in the straight then finished well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind lead. No more when asked for effort at 400 M.
Behind lead and 3-wide. Prominent into straight and gave ground shortly afterwards. (Demoted.)
Always prominent. Kept on one-paced final 200 M.
Soon sat outside leader from wide draw. Held some chance 200 M out. Weakened steadily closing stages.
Ridden early to be slightly better than midfield. Steady progress from 800 M, was prominent entering straight. Kept on one-paced until weakened close home.
Handy to the Rock. Soon under pressure and steadily dropped out of contention.
Ridden to lead. Held narrow advantage to straightening. Headed at 200 M, steadily weakened.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, well back. Improved a little turning in. Steadied at 200 M, then made up some late ground.
Midfield to straightening. Made ground gradually final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Closer order on home turn. Quickened well from 200 M to hit front 100 M out. Just held on. (Promoted.)
Tardy start, well back. Made some turn awkwardly and shifted out. Never in contention.
Behind midfield. Switched out to the clear at 200 M and made up good ground, doing best work at finish.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Moved closer rounding home bend. Ran on steadily final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Began very awkwardly, then over-raced early, dropping to last. Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly and shifted out abruptly to be among the rear group. Made some progress from 500 M to join 4th 300 M. No extra.
Prominent to 600 M. Dropped back steadily.
Midfield early. Weakened from halfway.
Always well there. Ran on but just failing to catch the quinella pair.
