Stumbled at start, tailed off from 600 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was behind the main bunch early stages. Improved steadily to 4th 500 M but soon out-paced by the front group.
Soon led and was joined 400 M out. Held on well to just maintain a slender advantage at finish.
Raced 6th or 7th before making up some ground final 300 M.
In touch. Quickened up to join the leader passing the course proper. Kept on well to miss narrowly.
Towards rear early. Gained midfield into straight. Improving when disappointed for a run and checked 100 M out. Quickly renewed effort and ran on late.
Began well. Gradually crossed from widest draw and soon took up running. Shifted out turning in and led until headed passing 200 M. Kept on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well. Held up in forward of midfield. Quickened well over 200 M out to grab lead close home. Just defied runner-up's late challenge.

Ridden and brief lead early. Just behind leader when hampered and lost position passing 1200 M. Renewed effort entering home straight and gained upper hand passing 200 M but caught near finish. (See Racing Incidents.) (Bled.)
Never in contention. (Demoted.)
Mainly in midfield to straight. Made steady headway early on before quickening well to be nearest at finish.
In rear. Over-raced before hampered approaching home bend. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Gradually improved to be 2nd outside leader home bend. Still prominent upon straightening but soon weakened under pressure.
Sluggish at start. Improved towards rear when severely checked approaching home bend. Made no impression thereafter.
Around midfield far side. Made steady headway rounding home bend to be close up into straight. Improved early on before finding no extra closing stages. (Demoted.)
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Wide throughout. Midfield to straight, then dropped out.
Led field from 1200 M. Looked like winner early straight. Unable to contain the winner final 100 M.
Towards rear. Moved up gradually to be 4th 1000 M out. Became unbalanced passing 800 M. Maintained position until weakening at 300 M.
Mainly 11th before making up good ground from outside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Rear. Moved to inside rounding home bend. Ran on along rail in straight to be 3rd approaching 200 M. One-paced.
At rear throughout.
In touch. Dropped to midfield when being checked 850 M. Weakened soon after straightening. (Demoted.)
Held 3rd till failing to hold place 250 M out.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Ran on well in straight to take control final 100 M. (Promoted.)
Towards rear. Soon moved up to be just behind midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Mostly midfield. Ran on a bit early straight but found no extra closing stages. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Jumped awkwardly, pushed along at rear, improving to 5th 900 M. Remained there until fading out of contention soon after straightening.
Near rear, 2nd last final turn. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Held prominent 2nd to early straight. Unable to quicken. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Dropped back steadily in straight.
Prominent to halfway. Dropped out upon straightening.
Prominent to halfway. Gave ground from home bend.
Never better than midfield.
Niggled along far side improving to close up position home bend. Responded well to hit front passing 200 M and soon went clear.
Ridden in front in centre of back straight. Settled just behind leader rounding home bend. Gradually faded under pressure in straight.
Well there. Took lead coming out of back straight. Headed inside 200 M and plugged on for 3rd.
Around midfield. Gained remote 4th into straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
In rear to straight. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Kept on one pace in straight.
Settled at the back. Ran on down straight doing best work at finish.
Very wide throughout. Midfield before losing position into straight. Found nothing.
Very wide throughout. Midfield before weakening into straight.
Prominent in 4th. Gradually weakened rounding home bend.
Well back. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Mostly midfield or better. Hung out 800 M and dropped towards rear. Never a threat in straight.
Soon outpaced to the rear. Never a threat in straight.
Soon outpaced towards rear. Improved 500 M out to be in midfield turning in. Ran on well and was doing best work when nearest at finish.
Jumped best from wide draw and soon travelling kindly in 3rd place. Kept on in straight but effort not sustained final 100 M.
Behind midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Always in touch. Improved from 900 M to join leader 700 M out. Kept on without threatening placed horses in straight. (Bled.)
At rear. Went wide turning in. Never a factor in straight.
In touch. Dropped back to midfield from 700 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Mostly better than midfield. Kept on until no extra final 200 M.
Midfield or better. Ran on well upon straightening to take charge inside 100 M. Held on.
At rear. Made up some late ground.
Led or disputed lead to straight. Kept on well in straight but was outsprinted by the first pair final 100 M. (Lame.)
At rear. Never in the hunt.
Jumped awkwardly and soon last. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening and had to be steadied when making ground.
Checked at start. Midfield into home straight and no impression afterwards.
Prominent. Asked for effort at 600 M. Kept on one paced.
With rear early. Improved along inner to be in front of midfield turning in. Responded well in straight.
2nd until taking lead at 400 M. Responded well and held on to score solid win.
Behind midfield. Drifted back to rear at 1000 M and remained same when waited with into home straight. Ran on very strongly despite having difficulty finding clear running. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield throughout.
Began well. Midfield early. Dropped to near rear 1000 M. Dropped out after straightening.
Near rear from wide barrier. Wide turning in. Only slight improvement after being awkwardly placed early in straight.
Prominent. Three wide outside lead turning in. Kept on one paced. (Demoted.)
Prominent. Did not quicken after 500 M.
Wide in midfield. Remained same into home straight. Made gradual ground under hard riding.
Ridden to be in front of midfield. Improved wide on track from 700 M. Prominent turning in and kept on one paced.
Led. Joined at 400 M then kept on until giving ground final 200 M.
Behind midfield and wide throughout.
Prominent. Sat outside leader from 1600 M. Faded from 250 M.
Midfield early. Pulled hard to be prominent at 1500 M. With leaders turning in, steadily weakened final 200 M.
Soon over-raced and moved up to be handy. Dropped to midfield at 1400 M, dropped further to last at 600 M. Ran on quite well final 300 M to claim 3rd closing stages.
Settled at rear. Switched out on straightening. Quickened well to take charge 200 M out, won comfortably.
Slowly away, recovered to behind midfield on stable bend. Made up some ground final 300 M, one-paced close home.
Midfield or behind. Closer order on home turn to hold every chance 300 M out. No extra and kept on one-paced.
Prominent early, gradually dropped behind midfield. Ran on well from 300 M, no match with the winner.
Pushed along to lead briefly. Remained prominent to 350 M. Kept on one-paced.
Towards rear early. Gradually moved up to the lead approaching stable bend. Narrow lead to straightening. Headed at 300 M, steadily weakened.
Well back. Made up some ground final 200 M.
At the rear throughout, never seen with a chance. Struck running rail at 800 M.
Soon moved across from wide draw to settle towards rear. Ran on well final 400 M and took lead in the closing stages. Held on well to the line.
Jumped very awkwardly and soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Made up some ground in the home straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent in 2nd or 3rd place. Unable to quicken and kept on one-paced in straight.
Ridden forward to lead. Kept on well in straight but was swamped for a place in the closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and then ridden forward to be in touch from 1200 M. Dropped back to forward of midfield from 1000 M. Ran on in straight until crowded 200 M out. Never recovered.
Missed the start badly and remained at back. Shifted out upon straightening and made up good ground.
Mostly midfield. Ran on steadily in straight but had to be steadied in the closing stages.
Under restraint early to settle at rear. Responded well 350 M out to be nearest at finish.
Mostly midfield or behind. Kept on one-paced in straight and had to be steadied close home.
Mainly forward of midfield. Ran on well in straight but was unable to match speed with the first pair close home.
Travelled kindly in 2nd or 3rd place. Soon weakened and dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Jumped well and soon settled in midfield or worse. Not a factor in straight.

Raced keenly early stages. Taken back to rear of midfield approaching home bend. Wide turning in. Made up good ground final 300 M to hit front 100 M out. Failed to hold off placegetters' late challenges.
Slowly away. Soon moved up and settled some 2Ls off pace. Shifted off rails to obtain clear run early in straight. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Jumped well from widest draw. Gradually settled in better than midfield. Ran on well final 250 M to hold every chance closing stages.
Settled in rear. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Jostled on jumping from wide draw. Midfield early. Quickly moved up on outside to prominent position passing 1200 M. Weakened badly upon straightening.
Tracked leader. Hit front 300 M out. Kept on one pace when overhauled inside 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Making ground when disappointed for a run and steadied over 200 M out. Shifted out into the clear and ran on late.
Sluggish at start. Remained at tail-end to straight. Made up considerable ground on outside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Ran on steadily final 300 M. Battled on gamely closing stages to get up final strides. (Promoted.)
Gradually moved up on rails to be midfield passing 1200 M despite slightly crowded 1400 M out. Saved ground on inside turning in. Ran on well final 200 M to just miss.
Led until headed 300 M out. Dropped out quickly.
Behind midfield early. Hampered and dropped towards rear after 1400 M. Pushed along in rear before making up good ground inside 200 M, doing best work at finish.
Raced keenly in midfield early. Steadied after 1400 M. Remained in midfield to straight. One-paced.
Settled behind midfield. Crowded for room momentarily on rails near 200 M when improving. Found no extra closing stages.
Slowly away, last to 450 M. Ran on well from a widest position to be 2nd 100 M. Unable to catch the winner. (See Racing Incidents.) (Promoted.)
Midfield or behind. Improved to 5th rounding home bend. Shifted to inside early straight and found no clear run 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon led and was prominent when headed passing 800 M. Held good chance early straight, faded final 150 M.
Prominent. Joined the lead turning in. Weakened final 200 M.
Around midfield. Hampered at 600 M and checked around 500 M, soon dropping to the last. Held up on the rail about 200 M when trying to make ground. Run ignored.
Towards rear. Wide into straight. Sustained effort to take control passing 200 M. Held on well.
Prominent early, soon in midfield and raced ungenerously. Made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled midfield early. Crept closer order 800 M out. Kept on without quickening.
Well there. Led field passing 800 M to early straight. Still in prominent position until finding no extra closing stages.
Rear early improving to midfield far side. Found nothing in straight. (Bled.)
Rear early. Soon improved to midfield. Took closer order home bend and ran on from close-up 4th into straight to hit front closing stages. Just held on.
Soon in rear. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Prominent early. Dropped back to last few approaching 800 M. Recovered good late ground inside final 200 M.
Began well settling in midfield. Ran on steadily inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Held up in prominent position early. Lost position and dropped to 5th home bend. Kept on one pace in straight.
Niggled along towards rear in centre of back straight. Made swift progress around Rock to be prominent. Gained slender lead briefly early in straight before headed 200 M out.
Just worse than midfield when checked and lost ground about 800 M out. Made no impression thereafter.
Began well and led early, then settled just behind pace from 800 M to straight. Ran on steadily on rails to hold every chance but just failed to peg back winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Took over and crossed to rail passing 800 M. Went off rails home turn and headed before checked 200 M out.
Slowly away, remained rear to straight. Made up some ground from outside final 250 M.
Jumped well to take lead until 900 M where he stayed in a prominent position. Kept on under pressure until one-paced closing stages.
Middle and wide without cover. Kept on but unable to quicken.
Pushed along from widest draw to soon be 2nd. Took lead passing 800 M. Held narrow advantage until headed closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Weakened final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly. Never a factor.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on well under pressure final 200 M.
Never far off. Ran on well final 200 M to just miss narrowly.
Held 4th before improving from 1200 M to take brief lead entering back straight. Remained in prominent position but unable to withhold the placegetters inside 200 M.
Behind midfield throughout.
Always thereabouts. Ran on early straight but unable to quicken 100 M out.
Lost a lot of ground at start, towards rear throughout.
Stumbled at start. Made no show.
Midfield or behind. Sustained effort in straight to take lead closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Made good progress approaching Rock to be better than midfield 500 M out. Ran on steadily in straight to just get up at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Steadied after 600 M, losing position. Gained ground on inside turning in. One-paced.
Pushed along early to dispute lead. Settled just behind leader coming out of stable bend. Took up running approaching Rock. Led until headed 200 M out. Weakened.
Never far off. Settled some 3Ls off pace far side. Made good progress rounding home bend to be 2nd entering straight. Hit front 200 M out. Kept on but headed closing stages.
Prominent early. Gradually dropped to midfield turning into back straight. Gave further ground towards rear approaching home bend. Stayed on in straight.
Prominent. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Gave ground final 300 M. (Demoted.)
Always at the back.
Settled behind midfield. Made up some ground in straight. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Checked near 600 M, losing some 2Ls. Remained around midfield before running on without threatening final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Always in last few.
Given reminders early. Towards rear before making moderate progress rounding home bend. Ran on final 200 M.
Pushed along early to share lead. Took up running turning into back straight. Headed approaching Rock, then dropped out quickly.
Hard ridden throughout in prominent position. Gained upper hand 100 M out. Just pipped on line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear throughout.
Soon led and never headed.
Around midfield, beaten 600 M out.
Mostly midfield or better, in touch turning in, kept on.
Behind midfield, hung out and never likely.
Prominent early, awkward and unbalanced and beaten far out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always prominent.
Prominent, weakened 300 M out. (Demoted.)
Tardy start and behind midfield, plenty to turning, then one-paced.
Slow away, hung out from 600 M and never likely.
Around midfield, beaten 400 M out.
Around midfield, some improvement final 200 M.
Dropped back from wide draw, modest improvement final 300 M.
Prominent. Asked for effort after straightening and responded fairly. Continued to make gradual ground over concluding stages.
Led after being wide on 1st turn. Headed at 250 M. Kept on well to hold placing.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Improved to midfield by 900 M. Remained around same with making some ground late.
In front of midfield. Found no extra after the 300 M.
Bound in air at start and lost ground. Improved to around midfield until making ground wide on track after 400 M. Continued to make gradual ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Near rear and wide throughout after being slow to begin. Hung out throughout.
Prominent early. Didn't show enough speed to hold position and dropped to midfield by 1000 M and near rear by 600 M. Made some impression in straight.
Followed leader. Kept on early in straight then found no more final 200 M. (Demoted.)
In front of midfield. Gave ground quickly after 600 M.
Behind lead. Improved gradually after straightening to reach lead at 250 M. Went to score well. (Promoted.)
At rear until improving from 500 M. Made good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Ridden to be in front of midfield. Kept on well until having difficulty finding clear running the last bit. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always well there. Kept on one-paced without threatening the first pair.
Began awkwardly, trailed the field throughout.
Prominent. Took lead at 1000 M, headed at 200 M. Kept on one-paced, weakened close home.
Mainly midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Ridden to lead early. Headed and sat behind leader at 1000 M. Weakened from 400 M.
Stood flat-footed at the start, losing a lot of ground, never in the race.
Began awkwardly, settled towards rear. Became unbalanced when crowded at 400 M. No improvement in the straight.
Well back from wide draw. Taken wide on home turn, made up a little late ground.
Midfield throughout. Failed to quicken in straight.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made up some late ground when inclined to shift out in the straight.
Soon dropped to last of main group. Made up a little ground in home straight.
Slowly away, recovered to be behind midfield from 1400 M. Steady progress from Rock, struck rail and became unbalanced at 600 M. Ran on final 200 M but was held by the winner.
Niggled along to be always handy. Hit the front 200 M out. Kept on well.
Pushed along from a wide draw to take lead at about 900 M. Held on until headed 100 M out. Found no extra.
Checked at start, rear to straight. Made up good ground final 200 M, never nearer.
Well there early, soon remained better than midfield. Was steadied 300 M before running on well final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Inconvenienced at about 800 M and final turn, obliged to travel wider. Ran on while hanging in 300 M. Just got up in a ding-dong battle closing stages. (To Class 3.)
Midfield. Progressed to 4th rounding home bend. Lost position while hanging out final turn. Renewed effort early straight but was giving ground when severely checked at 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, never seen with a chance.
Rear early, soon moved up to midfield. Dropped back steadily from 800 M.
Never far off. Improved from 4th early straight to dispute lead with the winner 100 M out. Just beaten narrowly.
Inconvenienced soon after start, travelled just behind midfield. Crept closer order turning in but was soon one-paced.
Towards rear soon after start.
Prominent. Dropped out of contention 300 M out.
Held narrow lead to 900 M. Remained prominent until failing to hold place 250 M out.
Towards rear. Just a little progress final 200 M.
Led or disputed lead to 400 M then dropped out.
Settled in rear. Ran on well inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily inside final 200 M doing best work at finish.
Hampered early. Always at the back.
Never in the hunt.
Settled just behind leaders. Tightened passing 300 M. Made no impression thereafter.
Better than midfield early stages. Commenced move onto course proper and quickened well to take charge inside 200 M. Hung on well. (Promoted.)
Prominent to 250 M then weakened.
Never far off. Found no extra close home.
Led or disputed lead to 200 M. No extra.
Remained in rear before making late impression closing stages.
Always at the back.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily alongside second runners-up without pegging him back.
Made no show.
Remained 5th before making progress rounding home bend to lead narrowly final turn. Held on well but was headed inside 100 M. Shifted in and caused interference.
Midfield. Made some progress 400 M but unable to quicken closing stages.
Towards rear. Advanced to midfield 1100 M. Made no show from final turn. (Demoted.)
Towards rear. Made good progress far side to be 4th 1000 M out. Dropped back to midfield final turn. Was one-paced until making up some late ground closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Well there. Led field 1700 M out until joined 800 M. Remained in prominent 2nd early straight. Kept on until being checked close home.
Midfield or behind. Ran on steadily in straight to dispute for lead inside 100 M. Won marginally. (Promoted.)
At rear throughout.
Ridden out to be in touch. Improved from 1100 M to join lead 800 M. Faded out of contention from 300 M.
Towards rear. Ran on well from 8th early straight. Disputed lead with the winner final 100 M, just failed.
Towards rear. Made ground early straight while being steadied passing 300 M. Ran on final 200 M.
Soon prominent. Dropped back steadily final 500 M.
Prominent. Dropped to 6th 1000 M. Regained 4th early straight. Kept on.
Well there to 300 M then weakened.
Lost considerable ground at start. Recovered to 10th but wide rounding home bend. Faded in straight.
Midfield. Steadied for a stride home bend. Towards rear into striaght. Made up late ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never in contention.
Made running to straight then weakened. Squeezed on rails 200 M out.
Settled in rear. Not much room early in straight. Eventually found clear passage inside final 200 M and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Well there to 300 M then faded. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled towards rear. Gained midfield into straight. Driven to 3rd over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort near finish.
Began awkwardly and lost ground at start. Remained well back before running past beaten horses in straight.
Settled just off the pace. Found nothing in straight.
Settled in 6th better than midfield. Cruised to join leaders upon straightening and grab lead inside 200 M always holding runner-up at bay. Won cleverly.
Sluggish at start but quickly recovered to 5th before home bend. Moved up to slender lead over 250 M out but soon grabbed by winner passing 200 M.
Held up in midfield. No clear passage in straight before running on inside final 200 M doing best work at finish.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Dropped back behind midfield, shaken up 800 M, disputed lead turning in, gave ground from 400 M.
Behind midfield, niggled along far out, kept on home straight.
Around midfield. Kept on home straight.
Good start from wide draw, dropped back to midfield, hampered when beaten 200 M out.
Led or disputed lead to 300 M, then weakened. (Demoted.)
Sent up to be prominent, disputed lead turning in, weakened 200 M.
Around midfield, ran on final 300 M.
Forward midfield, ran on 400 M out, led 200 M and kept on. (Promoted.)
Never a factor. (Demoted.)
Slow away, recovered towards midfield, modest improvement 300 M to 200 M, then found no more.
Taken back towards rear, ran on under pressure to only just fail.
Soon prominent, every chance turning in, disputed lead 300 M to 200 M, no extra.
Taken back to last, ridden patiently, ran on final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led on rail. Remained same until giving ground after the 200 M.
Behind lead and 4 wide. Made ground after straightening to look good hope at 250 M. Kept on but unable to hold off winner.
Midfield. Had some difficulty getting clear run early in straight. Found no extra final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Saved ground on home bend. Responded well, mainly under hands and heels riding, to just miss quinella place.
Behind leaders. Obtained run after straightening to issue challenge. Well there until no more after 200 M. Hung in concluding stages.
Prominent and free in early and middle stages. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
Began awkwardly and in the early stages hung in. Settled behind midfield. Near rear turning in. Made steady ground in the straight.
Behind leaders. Remained same into straight then issued challenge. Kept on well until one paced last bit.
At rear into home straight. Taken to outside and responded fairly without ever looking likely. (Lame.)
Wide in midfield. Made some ground early in straight. One paced final 200 M.
Midfield. Taken into clear on straightening. Sprinted quickly after the 400 M to go on and win strongly.
Near rear. Made ground on home turn. Lost momentum when crowded near 200 M. Finished strongly afterwards.
Prominent. Asked for effort after straightening. Had difficulty obtaining clear run approaching 200 M. Did best work at finish.
Raced wide outside lead when free in the early and middle stages. Gave ground after straightening and rider expressed concern with action in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped very badly and remained at rear. Steady headway on the outside from 900 M to be midfield turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.) (Bled.)
Crowded at start. Mostly around midfield. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Soon towards rear. Last 800 M out. Never a factor.
Jumped awkwardly. Always at rear and wide. Never a threat.
Jumped well but soon settled behind midfield. Over-raced and lost position at 900 M. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Always in touch. Ran on steadily in straight until effort not sustained close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or better. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Ridden forward to be in touch. 2nd rounding home turn. Kept on until weakening badly final 200 M. (Dropped whip near 400 M.)
Ridden forward and soon led. Headed 250 M out and dropped quickly out of contention. (Demoted.)
Crowded at start. Mostly midfield. Failed to make any impression in the straight.
Jumped well and steadily settled towards the rear. Inconvenienced at 900 M. Unable to quicken in the straight.
Midfield or better. Kept on in straight without threatening.
Led briefly before settling forward of midfield at 900 M. Quickened well upon straightening and took charge 250 M out for an easy victory. (Promoted.)
Niggled early to be in midfield or behind. Improved along rail rounding home bend to be 3rd or 4th turning in. Ran on well final 300 M without threatening the winner.
Towards rear from wide draw. Steadily pulled to the front from 1300 M to lead at 800 M. Headed 200 M out, kept on before weakening closing stages.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Prominent to 200 M, kept on quite well.
Midfield or better to 900 M. Dropped back a bit on home bend. Kept on one-paced.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one-paced home straight, weakened closing stages. Wide and without cover throughout.
At the back, over-racing in early and middle stages. Crept a bit closer on home bend to be midfield entering straight. Made ground steadily without threatening the winner.
Midfield. Raced awkwardly due to slow early pace, lost position and dropped to rear in middle stages. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Close up. Under pressure from 600 M to hold position. Steadily weakened upon straightening.
Always well there from widest draw. Hit the front 200 M out, won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Midfield or better to 600 M. Faded in the straight. (Bled.)
Well back. Hampered in middle stages when pulling. Made up good ground final 300 M. No extra close home. (Lame.)
At the rear. Steady progress from 1200 M to be better than midfield into straight. Kept on quite well.
Began very awkwardly, at the back. Not clear run rounding home turn. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Prominent. Held narrow advantage from 1600 M. Headed at 900 M. Dropped out from 600 M. Further steadied at 300 M. Hung out throughout. (Lame.)
Soon towards rear. Shifted to outside turning for home. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Settled at the back. Made ground final 200 M. Nearest at finish.
Made running from widest draw. Headed over 200 M out. Found no extra.
Settled behind midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Weakened final 300 M.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Pushed along early to be prominent. Remained in 4th to straight. Weakened.
Settled in better than midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Gained 3rd after straightening. Ran on final 250 M without threatening.
Settled in rear. Gained good ground on rails turning in to be some 3Ls off pace upon straightening. Continued to make ground without threatening.
Niggled along early. Settled behind leader. Quickened to lead over 200 M out. Won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Jumped awkwardly. Gradually moved up on outside to be behind leader approaching 1000 M. Gave ground soon after straightening.
Settled in mid-division. Kept on one pace under pressure in straight.
Behind midfield. Made short-lived effort upon straightening before fading inside 200 M.

Jumped in the air at start, losing some ground. Remained in rear. Clipped heels and ducked wide on home turn, dropping to last position. Made up considerable ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled towards rear. Failed to obtain clear passage most of home straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always prominent. Kept on one pace closing stages.
Raced keenly in midfield before improving to 2nd passing 800 M. Hit front approaching 200 M. Kept on but was headed 100 M out.
Slightly better than midfield. Made no impression early straight. Kept on closing stages.
Prominent to 300 M. Faded out of contention.
Broke well. Gradually settled in better than midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M to hit front 100 M out. Just held on.

Slowly away. Behind midfield. Inconvenienced and lost position approaching 800 M. Made ground final turn to be 7th early straight. Ran on well final 250 M to just miss 2nd at finish. (See Racing Incidents.) (Promoted.)
Gradually taken back to rear. Remained there until making ground steadily final 200 M.
Towards rear and wide throughout.
Soon led. Headed inside 250 M. Weakened.
Jumped awkwardly from widest draw, dropping to the last. Remained well back until making some late impression inside 200 M.
Midfield or behind. Towards rear early straight. Made up a little late ground final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Slightly slowly away. Behind midfield. Ran on well final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Never in the hunt.
Better than midfield. Steadied when short of room approaching 200 M. Shifted out and made some late progress closing stages.
Midfield early. Dropped to the rear group when severely checked near 1000 M. Modest progress final 300 M.
Pushed along to soon be better than midfield. Raced 4th 700 M out, remained same until running on quite well final 150 M.
Prominent, 2Ls 3rd final turn. Kept on.
In touch briefly, soon dropped to the rear.
Ridden early from wide draw and settled outside leader 850 M. Kept on well in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, inconvenienced 1000 M and passing 800 M. Never in contention. (Bled.)
Soon led. Held on well but found no extra when headed closing stages.
Better than midfield early. Soon in midfield or behind. Severely checked passing 800 M, never recovered.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear early. Moved up along rail to be midfield around 800 M. Sustained effort final 200 M to take charge closing stages. (Promoted.)
Well there early, dropped to 4th or 5th 900 M. Around midfield into straight, kept on well closing stages.
Tardy start, remained in rear group throughout. (Demoted.)
Midfield or behind. Was checked passing 800 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Bounded in air jumping out. Quickly recovered to midfield before home bend. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Began well then settled towards rear. Headway around home bend before baulked upon straightening. Kept on one pace.
Ridden to muster pace early. Travelled towards rear to straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Soon in rear. Tailed off from home bend.
Broke well and attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and swamped near finish.
Settled in midfield. Ridden around home turn. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish despite being tight between runners closing stages.
Ridden early. Soon dropped to last few. Gained midfield on rails turning in, then weakened.
Always well there. Kept on one pace closing stages.
Always in last few.
Jumped in rear. Held up within striking distance. Quickened well inside final 300 M to take command closing stages. Won well. (Promoted.)
Settled in prominent position to straight. Found nothing.
Never better than midfield. Kept on in straight.
Travelled at the back. No clear run early in straight before making significant progress inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Amongst leaders entering straight. Gradually faded closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on well final 200 M but was slightly inconvenienced close home.
Midfield or behind. Ran on well from 10th at 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Was 2nd when shifted in early stages. Dropped back steadily to midfield passing 400 M. Kept on without quickening.
Ridden hard to lead soon after start. Shifted in to the rail passing 800 M. Maintained advantage until weakening out of contention when headed 200 M out.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Improved steadily to reach midfield course proper. Continued to run on to reach 2nd briefly near 100 M. Kept on well.
Around midfield. Kept on final 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Crowded and steadied approaching 200 M. Never recovered.
In touch. Quickened up steadily inside 200 M to be beaten marginally.
Behind midfield. Shifted out 300 M to obtain a clear run. Ran on strongly final 200 M to miss narrowly.
Never a factor.
Soon prominent, was 2Ls 2nd near 400 M. Sustained effort to take lead approaching 200 M. Just held on.
Jumped badly. Was soon prominent until inside 150 M. Found no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
At rear throughout.
Settled mainly in midfield. Quickened to reach 3rd 200 M out but lost position when no extra final strides.
Travelled in front racing keenly far side. Narrowly headed over 200 M out but fought on gamely to draw level only to be pipped at post.
Midfield far side. Took closer order home bend. Unable to sustain effort and weakened over 200 M out.
Taken back to rear early. Steadied for a run 300 M out before making moderate late impression closing stages.
Well there to 300 M then dropped out.
Travelled behind midfield to straight. Ran on determinedly under strong pressure to claim 3rd final strides.
Jumped awkwardly and in last few early. Improved to midfield home bend when hung very wide and saddle shifted. Never recovered.
Settled just off the pace. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out and hung on doggedly to just stave off runner-up's determined revenge.
Close up. Lost position and dropped to 6th just better than midfield home bend. One-paced in straight.
Midfield throughout. (Bled.)
Slowly away. Soon recovered to last few. Made no impression in straight.
Soon in rear. Never in the hunt.
Wide throughout. Mainly in midfield. Hung out and forced wider rounding home bend. Never recovered.
Settled in last few. Steadied early in straight before running on past beaten horses closing stages.
Towards rear, niggled along far out, kept on under pressure, nearest at finish.
Tardy start, at rear before making late improvement to be nearest at finish.
Led or disputed lead to closing stages.
Forward midfield, steady progress from 400 M to lead closing stages and just held on.
Always towards rear.
Around midfield, inclined to hang out and never likely to threaten leaders.
Around midfield, ran on final 200 M. (Rider broke whip.)
Prominent under pressure turning in and gradually weakened. (Demoted.)
Mostly midfield, no extra final 150 M.
Prominent and only weakened closing stages.
Prominent and only weakened closing stages. (Demoted.)
Around midfield, ran on between horses from 300 M to only just fail.
Dropped back from wide draw, caught wide home turn, no extra home straight.
Behind midfield, kept on under pressure home straight.
Prominent. Kept on one paced after straightening.
Behind midfield after being slow to begin. Inconvenienced at 600 M when commencing to improve. Near rear turning in. Made ground in straight to be closest at finish.
Prominent. Gave ground from the 400 M.
Prominent early. Gradually lost ground to be near rear at 600 M then at rear turning in. Only passed beaten horses in straight.
Drifted back to near rear by 1200 M. Hard ridden 1000 M out. Circled field from 600 M. Widest turning in. Kept responding to arrive in time.
Near rear. Commenced to improve wide on track from 600 M. Responded gamely in straight to just miss quinella place.
Led until 400 M. Kept on fairly without finding any more.
Prominent and 3 wide. Gave ground from the 500 M. (Demoted.)
At rear after being slow then inconvenienced. Made slight improvement under hard riding after 600 M. No extra in straight.
Midfield or just behind. Responded only fairly after straightening and never looked likely.
Followed leader. Took closer order at 700 M. Went to clear lead at 400 M. Kept on strongly despite being unable to hold off winner.
Gradually drifted back to be midfield by 1100 M. No response after 400 M.
Midfield throughout. No extra after straightening.
Stumbled at start. Behind midfield and wide. Improved wide on track from 700 M. No more after straightening.
Behind midfield. Raced awkwardly when crowded at 1400 M. Dipped when clipped heels at 900 M. Never in contention.
Worse than midfield. Steady improvement around home bend to be better than midfield turning in. Effort not sustained, weakened gradually from 200 M.
Always handy. Kept on one-paced in the straight.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield, over-racing in middle stages. Dropped towards rear near 1000 M, last into straight. Never seen with a chance.
Ridden along early, mostly midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
Well back. Crept a bit closer from 900 M. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend to be better than midfield turning in. Ran on again from 300 M, kept on one-paced closing stages.
Settled at rear. Switched out on straightening. Made up a lot of ground to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one-paced in the straight.
Sent along and soon led. Headed at 1100 M and sat behind leader. Hampered and lost running 200 M out, did not recover.
Began awkwardly, midfield. Moved closer from 900 M to be behind leaders into straight. Kept on one-paced final 200 M.
Prominent from widest draw. Took up running from 1100 M. Kept on well in the straight to win comfortably.
Settled towards rear. Steady progress from 900 M to be midfield on straightening. Ran on well final 300 M though not able to threaten the winner.
Never far off. Steady headway rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Ran on gamely and took lead final 200 M. Held off strong challenge from 2nd horse. (Promoted.)
Around midfield. Failed to make any impression upon straightening.
Soon led. Kept on in straight. Headed 200 M out. Weakened and plugged on for a distant 3rd.
Midfield early. Dropped back to the rear rounding stable bend. Improved steadily on the outside rounding home bend. Stayed on without threatening in straight.
Stood flat footed and lost a lot of ground. Always at back and never a factor.
Stumbled and dislodged rider on jumping.
Towards rear. Never a threat in straight.
Midfield early before settling towards the rear. Kept on in straight.
Led briefly before settling in touch. 2nd turning in. Ran on determinedly and had narrow advantage 200 M out before losing a hard fought battle with the winner in the closing stages.
Mostly around midfield. Given reminder rounding home bend. Found nothing upon straightening and soon dropped out of contention.
In touch. Kept on in straight until weakening badly final 100 M.
Settled in better than midfield. Held for a run briefly after straightening. Ran on well alongside runner-up when obtained clear passage final 250 M.
Settled just behind midfield. Dropped towards rear and jostled turning in. Inconvenienced near 300 M. Made up good late ground inside 200 M.
Towards rear and raced keenly far side. Dropped to last position rounding home bend. Wide turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Slowly away. Soon moved up to midfield. Cruised in straight to lead approaching 200 M. Won easily. (Promoted.)
Settled towards rear. Attempting to improve when checked near 300 M. Kept on to line.
Pushed along from widest draw to lead. Headed approaching 200 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out quickly.
Settled in rear. Widest runner rounding home bend. Made moderate progress final 200 M.
Settled just behind midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled behind leader. Kept on without quickening under pressure in straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Remained in rear to straight. Made up good ground without threatening winner.
Sluggish at start. Settled in rear. Gained good ground on rails to be some 3Ls off pace upon straightening. Ran on final 250 M without ever looking likely.
Led briefly. Settled behind leaders. Made some progress final 250 M.
Raced keenly towards rear early stages. Inconvenienced near 500 M. Steadied 250 M out when trying to improve. Kept on thereafter.
Behind midfield before making progress from outside rounding home bend. Ran on in straight to take lead passing 200 M. Won readily.
Never far off. Improved slightly to 3rd 650 M. Kept on to just miss 2nd at finish.
Mainly behind the main bunch. Slightly inconvenienced on straightening. One-paced without quickening.
Always thereabout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Slow into stride, near rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Soon dropped towards rear and raced ungenerously throughout. (See Racing incidents.)
Well there, took lead briefly near 1000 M. Sat outside leader until joining the lead again final turn. Was headed inside 200 M. Kept on without threatening.
Towards rear. Was taken to the widest home turn. Faded. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield throughout.
Led or disputed lead early stages. Went clear approaching the Rock. Maintained advantage until joined final turn. Found no extra when headed passing 200 M.
Missed the start and lost a lot of ground. At rear until running on well in straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from 800 M to become 6th turning in. Weakened.
Midfield before dropping back under pressure home turn. Checked upon straightening. One-paced thereafter.
Settled in 4th. Quickened early in straight to hit front inside final 200 M. Failed to ward off winner close home.
Jumped in air at start then knuckled. Quickly recovered and took up running. Tearaway leader far side before joined approaching home turn. Headed 200 M out then dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in just behind midfield. Ran on steadily final 250 M to get up near finish.
Jumped very badly, losing ground. Towards rear throughout. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled in just better than midfield. Made some progress final 250 M.
Settled at the back. Commenced move on outside rounding home bend. Made further ground under pressure from 8th upon straightening.
Settled in rear. Tailed off from home bend.
Settled worse than midfield. Steadied and lost position near 500 M. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Gained good ground on rails to be midfield turning in. Held for a run inside final 200 M. Kept on to line.
Settled behind leaders in 3rd. Quickened to join leader approaching home turn. Kept on but headed 100 M out.
Led briefly then settled behind leader. Dropped to 3rd rounding home bend. Came under pressure to hold position until finding no extra final 200 M.
Held 3rd to approaching the Rock. Dropped back steadily.
Soon in 6th and dropped a bit approaching the Rock. Severely checked passing 600 M, dropping further back to the rear. Only finished before a few tiring horses.
Around midfield. Crept closer order on straightening. Kept on well but no match with speed of winner final 200 M.
Rear. Made some progress final turn. Continued to make ground in straight, never nearer.
Slowly away. Towards rear before making good progress from 600 M. Ran on strongly in straight to take control 200 M out. Won convincingly.
In touch. Was checked near the winner post the first time. Remained 4th until finding no extra in straight.
Held 2nd until weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. Dropped further to the rear ground far side. Made up a little late ground inside 200 M.
Led. Shifted to the rail and caused interference near winning post first time. Sent along to maintain advantage to 200 M out. Weakened.
Towards rear. Improved far side to be 3rd at Rock. Kept on and maintained position thereafter.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Made ground under pressure final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Modest improvement in straight.
Settled in rear. Commenced run on outside rounding home bend. Ran on steadily down straight to just get up on line.
Travelled just behind midfield to 400 M. Found nothing.
Settled at the back. Improving when forced to switch outward inside 200 M. Continued to make progress closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Raced prominently in 3rd. Came to tackle for lead approaching home turn. Ran on steadily to draw level but pipped at post.
Travelled just worse than midfield. Ridden and made moderate headway around home bend. Tired inside final 200 M.
Tracked leader. Hit front approaching 800 M. Still holding 2Ls break 200 M out. Just worn down in the shadows of the post.
In similar position throughout. Made no impression in straight.
Settled just worse than midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure along rails without threatening.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground down straight doing best work at finish.
Travelled in better than midfield. Came under pressure home bend. Kept on one pace without quickening in straight.
Soon took up running and led until narrowly headed approaching 800 M. Gradually faded from 400 M.
Began well. Travelled some 2-1/2Ls off pace. Weakened badly over 200 M out.
Prominent, kept on home straight.
Poor start, behind midfield and beaten far out. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield, ran on final 300 M.
Forward midfield, kept on under pressure home straight.
Led, headed about 100 M, then inconvenienced by loose horse.
Prominent, under pressure 400 M out, weakened home straight.
Behind midfield, ran on home straight to lead about 100 M out.
At rear, widest turning in, nearest at finish.
Behind midfield, kept on under pressure from far out, no extra closing stages.
Around midfield, attempted to improve along inner turning in, no extra final 200 M.
Unseated rider leaving gates. (See Racing Incidents.)
Knuckled shortly after the start then went forward to take clear lead at 600 M. Kept on early in straight then commenced to give ground after the 200 M.
Began awkwardly and was at rear throughout.
Midfield or little worse into home straight. Made strong run through field from 300 M to reach lead near 100 M then went on to win comfortably.
Bounded in air at start but quickly was in front of midfield. Made gradual ground along inner in straight and kept on well.
Behind midfield after lacking early pace. Under pressure at 500 M. Made steady ground without ever threatening.
Slow to begin and remained at rear throughout.
Behind lead and 3-wide. Under pressure after straightening and kept on well.
With lead early. Allowed another to cross it at 600 M and took sit. Improved on straightening. Kept on well but unable to hold off winner.
Midfield. Hung out on home turn. Did not respond early in straight. Made a little ground final 100 M.
Failed to muster early speed and was behind midfield. Remained same into home straight then made strong ground until awkward on heels closing stages.
Midfield and 3-wide. Gave ground from the 400 M.
Behind lead and under pressure to hold position at 600 M. Hung out on the latter part of the home turn and found no extra after.
Ridden early to lead going into stable bend, maintaining narrow advantage. Kept on well despite shifting out in the run to the line. (Promoted.)
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Severely checked when crowded passing winning post the first time. Made up a little ground towards finish.
Jumped awkwardly. Severely checked when crowded going into stable bend, then over-raced. Weakened steadily from 400 M.
Behind midfield. Checked when crowded passing winning post the first time. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Brief lead, remained handy from stable bend. Ran on well after straightening though unable to peg back the winner.
Mainly better than midfield. Ran on well from 200 M, one-paced final 100 M.
Better than midfield early. Improved swiftly to dispute lead from 1200 M. Sat behind leader from 800 M. Weakened steadily from 150 M.
Slowly away, soon recovered to behind midfield when over-racing in early stages. Made up a little ground after straightening, then one-paced.
Severely checked and dropped to last when crowded passing winning post the first time. Widest turning in. Made up a little late ground.
Mainly better than midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M. No extra closing stages.
Slowly away, well back. Checked when crowded going into stable bend. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon behind midfield.
In touch. Weakened final 300 M.
Jumped well and took lead to 200 M. Kept on well but just failed to peg back the winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there. Sustained effort to take lead final 200 M. Held on well.
Always at the back.
Midfield early. Dropped a bit to towards the rear mid-way. Kept on closing stages.
Slowly away and was behind midfield. Soon recovered some ground and remained in similar position final 400 M.
Prominent on the outside rail. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
In touch to course proper. Weakened.
Better than midfield. Was 1L 3rd passing the course proper. Kept on without threatening the quinella pair.
Missed the start and was towards rear along the outside rail. Shifted to the centre of the field passing 400 M and made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield along outside rail. Made up a little late ground final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear early. Recovered ground to midfield course proper. Found no extra inside 200 M. (Hung in.)
Made running to 200 M then no extra.
Never a factor.
Never better than midfield. No extra closing stages.
Tailed-off throughout.
In similar position throughout. Kept on.
Prominent to 400 M then weakened. (Demoted.)
Began well. Never far off. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight.
Prominent to 200 M then faded.
Always in rear.
Settled towards rear. Quickened well inside final 400 M to get up at finish. (Promoted.)
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, but soon recovered to prominent position. Quickened to hit front just inside 200 M but caught close home.
Began well. Close up. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on one pace closing stages.
Never better than midfield. One-paced.
Missed the start. Was last until making up good ground final 250 M.
Around midfield. Ran on well from 300 M to take lead 100 M out. Unable to contain the winner close home.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Jumped well, soon settled in 6th. Moved up from 1000 M to reach lead rounding home bend. Held on until finding no extra when headed 100 M out.
Was prominent before weakening out of contention inside 200 M.
Soon led until headed 650 M. Prominent into straight, unable to hold place final 250 M. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield throughout.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Ran on steadily in straight to claim victory close home. (Promoted.)
Lost ground at start, at the back early. Made ground far side to be midfield 1100 M. Ran on in straight to just miss 3rd final stride.
Tardy start, towards rear throughout.
Well there, was 2Ls 4th turning in. Kept on well to just maintain a minor placing at finish.
Midfield or better. Dropped out from 300 M.
Prominent. Dropped to midfield home bend after unbalancing passing 1000 M. One-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Was checked approaching 200 M before shifting out to obtain a clear run. Went forward thereafter to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Steadied passing 200 M. Kept on.
Mainly in last few. Gained some ground on rails turning in. Made no impression closing stages.
Began well and attempted to make all. Caught close home.
Always prominent. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Towards rear. Effort around home bend. Kept on steadily early in straight before swamped.
Soon crossed from wide draw to prominent 4th. Dropped away from 5th into straight.
Chased leader to 300 M then weakened under pressure.
Travelled in better than midfield. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening holding some chance 200 M out, but had not much to give closing stages.
Settled at the back to straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always in rear and made no show. (Lame.)
Settled at the back. No clear passage throughout straight and made modest progress only.
Settled towards rear. Baulked for a run early in straight. Produced good late effort closing stages.
Knuckled at start. Settled in last few. Ran on gamely down straight to take command close home.
In touch, led over 200 M out and kept on. (Promoted.)
Around midfield, soon beaten home straight.
Towards rear, ran on from 400 M out.
Mostly midfield or worse, hampered 200 M and gave ground.
In touch, alongside winner home turn, found no extra.
Led to approaching 200 M then weakened.
Well back, last turning in, nearest at finish.
Slow away, shifted in behind field and over-raced, improved final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear and outside of field, ran on well home straight.
Around midfield, kept on closing stages.
Prominent, hung out and not ridden right out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or worse, ran on home straight.
Prominent, every chance turning in, no response final 200 M.
Around midfield, faded over 300 M out.
Taken back to behind midfield. Wide on home turn. One paced in straight and never likely.
Behind midfield. Improved to midfield on straightening. Made good ground in straight.
Followed leader. Into clear at 400 M. Tried hard but unable to peg back winner.
Behind lead. Moved up three wide on straightening. Kept on well but found quinella pair too strong.
Midfield. Remained on inner around home turn. No extra in straight.
Outside lead. Battled on strongly until giving little ground last bit.
Behind midfield early. Improved from 800 M to be prominent turning in. Made steady progress final 300 M after failing to sprint early in straight.
Failed to show pace and got back to near rear. Under pressure at 400 M and only made gradual ground without ever looking likely.
Taken back to near rear. Some improvement along inner at 800 M. Back to rear on straightening. Some difficulty finding clear run in straight. Finished strongly last bit. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent and five wide without cover. Gave ground from 400 M.
Slow to begin and at rear. No improvement in straight.
Midfield. One paced in straight.
Prominent. Remained same until giving ground from 300 M.
Led and made all.
Jumped awkwardly. Always at rear. Not a factor in straight.
Soon moved up and took lead at 1400 M. Kept on well in straight but was unable to match speed with the winner final 100 M and lost 2nd place right on the line.
Stumbled at start and remained at back. Made up some late ground.
Ridden forward to lead. Headed 1400 M and then settled in midfield or better. Weakened badly final 250 M.
Jumped best and remained in touch. Kept on until weakened final 200 M.
In touch early. Lost position from 1300 M to be behind midfield. Trapped widest turning in. Made up a little late ground. (Demoted.)
Soon midfield. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on one pace.
Never far off. Took closer order rounding home turn to be 3rd or 4th turning in. Kept on without threatening placed horses.

Slightly tardy start and ridden hard to recover ground to be with leaders. Sat outside leader from 900 M. Hard ridden in straight to fight off challenge from 3rd horse and then from 2nd horse close home. Just lasted.
Soon settled in midfield or a little worse. One-paced in straight.
Mainly midfield or better. Steadied and shifted in near the 400 M. Ran on final 300 M and was doing best work and nearest at finish.
Soon dropped towards rear from wide draw. Improved on the outside rounding home bend to be in midfield turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Stood flat-footed and would not jump. Took no part.
Mostly towards rear. Made up a little ground towards finish.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily from 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield. Hung out throughout, particularly in the run to the winning post.
Disputed lead to 400 M. Faded from 200 M. (Bled.)
Ridden along in better than midfield. Kept on and just held on for 3rd close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield, kept on one-paced closing stages.
Prominent. Challenged leader from 300 M. Only kept on one-paced closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, well there. Weakened gradually final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Weakened gradually final 200 M.
Better than midfield to 400 M, weakened steadily.
Always prominent. Hit the front 200 M out, won going away. (Promoted.)
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Began awkwardly, towards rear early. Steadily improved to be better than midfield 500 M out. Weakened close home.
Slowly away. Remained in rear before making headway rounding home bend. Ran on steadily from 11th upon straightening.
Settled in midfield. No response when asked soon after straightening. Steadied when crowded 200 M out.
Soon took up running. Headed upon straightening. Kept on one pace before weakening inside final 200 M.
Towards rear despite niggled along early. Behind midfield when steadied turning into home bend. Held for a run upon straightening. Making ground when crowded just inside 200 M. Ran on.
Just behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Jumped best from widest draw. Settled behind leading pair. Improved rounding home bend to be among leaders turning in. Kept on until finding no extra and swamped closing stages.
Soon towards rear. Dropped further back rounding home bend. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish on outside final 250 M.
Settled in midfield. Gained ground on rails to be 4th turning in. Kept on before making progress closing stages.
Just better than midfield. Gave ground under pressure final 300 M.
Soon towards rear. Saved ground on rails to be midfield turning in. One-paced.
Pushed along early to be outside leader. Hung out home turn then weakened badly.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground. Remained at the back to straight. Made steady progress early on then ran on well between runners final 200 M.
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Improved to be amongst leaders turning in. Quickened well to draw clear approaching 200 M. Won unextended. (Promoted.)
Behind midfield and wide. Improved swiftly to be better than midfield approaching home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Slowly away. Trailed the field throughout.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily final 250 M to gain 3rd narrowly near finish.
Soon better than midfield. Faded final 250 M.
Always prominent. Hit front approaching home turn. Kept on when headed inside final 200 M. Found no extra close home.
Settled in forward of midfield. Made slight improvement rounding home bend. Ran on final 200 M to just miss a minor placing.
Settled in prominent 4th. Ran on well under pressure final 200 M to claim victory near finish.
Soon better than midfield. Kept on early straight but found nothing final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Ran on final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Very slowly away. Towards rear and wide to straight. Made ground final 250 M but was one-paced closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Just behind midfield. Slightly hampered 1100 M out and dropped towards rear. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Close-up 2nd. Steadied approaching 800 M, dropping to 3rd. Quickened well early straight to hit front inside 200 M. Failed to contain winner close home.
Towards rear. No response when under pressure in straight.
Midfield to home bend. Made no show in straight.
Led field before narrowly headed approaching home turn. Remained in 2nd until weakening 200 M out.
Near rear. Made up good ground from outside final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon prominent. Took lead near 1000 M to final turn. Faded in straight.
Behind midfield. Slight progress rounding home bend. Kept on same pace in straight.
Prominent early, soon settled 5th. Remained there until running on in straight to claim 3rd inside 100 M.
Never better than midfield. Weakened closing stages.
In touch early, soon in midfield when tightened approaching 1400 M. Towards rear rounding home bend before making ground steadily in straight.
Never in contention.

Settled midfield from widest draw. Made good progress approaching the Rock to be 2nd 600 M. Took lead final turn and was still holding 2Ls advantage 250 M. Found no extra and was headed closing stages.
Slightly slowly away. Towards rear throughout.
In touch before dropping to midfield 700 M out. Remained in similar position thereafter. (Demoted.)
Led field early until taking back a bit passing 1000 M to become 4th 600 M out. Ran on well final 200 M to claim victory closing stages.
Prominent. Failed to quicken final 150 M.
Trailed the field throughout.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled behind midfield. Dropped towards rear passing 1000 M. Tightened turning into home bend. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Mainly ridden behind midfield. Made short-lived effort far side. Given reminders from home bend. One-paced in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Made progress rounding home bend on inside to be 3rd upon straightening. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Began well. Settled in forward of midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Midfield. Made swift headway far side to prominent position passing 800 M. Went wide turning in. Faded inside final 200 M.
Settled mainly in 3rd. Improved to 2nd rounding home bend. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Ridden along on rails to muster early pace. Made all. Drew clear closing stages.
Began well. Settled behind leader. Dropped to 4th rounding home bend. Gave further ground in straight.
Well there early. Settled in midfield turning into back straight. Niggled along to hold position before weakening final 200 M.
Crowded on jumping. Settled towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Settled towards rear. Gained ground on inside to be midfield turning in. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Started badly, towards rear. Moderate progress from 800 M, being 7th rounding home bend. Widest into straight, ran on without threatening. (Promoted.)
Midfield or behind. Shifted in early straight and made ground steadily along the rail to claim 3rd final 100 M.
Led field until headed passing 800 M. Dropped out from 2nd early straight.
Slowly away. Soon recovered ground to become 4th. Moved up to take lead 800 M. Faded out of contention when headed 400 M out.
Towards rear. Made ground under pressure final 250 M, never nearer.
Jumped awkwardly, last to straight. Ran on well.
Towards rear. Made progress passing 1200 M to be 4th far side. Kept on early straight but unable to quicken final 150 M. (Demoted.)
In touch early. Dropped to the rear group when unbalanced 1200 M. No progress. (Demoted.)
Prominent before racing in 5th far side. Sustained effort in straight to take command 200 M. Won convincingly. (Promoted.)
Around midfield. Kept on quite well 150 M.
Pulled to be in prominent position. Took lead final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Was not far off early stages. Dropped back steadily when the saddle shifted forward. Run ignored.
Held narrow lead to home bend. Dropped out upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced wide in rear. Went wider turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Dropped to midfield home bend. Kept on one pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Mostly in midfield to 400 M. One-paced.
Travelled just worse than midfield. Took closer order home bend. Fought on determinedly from 2nd into straight but failed to peg back winner.
Towards rear. Quickened to 3rd early in straight. Kept on without threatening.
Prominent to straight and dropped out of contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well. Close up. Hit front rounding home bend. Fought on under pressure to just defy runner-up closing stages.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Travelled in rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Lost considerable ground at start. Trailed the field until making up late ground inside final 400 M.
Prominent early. Then held up in midfield to straight. Dropped out. Wide throughout.
Midfield or worse, nearest at finish. (Demoted.)
Prominent, ran on home straight to lead 200 M out and kept on.
Towards rear, attempted to improve 400 M out, modest response.
Towards rear, under pressure far out and soon beaten.
Behind midfield, niggled along 700 M out, midfield home turn and ran on in straight.
Prominent to 200 M, then gave ground.
In touch, tracked winner turning in and kept on.
Around midfield, crept closer home turn, hampered 200 M then some late improvement.
Led to 200 M then weakened.
Towards rear, sent along far side, improved along inner home turn, came under pressure and no response.
Prominent, kept on under pressure home straight.
At rear and never likely.
Prominent and 3-wide. Joined lead after straightening. Kept on strongly but unable to match quinella pair.
With rear and found no extra in straight.
Led until giving ground from 500 M. Became unbalanced and hit rail at 300 M.
Prominent. Checked when crowded at 600 M. Midfield and wide on straightening. Responded fairly.
In front of midfield into straight. Asked for effort after straightening and improved through field to arrive just in time. (Promoted.)
Followed leader. Taken to clear lead at 500 M. Kept on until giving ground final 100 M.
Began awkwardly and then improved to midfield. Hampered at 600 M. Taken into clear on straightening, responded well to look winner only to be caught final strides.
Taken back to rear from outside draw. Remained same into home straight. Responded well and made continual ground in run to post.
Near rear into home straight. Only passed tiring horses when making moderate improvement.
Prominent. Hard ridden to hold position at 500 M. One-paced in straight and gave ground last bit.
Behind midfield and wide. Widest turning in and gave no response.
Behind lead into home straight. Taken 3-wide into clear and responded well until one-paced last bit.
Prominent early, settled just behind the pace from 1200 M. Weakened from 150 M.
Taken back at start and settled at the rear. Steady progress from 600 M to be midfield turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
At the back, over-racing early. Never in contention.
Behind midfield or worse. Steadied at 200 M then made up some ground.
Began awkwardly, well back. Made up a little late ground.
Towards rear. Under pressure from 600 M. Found little in the straight. (Demoted.)
Began well from wide draw, midfield, wide on stable bend. Moved closer on home turn. Hampered at the 200 M, made up some ground when got into the clear.
Midfield, became unbalanced when over-racing on stable bend and dropped towards rear. Made ground steadily final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Prominent, wide on stable bend. Took up running from 1100 M. Headed 150 M out, weakened.
Midfield early, improved to close-up position at 1200 M. Ran on well final 200 M though no match to the winner.
Prominent early, then settled in midfield from 1200 M. Closer order on home bend, responded well to take charge 150 M out. Won comfortably.
Niggled along to lead going into stable bend. Sat behind leader from 1100 M. Steadied and lost position at 200 M, not a factor afterwards.
Prominent. Lost position to become 9th when racing greenly near 900 M. Remained the same until running on a bit final 200 M.
Slow into stride, raced ungenerously in behind. Moved up without cover rounding home bend to be midfield or better final turn. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or behind. Kept on for some moderate improvement in straight.
Led or disputed lead to 400 M. Unable to quicken.
Midfield. Stumbled at 500 M. Ran on well 300 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Always there, kept on quite well in straight.
Behind midfield early. Made good progress passing 900 M, becoming 3rd rounding home bend. Came to tackle leader early straight, taking over 200 M. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group when hampered near the first turn. Hung in after the final turn and made up some ground final 250 M.
Towards rear. Hampered on the first turn. Made no show.
Pushed along from widest draw to be prominent. Disputed for lead rounding home bend. Gained upper hand turning in. Kept on well when headed 200 M. (Hung out throughout.)
Slightly better than midfield. Weakened steadily final 300 M.
Slowly away, never in contention.
Led or disputed lead. Headed over 200 M out. Fought on well to re-gain advantage final strides. (Promoted.)
Niggled along in better than midfield. Ran on determinedly under pressure to just fail to get up on line.
Never nearer.
Travelled in rear. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Travelled in better than midfield to 300 M then faded.
Always well there. One-paced closing stages.
Soon dropped to last few.
Midfield to 350 M then tired badly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield. One-paced closing stages. (Demoted.)
Travelled towards rear. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Always prominent. Took lead over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and caught final strides.
Always well there. One-paced closing stages. Inconvenienced final few strides. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off. One-paced.
Jumped slowly. Settled at the back. Ran on well inside final 300 M to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily final 250 M. Never nearer.
Always prominent. Ran on to threaten early straight but was one-paced inside 200 M.
Around midfield. Hung out home turn. Weakened steadily.
At the back. Made up some ground from outside in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground rapidly from outside to take lead 1500 M. Kept on gamely when being strongly challenged inside 300 M.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group far side. One-paced.
Lost ground at start, soon made good progress to be in touch. Dropped back a little to be around midfield home bend. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Settled midfield. Ran on well in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily final 300 M.
Crowded soon after start, raced in front of midfield. Made steady progress far side. Came to tackle leader early straight to hold every chance 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Led field to 1500 M. Remained in prominent position until failing to hold place soon after straightening.
Towards rear throughout.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure once into the clear 200 M out but failed to peg back runner-up.
Began well, then tracked leaders. Soon found no extra upon straightening.
Prominent to straight then gradually faded. Beaten when hampered 200 M out.
Around midfield to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Sluggish at start. Produced some late impression close home.
Jumped awkwardly. Always in rear.
Made no show.
Settled in last few. Not clear run early in straight before producing short-lived effort over 200 M out.
Never nearer.

Steadied to rear and crossed to inside rails before improving towards midfield when awkwardly placed behind runners approaching home bend. Ran on doggedly upon straightening to claim 2nd place close home.
Never far off. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight without ever looking likely.
Settled within striking distance. Cruised to lead over 200 M out for a commanding victory. (Promoted.)
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Began well and led field until headed 200 M out. Weakened.
Around midfield, five wide home turn then ran on under whip.
Always behind midfield.
Rear, soon niggled along and never likely.
Prominent, disputed lead throughout final 200 M.
Behind midfield, five wide turning in, ran on final 300 M.
Behind midfield, widest turning in and never likely. (Demoted.)
Forward midfield, niggled along 800 M out, in touch turning in, then one-paced.
Never a factor.
Prominent, in touch home turn, kept on.
Always behind midfield.
Forward midfield, every chance turning in, weakened final 200 M.
Around midfield, no extra final 200 M.
Led, kept on when challenged over 200 M out.
Around midfield, modest improvement home straight.
Ridden hard from wide barrier to be 3 wide and prominent at 1200 M. Maintained same under hard riding into straight. Kept on strongly.
In front of midfield until giving ground from 350 M.
Behind midfield. Moved closer on home turn. Responded fairly in straight and continued to make some ground after being crowded at 200 M.
In front of midfield early. Dropped to midfield at 600 M. Near rear turning in. No improvement.
Wide on stable bend from outside draw. Soon dropped to rear. No impression afterwards.
Slow to begin. Quickly improved to behind midfield. Responded fairly in straight.
Led and made all. (Promoted.)
Around midfield. Improved from 400 M and continued to make gradual headway in run to post.
In front of midfield into the home straight. Kept on fairly.
Worked forward to be prominent at 1200 M. Improved from 600 M to join lead on straightening. Kept on one paced.
Followed leader until giving ground quickly final 300 M.
Rear early. Made run around field from 600 M. Widest turning in. Kept on without ever looking likely.
Dropped to midfield after being crowded at 1200 M. Again steadied at 700 M. Renewed effort in straight to finish strongly and be closest at finish.
Behind midfield early. Near rear 600 M. No improvement in straight.
Better than midfield. Quickened to challenge the winner from 300 M, no extra closing stages.
Slowly away, well back. Became unbalanced at 800 M. Made up some ground from 300 M, one-paced final 100 M.
Steadily dropped to behind midfield from wide draw. Ran on well from 300 M without threatening the winner.
Never better than midfield. Failed to quicken in home straight.
Slowly away and trailed the field. Made up some ground towards the finish.
Midfield throughout. Did not quicken.
Always handy. Quickened well from 300 M to take command 200 M out. Won comfortably.
Soon sat outside leader. Failed to quicken final 100 M.
Held narrow lead to 250 M. Faded.
Mainly midfield. Ran on steadily in straight until effort not sustained in the closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Jumped well from wide draw and soon settled better than midfield. Trapped wide turning in. Failed to quicken in straight before weakened final 100 M.
Hard ridden early and always in touch. Ran on well in straight and took lead 250 M out. Just held off challenge from 2nd horse.
Soon moved up along rail to lead. Headed 300 M out. Weakened 200 M and dropped quickly out of contention.
Jumped best but soon outpaced to be forward of midfield. Ran on well final 300 M and was doing best work and nearest at finish.
Soon sat outside leader. Disputed lead turning in. Took narrow advantage 300 M out before being headed. Kept on without threatening placed horses.
Travelled kindly behind leaders along rail to 350 M. Dropped right out of contention shortly thereafter. (Bled.)
Never far off. Unable to quicken in straight and tired badly 200 M out.
Crowded at start and always towards rear. Hung out approaching and rounding the home turn. Made a little impression final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Always at rear. Raced wide and without cover throughout. Not a factor in straight. (Demoted.)

Checked at start. At rear. Niggled along from 900 M and improved steadily rounding home bend to be behind midfield turning in. Steadied early straight. Made up good ground from 300 M but was inconvenienced near the post.
Gradually dropped to the rear despite being niggled along. Made up some ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Niggled along in midfield or worse. Kept on in straight until no extra final 100 M.
Towards rear early. Niggled along just behind midfield far side. Kept on one pace in straight.
Settled just behind midfield. Made up some ground in straight.
Tracked leader. Took up running approaching 800 M. Joined rounding home bend. Weakened soon after straightening.
Settled mainly better than midfield. Improved to dispute 3rd rounding home bend. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight until failing to sustain effort closing stages.
Towards rear and wide throughout. Made no show.
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Quickly recovered after checked near 700 M. Ran on steadily in straight but no match with winner closing stages.
Midfield and wide early. Settled in 3rd far side. Improved to join leader rounding home bend. Took clear lead early in straight until worn down closing stages. Lost 2nd near finish.
Slowly away and tightened soon after start. Never in the hunt.
Pushed along early to take up running. Led until headed approaching 800 M. Dropped away rounding home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled towards rear. Shifted out from rails to improve rounding home bend. Ran on strongly final 250 M from 6th to assert authority closing stages.
Always towards rear. Made no show.
Better than midfield early. Dropped steadily to behind midfield rounding home bend. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Prominent early. Dropped to better than midfield rounding home bend. Made ground along rail to be 4th turning in. Kept on without quickening.
Settled towards rear. Widest turning in. Ran on final 350 M until one-paced close home.
Led early, soon settled behind leader. Quickened well early straight to hit front 200 M out. Kept on strongly. (Promoted.)
In touch until giving ground inside 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. Crowded and unbalanced 900 M out and dropped towards rear. Held up for a run early straight. Made moderate late ground closing stages.
Slightly slow into stride. Recovered to midfield approaching home bend. Denied a clear run early straight. Found no extra final 200 M.
In touch early. Improved to joint 2nd near 600 M. Kept on until one-paced close home.
Behind midfield and wide. Made ground final 350 M until one-paced when inconvenienced inside 100 M.
Outside leader before taking over passing 1000 M. Kept on quite well when headed 200 M out.
