Well back to straight. No clear run before shifting to outside final 250 M. Ran on steadily.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield from 900 M. Remained there until giving further ground final 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly, remained in rear. No clear run early straight, having to change course inside 250 M. Ran on to reach 3rd closing stages.
Better than midfield. Wide rounding home bend. Weakened final 300 M. (Bled.)
Prominent to 450 M. Weakened soon after turning in.
Midfield. Ran on early straight to be 4th passing 200 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Led early, then sat outside leader 1400 M. Joint lead 1000 M until 700 M. Was 2nd until failing to hold place final turn. (Hung in.)
Behind midfield. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped out from half-way.
Slightly better than midfield. Sustained effort in straight to take over 50 M out.
Slowly away, was last before improving from outside far side to be in touch home bend. Came to challenge passing 200 M but effort not sustained.
Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, towards rear. Gradual progress from 600 M and was wide turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M for a distant 4th.
Midfield or better. Dropped back passing the Rock.
In touch. Dropped back a bit from 600 M. Kept on same pace in straight.
Slightly slowly away, pushed along to take lead from 1400 M. Was joined 1000 M before re-gaining advantage approaching the Rock. Faded out of contention when headed 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Midfield or behind. Made good progress 600 M out to be 2nd final turn. Took advantage inside 250 M until headed 50 M out. Kept on.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Made up some late ground to be nearest at finish.
Held up just behind leaders. Lost position into straight. One-paced.
Never a factor.
Settled just behind midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend to be prominent into straight. Kept on steadily under pressure to just hold 2nd place.
Sluggish at start. Ridden in rear early. Never nearer.
Niggled along in 4th. Gained 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Better than midfield early. Unbalanced and dropped to midfield after 1000 M bend. Lost some ground approaching home bend before dropping back further entering straight.
Tracked leader. Hit front upon straightening and soon drew clear.
Travelled better than midfield and wide early. Forced wider and dropped to rear after 1000 M bend. Never recovered.
Wide throughout. Ridden to keep better than midfield position early stages. Dropped out from home bend.
Ridden to lead and held narrow advantage to straight. Weakened.
Began awkwardly. Improved to midfield at Rock. One-paced in straight.
Prominent. Shifted out 400 M to make some advancement final turn. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
In touch early. Soon in midfield when hampered and unbalanced near 1400 M and 1300 M. Gradual progress from home bend but was checked on inside passing 200 M. Kept on without threatening thereafter.
Prominent. Led field from 1400 M to 1000 M. Was 2nd until re-gaining advantage soon after straightening. Kept on well but was headed inside 100 M.
Towards rear. Slight progress along rail turning for home. Soon found no extra.
Raced keenly and was prominent. Pulled to the front 700 M. Kept on when headed final turn. Weakened final 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Inconvenienced and obliged to race wide turning in. Made no impression. (Demoted.)
In touch to home bend. Dropped out steadily.
Midfield or better. Dropped back a bit approaching 400 M. Towards rear turning in before running on a bit inside 200 M. (Demoted.)
Well there. Took narrow lead from 1000 M to 700 M. Was prominent until dropping out of contention rounding home bend.
Behind midfield. Progress along rail 400 M out to be 5th turning in. Ran on to take lead 100 M. Just held on.
Around midfield. Very moderate progress 350 M.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Very wide turning into straight. Made up some ground 200 M.
Lost ground at start, last to 400 M. Made up good ground in straight, never nearer.
Prominent early. Settled 3Ls off pace turning into back straight. Came under pressure passing Rock but soon dropped out.
Behind midfield. Made good headway on inside rounding home bend to be 2L 4th turning in. Ran on under pressure final 250 M but unable to peg back winner.
Settled behind leaders in 3rd. Made good progress rounding home bend to hit front turning for home. Kept on well.
Pushed along early from widest draw. Midfield to straight. Faded.
Settled behind leader. Took up running approaching Rock. Headed when under pressure turning in. Kept on until fading out of contention closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Effort approaching Rock. Gained 3rd passing 400 M. Kept on under pressure until finding no extra close home.
Crowded after start. Settled towards rear. Improved rounding home bend to be 5th turning in. Kept on without quickening.
Niggled along and given reminder early. Towards rear throughout.
Made running. Headed approaching Rock. Dropped out quickly rounding home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Around midfield throughout. Kept on in straight.
Rear. Gained good ground on inside rounding home bend to be midfield entering straight. Made further progress closing stages.
Remained in rear until making some progress turning in. Kept on.
Settled in rear. Widest runner rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Soon led, challenged turning in, already beaten when hampered 100 M out.
Behind midfield, improved from 500 M to 200 M then weakened.
In touch and kept on under pressure home straight.
Around midfield, some improvement along inner turning in, then soon beaten.
Around midfield, improved 600 M out and kept on home straight.
In touch, improved along inner turning in, led 200 M, unable to contain winner closing stages.
Forward midfield and widest stable bend, under pressure 400 M out and weakened.
Around midfield, under pressure 600 M out and never likely thereafter.
Well back, progress around field 500 M out, ran on home straight to lead closing stages.
Towards rear, ran on home straight.
Prominent, disputed lead turning in, weakened inside final 200 M and beaten when hampered 100 M out.
Behind midfield, kept on home straight.
Towards rear, niggled along far out and never likely to reach leaders.
Around midfield, under pressure 600 M out and gave ground.
Behind lead. Remained on inner in straight and kept on fairly.
Behind midfield. Responded only fairly in straight to make a little ground.
In front of midfield. When asked to improve around home bend, only kept on one-paced.
Hampered at start and remained at rear throughout.
Worked forward to sit off leader at 700 M after being prominent early. 3-wide turning in. Kept on strongly in run to line.
Behind midfield. Inclined to lay out in middle stages. Made home bend wide then kept on one-paced.
Midfield into home straight. Drifted out under pressure. Continued to make ground in run to line.
Led. Joined entering straight. Kept on fairly to hold 3rd place.
Began awkwardly and made first turn awkwardly. Ridden hard to improve to be wide in front of midfield at 600 M. Gave ground shortly afterwards.
At rear. Improved gradually from 600 M. Continued to make gradual ground through the field in the straight.
Behind midfield after being hampered at start. Under pressure around home bend. Kept on one-paced.
Prominent. Taken off fence to improve at 400 M. Joined leader on straightening. Taken to clear lead at 200 M. Too strong.
Behind midfield. Made up a little ground final 200 M, having tendency to hang in.
Mainly midfield. Steadily weakened final 200 M.
Well back. Dropped to last from 600 M. Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to 500 M. Gradually weakened.
Better than midfield. Closer order on home bend to be behind leader entering straight. Weakened gradually final 200 M.
Midfield throughout. Unable to quicken in straight. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield or worse. Moved a bit closer from 700 M. Failed to quicken from 250 M.
Dropped to last from widest draw. Steady progress from 500 M to be behind midfield and widest turning in. Continued to make ground, no extra closing stages.
Better than midfield. Responded well from 250 M. Won going away. (Promoted.)
Slowly away, settled at rear. Steady improvement on home bend to be wide and midfield entering straight. Ran on for a distant 2nd close home.
Soon led, drew 3Ls clear into straight. Headed at 150 M, kept on.
Well there to early straight. Dropped out steadily.
Towards rear. Steadied and shifted out to find running on straightening, did not quicken.
Prominent to early straight. Faded gradually.
Soon prominent, 2nd passing 600 M. Given reminders 200 M out. Responded well to take lead closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Kept on well final 200 M.
In touch to course proper. Weakened.
Missed the start badly, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made some progress final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily 300 M out.
Led field to 600 M, then remained in prominent position. Kept on well when checked 200 M and hampered near finish.
Around midfield. Made progress from course proper. Ran on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield early. Dropped to the rear at 500 M.
Started badly, towards rear. Steadied 700 M before making up some ground half-way. Maintained similar position while hanging out closing stages.
Towards rear. Made progress from 500 M to become midfield 200 M out. One-paced thereafter.
Well there, took lead from 600 M. Shifted in and caused interference 200 M. Was beaten narrowly closing stages.
Settled around midfield. Took closer order home bend. Quickened early in straight but not match speed of winner closing stages and kept on for 2nd place.
Made running to 350 M then dropped out.
Held up in midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Made good progress closing stages doing best work at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always prominent. Quickened to hit front after straightening but swamped inside final 200 M.
Travelled in better than midfield. Quickened to challenge early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Made up late ground in straight. Nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. Made up ground in straight doing best work at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well and close up early. Gradually dropped back to midfield rounding home bend. Ran on steadily down straight to claim 3rd place final strides.
Stumbled badly and lost position early. Quickly ridden and recovered to better than midfield home bend. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Began well and ridden early and wide. Settled in prominent position before joining leaders into straight. Soon weakened.
Restrained in midfield. Steadied 600 M out. Cruised to lead 200 M out down centre of straight to win unchallenged. (Promoted.)
Began awkwardly then held up in rear. Made no show in straight.
Soon prominent, chasing leader to straight. Dropped out quickly soon after straightening.
Held up in rear. Ran on gradually down straight to be nearest at finish.
In touch early, dropped steadily to midfield home bend. Weakened further in straight.
Midfield or better. Ran on steadily in straight to take control over final 100 M.
Prominent from widest draw. Dropped back from 4th upon straightening.
Settled towards rear. Ran on quite well from 300 M to claim 3rd closing stages.
Prominent, 3rd turning in. Kept on until failing to hold place final 150 M. (Demoted.)
Slowly away, recovered some ground to be in midfield. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Steadied passing 400 M. Made up good ground until one-paced close home.
Slightly slowly away, remained at rear. Recovered a little ground 250 M.
Prominent from wide draw, was 1-1/2Ls 2nd turning in. Took lead inside 250 M. Kept on when headed 100 M.
Rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Over-raced and pulled to the front passing 1200 M. Held on until headed 250 M, weakened while hanging out badly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly 9th before making up some ground under pressure inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit from 300 M. One-paced closing stages.
Settled behind leader. Came to challenge upon straightening but not much room 200 M out. Finished well. (Promoted.)
Never better than midfield. Dropped out into straight.
Around midfield to straight then gradually faded.
Towards rear. Gained some ground turning in. Kept on same pace in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight then dropped out. (Demoted.)
Held up in rear. Raced tightly between runners in straight and kept on steadily to the line.
Mainly behind midfield. Steadied home bend. Made up some late ground in straight.
Midfield. Ran on doggedly under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent and wide to straight. Kept on one pace without threatening closing stages.
Travelled mainly behind midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Began awkwardly and made running, crossing to inside gradually from poor draw. Headed early in straight but kept on same pace under pressure.
Prominent early. Steadied in midfield coming out of back straight. Kept on under pressure in home straight.
Tracked leader. Moved up to gain 1L advantage over 200 M out. Hung on well against runner-up's strong late challenge.
Checked and dropped to rear early. Remained there to straight where not clear run and only kept on steadily to the line.
Soon prominent, no extra final 200 M.
Soon led and kept on.
Never better than midfield.
Never better than midfield.
Around midfield, under pressure 400 M out and gave ground.
Hampered and stumbled start and never likely thereafter.
Poor start, recovered to midfield 400 M out, ran on final 300 M.
Poor start, soon under pressure and never likely to reach leaders.
Midfield or better.
Always in touch.
In touch, ran on final 300 M.
Never a factor.
Forward midfield to 400 M then soon beaten.
Soon prominent, weakened 300 M out.
Prominent. Was keeping on fairly until severely checked at 200 M when interfered with by runner on outside breaking down.
In front of midfield. Crowded at 800 M and 600 M. Unable to obtain clear run in straight and was checked at 200 M.
Began awkwardly. Waited with at rear, made moderate progress late.
Behind midfield throughout and never likely. Didn't quicken in straight.
Prominent and three wide. Remained same until finding no more final 200 M after being inconvenienced.
Midfield. Didn't quicken when pressure came on at 700 M. Made moderate improvement in straight.
Led early. Allowed one to improve around him at 1400 M and took sit. Stayed prominent until breaking down at 200 M.
Behind midfield throughout. Found no extra in straight.
Midfield into home straight. Responded well after 400 M but unable to match finishing effort of quinella pair.
Worked forward to lead at 1400 M. Stayed same until 200 M. Unable to hold off challengers but kept on fairly.
In front of midfield and 3 wide. Asked for effort at 500 M and prominent turning in. Reached lead approaching 200 M. Unable to hold off winner.

Ridden in prominent position with cover. Was crowded at 800 M and 600 M. Had difficulty finding a run early in straight. Was checked when disappointed for run 200 M. Made some ground late. (See Racing Incidents.)
At rear. Taken wide turning in. Moderate improvement late to passing tiring horses.
Midfield. Shifted away from fence at 500 M and crept closer. Taken into clear at 400 M and responded gamely to reach lead after 200 M. Kept on well to record strong win.

Ridden forward. Well there. Dropped back steadily from 900 M to midfield or better rounding home bend. Quickened well final 200 M to snatch win just before the post and held off challenge from 2nd horse.
Soon outpaced to the rear. Steady progress rounding home bend to be behind midfield turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish without threatening placed horses.
Midfield early. Steadily dropped back near 1000 M and trailed the field.
Jumped well from widest draw and moved across gradually to be just off the pace. Improved to 2nd from 850 M. Ran on well upon straightening and led 300 M out. Kept on until no extra final 100 M.
Mostly midfield or behind. Failed to make any impression in the straight.
Bumped at start and remained at rear. Awkwardly placed for some distance after 600 M. Made up good ground from 300 M despite being steadied and shifted out at 100 M.
Mainly in touch. Ran on well and took lead 100 M out. Kept on but was outsprinted by the first pair close home.
Broke well from wide draw but soon settled behind midfield. Went widest turning in. Responded well final 200 M and grabbed 2nd place final strides while being just held off by the winner.
Broke best. Led or disputed lead to home straight. Headed 300 M and then got crowded. Not a factor afterwards.
Soon moved up and led briefly at 1200 M before settling behind the leaders. Kept on well in straight until effort not sustained in the closing stages.
Soon midfield or better. Tired badly 300 M out.
At back. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield or better. Crowded slightly and lost a little ground at 800 M. Not a factor thereafter.
Prominent before dropping back to midfield from 1100 M. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Prominent early. Dropped steadily to behind midfield from 900 M, inconvenienced near 800 M. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Niggled along, always well there. Inconvenienced at 200 M and again close home.
Never far off, steadied near 800 M. Checked and lost position at 200 M. Kept on.
Never better than midfield. Unable to quicken in the straight, dipped at 100 M.
Broke best from wide draw and led briefly. Gradually dropped to behind midfield, caught wide most of the way. Made up a little late ground.
Towards rear, last turning in. Never in contention.
At the back. Responded well from 300 M to hit the front close home. (Promoted.)
Pushed along to be midfield, hampered at 800 M. Not a factor in the straight.
Ridden along from widest draw to be prominent. Quickened to lead 250 M out. Overhauled by the winner close home.
Pushed along and soon led. Headed 250 M out. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
Midfield. Made up some ground towards the finish.
Better than midfield. Ran on from 300 M to hold some chance inside final 200 M. Kept on well.
Lacked early pace and was soon last. Switched out behind DANSWINNER at 400 M, made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Made up a little ground towards the finish.
In touch. Squeezed and dropped to midfield approaching home bend. Made progress early in straight. Kept on one pace closing stages.
Settled just behind midfield. Stumbled approaching 600 M, dropping towards rear. No clear run early in straight. Stayed on.
Settled towards rear. Made headway rounding home bend to be midfield and widest turning in. Made good progress before fading inside 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily final 300 M but outsprinted by first pair close home.
Led or shared lead far side. Niggled along inside leader rounding home bend. Made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled behind midfield. Ran on final 250 M without threatening.
Began well. Settled at the back. Made up considerable ground final 300 M to grab victory close home.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground and rider losing iron momentarily. Remained at the back until making good progress final 300 M, doing best work towards finish.
In touch and raced keenly early stages. Weakened soon after straightening.
Tracked leaders before taking up running approaching home bend. Drew 3Ls clear early in straight but worn down closing stages.
In touch. Dropped out from home bend.
Midfield. Ran on early in straight. One-paced closing stages.
Jumped badly, losing ground. Ridden and recovered to be in touch approaching 1200 M. Steadied when denied a clear run early in straight. Found no extra thereafter.
Led or joint lead to 1000 M. Remained in prominent 3rd before weakening final 250 M.
Inconvenienced at start. Was last before ridden to reach midfield approaching 1200 M. Kept on steadily in straight.
Tracked leader. Hit front 350 M out. Kept on when outsprinted by the fast-finishing winner closing stages. Lost 2nd final strides.
Towards rear early. Soon moved up to midfield. Ran on final 300 M until one-paced closing stages.
Niggled along in midfield. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Gradually moved up along rail to be better than midfield approaching 1200 M. Gained 4th rounding home bend. Ran on steadily final 300 M to claim 2nd near finish.
Jumped badly, unbalancing rider. Towards rear throughout.
Pushed along from wide draw to lead soon after start. Headed 350 M out. Soon weakened.
Slightly slowly away. Settled in rear. Made up considerable ground final 300 M to assert authority closing stages. (Promoted.)
Prominent 3rd and raced keenly approaching 1200 M. Moved up to join leaders home turn. Weakened badly inside 300 M.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Inconvenienced at start. Remained well back until making some late ground inside 200 M.
Settled just behind midfield. No improvement in straight.
In touch to straight. Weakened gradually.
Settled in better than midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M.
Led field before joined from 700 M. Weakened when headed approaching 200 M.
Never a factor.
Mostly 6th. Unable to quicken in straight.
Slow into stride. Towards rear throughout.
Rear. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Soon 3rd, was 1-1/2Ls behind the leader turning in. Sustained effort to assert authority approaching 200 M. Won readily.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on quite well in straight.
Midfield to home turn. Weakened.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 200 M.
In touch until weakening out of contention inside 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend. Ran on from 7th early straight to gain 3rd close home.
Sat outside leader before sharing the lead from 700 M. Outsprinted by the winner final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Faded in straight. (Demoted.)
Settled just behind midfield. Ran on final 300 M.
Midfield to straight. Shifted into the clear 300 M out. Ran on quite well but unable to peg back winner.
Behind midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Inconvenienced at start. Towards rear. Made ground final 200 M.
Soon towards rear despite ridden along. Widest runner turning in. Made ground final 200 M.
Slowly away. Niggled along towards rear throughout.
Well there early, settling behind leaders in 3rd. Quickened in straight to hit front 250 M out. Kept on well to hold runner-up at bay.
Settled in better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled mainly in 4th better than midfield. Ran on final 300 M without threatening.
Ridden to muster early pace. Took slender lead from 1000 M. Kept on until headed 250 M out. Found no extra.
Led or shared lead early. Outside leader approaching home bend. Found nil upon straightening. (Demoted.)
Very sluggish at start. Remained well back until making some late progress inside 200 M.
Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
At the back. Ran on well 300 M to become 3rd inside 100 M. No threat to the quinella pair.
Jumped awkwardly, near rear, was widest upon straightening. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Pushed along from widest draw to become 2nd passing 1000 M. Faded out of contention 250 M out.
Prominent. Failed to maintain position from 250 M. Weakened.
Made running to 200 M. Found no extra under pressure.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to take command at 200 M. (Promoted.)
Started well from a wide draw, remained in touch to home turn. Dropped back steadily from 5th early straight, one-paced closing stages.
Rear. Slight progress rounding home bend. Hung out home turn and in straight. Ran on but finished wide out.
Was 5th or 6th early. Dropped back steadily from 1100 M.
Better than midfield. Steady progress home bend to be 4th early straight. Further improved to a close-up 3rd 250 M. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made some advancement along rail final turn but found no extra final 200 M.
Around midfield to straight. Kept on steadily.
Slightly better than midfield. Made no show soon after straightening.
Made all. Held on well.
Towards rear. Improved towards midfield when steadied coming out of back straight. Kept on early in straight but could find no extra closing stages.
Travelled mainly better than midfield despite hampered coming out of back straight. Found no extra closing stages.
Rear early. Soon moved up to midfield. Quickened well in straight to grab 2nd place close home.
Close up early. Lost position 800 M out before checked and lost further ground shortly afterwards. Dropped out upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled wide in midfield before checked and dropped to rear coming out of back straight. Never recovered.
Wide throughout. Rear early. Improved to midfield home bend. Continued to make ground upon straightening but failed to sustain effort closing stages.
Prominent to 250 M then weakened.
Always thereabouts, holding some chance turning into straight, then kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Mostly in midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Slowly away but soon recovered to rear of midfield. Checked coming out of back straight. Kept on same pace in straight.
Soon dropped to rear.
Travelled at the back. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Travelled mainly in better than midfield, then gradually faded passing 300 M.
Around midfield, found nothing home straight.
Went forward early, sent along 600 M, no response from 400 M out.
Around midfield, kept on home straight.
Prominent to 300 M then weakened.
Towards rear early, niggled along 600 M out and kept on home straight.
Well back, improved around field from 600 M, ran on to dispute lead final 100 M.
Forward midfield, prominent turning in, led briefly around 300 M, then weakened.
Forward midfield early, niggled along far out, under whip home turn and no response.
Led to 300 M then faded.
Behind midfield, checked when attempting to improve early in home straight, ran on when clear. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never a factor.
Midfield far side, soon under pressure and beaten far out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield, progress from 800 M, in touch turning in, led 200 M and kept on when challenged closing stages.
Behind midfield, some improvement from 600 M, ran on home straight.
Behind midfield after being slow to begin. Improved gradually on home bend to be midfield. Responded well to just miss second placing. (Promoted.)
Midfield throughout. Kept on one-paced.
Prominent and 3-wide early. Improved to be outside leader at 800 M. Took lead at 300 M. Kept on strongly but unable to hold off winner.
At rear. Commenced to improve after straightening. Made gradual ground to be closest at finish.
Midfield and 3-wide. Carried wider after 500 M when commencing to improve. Raced tightly early in straight. Finished well to be closest at finish. (Promoted.)
Ridden hard to be prominent and wide after being slow to begin. Gave ground quickly final 300 M. (Demoted.)
Led until giving ground after the 300 M.
With rear after beginning awkwardly. Shifted wide on home bend. After initially being slow to respond in the straight, finished strongly final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Didn't respond when asked for effort at 400 M. Never likely.
Followed leaders. Improved after straightening to reach lead after 200 M. Kept on strongly. (Promoted.)
Prominent. Free early and middle stages. Shifted out to avoid heels at 400 M. Effort told and only one-paced final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind leaders. Still there at 200 M then found no more.
Midfield. Kept on same pace until giving ground final 200 M.
Behind midfield and 3-wide. Inconvenienced early in straight by runner on inside hanging out. Kept on one-paced afterwards.
Steadily dropped to the rear. Never in contention.
Soon prominent. Caught wide in early stages, took lead at 600 M. Kicked clear turning in, won unchallenged.
Prominent to 100 M, faded.
Jumped rather awkwardly and steadied just after the start. At the back. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, recovered to be better than midfield. Crowded at 800 M. Dropped out from 250 M.
Midfield or worse. Hung out in early and middle stages. Never in contention.
Midfield. Wide in back straight. Improved around home bend, well there turning in. Weakened badly from 300 M.
Midfield or worse. Steadied at 800 M, made up good ground from 300 M.
Dropped to the back. Never a factor.
Slowly away, soon midfield. Crowded at 800 M, ran on well from 300 M, winner too strong. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden to lead. Headed at 700 M. Weakened gradually from 200 M.
Slowly away, soon recovered to be in midfield. Closer order turning in. Tightened at the 200 M when giving ground.
Towards the rear. Made up a little ground final 300 M.
Just behind the leaders, one-paced in straight.
Prominent. Weakened final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Remained 5th or 6th throughout. One-paced when steadied 300 M.
Never far off. Kept on without quickening final 200 M.
Led early, still holding 3Ls advantage early straight. Held on until headed final 50 M.
Behind midfield. Made some improvement from final turn. Crowded and steadied early straight, then one-paced.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a bit passing 1000 M. Under pressure early straight, made no show. Raced greenly throughout.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped back to the rear rounding home bend and was last soon after straightening. Ran on from outside 300 M, never nearer.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily final 400 M to claim 3rd inside 150 M.
Tardy start, remained at rear. Made slight progress from 600 M and was 4-wide turning in. Responded well in straight to take over the leader close home.
Well there, tracked leader to 400 M. Failed to hold place when weakened 250 M.
Mostly in prominent position to 400 M then weakened.
Began awkwardly dropping to rear. Remained behind until making late impression closing stages.
Always in last few.
Always thereabouts. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Began fairly. Soon took up running and led until headed 300 M out. Gradually faded.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Slightly slowly away. Soon recovered to midfield. Took closer order home bend. Moved up to lead 300 M out then never threatened. (Promoted.)
Always well there. Kept on same pace without quickening. Hung out throughout.
Settled just behind midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Travelled better than midfield before steadied and dropped towards rear home bend. Made up some late ground closing stages. (Demoted.)
Settled towards rear. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Never a factor.
Better than midfield. Came under pressure home bend. Weakened upon straightening.
Began well. Settled in midfield. Renewed effort entering straight. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd inside final 200 M.
Held 4th or 5th until weakening out of contention 200 M out.
Towards rear. Moved up to around midfield 1200 M. Maintained similar position thereafter.
Towards rear. Made ground from 300 M. Continued to run on through runners after steadied for a run at 200 M.
Led field from 1400 M. Found no extra when headed 150 M.
Made no show. (Bled.)
Tardy start. Never a factor. (Demoted.)
Slightly behind midfield. Was awkwardly placed behind a runner passing 300 M. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Always prominent. Came to tackle leader 300 M, taking advantage 150 M. Kept on when headed inside final 50 M.
In touch before dropping to 6th when inconvenienced 800 M. Made progress final turn to become prominent early straight. Found no extra closing stages.
In touch. Was checked 300 M and around 150 M. Did not recover.
Around midfield. Crept closer order from outside turning in. Ran on under pressure 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Dropped back gradually to the last near 1100 M. Ran on steadily from outside in straight.
Led briefly early, then settled in prominent position. Ran on from 3rd at 200 M to assert authority close home.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Made progress from 600 M. Weakened closing stages.
Wide throughout. Raced keenly and improved to midfield home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Settled around midfield. Ran on in straight but just missed a place.
Began slowly. Quickly recovered to prominent position. Just behind leader turning into straight and quickened to take charge 200 M out.
Trailed field most of way.
Began slowly. Soon recovered to midfield. Came to challenge under pressure entering straight and ran on steadily without threatening.
Prominent briefly. Soon dropped to rear.
Ridden early, settling in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Soon took up running and led until headed 300 M out, then weakened.
Prominent to straight then tightened and faded.
Settled in rear. Took closer order home bend. Made up good ground in straight to claim 3rd final strides.
Midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. Made up some ground from towards rear into straight. (Demoted.)
Always in last few.
Prominent to straight then one-paced.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Mostly midfield.
Led, headed approaching 200 M and weakened.
Around midfield, ran on under pressure from 400 M out.
Behind midfield, niggled along far out, kept on home straight.
Prominent, every chance turning in, one pace home straight.
Poor start, at rear, kept on doggedly closing stages. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield, widest turning in, progress final 200 M.
Prominent, led over 200 M out and won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Forward midfield, weakened 300 M out and dropped away.
Slow away and behind midfield, improved along inner turning in and kept on.
Poor start, towards rear and never likely.
Towards rear, improved home straight to be nearest at finish.
Slow away and never likely.
Forward midfield, no extra home straight.
Behind midfield. Into clear at 350 M. Responded gamely under hard riding to reach lead in the concluding stages.
Prominent. Over-raced when forced to race without cover 3 wide in early and middle stages. Kept on strongly after challenging at 300 M.
Around midfield and wide without cover. Did not respond after straightening.
Began awkwardly and taken back to rear. Remained same into home straight when taken to outside. Very moderate response.
Midfield. Loomed as main chance when improving at 300 M. Kept on until one paced last bit.
Near rear. Remained on inner around home bend. Made good ground early straight. Not a lot of room to keep going forward last bit.
With rear throughout. No response in straight.
In front of midfield. Moved closer rounding home turn. Kept on behind leaders until giving ground final 100 M.
Behind lead. Joined lead on straightening. Kept on strongly. Unable to hold off winner last bit.
Near rear throughout and never likely.
Near rear after beginning awkwardly. Improved to midfield at 800 M. Was responding strongly until checked when disappointed for run at 200 M. No clear run afterwards and was not tested.
Near rear and 3 wide. Carried wide turning. Made moderate ground in straight and never looked likely.
Led. Strongly challenged on straightening and kept on until giving ground final 200 M.
Followed leader. Into clear on straightening. Kept on to hold some chance until one paced last bit.
Close-up early, dropped steadily towards rear at 800 M. Made up a little late ground.
Reared at start, lost a lot of ground. At the back until making ground steadily from 500 M, weakened badly from 200 M.
Settled towards rear, became unbalanced near the 600 M. Made up good ground final 300 M.
Always handy, kept on well without threatening the first two.
Better than midfield to 200 M, then kept on one-paced.
Prominent, took up running from 700 M. Headed 250 M out, steadily weakened, became unbalanced and stumbled near the 100 M.
Settled in better than midfield. Quickened well to lead 200 M out, won comfortably.
Led briefly, then remained prominent to 100 M, weakened gradually.
Settled in better than midfield. Responded well final 250 M, though never likely to peg back the winner.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Ran on steadily from 300 M, one-paced closing stages.
Better than midfield to 700 M, not in contention thereafter.
At rear. Hung out final 400 M, made good progress 200 M out.
Well back, never a factor.
Prominent to 200 M, kept on one-paced.
Mostly around midfield. Quickened well final 400 M and took lead 200 M out. Won easily.
Crowded at start and remained at back. Made up good ground in straight to grab 3rd place right on the line.
Mainly towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight but lost 3rd place right on the line.
Soon settled in midfield. Kept on under pressure in straight. Crowded and checked at 200 M. Not a threat thereafter.
Always well there. 2nd turning in. Kept on well without threatening the winner.
Sat outside leader before leading from stable bend. Kept on until headed 200 M out. Tired closing stages.
Soon settled at rear. Improved down the back straight to be 2nd at 1000 M. Hung out rounding home bend and upon straightening. Weakened final 200 M.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
Led to stable bend while over-racing and then remained in touch to 1100 M before dropping back to midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Prominent early. Slightly inconvenienced and dropped towards midfield approaching home bend. Jostled turning in and not much room early in straight. Ran on steadily final 300 M.
Soon moved up to be better than midfield. Made modest progress final 300 M before hampered near 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed along from wide draw to be just better than midfield approaching home bend. Weakened after straightening.
Close up early. Dropped towards midfield turning into home bend. One-paced in straight.
Settled in rear. Checked approaching 1000 M. Remained at the back and wide turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Shared lead before settled behind leader after 800 M. Kept on one pace in straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield when severely checked passing 1000 M, dropping to rear. Making ground in straight before checked again near 100 M.
Raced keenly sharing lead early. Settled behind leaders in 3rd turning into home bend. Weakened final 300 M.
Sluggish at start. Moving up towards midfield when hampered near 900 M. Remained just behind midfield to straight. Ran on steadily final 300 M.
Behind midfield. Shifted out for clear run turning in. Ran on well final 250 M to snatch victory close home.
Towards rear. Made steady progress final 300 M.
Midfield and widest early. Moved up to lead passing 800 M. Went 2Ls clear early in straight. Kept on under pressure but grabbed near finish.
In touch. Quickened to hold some chance 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend on rails to be midfield into straight. One-paced.
Slightly better than midfield. Made ground along rail on home turn to be 5th upon straightening. Ran on to reach 2nd inside 200 M but unable to threaten winner. (Promoted.)
Close up. Took lead passing 1000 M. Kept on when headed 350 M out. One-paced closing stages.
Soon dropped to last. Trailed the field until making up some ground final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Niggled along in midfield. One-paced in straight until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Took brief lead before settled in 2nd passing 1000 M. Quickened well upon straightening to hit front 350 M out. Kept on well to the line. (Promoted.)
Soon dropped towards rear. Made up some ground final 250 M but found no extra closing stages.
Just behind midfield. Weakened steadily in straight.
Close up early. Soon dropped to be just better than midfield. Weakened final 250 M. (Bled.)
Prominent. Kept on but unable to quicken inside final 200 M.
Close up early, then settled in 3rd. Weakened soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. Made progress on outside rounding home bend to be 6th turning in. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Behind midfield. Dropped back slightly approaching 800 M. Ran on without threatening final 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Made up some ground when under pressure in straight.
Never in contention. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Crept closer order turning into straight. Kept on without quickening final 200 M.
Soon led and made all. Held on well.
Towards rear. Became unbalanced when hampered 450 M. Ran on well to make up good ground final 250 M.
Midfield. Was checked near 450 M. Kept on the same until making a little late ground closing stages.
Behind midfield. Widest turning in. No progress.
In touch. Became 4th approaching the Rock. Ran on steadily to dispute for 2nd passing 200 M.
Towards rear. Slightly inconvenienced passing 500 M. No significant improvement in straight.
Slowly away, rear to 400 M. Made good progress along rail to be nearest at finish.
In touch until dropping slightly to midfield home turn. Tended to lay in early straight. Unable to quicken.
Always 2nd, was 2Ls behind lead final turn. Kept on but unable to catch the winner.
Unbalanced after start, pushed along and obliged to be wide in midfield. Dropped out from 400 M.
Pushed along from widest draw to become prominent far side. Dropped back steadily from 400 M to be 5th turning in. One-paced.
Wide throughout. Midfield to home bend, then dropped out.
Midfield and wide throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Made running to home bend. Remained prominent before dropping out quickly final 200 M.
Given reminders early in midfield. Steadied turning into stable bend, dropping towards rear. Gained ground on rails to be midfield turning in. Kept on when checked 200 M out. Never recovered. (Bled.)
Settled behind leaders. Found nothing in straight.
Well back early. Made headway from 800 M but was widest rounding home bend. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to hit front close home and held off runner-up's challenge.
Rear of midfield. Unbalanced and lost action approaching 800 M, dropping to last position passing Rock. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Inconvenienced on stable bend and before home bend. Gained ground on inside to be behind midfield turning in. Ran on final 200 M.
Sluggish at start. Settled at the back. Made progress rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on steadily but failed to peg back winner. (Rider dropped whip near 200 M.)
Prominent. Went wide turning into straight. Kept on without quickening.
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Quickened well upon straightening to hit front final 200 M out. Kept on but headed near finish.
Prominent and wide early. Settled behind leader far side. Quickened to lead on home bend. Headed 200 M out. Found no extra. (Demoted.)
Niggled along mainly in midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
Led field before joined at 1200 M. Kept on when headed turning in. Faded out of contention final 200 M.
Pushed along from a wide draw to join lead from 1200 M. Gained slender advantage final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Midfield. Shifted to the inside to make ground early straight. One-paced closing stages.
Never in contention. (Hung out throughout.)
Always there, was in a close-up 4th turning in. Kept on well without threatening.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd 850 M. Slightly inconvenienced at 200 M. Kept on to the line.
Slightly slowly away, remained at rear. Very minor progress early straight. Weakened 200 M.
Rear. Made progress from 600 M to become 8th rounding home bend. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out upon straightening. (Demoted.)
Prominent early, settled 6th. Ran on well from outside to take control 200 M. Won unchallenged. (Promoted.)
Midfield or behind. Dropped back from 500 M. Hung out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always there. Made some improvement early straight. Unable to quicken inside 150 M.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Soon in rear. Made up ground past beaten horses inside final 200 M. (See Racing incidents.)
Always towards rear.
Never in the hunt.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Travelled in joint 5th just better than midfield. Hampered inside final 200 M and kept on steadily to the line.
Began well. Settled in prominent position. Fought on well in straight to get up at finish.
In similar position throughout. One-paced closing stages.
Well there. Tightened for a stride over 150 M out, then one-paced.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress in straight.
Jumped in rear. Quickly into lead before Rock. Just worn down final strides.
Led early. Well there. Dropped to 4th into straight. Kept on steadily to finish.
Mostly in 5th before making up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Well back until making modest late progress closing stages.
Always towards rear.
Led to 500 M, then gradually gave ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield, under pressure 800 M out and dropped out.
Behind midfield, some improvement from 400 M out.
Checked early and well back, kept on from 600 M to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield and never likely.
Forward midfield, weakened final 200 M. (Hung out throughout.)
Around midfield, under pressure far out and soon beaten.
Well back and never a factor.
At rear, ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Prominent, led 500 M to inside 200 M.
Around midfield, kept on under pressure from 500 M out.
Around midfield, in touch turning in, no extra closing stages.
In touch, niggled along far out, led inside 200 M, kept on under pressure.
Behind midfield, kept on from 400 M out.
Near rear. Commenced to improve at 500 M. Still making ground until checked when disappointed for a run after straightening. Once balanced again made ground in run to line.
Midfield. Taken into clear after straightening. Responded well but unable to match winner.
Midfield. Made home bend wide. Responded well in straight and continued to make steady ground in run to line.
Prominent after beginning awkwardly. Gave ground from the 600 M. (Demoted.)
Slow to begin but soon improved to midfield. Remained on inner around home turn. Made ground to be prominent at 200 M. One-paced afterwards.
Equal lead early and steadied to get cover at 1100 M. Took narrow lead on straightening. Gave ground final 200 M.
Equal lead early. Went to clear lead at 1100 M. Headed on straightening. Gave ground final 300 M.
In front of midfield. Made ground early in straight to hold good chance at 200 M. Kept on well but unable to match quinella pair.
In front of midfield. Improved after straightening. Reached lead at 200 M. Kept on strongly. (Promoted.)
Behind midfield. Was checked at the 500 M. Made some ground in the straight until not being able to find clear running over final 100 M.
Soon near rear. Was checked at 800 M. Remained with rear and was widest turning in. Made some progress in straight but was never likely.
Behind lead. Remained prominent until finding no extra when asked for effort after 300 M.
At rear. Remained same until saving ground by remaining on inner on the home turn. Made good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide behind midfield. No response in straight.
Mainly midfield. Made up a little ground towards the finish.
Mainly midfield, crowded turning out of the straight the first time, weakened badly final 150 M, hung in.
Behind the leader, took narrow lead early straight. Kept on well.
At the back. Made up some ground towards the finish.
Behind leaders to the straight. Kept on until no extra close home.
Midfield or worse. Failed to quicken in straight.
Midfield, checked near the winning post the first time, dropped to the back. Last turning in, not a factor afterwards. (Rider broke whip.)
Slowly away, at the back. Made up a little ground final 100 M.
Always well there, kept on one-paced.
Tardy start, soon midfield or better. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Severely checked near winning post the first time, dropped towards the rear. Made up some ground towards the finish.
Jumped awkwardly, settled at the back. Progress from 700 M, wide turning in, ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon dropped to the rear. Closer order around home bend, failed to quicken in straight.
Ridden to lead. Headed early straight, kept on until faded closing stages.
Always there. Ran on under pressure in straight to take brief lead passing 200 M. Effort not sustained.
Dropped towards rear early stages. No progress.
Among the front runners before settling 3rd 900 M. Failed to maintain position in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Well there. Disputed lead 900 M out. Gained slender advantage early straight. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Slowly away, soon last. (Lame.)
In touch. Dropped to midfield when racing greenly and checked 700 M. Ran on from 6th early straight to hit front briefly near 50 M. Unable to contain the winner.
Midfield. Was hanging out when turning for home. Made up good ground in straight, just lost a minor placing at finish.
Was prominent before racing in midfield passing 1000 M. Ran on well final 300 M to assert authority closing stages.
Near rear to straight. Hung in when whipped 300 M. Kept on well while ridden hands and heels to the line. (See Racing incidents.)
Well there, disputed lead from 900 M to early straight. Dropped out final 200 M. (Finished distressed and uncoordinated.)
Towards rear. Severely checked passing 800 M. Kept on in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Hard ridden in midfield early. Took over coming into stable bend then never headed.
Prominent with brief lead passing winning post the first time. Weakened from 450 M.
Always in rear. Pulled up approaching 600 M. (Bled.)
Prominent early stages, then travelled mainly in midfield. Came under reminders halfway out and weakened from home turn.
Never far off. Came to tackle leader turning into straight but never threatening.
Settled at the back. Made up late ground past beaten runners in straight.
Soon took up running setting slow pace. Led until headed over 1600 M out. Remained in prominent position before dropping out from 450 M. (Demoted.)
Never better than midfield.
Settled in rear of midfield. Came under pressure rounding home bend but had no more to give closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily final 300 M.
Never in contention.
Started badly, soon recovered ground to become just behind midfield. Dropped out from 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tardy start, soon recovered ground to be better than midfield. Lost some ground when hampered 400 M. Renewed effort thereafter to be nearest at finish.
Soon midfield. Made progress final turn to be 3rd turning in. Sustained effort in straight to take control final 100 M.
Well there, 2Ls 2nd final turn. Failed to hold place final 250 M.
Midfield or behind. Ran on steadily 300 M to claim 2nd closing stages.
Prominent. Faded out of contention final 400 M. (Bled.)
Stood flat-footed at start, losing a lot of ground. Never a factor.
Led, holding 2Ls advantage early straight. Kept on same pace when headed final 100 M.
Mainly 4th to 250 M. Weakened. (Demoted.)
Better than midfield. Ran on 350 M but unable to quicken closing stages.
Near rear. Ran on from 300 M, never nearer.
Towards rear throughout. (Demoted.)
Mainly around midfield. Gained 5th on rails entering straight. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Wide throughout and in midfield to halfway. Took closer order around home bend but was some 5L 6th turning in when hung out. Produced moderate late impression to claim 3rd closing stages.
Travelled just better than midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend and sustained progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Attempted to make all. Found no extra and headed 200 M out.
Chased in 3rd to 200 M then weakened.
Tracked leader. Took charge 200 M out, then never threatened.
Never in contention.
Raced very wide towards rear throughout, with some late progress closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to halfway then gradually weakened.
Trailed field to 400 M. Finished well.
Always in last few.
Around midfield. Came under pressure halfway out, but soon weakened from home bend.
In similar position throughout.
Never better than midfield.
Around midfield, ran on from 300 M out.
Always in touch, led approaching 200 M and kept on.
Poor start and towards rear, some improvement to be nearest at finish.
Forward midfield early, under pressure 400 M out and weakened 200 M.
Prominent, disputed lead about 200 M out, no extra closing stages.
Led, headed outside 200 M and weakened. (Bled.)
Around midfield.
Led standside group, no extra closing stages.
Poor start and never likely.
Well back to 400 M, then steady improvement to finish.
Poor start, towards rear standside, improved final 200 M.
Around midfield, ran on from 300 M out.
Inconvenienced start, soon under pressure and never likely.
Midfield and 3 wide. Kept on to hold position in straight.
Followed leader. Gained run on straightening to look good chance. Gave ground final 150 M.
In front of midfield. Made steady ground under hard riding in straight to just miss second placing.
In front of midfield. Kept on to hold position in straight.
Near rear. Inconvenienced at 800 M and awkwardly placed on heels around home turn. Had difficulty finding clear running in straight. Finished well.
Midfield after being crowded at the start. Remained same until after 300 M. Doing best work at finish when finishing strongly.
Behind midfield and 3 wide. Found no extra in straight.
Led and made all.
Knuckled at the start and then behind midfield after being inconvenienced at 800 M. Had difficulty finding clear running in straight and not properly tested.
At rear. Taken to extreme outside on straightening. Made good ground in the run to the line despite being well beaten.
In front of midfield and 3 wide without cover. Kept on to hold position in straight.
Sat outside leader after being unable to cross to fence early. Kept on strongly but unable to make any impression on winner. (Promoted.)
Midfield. Found no extra in straight.
Always well there. Sat outside leader from 800 M. Tired badly upon straightening. (Hung out.)
Jumped well before settling in midfield from 1000 M. Ran on final 300 M without threatening the first pair.
Soon moved across to settle towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Mainly around midfield. Not a factor upon straightening. (Demoted.)
Jumped best and was never far off. Kept on until no extra in the closing stages.
Soon outpaced towards rear. Took closer order along rail rounding home bend. Kept on one-paced until weakening closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Always at rear. Last turning in. Ran past well beaten horses in the straight.
Niggled along behind midfield. Ran on steadily from home bend without threatening the winner.
Missed the start and was then checked towards rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Well there to 400 M. Soon tired and dropped steadily out of contention.
Mainly midfield or better. 4th turning in. Improved to 3rd at 300 M. Kept on well until effort not sustained in the closing stages.
Midfield early. Steady headway along rail from 1000 M to be 2nd turning in. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
Hard ridden forward along rail to take up running. Kept on well in straight to win comfortably despite drifting out.
Tardy start and remained at back. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled at the back. Made up good ground final 300 M, shifting out in the run to the winning post.
Behind midfield or worse throughout.
Settled near the rear. Made up good ground from 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield throughout. Unable to quicken in straight.
Midfield. Weakened steadily from 200 M.
Soon held narrow lead. Headed 300 M out, dropped out rapidly.
Began awkwardly, well back. Never in contention.
Towards rear. Made up some ground from 400 M, steadied and changed course near the 250 M.
Prominent to 350 M. Faded steadily. (Demoted.)
Began awkwardly, ridden along and gradually recovered to be behind leaders at 1500 M. Kept on quite well until hampered twice in the run to the line.
Soon dropped to last from widest draw. Made up a little ground from 300 M.
Handy. Hit the front 300 M out, headed at 150 M. Kept on quite well.
Well there to 300 M, kept on one-paced.
Settled better than midfield. Quickened well to hit the front 150 M out, won comfortably.
Amongst leaders early. Settled some 2Ls off pace rounding home bend. Weakened final 300 M.
Hampered at start, dropping to last position. Remained at the back and widest turning in. Made moderate late progress closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled in better than midfield. Ran on after straightening to hit front inside final 200 M. Just caught on line.
Settled towards rear. Ran on final 300 M without threatening.
Towards rear. Took closer order home bend but wide turning in. Made modest progress final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Behind midfield. Made no progress in straight.
Settled in rear. Making up ground when steadied to change course 300 M out. Continued to make progress.
Led briefly then settled behind leader. Failed to quicken upon straightening. Found no extra final 200 M.
Pushed along to muster early pace. Took up running approaching 1000 M. Headed inside 200 M and weakened.
Pushed along early to share lead. Settled behind leaders rounding home bend. Kept on one pace before no extra final 200 M.
Jumped well. Gradually settled in midfield. Ran on well final 300 M to just get up at finish.
Mainly midfield. Ran on under pressure final 300 M without threatening.
In touch early. Improved to prominent position approaching home bend. Kept on but dropped back when inconvenienced inside 150 M.
Midfield. Checked approaching 800 M. Ran on inside 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Prominent and wide early. Gradually dropped to midfield passing 1000 M. Took closer order rounding home bend. Kept on until finding no extra final 200 M.
Never far off. Ran on final 250 M but unable to catch first pair.
Made running to 250 M. Checked 150 M out when giving ground.
Soon at the back. Made no show. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sluggish at start, remained in rear. Steadied near 900 M and upon straightening. Made ground but unable to obtain clear run final 250 M.
Settled outside leader. Quickened soon after straightening to hit front 250 M out. Kept on when headed closing stages.
Behind midfield. Came under pressure approaching 1000 M, reaching midfield rounding home bend. Did not obtain clear running along rail final 200 M.
Soon towards rear. Widest rounding home bend. Made no improvement in straight.
Prominent. Kept on without quickening in straight.

Towards rear. Steadied near 800 M. Made some progress rounding home bend but was wide turning in. Ran on steadily final 300 M to hit front closing stages. Just caught by the fast-finishing winner final stride.
Slightly behind midfield. Steadied near 850 M, dropping towards rear rounding home bend. Ran on well final 200 M to snatch victory on the line.
Soon led. Was joined passing 800 M. Found no extra when headed early straight.
In touch. Dropped to midfield 600 M. Weakened in straight.
In touch. Went forward to join lead passing 800 M, gaining slender advantage briefly on straightening. Kept on but unable to quicken close home.
Towards rear. Made progress from 800 M to be 6th turning in. Continued to make ground in straight to gain 2nd close home.
Lost ground at start, always at the back. Hung out and was very wide throughout.
Towards rear. Ran on well to make up good ground in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Never in contention.
Behind midfield. No progress.
Slowly away, towards rear. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Jumped well and led briefly. Soon raced 3rd before reaching lead early straight. Went clear 200 M, held on well to the line. (Promoted.)
In touch early, dropped back from 900 M.
Prominent. Dropped to just better than midfield home bend. Unable to quicken in straight.
Midfield. Steadied along rail at 700 M. Never recovered.
Prominent to straight. Kept on on pace until fading closing stages.
Close up early. Taken back to some 2Ls off pace in 5th far side. Dropped to midfield rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Never a factor.
Settled towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend to be better than midfield turning in. Quickened well to hit front 300 M out. Gained upper hand despite jostled inside 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Remained in rear until making up good ground final 300 M despite inconvenienced by runner shifting out closing stages.
Sluggish at start. Pushed along early to be behind midfield. Came under pressure rounding home bend but dropped towards rear into straight.
Settled in rear. Hampered near 1600 M and dropped to last position approaching home bend. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon took up running. Settled behind leader from 1200 M. Dropped to 3rd rounding home bend. Weakened final 300 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on well alongside winner in straight. Shifted out inside final 200 M.

Niggled along in better than midfield early. Raced keenly turning into back straight and soon moved up to prominent position. Took closer order home bend before taking brief lead early in straight. Found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Came under reminders rounding home bend. Made steady progress inside final 300 M without threatening.
Behind midfield early. Raced keenly turning into back straight and moved up to lead from 1200 M. Headed early in straight, then dropped out.
Settled mainly in midfield. Wide turning in. Made progress final 250 M before no extra close home. (Sore.)
In touch. Ran on steadily to reach 2nd 250 M. Kept on closing stages.
Midfield to 500 M. Dropped back steadily.
Prominent briefly, soon dropped to behind midfield. Was widest near rear turning in. Made up a little late ground.
In touch to 250 M. Weakened.
Led field before joined passing 800 M. Went clear turning in. Strongly challenged by the runner-up closing stages. Just held on.
Towards rear. Slight improvement rounding home bend. No further progress. (Demoted.)
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on under pressure final 250 M.
Made no show. (Demoted.)
Towards rear. Advanced to midfield turning. One-paced thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Made progress from outside at 700 M to be 2nd upon straightening. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Prominent. Shared lead 800 M out until headed final turn. Weakened inside 250 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 200 M out.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 300 M. Just failed to catch the winner.
Well there. Took over far side. Joined briefly turning into straight but soon went clear. (Promoted.)
Always towards rear.
Made no show.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Not clear run on rails early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled in last few. Commenced run entering straight but no clear passage. Finished well to miss 2nd place narrowly.
Settled in rear of midfield. Took closer order home bend. One-paced in straight.
Midfield early stages. Dropped out far side. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led early. Prominent to straight. Failed to quicken under pressure.
Settled towards rear. Headway into straight. Ran on quite well and just held 2nd place final strides.
Niggled along in prominent position. Lost some ground halfway out and faded from home bend.
Never far off to straight then faded gradually.
Well there. Disputed lead turning into straight but soon faded.
Prominent to straight then dropped out. (Bled.)
Sent up to be in touch and kept on under pressure to finish.
Around midfield and sent along far out.
Towards rear, ran on from 300 M.
In touch, kept on to finish.
Disputed lead to approaching 200 M, then faded.
Never a factor.
Around midfield, improved along inner home turn, led approaching 200 and kept on.
Behind midfield, some improvement from 600 M, ran on home straight.
Forward midfield, gave ground final 200 M.
Close up, weakened final 200 M.
Mostly around midfield.
Never a factor. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield, ran on final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Disputed lead to 300 M, hampered when beaten and dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
3-wide outside lead early. Dropped to behind leaders at 1000 M. Remained same into straight when found no extra.
Behind midfield. Moved closer on home bend. Kept on strongly despite being hampered and carried wider by horse on inside hanging out.
Near rear. Commenced to make good ground after 400 M. Was checked when disappointed for run at the 200 M. When balanced again made ground in run to line.
At rear throughout.
In front of midfield and free. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Midfield. Asked for effort after straightening. Made some improvement until run ended 100 M out.
Near rear. Improved around the field from the 500 M. Was hampered and carried wide in straight. Kept on fairly without ever looking likely.
Behind midfield. Waited with until after straightening. Continued to make ground in run to line.
Led. Stayed same until giving ground final 250 M.
In front of midfield. Improved after 500 M to be 3-wide outside lead on straightening. Gave ground final 300 M.
Midfield and 3-wide. Moved closer on home turn. Asked for effort after straightening. Hung out in straight. Reached lead momentarily approaching 200 M but couldn't match the winner.
