Led field to 400 M. Faded. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear and was wide throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. Ran on well 400 M to take 2nd inside 250 M. No match with the winner.
Midfield or better. Made no show in straight.
Pushed forward to soon be prominent. Dropped back from 600 M. (Demoted.)
In touch. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily in straight.
Prominent. Was 2Ls 4th 400 M. Found no extra final 250 M.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Made ground steadily in straight.
Prominent. Cruised to the front final turn. Won unchallenged. (Promoted.)
Towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Near rear. Progressed to midfield early straight. Ran on steadily but just failed to obtain a minor placing. (Sore.)
Began well but settled towards rear and wide. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in midfield. Gained 5th shortly after straightening. Hampered and lost ground before fighting on to recover position closing stages.
Chased leader to straight. Came to tackle leader upon straightening but dropped out quickly.
Midfield, racing keenly far side. Made moderate progress early in straight but soon one-paced.
Rear early but quickly improved to forward of midfield. Made further headway home bend to dispute lead into straight holding every chance. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Began very slowly. Remained well back. Went widest turning into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Soon ridden to lead and attempted to make all. No extra under pressure and overhauled passing 200 M.
Settled in prominent 3rd. Quickened to join leaders inside final 200 M but outsprinted closing stages.
Well back until making good late ground closing stages.
Travelled in rear of midfield to straight. No clear passage until making good late impression close home.
Well back. Saved ground turning in on inside rails. Kept on steadily in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off to straight then one-paced.
Settled towards rear. No clear passage early in straight. Quickened well inside final 200 M to get up at finish.
Settled towards rear. Ran on upon straightening to hit front inside final 200 M but caught near finish.
Dropped back from widest draw and never likely.
Midfield or worse, beaten far out.
Never a factor.
Went forward from wide draw, dropped back to midfield, steady progress from 500 M to line.
Widest on stable bend and then behind midfield, improved to midfield far side, kept on home straight.
Led or disputed lead to 400 M, then gave ground.
Behind midfield and never likely.
In touch, sent along 600 M out, hit front 100 M and kept on. (Promoted.)
Around midfield, shaken up 800 M out, in touch turning in, no extra final 200 M. (Sore.)
Prominent, led 400 M to 100 M and kept on. (Bled.)
Went forward from poor draw, caught wide stable bend around midfield far side, niggled along far out, no extra home straight.
Around midfield before giving ground over 600 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Poor start, behind midfield, shaken up 600 M, ran on final 200 M.
Midfield or worse.
Behind midfield. Made ground along inner to be midfield on straightening. Kept on in that position until giving ground final 100 M.
Prominent and 4-wide without cover from outside draw. Made home turn awkwardly. Improved after straightening to hold 2nd place at 200 M. One-paced afterwards.
Midfield. Moderate response early in straight. One-paced final bit.
Prominent. Under pressure on home turn and gave ground soon after.
Prominent. No response after straightening.
Outside leader. Kept on one-paced in straight. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Kept on until giving ground final 150 M. (Demoted.)
Near rear after being inconvenienced at start. Remained same into home straight. Responded well after 300 M and was doing best work at finish.
Behind midfield and 4-wide. Made ground after 400 M. Final 200 M kept on without improving position.
Rear early after being checked at start. Improved to be behind midfield at 800 M. Midfield on straightening. Responded well in straight, despite shifting ground, to go down narrowly.
Led. Hung out on home turn. Found no extra after straightening.
Followed leader. Gained rails run after straightening to reach lead. Held clear lead until after 200 M when unable to hold off quinella pair.
Rear. Improved quickly through field after straightening to be prominent at 200 M. Went on with it to score narrow but strong win.
With rear into home straight. Made gradual ground in straight when passing mainly tiring horses.
Worse than midfield, progress around home bend to be in touch entering straight. Kept on well.
Bounded in the air at start, soon moved up to midfield. Faded final 200 M.
Soon at the back. Never a factor.
Towards rear, progress from 700 M to be midfield on outside turning in. Made up a little ground in the closing stages.
Ridden to lead from widest draw, headed 100 M out. Kept on.
Never better than midfield.
Slowly away and was inconvenienced, at the back. Steadied at 300 M and changed course. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Better than midfield, unable to quicken.
Behind leader to 300 M. Steadily weakened. (Demoted.)
Worse than midfield throughout. Crowded in early stages.
Jumped well, caught wide in back straight. Never far off, mainly in 3rd. Ran on well from 300 M. Won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Midfield or worse, never in contention.
Mainly midfield to the straight. Over-raced in middle stages. Never a factor.
Began awkwardly, at the back. Wide without cover in middle stages. Improved a little around home bend to be midfield on outside turning in. Never threatened.
Soon 4th. Progressed well turning in. Ran on along rail to hit front closing stages.
Rear. Advanced to midfield upon straightening. Ran on.
Never in contention.
Was soon 3rd when over-raced far side. Faded upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Reared at start, losing ground. Remained at rear until shifting in to make ground along rail 250 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Raced without cover and soon became better than midfield 800 M. Found nothing when asked for from 400 M.
Tardy start and was soon over-raced in midfield. Improved gradually to 5th passing 600 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Soon midfield. Dropped back steadily from the Rock. (Demoted.)
Made most. Was beaten narrowly closing stages.
Always prominent. Kept on without threatening the quinella pair.
Around midfield. Crept closer order final turn. Kept on well in straight.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Went very wide home turn. Never recovered.
Outpaced early and dropped to last position. Made progress rounding home bend and gained ground on rails to be midfield turning in. Kept on one pace.
Jumped awkwardly then slightly inconvenienced. Towards rear throughout.
Niggled along in better than midfield. Ran on final 200 M to just miss a distant 2nd.
Pushed along around midfield. Dropped out approaching home turn.
Chased leader. Unable to quicken to challenge final 200 M. Just held on for 2nd.
Better than midfield. Faded closing stages.
Made all. Drew clear final 200 M. (Promoted.)
Slowly away. Towards rear. Improved towards midfield rounding home bend but hung out turning in. Made some progress final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Soon moved up to midfield. Ran on inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Jostled at start and dropped towards rear. Not much room early in straight. Made up late ground closing stages.
Pushed along early in midfield. Hung out home turn and never recovered.
Settled in prominent 3rd. Failed to quicken upon straightening. Found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Moved up from 500 M and was widest turning in. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Never a factor. Hung out home turn.
Prominent. Failed to hold position upon straightening.
Midfield. Ran on a bit along rail in straight.
Settled midfield. Made up good ground inside 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Soon prominent and sat outside the leader. Hung out final turn and dropped out in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped very awkwardly, remained at rear until making some late ground final 200 M.
Led. Found no extra when headed final turn.
Better than midfield. Ran on under pressure in straight. Never nearer.
Behind midfield. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Slowly away, soon in midfield. Made progress when under pressure turning in. Ran on.
In touch. Cruised to the front turning in. Held on well to the line.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear and ridden along early. Improved to midfield going up Rock. Inconvenienced around home bend. Made good late impression closing stages.
Better than midfield when checked and lost position passing 1000 M. Gradually recovered to be midfield approaching home bend. Weakened passing 200 M. (Lame.)
Began well. Niggled along to muster pace when checked 1000 M out. Severely checked again approaching 800 M. Never recovered.
Began well then held up behind pace. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Began awkwardly. Never nearer.
Raced wide in forward of midfield to straight. No extra.
Settled in forward of midfield early stages. Took closer order going up Rock reaching 2nd into straight. One-paced closing stages.
Crowded early. Remained well back most of way. Ran past beaten runners closing stages.
Held up in last few. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on quite well down straight to snatch 2nd closing stages.
Prominent to straight then gradually weakened.
Soon took up running then never headed.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in straight.
Rear early, sent along over 400 M out, ran on home straight.
Mostly around midfield.
Never a factor.
Prominent to 700 M, then gave ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Forward midfield, sent along 500 M out and weakened final 200 M.
Midfield, dropped back when hampered 600 M out, modest improvement home straight.
Always wide and never likely.
Led 1000 M to 200 M then no extra. (Lame.)
Prominent to 500 M, faded home straight. (Demoted.)
Around midfield, in touch but niggled along over 400 M out, weakened final 200 M.
Rear early, sent along home turn and ran on to lead inside 100 M.
Forward midfield, dropped back 600 M, kept on without threatening home straight.
Around midfield, improved 700 M, led 200 M, headed inside 100 M.
Rear early, progress from 700 M and kept on home straight.
Behind midfield after beginning awkwardly. Under pressure at 600 M. Wide into home straight and found no extra.
Prominent. Kept on fairly in straight without threatening.
Midfield and 3 wide. Remained same into home straight where kept on one paced.
Prominent until giving ground at 400 M.
Midfield. Kept on one paced early in straight then no extra final 100 M.
Taken back to rear at start. Remained same into home straight when waited with. Made strong ground in straight despite having some difficulty getting run. (See Racing Incidents.)
Near rear. Asked to improve after 600 M. Was hampered and carried widest on home turn. No extra in straight.
Prominent early. Remained in front of midfield. After straightening responded well to be near lead at 200 M. Kept on well to just fail.
Behind midfield. Wide on home bend. Made gradual headway in straight without ever looking likely.
Followed leaders. Taken into clear after straightening. Reached lead after 200 M. Was hard ridden to hold narrow advantage at post.
Moved forward to be outside leader after being wide on first turn. Reached narrow lead briefly at 200 M. Unable to hold off quinella pair.
In front of midfield early. Dropped to midfield at 700 M. Remained on inner around home bend. One paced in straight.
Led until 200 M. Kept on fairly afterwards.
Behind midfield. No clear run until after 200 M and as a result was near rear. Made some impression when clear after 100 M.
Soon prominent from wide draw and sat outside leader. Hit the front 500 M out, drew clear from 200 M, won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Always in touch. One-paced in straight.
Tardy start and dropped to the back. Closer order on home turn to be around midfield entering straight. Made ground steadily final 200 M.
Midfield or worse. Lost position at 600 M and dropped to last 500 M out. Made up a little ground closing stages.
Mainly towards rear. Ran on a little final 200 M, tightened at 100 M.
Pushed along to be in touch early. Steadily dropped to behind midfield at the Rock. Ran on well final 200 M to claim 3rd close home.
Ridden along in midfield. Moved closer from 700 M. No extra final 100 M, gradually weakened.
Slowly away, at the back. Dropped to last at 800 M. Switched out after straightening, ran on strongly to be nearest at finish.
Ridden along early, never better than midfield.
Niggled along to lead. Saddle shifted, placing rider at a disadvantage. Headed 500 M out, dropped out from 250 M.
Jumped badly. Taken back from widest draw to the rear. Headway from 500 M to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early before dropping back to midfield from the Rock. Took closer order along rail turning in. Ran on steadily and was doing best work and nearest at finish.
Soon settled towards rear. Ran on in straight but had to be steadied after the 200 M. Not a threat thereafter.
Jumped well. Dropped to midfield rounding the first turn after being hampered. Towards rear at the Rock. Made up good ground in the straight.
Soon midfield or better. Responded well in straight. Held every chance but was unable to match speed with the winner in the closing stages. (Promoted.)
Well there to 900 M. Dropped back to midfield or better after checking on the first turn. Held up turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Soon outpaced to the back. Never a factor.
Jumped awkwardly. Niggled along around midfield. Trapped widest turning in. Ran on well final 250 M to snatch win in the closing stages. (Promoted.)
Disputed lead before settling forward of midfield from 1000 M. Ran on steadily in straight until not quickened in the closing stages.
Took lead from 1000 M. Headed turning in. Soon weakened.
Sat inside leader from 1000 M. Took lead turning in. Kept on well until finding no extra in the closing stages.
Always in touch. Tired badly upon straightening.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped out final turn. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held 2nd to early straight. Faded final 200 M.
Slightly slowly away. Never better than midfield.
Towards rear. Ran on from outside 250 M.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Crowded at 200 M. No extra.
Towards rear. Made progress final turn. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on steadily to just miss 2nd.
Led field soon after start. Held on well to the line. (Promoted.)
Rear. Made ground from outside in straight.
In touch before dropping back to behind midfield 500 M. Towards rear turning in. Made up a little ground in straight.
Always there. Improved to 2nd on straightening. Kept on well.
Mostly 5th or 6th. Weakened final 200 M.
Pushed along to be in touch, becoming 3rd passing 1200 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Held up in midfield. Headway rounding home bend to be 4th position into straight. Ran on dourly to just get up on line. (Promoted.)
Nearly made all. Fought on well in straight but just pipped at post.
Travelled in rear of midfield. Came to challenge under strong pressure around home bend and ran on determinedly down straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to halfway. Dropped to 5th position after Rock. Faded further in straight.
Midfield. Improved to 3rd position home bend holding some chance in straight, but raced tightly on rails inside final 200 M without quickening.
Mainly in better than midfield to 500 M then weakened.
Raced wide among front rank early stages. Eventually gained position outside leader coming out of stable bend. Dropped away quickly after Rock. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in rear. Improved to midfield rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight. (Demoted.)
Began well. Settled just off the pace. Came to challenge upon straightening but failed to quicken to threaten.
Badly hampered at start. Remained in rear to straight. Ran past some beaten runners.
Settled in midfield then gradually dropped to rear after Rock. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sluggish at start but quickly recovered to rear of midfield. Became rear of field approaching home bend then made no impression in straight.
Settled at the back. Commenced run on rails rounding home bend. Sustained progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in midfield to 500 M then no extra.
Towards rear. Ran on well from outside 250 M. Nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Quickened up early straight but was inconvenienced passing 200 M. Ran on well to gain 3rd marginally.
Jumped well from a wide draw, settling 4th. Ran on under pressure in straight, however effort not sustained.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, made no show.
Better than midfield. Shifted in near 200 M and caused inconvenience. Unable to quicken.
Rear. Made up a little late ground inside 200 M.
Jumped well. Settled 3rd along the rail. Sustained effort in straight to take lead final 100 M. Held on well. (Promoted.)
Sat outside leader. Reached front briefly near 200 M. Kept on.
Midfield. Unbalanced near 1400 M and 1000 M. Kept on same pace when bumped 200 M.
Took lead early. Was challenged soon after turning in, losing advantage 200 M. Kept on well to maintain 2nd at finish.
Behind midfield. Checked approaching 1000 M. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on well.
Midfield. Slightly improved to 5th 1200 M. Ran on steadily in straight, just narrowly missed the 3rd place.
Jumped very awkwardly, never a factor.
Behind midfield. Raced wide far side. Dropped back rounding home bend to be last runner turning into straight. (Hung out throughout.)
Prominent. Disappointed for a run on rails 250 M out. Found no extra thereafter.
Settled towards rear. Made headway approaching home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
In touch. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Quickened in straight to dispute 2nd final 200 M before no extra close home.
Mainly in midfield. Dropped out final 250 M.
Settled in midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Ran on in straight to reach 2nd 200 M out before no extra closing stages.
Settled mainly in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Soon crossed to inside rails and took up running. Headed early in straight, then weakened.
Towards rear when unbalanced and struck rails on stable bend. Never in contention.
Settled towards rear. Inconvenienced on stable bend. Made progress rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on well final 200 M without threatening winner.
Settled behind leader. Quickened to hit front soon after straightening then never threatened.
Settled at the back. Went wide turning for home. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Dropped towards rear despite niggled along rounding home bend. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Never a factor. (Demoted.)
Around midfield early, under pressure far out and gave ground home straight.
Around midfield, kept on home straight.
Well back, ran on home straight.
Forward midfield, under pressure 500 M out, no extra final 200 M.
In touch, shaken up 600 M out, gave ground home straight.
Prominent, niggled along far out, weakened outside 200 M.
Behind midfield, attempted to improve 600 M out, modest improvement home straight.
Towards rear, kept on from home turn to be nearest at finish.
Prominent throughout.
Led and only headed close home.
Around midfield, gradual improvement from 700 M and throughout straight to just get up.
Behind midfield and never likely.
Around midfield, niggled along 700 M out, flattered briefly turning in, then no extra.
Slow to begin and settled with rear. Improved gradually from 500 M to be midfield on straightening. Responded fairly early in straight then one-paced last 100 M.
Midfield. Failed to quicken when asked for effort at 600 M. Taken wide into home straight and kept on one-paced.
Behind midfield after being checked on first turn. Gave ground from 700 M. (Bled.)
Ridden hard from wide draw to lead. Stayed same until approaching 200 M. One-paced in straight.
Near rear. Improved quickly around field from 700 M to be prominent turning in. Reached lead at 200 M and went on to score effortlessly. (Promoted.)
Taken back to rear from outside draw. Failed to quicken when asked for effort after 500 M. Remained with rear into home straight. When balanced responded well to be doing best work at finish.
Behind leaders. Didn't respond when pace quickened at 600 M and was around midfield turning in. Kept on well in straight to just fail to hold 3rd place.
Prominent. Found no extra when asked for effort after 400 M.
Midfield early. Dropped to behind midfield after being checked on first turn. Ridden to hold position from 600 M with no response. With rear turning in and only passed beaten horses.
Prominent. Responded fairly when asked for effort after 400 M. Reached 2nd at 200 M and kept on well but no match for winner.
Behind midfield. Made ground gradually through field from 700 M. Taken into clear on straightening and kept on one-paced.
Ridden hard to be outside lead. No response when under pressure at 600 M.
Midfield. Into clear after straightening and continually made steady ground to gain 3rd place narrowly.
Followed leaders. Asked for effort after 400 M and held position into home straight. Gave ground shortly afterwards.
Jumped well, settled just behind the pace. Checked near 600 M, not in contention afterwards.
Jumped awkwardly at back. Brushed rail near 600 M. Never a factor.
Jumped well, settled at rear. Progress from 700 M to be midfield turning in. Ran on strongly final 200 M, won comfortably hands and heels.
Slowly away, towards the rear. Never a factor.
Well there early, dropped back to midfield from 900 M. Made up a little late ground.
Always prominent. Overhauled by winner close home, winner too strong.
Midfield early. Progress from 1000 M to be prominent on outside. Weakened final 100 M.
Mainly midfield. Ran on a little closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Ridden to lead narrowly to 250 M. Faded.

Prominent, lost a little ground near the 600 M to be behind leaders turning in. Became badly unbalanced behind and shifted in abruptly on straightening. Not a factor afterwards. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly better than midfield. Kept on well in straight without threatening the first two.
Tardy start, worse than midfield. Never a factor.
Well there. Led field approaching 1000 M. Was headed narrowly 700 M before re-gaining 1L advantage turning in. Found no extra when caught inside 250 M.
Soon prominent. Held every chance 250 M. Kept on well to the line.
Bounded at start, lost considerable ground. Recovered ground gradually to become midfield home bend. Ran on well 450 M to take lead 250 M. Kept on when headed closing stages.
Jumped well and led field to 1100 M. Remained prominent and re-gained narrow lead 700 M to final turn. Faded soon after straightening.
Pushed along from widest draw to be in touch. Steadied 450 M, then weakened.
Jumped badly, lost a lot of ground. Remained at rear until making up a little ground in straight.
Soon towards rear. Made ground gradually from outside final 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield early, soon dropped to behind. Ran on from 9th early straight.
In touch. Progressed to 3rd 800 M. Weakened out of contention final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Kept on along rail early straight. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Behind midfield on outside. Kept on steadily in straight.
Towards rear. Responded well final turn but found not much room early straight. Ran on final 200 M when got into clear. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly 6th before running on well final 200 M to take command closing stages. (To Class 3.)
Soon in rear. Ran on past beaten runners entering straight then kept on.
Settled within striking distance. Ran on to hit front inside 200 M then never in doubt.
Ridden from start. Steadied and lost ground shortly afterwards. Gradually recovered to be midfield home bend. Kept on steadily in straight.
Ridden to muster pace in midfield early. Unbalanced and gave a lot of ground halfway out. Never recovered.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Began well. Held lead to 350 M and dropped out. (Demoted.)
Never better than midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Settled wide just better than midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly. Never nearer and hung out throughout.
Settled just behind leader. Improved to hold every chance in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Raced freely at the back. Never on terms. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began slowly. Travelled towards rear. Never a factor.
Never far off. Awkwardly placed behind runners upon straightening. Kept on steadily to claim 3rd closing stages.
Well there. Gained narrow advantage early in straight when hung in. Weakened inside final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Never far off. Kept on in straight. Found no extra when inconvenienced inside 200 M.
Prominent. Reached lead 400 M, taking 1L clear when hanging in 200 M. Kept on when headed final strides.
Towards rear, soon recovered ground to become 5th passing 1200 M. Remained in similar position until failing to hold place from final turn.
Tardy start. Remained at rear until making up good ground from outside final 300 M.
Rear. Made ground from outside to be better than midfield first turn. Reached 3rd while hanging out final turn. Faded from 300 M. (Demoted.)
Around midfield. Made progress home bend to be 5th turning in. Ran on steadily in straight.
Midfield or worse. Ran on steadily in straight to take over close home. (Promoted.)
Prominent. Settled 2nd far side. Kept on along rail turning in while hampered inside 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never in contention. (Demoted.)
Towards rear. Ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
In similar position throughout.
Cruised to take lead from widest draw. Was headed early straight. Found no extra when checked at 150 M.
Never better than midfield.
Settled at the back. Made up late ground past beaten runners in straight.
Settled at the back. Made up late ground past beaten runners in straight.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Held up just behind leaders. Moved up to dispute lead turning into straight gaining narrow advantage shortly afterwards. Unable to sustain effort and worn down closing stages.
Prominent. Took over coming out of back straight. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Jumped badly then travelled in last few. Switched out for a run early in straight and made significant progress down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Began well then held up in 5th position. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Just behind leaders into straight. Quickened to take charge nearing home.
Soon took up running. Headed coming out of back straight. Gradually weakened from home bend.
Prominent. Looked holding some chance early in straight but soon found no extra.
Never better than midfield.
Travelled in forward midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Around midfield, gave ground 300 M out.
Prominent, led 300 M out and kept on. (Promoted.)
Raced towards standside, ran on final 200 M.
Prominent early, under pressure 400 M, dropped back final 200 M. (Saddle shifted.)
Slow away and never a chance.
Always prominent, disputed lead over 400 M to 300 M and kept on.
Poor start, recovered to midfield, under pressure over 300 M out and weakened. (Demoted.)
Slightly slow into stride, midfield 600 M, ran on final 400 M.
In touch, unbalanced and lost position 700 M, kept on although racing greenly thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield, no extra final 200 M.
Midfield or worse, improved final 200 M.
Sent along to be prominent, weakened 300 M out.
Tardy start and never a factor.
Midfield or worse before making gradual improvement to be nearest at finish.
Prominent and 3 wide. Gave ground after straightening.
Rear into home straight. Made some ground passing mainly beaten horses.
Followed leader into home straight. Did not get clear run until last bit. Not properly tested.
Near rear. Shifted wide on home turn. Made gradual ground without ever looking likely.
In front of midfield. Gained nice run through field to be prominent after straightening. Reached lead at 200 M. Unable to hold off winner final 100 M.
Prominent. Found no extra after straightening.
Behind midfield. In clear on straightening then only made moderate ground.
Outside leader. Kept on one paced in straight.
Midfield. In clear on straightening and responded well to reach lead at 100 M. Scored comfortably. (Promoted.)
Prominent. Taken into clear after straightening and kept on fairly to hold position without threatening.
Taken back to rear. Remained near rear into home straight. Stayed on inner and made good ground in straight to be closest at finish.
Led until 200 M. Gave ground slightly last bit.
With rear and wide. Widest turning in and made no impression.
In front of midfield. Lost ground after 800 M when raced greenly. Behind midfield into home straight then found no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or better. Ran on steadily in straight until not quickened in the closing stages.
Jumped well. Soon settled towards rear. 2nd last turning in. Made up some ground without threatening in straight.
Taken to the back. Never a factor.
Midfield or worse. Dropped towards rear from 1300 M. Under pressure rounding home bend. Not a factor in straight.
Mostly towards rear. Never a threat.
Dropped in behind from wide draw. Shifted out to find running inside the 300 M and finished strongly but the line came just too soon.
Always there. 3rd or 4th turning in. Kept on until no extra final 200 M.
In touch early before settling behind midfield or worse from stable bend. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Soon took up running. Commenced to give ground from 300 M.
Midfield. Took closer order along rail turning in. Ran on well final 400 M but was unable to pass the winner and got pipped for 2nd right on the line.
Always there. Ran on determinedly in the straight but was unable to match speed with placed horses and lost 3rd place in the closing stages.
Travelled kindly behind leader. Took lead turning in. Kept on well and just held off strong challenge from 2nd and 3rd horses in the closing stages.
Mainly towards rear. Improved to behind midfield rounding home bend. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Kept on one-paced 300 M out.
Broke well from widest draw and soon led. Kept on well to fend off runner-up's challenge throughout the straight.
Ridden along to be better than midfield. Weakened steadily after straightening.
Settled at the back. Made up some late ground.
Close-up to 300 M. Faded.
Dropped steadily towards rear despite being pushed along. Never seen with a chance.
Jumped awkwardly, midfield throughout. Unable to quicken in straight.
Mostly midfield, made up some ground from 300 M until became unbalanced when hampered 100 M out.
Settled in behind midfield. Was awkward on heels rounding home turn, then held up early in the straight. Ran on steadily final 300 M.
Crowded soon after the start, lost position and dropped to rear. Made up some ground final 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
Niggled along early to sit behind leader. Launched challenge after straightening but was always held by the winner.
Always close-up. Hampered near the 800 M. Kept on well without threatening the first pair.
Began awkwardly, at rear, hung out badly throughout. Was inconvenienced early in the straight. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
In touch early. Midfield from 900 M. Weakened from 400 M.
Jumped slowly then inconvenienced. Towards rear. Gained ground on rails rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Kept on before no extra closing stages.
Settled in forward of midfield. Made some progress inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear. Made ground inside final 300 M.
Midfield. Faded soon after straightening.
Travelled in 3rd within striking distance. Failed to quicken early in straight. Made no impression final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled at the back. Niggled along turning for home. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Dropped towards rear turning for home. Crowded 300 M out. Made no impression thereafter.
Well there early. Held up behind leader rounding home bend. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out. Just failed to fend off winner's late surge. (Rider dropped whip near 100 M.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on early in straight before no extra final 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Inconvenienced near 700 M. Made ground inside final 300 M.
Broke best from widest draw. Settled behind midfield. Ran on well inside final 300 M to grab victory close home.
Soon took up running. Headed approaching 200 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Raced keenly and soon moved up to forward of midfield. Kept on early in straight. Dipped 200 M out. Made no impression thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear despite given reminders early. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Moved up to be prominent approaching home bend. Kept on until weakening out of contention 250 M out.
Settled in midfield. Ran on a bit inside final 200 M.
Better than midfield early. Gradually dropped towards rear approaching 800 M. Made progress early straight before finding no extra inside 200 M.
Settled mainly in midfield. Kept on one pace in straight. Faded closing stages.
Pushed along early and soon moved up to the front. Held clear advantage in straight. Just held off runner-up's strong challenge closing stages. (Promoted.)
Settled at the back. Made up good ground on outside final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Prominent before dropping to midfield rounding home bend. Weakened further in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground. Raced keenly and moved up to be prominent approaching 1000 M. Dropped to 5th rounding home bend. Faded final 250 M.
Towards rear early. Moved up to midfield approaching 1000 M. Dropped back slightly rounding home bend. Made steady progress in straight before finishing strongly closing stages to miss narrowly.
Crowded at start. Settled in midfield. Made progress approaching 100 M to be behind leader 800 M out. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield early. Settled in rear approaching home bend. No clear run early straight. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Jumped well from wide draw and was prominent early. Settled in forward of midfield approaching 1000 M. Gained 4th turning in. Kept on well without threatening.
Soon last. Made up some ground in straight.
In touch to 650 M. Dropped out in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3rd 600 M out. Unable to quicken on straightening.
Behind midfield. Moved up 800 M to become 5th early straight. Weakened 250 M.
Pushed along to take narrow lead passing 1000 M. Headed at 400 M. Kept on same pace final 200 M.
Towards rear. Hung out from home turn. No improvement.
Behind the main bunch to straight. Kept on for a distant 3rd.
Towards rear. Made some progress on inside 400 M. Found no extra final 200 M.
Prominent early, soon raced in midfield. Made no show final 200 M.
Well there. Ran alongside with the leader before taking over on straightening. Kept on well to hold off runner-up's challenge closing stages. (To Class 3.)
Better than midfield. Improved along rail rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Ran on well final 250 M.
Reared at start, losing ground. Remained at 2nd last until making up some ground in straight.
Prominent early. Soon in midfield and travelled wide throughout. Hung out badly.
Held up behind midfield. Came to challenge inside final 400 M and ran on to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled behind midfield. Ran on well inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Made no show.
Settled in 3rd within striking distance. Ran on to challenge inside final 400 M making steady progress to just claim 2nd.
Always there. Cantered to lead 400 M out. Won easily.
Began awkwardly. Never in the hunt.
Settled in 4th in forward of midfield. No response under pressure inside final 400 M.
Showed early speed and led until finding no extra 400 M out.
Travelled just better than midfield. No extra under pressure inside final 400 M.
Ridden along in midfield. Weakened under pressure in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon in rear. (Bled.)
Never better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Settled in midfield. Took closer order around home bend. Gained 2nd upon straightening but soon found no extra.
Well there to straight, with brief lead early. Dropped out.
Jumped slowly. Travelled at the back to straight. Quickened well inside final 300 M doing best work at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from wide draw. Settled in forward of midfield to straight. Faded gradually under pressure. (Distressed.)
Given reminders to muster speed early. Travelled towards rear to straight. Gained ground on rails turning in. Tightened for a run over 300 M out before running on steadily though without threatening.
Well there to straight then dropped out quickly.
Soon in rear. Remained well back until running on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear. Not clear run early in straight. Made up late ground closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Kept on well.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Virtually made all. Went clear upon straightening to win comfortably.
Began awkwardly and lost ground at start. Travelled towards rear before improving to midfield coming out of back straight. Made no further impression.
Mainly in midfield. Produced short-lived effort early in straight then soon found no extra.
Never far off to home bend then weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Kept on early in straight before weakening.
Tailed-off far side. Made significant progress in straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Attempted to make all, holding clear advantage until worn down by winner closing stages. (Lame.)
Settled towards rear. Commenced move entering straight. Ran on but lost 3rd final strides.
Midfield to home bend then dropped out under pressure.
Never far off and was still 3rd turning in but soon weakened. (Demoted.)
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out. (Demoted.)
Never nearer.
Well back until making up late ground past beaten runners in straight. Wide throughout.
Settled just behind midfield. Given reminders upon straightening and ran on determinedly to snatch victory close home.
Settled in midfield. Headway around home bend chasing leader into straight, then soon weakened.
Never too far away, kept on. (Promoted.)
Improved back straight to be forward midfield, in touch home turn then found little.
Well back, some improvement latter stages. (Demoted.)
In touch, disputed lead 1000 M to 600 M, soon beaten home straight.
Led or disputed lead to 300 M then weakened.
Mostly around midfield.
Around midfield, hampered 800 M and 200 M, then modest improvement to finish.
In touch, niggled along far out, kept on under pressure home straight.
Prominent, led about 300 M out and ran on.
At rear, awkward and wide home turn. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield and never likely.
Prominent to 800 M, came under pressure and gave ground.
Well back, under pressure far out and never likely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield, beaten 600 M out and dropped back. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Responded fairly final 400 M to make gradual ground and be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Hung out badly throughout and gave ground from 500 M. (Lame.)
In front of midfield and 3-wide. Responded fairly after straightening to reach 3rd approaching 200 M. One paced afterwards.
Near rear into home straight. Remained on inner and gained nice run through field. Made strong run to be closest at finish.
Behind midfield after being checked at 800 M. Found no extra when asked for effort after straightening. Was checked again at 200 M.
Behind lead. Struck heels and nearly fell at 800 M. Remained prominent into home straight and gave ground after 400 M.
With rear. Took a while to gather momentum after entering straight. Doing best work final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Led until approaching 200 M when gave ground quickly.
Little slow to begin. Improved to be 3-wide in midfield. Found no extra when asked for effort at 400 M. (Demoted.)
Followed leader. Went to clear lead when sprinted quickly after 300 M. Went on to score comfortable win. (Promoted.)
At rear into home straight. Remained on inner and gained nice run through field. Responded strongly in run to line to just gain second place.
Midfield. Commenced to make ground after 400 M. Was checked when disappointed for run at 300 M. Made ground again in concluding stages. (Demoted.)
In front of midfield after being checked at 800 M. Kept on until giving ground final 200 M.
Prominent early. Checked at 800 M and dropped to be in front of midfield. Made ground after 400 M and was clear second at 200 M. Kept on strongly to just fail to hold onto the quinella placing.
Settled around midfield. Responded well final 300 M to take charge closing stages.
Soon sat behind leader. Raced awkwardly near 800 M. Kept on well, did not quicken close home.
Mainly around midfield. Kept on one-paced in the straight.
Outpaced early, at the back. Made up a little ground early in straight, soon weakened.
Settled at rear. Ran on steadily final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Ridden to lead. Kept on well until overhauled close home.
Midfield. Progress on home bend. Made ground steadily final 200 M without threatening the first two.
Better than midfield. Hung out approaching and rounding home turn. No extra final 200 M, weakened steadily.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon behind midfield. Severely hampered near 1000 M and dropped towards rear. Never a threat in straight.
Clipped heels just after the start and knuckled. At rear. Never in contention.
Midfield early before being ridden forward to be in touch from 1200 M. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened badly final 200 M.
Soon midfield. Checked near 1100 M when racing freely. 4-wide turning in. Made up a little late ground.
Soon moved across from widest draw to settle behind midfield. Headway from 1000 M to be in touch rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Hard ridden to be in midfield or better. Kept on in straight without threatening placed horses.
Soon racing freely in midfield or worse. Responded well final 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Checked at start. At rear. Trapped wide turning in. Made up some ground in straight until no extra final 100 M. (Demoted.)
Mainly midfield or better. Weakened badly final 250 M. (Demoted.)
Missed the start. Niggled along to be behind midfield from 1000 M. Failed to make any impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led to 1200 M and then sat outside the leader. Kept on well in straight without threatening the winner final 200 M.
Always in touch. Switched away from the rail for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon behind midfield. Crowded and dropped towards rear near 1000 M. Not a factor in straight.
Took lead from 1200 M. Kicked clear 200 M out. Won easily. (Promoted.)
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Kept on well without quickening in straight. (Rider dropped whip inside final 200 M.)
Settled in rear. Made up a lot of ground final 250 M to just get up at finish. (Promoted.)
Settled just behind midfield. Took closer order to be prominent 3rd approaching home bend. Kept on early in straight. Found no extra final 200 M.
Close up early. Settled in midfield far side. Ran on steadily final 200 M without threatening.
Very sluggish at start. Settled towards rear. Made no improvement in straight. (Demoted.)
Sluggish at start. Niggled along at the back. Never seen with a chance.
Soon took up running. Kept on well in straight but just pipped at post.
Slowly away. Soon moved up to midfield. Dropped out turning into straight.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground. Gradually moved up and settled behind leader turning out of stable bend. Failed to quicken in straight and found no extra closing stages.
Midfield early. Settled towards rear far side. Niggled along rounding home bend. Kept on one pace in straight.
Pushed along to muster early pace. Took narrow lead approaching 1200 M. Drew clear early in straight but soon found no extra and headed 250 M out. Checked at 200 M when weakening.
Led early. Settled in 3rd some 2Ls off pace. Dropped to 4th rounding home bend. kept on until no extra final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in 4th some 2Ls off pace. Made progress rounding home bend to be 2nd turning in. Hit front 250 M out but soon headed and found no extra.
Settled towards rear. Improving when checked over 200 M out. Kept on.
Jostled at start. Niggled along at the back. Made up a lot of ground final 200 M to grab victory near finish despite hanging out badly in straight. (Promoted.)
Towards rear. Saved ground on rails turning in. Made up further ground inside final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on well final 250 M but outsprinted by fast-finishing winner close home.
Settled in midfield. Made steady progress in straight until no extra final 100 M.
Soon moved up to midfield. Ridden to hold position approaching 1000 M. Gained ground on rails turning in. Kept on before hampered approaching 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Settled in midfield. Found nothing in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Outside leader. Dropped out in straight. (Demoted.)
Settled towards rear. Made some progress but wide rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon moved up to be better than midfield. Made no show from home bend.
Mainly in midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Well back. Never a factor.
Ridden to muster early pace. Settled in 4th turning into back straight. No response when asked for effort rounding home bend. Weakened in straight.
Slowly away but quickly recovered to midfield. Dropped back steadily far side.
Led early. Settled inside leader far side. Came under pressure to hold position rounding home bend. Kept on before no extra final 200 M.
In touch but raced wide early. Dropped behind midfield turning into back straight then never likely to feature.
Tailed off most of way.
Better than midfield before dropping out far side. (See Racing Incidents.) (Heart irregularity and lame.)
Well there early. Settled behind leaders in 3rd far side. Responded well in straight to take charge closing stages.
Ridden along from widest draw to muster early pace. Took narrow lead far side. Kept on well in straight but headed closing stages. Lost 2nd at post.
Settled behind midfield. Made progress passing 800 M to be 4th approaching home turn. Kept on one pace in straight.
Rear. Commenced move passing Rock to be better than midfield turning in. Sustained good progress down straight to grab 2nd at finish.
Never in contention.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Just failed to defy winner's late challenge close home.
Began well then settled in 5th. Attempted to quicken early in straight but just kept on same pace to the line.
Always in last few.
Checked at start. Gradually recovered to last few at Rock. Dropped out upon straightening.
Began well. Settled in prominent position 4-wide. Quickened well early in straight. Gained upper hand close home.
Raced just behind midfield. Attempting to improve when checked on rails 200 M out. Produced good recovery closing stages.
Well there to 200 M. One-paced.
Jostled at start. Always in rear. Tailed off from home bend.
Settled behind leaders. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Kept on one pace in straight.
Ridden along to muster early pace. Outside leader turning into stable bend. Took lead passing 600 M. Kept on well in straight but caught close home.
Badly bumped at start and was towards rear early. Moved up to midfield far side. Made no progress in straight.
Settled behind leaders. Hung out turning in. Kept on one pace before no extra closing stages.
Made running to 600 M. Dropped to 4th upon straightening then gave further ground.
Settled in midfield. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend then never a threat. (Demoted.)
Very sluggish at start, losing a lot of ground. Remained at tail-end before ridden towards rear approaching 800 M. Made up some ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always in rear.
Settled in midfield. Improved rounding home bend to be 3rd upon straightening. Made further late ground closing stages.
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Took closer order to be 2nd approaching home turn. Ran on steadily final 200 M to assert authority near finish.
Towards rear. Made steady progress down straight to claim 3rd close home.
Soon in rear. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Well there to home bend. Weakened badly. (Demoted.)
Prominent early then mainly in midfield. Quickened well inside final 200 M to just get up in the shadows of the post. (Promoted.)
Ridden early. Midfield to home bend. Faded gradually in straight.
Better than midfield early. Dropped to rear of midfield after Rock. Made moderate headway in straight.
Always in last few.
Better than midfield. Quickened into straight but ducked in and lost position 200 M out. One-paced.
Always wide and thereabouts. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Never on terms.
Prominent to 300 M then weakened.
Attempted to make all. Kicked 2Ls clear early in straight but unable to sustain effort and caught final strides.
Prominent, tracked winner turning in, kept on.
In touch, niggled along 600 M, weakened final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Slow away, recovered to race behind midfield, attempted to improve 600 M, soon beaten home straight.
Prominent, every chance turning in, no extra home straight.
Towards rear, sent along 600 M out, widest turning in, progress final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch, kept on home straight.
Led throughout.
Around midfield, under pressure 600 M out and gradually gave ground.
Towards rear early, improved around horses far side, in touch 600 M, weakened final 200 M.
Prominent. Checked at 500 M and dropped to midfield. Made only moderate improvement when asked for effort after straightening.
At rear throughout.
Midfield. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
Midfield after being slow to begin. No extra after straightening.
Near rear early. Improved to be behind midfield at 800 M. Remained same into home straight and then made only slight improvement. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden hard to lead. Headed after 300 M. Kept on fairly.
Outside lead and 3-wide. Under pressure to hold position at 600 M. Dropped to be prominent at 500 M. Gave ground final 200 M.
Prominent and 3-wide after hanging out on first turn. Lost a little ground at 500 M. Taken widest turning in. Responded well but found winner too strong.
Prominent. Into clear after straightening and responded well to reach lead after 200 M and went on to score comfortably.
Outside leader. Reached lead after 300 M. Kept on strongly but unable to hold off quinella pair.
Near rear. Made home turn wide and then found no extra.
Soon held narrow lead. Headed at the Rock. Weakened Steadily from 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon sat outside leader. Took up running from the Rock. Headed 100 M out, kept on.
Pushed along early to be better than midfield. Under pressure from 800 M when beginning to give ground. Weakened further in home straight.
At the back throughout.
Well back. Improved a little turning in. No further progress.
Mainly behind midfield. Raced wide most of way. Wider turning in. Made up a little ground in straight.
Settled in midfield. Obtained clear run on rails upon straightening. Quickened well final 250 M to hit the front 100 M out. Won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Began awkwardly, ridden along early in behind midfield. Raced wide most of way. Steadily improved to close-up position at 800 M. Kept on one pace.
In touch to the Rock. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Weakened further final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout. Hung out on first turn. Never in contention.
Always well there, kept on well in the straight, winner too strong.
Bounded in the air at start. Midfield. Weakened from 600 M.
Was there until failing to maintain position inside 300 M.
Soon in the front. Took clear lead passing course proper. Was headed while shifting out closing stages.
Near rear. Ran on a bit 200 M out.
In touch. Unable to quicken closing stages. Hung out throughout.
Behind midfield. Moved up to be in touch halfway. Just kept on same pace when under pressure final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Slightly behind the main bunch. Quickened well final 250 M to claim victory inside 100 M. (To Class 3.)
Tardy start and was soon behind midfield. No improvement.
Soon prominent. Kept on well but unable quicken to challenge closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without threatening.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear early. Improved to midfield course proper. Found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, never in contention.
Soon towards rear. Hung in badly after halfway. No significant progress.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace down straight despite steadied 200 M out.
Settled at the back. Made good progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Rear until running on past beaten horses in closing stages.
Always towards rear.
Never better than midfield. (Demoted.)
Made running to 300 M then dropped out. (Demoted.)
Began well. Close up. Held every chance in straight. Just failed.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out. (Demoted.)
Settled in midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Ran on determinedly from 2L 5th into straight to just get up on line.
Never in contention. (Demoted.)
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Well back most of way. Never nearer.
Always prominent. Improved into straight gaining slender lead inside 200 M. Pipped at post.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. Ran on from 8th early straight to just miss narrowly.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily from outside 300 M to take narrow lead closing stages.
Moved up to soon be 2nd. Took lead early straight. Weakened when headed 150 M.
Held 3rd. Quickened to take lead briefly 150 M. Soon headed when found no extra.
Settled 4th. Shifted in for a gap on the rail 300 M. Ran on but just failing to catch the quinella pair.
Led field to early straight. Soon found no extra.
Raced 4th or 5th. Made no show soon after straightening.
Settled behind midfield. Improved to 6th turning in. Kept on under pressure until one-paced close home.
Midfield or behind. Slightly hampered when trying to improve 300 M. Ran on well final 200 M when in clear. (Lame.)
Slightly slowly away, was last to 200 M. Made up good ground on outside to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made some progress to 7th early straight. Weakened 200 M out.
Jumped awkwardly and was behind midfield. Gradual progress rounding home bend to be 5th final turn. Unable to quicken when checked 300 M.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Travelled better than midfield. Dropped out from home bend.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
Made running to straight. Dropped out.
Towards rear far side. Dropped out home bend.
Better than midfield to straight. Faded.
Midfield early. Improved gradually far side to be close-up 3rd home bend. Quickened in straight and fought on gamely to claim victory final strides. (Promoted.)
Slowly away. Quickly recovered to midfield. Improved to 5th into straight. Ran on to hit front inside 200 M but unable to resist winner's late burst of speed near line.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Gained midfield into straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Travelled behind leaders to straight. Weakened.
Never in the hunt.
Always prominent. Came to tackle leaders into straight and soon hit front. Unable to sustain effort and caught closing stages.
Never a factor.
Towards rear, sent along from home turn and kept on steadily.
Forward midfield, under pressure far out and gave ground home straight.
At rear early, ran on home straight to hit the front about 100 M out.
Led to inside 200 M, then weakened.
Always in touch, led briefly inside 200 M.
Prominent to 500 M then soon beaten.
Well back early, under pressure far out to make modest improvement to finish.
Around midfield, ran on final 200 M.
In touch, every chance turning in, weakened 300 M out.
Always behind midfield, dropped out quickly from home turn. (Heart irregularity.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Sent along from wide draw, around midfield 800 M, in touch turning in, no extra final 200 M.
Mostly around midfield.
Prominent early. Dropped to be in front of midfield and 3 wide at 800 M. Effort told and found no extra after 400 M.
Prominent into home straight. Hung out rounding home turn and in the straight. Gave ground from 400 M.
Midfield and three wide. Taken into clear after straightening and responded well to reach lead inside final 100 M.
Near rear after failing to show early pace despite being hard ridden. Under pressure shortly after straightening. Responded fairly and continued to make ground over the concluding stages.
At rear after crowding at 1000 M. Commenced to make ground after 400 M. Was steadied when disappointed for a run at 200 M. Got going again in last bit.
Behind midfield. One paced in straight.
Midfield. Kept on until giving ground final 200 M.
Followed leader. Stopped quickly when asked for effort final 300 M. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Shortly after straightening was steadied and shifted out to go forward. Responded fairly to gain placing in closing stages.
Led. Went to clear lead after 400 M. Kept on strongly but unable to hold winner final 100 M.
Worked across from wide draw to be outside leader. Kept on one paced when asked for effort after straightening.
Behind midfield after being crowded at start. Remained same into home straight. Continued to make gradual ground in the run to the line.
Mostly midfield or behind. Ran on a bit in straight until effort not sustained final 100 M.
Soon recovered from poor start to be in touch from 1000 M. Unbalanced and dipped at 900 M. Soon weakened and dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Mostly towards rear. Made up good ground in straight.
Midfield early. Dropped back steadily from 1000 M to rear and was further inconvenienced at 900 M. Never a factor afterwards.
Soon moved across from wide draw to settle at rear. Wide along back straight and around home bend with some progress from 600 M. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Ridden forward along rail and soon sat inside leader. Took lead from 900 M. Kept on well in straight until swamped by the first pair when no extra close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon led. Headed at 900 M and held 2nd place turning in. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
Midfield or better. Made up some ground in straight.
Niggled along early. Never far off. Kept on without threatening the first pair in straight and just got held off for a minor placing.
Led briefly before settling in 3rd place. Ran on determinedly final 400 M to snatch victory in the closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and stumbled. Mainly towards rear. Ran on gamely in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or behind. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Soon at back. Never a factor.
Soon outpaced to rear. Never a factor.
Niggled along early to sit outside leader. Weakened steadily final 200 M.
Mainly around midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M, no extra close home.
At the back. Never in contention.
In touch to straightening. Dropped out from 300 M.
Began awkwardly, well back. Wide turning in. Never seen with a chance.
Midfield or behind. Made up some late ground.
Better than midfield. Responded well from 300 M to hit the front 200 M out. Kept on well.
Towards rear early. Pulled to behind leaders at 1300 M. Kept on well but found the winner too strong.
Around midfield. Made up a little ground final 200 M. Weakened close home.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Soon held narrow lead, setting moderate pace. Headed at 200 M, kept on until weakening closing stages.
Checked after start, settled towards rear. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
In touch. Kept on well in straight.
Settled in rear. Wide rounding home bend. Made ground final 300 M.
Settled in midfield. Gained good ground on rails to be 3rd turning in. Disappointed for a run early in straight. Made progress final 300 M but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Worse than midfield. Made progress on outside rounding home bend but went very wide turning in. Made no impression thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled mainly in midfield. Weakened upon straightening. Wide throughout.
Soon took up running. Headed 250 M out then found no extra.

Jumped awkwardly. Settled towards rear. Gained good ground on inside to be better than midfield turning in. Responded well final 250 M to hit front 150 M out. Hung on well to fend off runner-up's late challenge.
Settled mainly in 3rd within striking distance. Kept on well in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. No clear run early in straight. Made good progress final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Not much room early in straight. Found nothing final 200 M.
Slowly away. Settled in rear. Switched to extreme outside turning for home. Made up good ground final 300 M. Shifted in and failed to gain upper hand closing stages.
Slightly slowly away. Remained in rear despite hard ridden early. Never likely to feature.
Settled in midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Settled behind leader. Came under pressure turning for home. Weakened.
