Always there. Kept on but just lost 3rd close home.
Towards rear. Slightly improved to 6th 400 M. Ran on well under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never a factor. Hung out throughout.
In the leading pair before headed early straight. Was always held by the winner thereafter.
Raced 5th to the Rock. Not in contention thereafter. (Demoted.)
Mainly 4th to final turn. Found no extra.
Jumped awkwardly, remained in rear. Made progress 800 M out to be in touch rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Led or shared lead to straight. Gained 1/2L advantage 250 M. Held on well.
Behind midfield. Dropped out approaching the Rock.
Mainly in midfield and wide to home bend. No extra.
Lost ground at start. Travelled towards rear. Made rapid progress home bend to be close up into straight. Fought on doggedly to gain upper hand final strides. (Promoted.)
Soon in rear. Kept on past beaten horses in straight.
Nearly made all. Caught close home.
Prominent to home bend. Broke down at about 500 M.
Tailed off far side. Made good headway home bend. Kept on steadily in straight.
Mainly in 4th far side. Inconvenienced and carried wide around home bend. No impression in straight.
Travelled in last few. Made good headway around home bend to be 3rd on heels of leading pair home turn when hesitated for a stride and lost momentum. Hung on under pressure for remote 3rd.
Prominent. Went wide into straight. One-paced.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Was 2nd before taking over 600 M. Held on to maintain advantage to the line.
In touch early, dropped towards rear stable bend. Crept closer order along rail turning in. No extra closing stages.
Never far off. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Towards rear early. Moved up to be better than midfield stable bend, becoming 3rd from 400 M. Found no extra final 200 M.
Slowly away, made no show.
Was prominent before dropping to 6th far side. Steady progress 400 M, kept on without threatening.
Tardy start, last to final turn. Was steadied 300 M before making up good ground thereafter.
Slightly behind midfield. Slightly inconvenienced 500 M. Not in contention.
Midfield at best.
Towards rear throughout. Widest on straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made running to 600 M. Faded in straight.
Always prominent. Came to tackle the winner 500 M. Was 1L behind final turn. Kept on well in straight.
Better than midfield to 1200 M. Not a factor thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide throughout. Travelled just behind midfield to straight. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Made all. Unchallenged.
Always well back.
Wide throughout. Midfield briefly. Gradually dropped towards rear.
In last few. Saved ground on rails turning in. Kept on past beaten horses in straight.
Broke well. Settled in midfield. Made up good late ground in straight doing best work at finish.
Tailed off from halfway.
Always prominent. One-paced closing stages.
Missed start. Travelled behind midfield. Gained midfield into straight on inside. Kept on steadily before inconvenienced close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always in last few.
Held 2nd position outside leader to 300 M. Plugged on but lost placing close home.
Wide. Towards rear early. Improved to midfield stable bend. Remained there to straight, then faded.
Travelled mainly in 4th position to straight. No extra.
In similar position throughout.
Attempted to be in touch early, around midfield but under pressure back straight, no extra home straight.
Slow away and never a factor.
Around midfield, improved from 500 M, kept on home straight.
Went forward from wide draw, widest stable bend, pursued leader from back straight, but never able to get on terms.
Behind midfield, little response home straight.
Sent to the front and then never headed.
In touch, under pressure 500 M out, soon beaten home straight. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
Behind midfield, inconvenienced first turn and again when attempting to improve along inner home turn, weakened final 200 M.
Around midfield early, dropped back far side, modest improvement final 200 M.
Poor start and soon beaten.
Behind midfield, niggled along 600 M out, some improvement home straight, already beaten when inconvenienced closing stages.
Always towards rear. (Demoted.)
Prominent without ever threatening leader.
Forward midfield early, weakened 300 M out.
Behind midfield and wide. Under pressure after straightening and continued to make gradual ground in the run to the line.
Outside leader into home straight. Kept on one-paced early in straight. No extra after 200 M.
Near rear. Failed to improve despite hard riding early in straight. Made some improvement late.
Near rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Found no extra when asked for effort in the straight.
In front of midfield. Into clear after straightening and responded well despite not being able to match quinella pair.
In front of midfield. Maintained position in straight without looking likely.
Followed leaders into home straight. Gained run through after 300 M and kept on strongly. No match for winner.
Led until 250 M. Found no extra afterwards.
Around midfield. One-paced when asked for effort after 400 M.
Outside lead and 3-wide early. Allowed to drop to be behind lead after 600 M. Improved 3-wide after 400 M to reach lead at 300 M. Went on to score impressively. (Promoted.)
Midfield after being checked at 600 M. Didn't respond early in straight then made slight headway final 100 M.
Reared at the start and lost ground. Remained at rear. Rider dropped whip at 800 M.
Always prominent. Hit the front 400 M out, kept on well to the line. (Promoted.)
Slowly away, at the back. Made moderate progress when wide along back straight. Wider turning in, not a factor in home straight.
Behind midfield throughout. Did not quicken in home straight.
Crowded soon after start, behind midfield or worse. Tailed off upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M. One-paced close home.
Always close-up. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Settled at the back. Swift progress from 800 M on outside to dispute lead rounding home turn. No extra final 200 M, kept on one-paced.
In touch. Under pressure when dropping steadily to midfield at 700 M. Not a factor afterwards.
Soon held narrow lead, hanging out throughout. Headed inside 500 M. Faded from 200 M.
Prominent to 600 M, gradually weakened.
Well there early. Dropped to midfield at 1200 M. Made up a little ground final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Well back throughout.
Mainly around midfield. Checked at 1000 M. Closer order rounding home bend. Made ground steadily final 250 M, unable to peg back the winner.
Towards rear. Knuckled when clipped heels approaching 800 M. Made good progress rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Found no extra while hanging in final 150 M.
Never a factor.
Rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Led before joined near 750 M. Weakened when headed early straight.
Raced 4th or 5th to straight. Shifted out for a clear run 400 M. Ran on well to take command closing stages. (To Class 3.)
Well there. Joined leader 750 M before taking advantage 300 M. Unable to withhold winner's challenge closing stages.
Mostly 6th before running on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always there. Quickened well to tackle leader inside 250 M. Was one-paced closing stages.
Behind midfield. Made up a little late ground final 200 M.
Jumped well and was in the front briefly. Dropped to behind midfield 1000 M. Dropped out in straight.
Well there. Disputed lead into straight. Gained slender lead over 200 M out. Hung on well to defy late challengers close home.
Always at the back.
Prominent when steadied 800 M out. Still prominent early in straight. Dropped out from 300 M. (Bled.)
Soon in rear.
Jumped in air and slowly away. Never in contention.
Slowly away. Gradually recovered towards rear before home bend. Made up good late ground inside final 250 M to be nearest at finish despite inconvenienced momentarily.
Well there. Took narrow lead coming out of back straight before joined over 400 M out. Soon headed but fought on well until the last few strides. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly in midfield or worse. Switched out for a run early in straight. Ran on inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced steadily towards rear 3- or 4-wide to straight. Commencing to improve when hampered 300 M out. Produced modest late impression closing stages.
Began well but soon in midfield. One-paced in straight. (Distressed.)
Raced in first few on rails before steadied to midfield 1000 M out. Hampered and lost ground 800 M out. Saved ground on inner turning in. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield far side. Disputed 4th behind leading trio around home bend. Quickened well early in straight holding every chance inside final 200 M. Just failed to peg back winner.
Mainly in better than midfield to straight then dropped out.
Began well from wide draw and held narrow lead 3- or 4-wide in back straight. Lost advantage around home bend. Hung in early in straight and soon dropped out. (Demoted.)
Mostly 6th. Ran on 300 M until one-paced closing stages.
Pushed from widest draw to be in touch early. Dropped back to midfield near 1000 M. Last at final turn. (Bled.)
Pushed forward to be well there. Kept on well but without threatening the winner.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Always behind midfield. One-paced.
Jumped awkwardly. Rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Never far off. Slightly inconvenienced when crowded approaching 800 M. Ran on from 5th in early straight.
Soon led and made all. Held on well to the line. (Promoted.)
Behind midfield. Made gradual progress far side to be 4th final turn. Kept on steadily.
Towards rear throughout.
Last early. Moved up to just behind midfield far side. Kept on.
In touch early but was soon in midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Raced keenly in prominent position and was 2nd turning in. Soon weakened. (Saddle shifted.)
Settled just better than midfield. Quickened to draw level holding every chance early in straight but could find no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Dropped to last few into straight. Made up good late ground down centre of track, doing best work at finish.
Began awkwardly. Held up in rear of midfield. Quickened well in straight to hit front over 200 M out. Readily.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Chased leader to 400 M then gradually faded.
Settled in 4th. Quickened to be joint leaders early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Prominent early. Raced awkwardly behind runners approaching home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Settled towards rear. Commenced move around home bend. Widest runner turning in. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd place closing stages.
Always in rear. Hung out in Straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Led until overhauled inside final 300 M.
In midfield or worse when hampered twice far side. Dropped to rear into straight. No further impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in rear. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Settled just better than midfield. Made steady headway under strong driving in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced towards stand side and always in charge. (Promoted.)
Never a factor.
Tardy start and always behind midfield.
In touch early, soon niggled along and never likely to reach leaders.
In touch early, no extra closing stages.
Slow away and well back, shifted out towards stand side 600 M and ran on late to be nearest at finish.
Prominent, struggled to hold position from 200 M.
Midfield, ran on under pressure from 400 M out.
Slow away, sent forward to be in touch 600 M, under whip 400 M, gave ground from 200 M.
Prominent, no extra final 100 M.
Behind midfield, kept on final 400 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield, hustled along 400 M out, little response.
Behind midfield, kept on final 200 M.
Some early speed before dropping out.
Behind midfield. Steadied and shifted out to find running on straightening. Responded well to just gain second place.
Followed leader. Into clear on straightening. Took clear lead at 300 M and went on to score comfortably. (Promoted.)
Behind midfield. Shifted wider to improve on straightening. Moderate response without looking likely.
Led. Gave ground quickly after 300 M.
Midfield. Hung out middle stages. Kept on fairly early in straight. Inconvenienced at 200 M then found no more.
Prominent. Kept on early in straight then caught behind another runner which was giving ground. Not persevered with last bit.
Behind lead. Kept on early in straight. Hung in badly and gave ground quickly final 200 M.
Midfield or slightly better. Responded fairly in straight to be nearest at finish.
Near rear. Waited with until straightening. Made nice ground through field to be closest at finish.
Near rear. Shifted out to go forward on straightening. Awkwardly placed between runners after 400 M. Finished fairly last 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear. Remained same into home straight. Taken to outside and made steady ground until finding no more final 100 M.
Around midfield. Checked at 800 M. One paced in straight. (Demoted.)
Prominent. Taken to 3-wide to improve on straightening. Went to clear 2nd approaching 200 M. Kept on strongly and just failed to hold 2nd placing.
Midfield. Kept on one paced after making slight improvement early in straight.
Better than midfield. Hung out from 400 M, not a threat afterwards.
Midfield to 300 M, gradually weakened.
Never better than midfield. Kept on well final 200 M.
Began awkwardly, midfield or behind throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well under pressure final 300 M to just get up on the line.
Attempted to make all. Just pipped by the winner final stride.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish. (Sore.)
Prominent. Steadily weakened final 100 M. (Heart irregularity.)
At the back throughout. Never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly, around midfield. Made ground steadily from 400 M, no extra close home.
At rear throughout. Never a factor.
Better than midfield. Kept on well.
Settled in worse than midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M.
In touch to 900 M before dropping back to forward of midfield. Kept on in straight until finding no more in the closing stages.
Settled behind leader. Cruised to lead 300 M out. Held off late challenge from 2nd horse close home.
Soon sat outside leader. Kept on in straight before weakening badly 200 M out.
Midfield or better. Never a threat in straight.
At back. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Last turning in after being trapped wide rounding home turn. Ran on strongly final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well before settling in midfield or worse. Not a factor in straight. (Sore.)
Mostly behind midfield or worse. Trapped widest turning in. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening the first pair.
Soon midfield or better. Ran on final 300 M until not quickened final 100 M.
Jumped well. Settled in midfield or worse from 1000 M. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Soon led. Headed 300 M. Kept on until no extra in the closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish without threatening placed horses.
Prominent early. Better than midfield when hampered passing 800 M, dropping to midfield home bend. Weakened in straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Towards rear. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Pushed along early to be midfield. Made headway home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield. Took closer order approaching home bend. Gained ground on rails to be just behind leaders turning in. Checked 300 M out. Kept on to finish.
Pushed along early to be better than midfield. Dropped towards rear around home bend despite niggled along. Made some late progress inside final 200 M.
Midfield early. Gradually dropped towards rear. Made no show. (Demoted.)
Settled at the back. Made progress on outside rounding home bend to be just behind midfield but widest turning in. Ran on well final 300 M without threatening winner.
Jumped slowly and awkwardly. Well behind until making moderate late impression closing stages.
Close up. Steadied approaching 800 M then settled behind leaders in 3rd rounding home bend. Quickened well to gain upper hand inside final 200 M and never threatened.
Jumped awkwardly. Niggled along towards rear early. Gained ground on rails to be midfield rounding home bend. Ran on final 250 M.
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Inconvenienced approaching 800 M, losing position. Midfield turning in. Made progress final 250 M.
Pushed along early from widest draw to lead. Joined briefly passing 1000 M before regaining slender advantage rounding home bend. Kept on quite well but headed inside 200 M.
Prominent. Joined leaders briefly passing 1000 M before settled inside leader rounding home bend. Kept on quite well without quickening in straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced keenly and was soon in prominent position. Kept on before finding no extra closing stages.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on well final 400 M to take charge approaching 200 M.
Hampered at start. Always at the back.
Mainly prominent before dropping to midfield rounding home bend. Weakened soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Not much room early in straight. Made up late ground inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Pushed along to lead. Headed approaching 200 M. Faded.
Prominent. Behind leader from 1100 M. Weakened final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly. Midfield or behind. Ran on steadily final 300 M until one-paced closing stages.
Slightly slowly away. Remained in rear until making up some late ground closing stages.
Always in rear.
Midfield early. Steadied approaching 1200 M, dropping towards rear. Improved after straightening until making no impression final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon recovered to midfield. Ran on steadily final 300 M without threatening winner.
Better than midfield. Widest final turn. Unable to quicken.
Well there. Took lead passing the Rock. Kept on when headed closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on well final 200 M to snatch 2nd close home.
Pushed along from widest draw to take lead early. Was 2nd passing the Rock. Held on until one-paced final 100 M.
Soon raced in the rear group. Hung in throughout. (Demoted.)
Mostly 9th. Moderate progress final 200 M.
Tardy start. Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace to finish.
Never a factor. (Demoted.)
Always prominent. Mostly 3rd before running on to take over closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Was last to 250 M. Made up significant ground to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
In touch to straight. Found nothing.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced keenly to be in midfield far side. Found no extra in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent early. Dropped out gradually.
Slowly away. Never in contention.
Began fairly. Dropped steadily to rear by Rock. Made no show thereafter. (Demoted.)
Never better than midfield. (Demoted.)
Prominent. Gradually dropped to 6th position upon straightening. Kept on steadily before producing good late impression closing stages.
Began well. Settled in midfield. Commenced run entering straight. One-paced without quickening.
Made all. Held on well.
Dropped to rear early. Improved to midfield entering straight. Sustained steady progress down straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in forward of midfield. Improved to reach 2nd position upon straightening. Ran on but unable to peg back winner.
Hard ridden to muster early pace. Chased leader to straight then faded.
Began well. Raced wide throughout and prominent early. Held up in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Slowly away. Remained well behind. Never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always prominent. Ran on to take control final 200 M. Shifted in to cause interference 150 M. Held on well to the line.
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Prominent to early straight. Weakened final 150 M.
Midfield at best. Faded soon after turning in.
Midfield. Crowded 200 M. One-paced.
Slowly away, near rear. Made moderate progress final 300 M.
Pushed forward to take lead early stages. Held 2Ls advantage upon straightening. Found no extra when headed inside 200 M.
In touch. Found no extra final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Never far off. Improved to 3rd turning in. Ran on but was checked 150 M. Kept on well thereafter.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order final turn. Continued to make ground in straight but without threatening the quinella pair.
Midfield. Made no show in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Clipped heels and knuckled 1000 M. Gradually dropped to the last near 500 M. Ran past tiring horses in straight.
Jumped very awkwardly, towards rear. Made progress from outside rounding home bend. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Towards rear when steadied turning into stable bend and again passing 1000 M. Remained there until making moderate late progress closing stages.
Settled behind leader. Took over approaching Rock. Joined rounding home bend before re-gaining slender advantage upon straightening. Headed 200 M out. One-paced.
Settled in prominent 3rd. Joined leader rounding home bend. Narrowly headed upon straightening. Weakened final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Effort home turn. Found not much room early in straight. One-paced final 200 M.

Jumped awkwardly. Remained in rear before making progress from 800 M on outside to be better than midfield but wide turning in. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd place close home without threatening winner.
Jostled at start. Settled towards rear. Made headway from 800 M on outside to be 2L 4th approaching home turn. Sustained effort in straight to hit front 200 M out and never threatened.
Settled at the back along inner. Made no impression in straight.
Better than midfield. Niggled along approaching Rock. Steadied near 500 M. One-paced in straight.
Settled in midfield. Given reminders to keep position passing Rock. Made no impression in straight.
Midfield early. Dropped towards rear rounding stable bend. Made short-lived effort far side before dropping back towards rear approaching home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Behind midfield before dropping to rear approaching Rock. Made no improvement thereafter. (Demoted.)
Slightly slowly away. Remained in rear until making up late ground closing stages.
Settled in better than midfield. Gained ground on inside to dispute 2nd upon straightening. Kept on without quickening.
Prominent from widest draw. Took lead turning into stable bend. Headed approaching Rock. Remained in prominent position to straight. Faded.
Forward midfield but never likely to reach leaders.
Always prominent.
Well back and never likely.
Around midfield, no extra home straight.
Behind midfield, found little home straight.
Always towards rear.
Widest stable bend, around midfield, under pressure 400 M and soon gave ground. (See Racing Incidents.) (Demoted.)
Slow away and too far back to make an impression.
Midfield or worse, under pressure 500 M out and never likely.
Always prominent.
Forward midfield, weakened 300 M out.
Went forward to lead and ran on to line.
Behind midfield despite being ridden hard in the early stages. Stayed near inner after straightening and received nice run through. Continued to make gradual ground in run to post.
Prominent. Found no extra when asked for effort at 400 M.
In front of midfield and 4-wide. Worked forward to be prominent at the 900 M. Kept on early in straight then checked when giving ground at 200 M. One-paced afterwards. (See Racing Incidents.)

Behind lead. Joined lead just before straightening. Kept on one-paced in straight.

In front of midfield. Made slight improvement early in straight. One-paced final 200 M.
In front of midfield. Under pressure at 600 M. Steadied when giving ground at 400 M. No extra afterwards. (See Racing Incidents.)

Soon dropped to rear. Improved gradually to be behind midfield on straightening. Made run through field. Shifted out to find clear running at 200 M. Continued to make ground but unable to catch winner.
At rear and wide after being slow to begin and carried wide on first turn. Continued to be wide throughout. Hard ridden at 400 M but no response. (See Racing Incidents.)
Wide in midfield. Went around the field quickly from the 600 M to be 3-wide outside lead on straightening. Soon after took lead and went on to score win.
Around midfield. Shifted wider on straightening and commenced to make ground. Was crowded at 200 M. Continued to make steady ground in run to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Kept on fairly until giving ground quickly after the 250 M.
Shifted out abruptly at start, causing crowding to outside horses. Ridden along to take up running, maintaining narrow advantage. Kept on well to the line. (Promoted.)
Bounded in the air at start, around midfield. Ran on well final 250 M without threatening the first pair.
Close-up early, dropped steadily to midfield at 1200 M. Became unbalanced and dipped at 600 M. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Well there to straightening. Faded from 200 M.
At the back throughout, never a factor.
Hampered and severely checked at start, dropping to the rear. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Hampered and severely checked at start, towards rear despite being hard ridden. Steady progress from stable bend, behind leaders at Rock. Effort not sustained and gradually weakened final 200 M.
Always disputing lead, kept on well though not able to overhaul the winner.
Well back, wide along back straight. Made up a little late ground.
Well there to 200 M. Gradually weakened. (Demoted.)
At rear. Was disappointed for running at 700 M and taken wide turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M, nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly, midfield. Checked turning out of straight the first time. Under pressure when beginning to give ground from 800 M. Not a factor thereafter. (See Racing Indicents.)
Settled behind midfield. Moved a little closer on home bend. Ran on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear, dropped to the last 850 M. Ran past a few tiring horses in straight.
Well there, sat outside leader 900 M. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Cruised to lead passing 1000 M. Held 2Ls advantage final turn. Was headed 200 M, kept on but lost 3rd place close home.
Missed the start, near rear to straight. Made some improvement on inside until steadied inside 200 M and was not ridden out to the line.
Towards rear from widest draw. Improved slightly to midfield home bend. Ran on well from 5-wide turning in but unable to catch the winner.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Ran on final 250 M.
Well there early. Soon dropped back to behind midfield halfway. Made no show in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, recovered ground along rail to be 6th 900 M. Kept on quite well early straight until finding no extra final 200 M.
Pushed along from a wide draw to be better than midfield. Hung out rounding home bend and was unable to quicken final 200 M.
Near rear. Made up good ground final 250 M. Never nearer.
Midfield. Lost running when checked at 900 M. Made up some ground from 7th soon after straightening.
Soon towards rear and never likely to feature.
Jumped well and led early, then raced 3rd along rail passing 1000 M. Ran on solidly in straight to take control 200 M. Held on well. (To Class 3.)
Midfield early. Gradually progressed to 4th 800 M out. Kept on quite well in straight.
Began well. Midfield to straight. Kept on before finding no extra closing stages.
Niggled along in prominent position far side. Dropped to 5th position just better than midfield home bend. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never nearer. Made moderate progress past beaten runners in straight.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.

Soon tailed-off.

Never nearer. Made moderate progress past beaten runners in straight. (Demoted.)

Better than midfield. Dropped out 600 M out.
Towards rear. Made some progress from 600 M to be 5th early straight. Found no extra final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on from 11th 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon 2nd. Gained slender advantage final turn. Kept on without quickening when headed 200 M.
In touch early, then raced better than midfield. Faded soon after straightening. (Demoted.)
Settled along rail in 4th. Kept on steadily early straight. Quickened up final 200 M to snatch victory on the line. (Promoted.)
Towards rear. Widest turning in. Ran on well to reach lead closing stages. Was beaten narrowly final stride.
Settled 3rd passing 1500 M, 2Ls behind leader final turn. Ran on to take lead inside 200 M. Was beaten close home.
Jumped badly, last to 450 M. Made good progress along rail but run ended inside 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Pushed forward from widest draw to take lead until final turn. Kept on before weakening from 150 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Tardy start, towards rear. Made ground steadily in straight.
Settled in distant 5th. Was keeping on same pace when tightened on rails and lost ground approaching home turn. Never recovered. (See Racing Incidents.)
Hampered and carried wide early dropping towards rear. Took closer order home bend and was just behind leaders turning in. Kept on well without making any impression closing stages.
Always towards rear before home turn. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend to be close-up 4th into straight. Sustained good effort to take charge over 200 M out, then never looked back. (Promoted.)

Sent up to be prominent early, in touch 600 M, kept on home straight.
Around midfield, niggled along far out, modest improvement closing stages.
Never a factor.
Never a factor.
Sent up to be prominent, kept on home straight.
Always behind midfield.
Soon at rear and never close enough to feature.
Prominent, attempted to get on terms with leader 600 M to 400 M, weakened final 200 M.
In touch early, forward midfield 600 M, some late improvement.
Went forward to lead, ran on home straight.
Behind midfield, ran on from 400 M out.
In touch early, around midfield at 600 M, weakened closing stages.
In touch early, soon dropped back behind midfield and no danger thereafter.
Went forward from wide draw, forward midfield 600 M, soon weakened home straight.
Near rear. Waited with into home straight. Made good ground through field to be nearest at finish.
Near rear. Never likely.
Behind lead. Into clear and under pressure on straightening. Kept on until finding no extra final 200 M.
Followed leader. Failed to quicken when asked for effort at 400 M. Gave ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Under pressure at 600 M and failed to respond. With rear on straightening and no response in straight.
Midfield. Remained same into straight then made run through field to reach lead after 200 M. Kept on well.
Hard ridden early stages to be 3-wide outside lead at 800 M. Kept on fairly until finding no extra final 200 M.
Outside leader. Took narrow lead on straightening and kept on strongly. Unable to hold off quinella pair final 100 M.
Led. Narrowly headed after straightening. Kept on fairly until finding no more final 200 M.
Taken back to rear. Improved gradually from 600 M. Widest turning in. Made improvement early straight until run ended final 150 M.
In front of midfield and 3-wide. Made strong ground early in straight to look major chance. Kept on strongly in run to line but unable to hold off winner.
Behind midfield. Taken wide into clear on home bend. Responded fairly to make ground and be closest at finish.

Hard ridden to maintain position in midfield. Severely crowded passing winning post first time. Dropped back towards rear from 1000 M. Given reminder rounding home bend. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Ridden forward to take up running. Struck rail and unbalanced at 700 M. Headed turning in. Kept on until no extra final 200 M.
Around midfield. Severely crowded passing winning post first time. Made no impression in straight.
In touch. Trapped wide stable bend but soon recovered to sit outside leader turning into back straight. 3rd from 900 M. Kept on until weakened final 250 M.
Tardy start, trapped wide rounding stable bend and remained at back. Wide rounding home turn. Made up a little late ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon dropped towards rear from widest draw. Never a threat.
Soon at rear. Took closer order along rail rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish without threatening the first pair.
Tardy start. Always at rear. Never a factor.
Moved steadily across from wide draw and sat outside the leader. Took lead turning in. Kept on well in straight until not quickened and headed 100 M out.
Soon midfield or worse. Severely crowded passing winning post first time. Ran on a bit 300 M out but effort not sustained final 100 M. (Distressed.)
Ridden forward and led briefly before settling behind the leader. 4th turning into back straight. Quickened well final 300 M and took lead 100 M out to win going away.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened from 250 M to take command close home, kept on well.
Led or disputed lead. Every chance 200 M out, no extra when headed 100 M out.
Always close-up. Ran on well final 200 M without threatening the first pair.
Towards rear early. Improved to behind leaders at 1000 M. Steadily weakened from 300 M.
Settled towards rear. Ran on strongly from 250 M though not able to peg back the winner.
Mostly behind midfield. Made up good late ground to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly, around midfield. Unable to quicken in home straight.
Never far off. Kept on one-paced final 200 M.
Prominent and over-raced. Shared lead from 1300 M. Crowded in the run to the winning post and was hit under the jaw by another rider's whip. Kept on one-paced.
At rear. Made up good ground final 200 M. One-paced close home.
At the back throughout, never in contention.
Settled towards rear. Produced some impression final 300 M.
Soon took up running. Headed 300 M out. Weakened.
Settled behind midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Sustained progress in straight without threatening.
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Joined leaders 3-wide turning for home. Kept on without quickening before no extra closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Not much room early in straight. Ran on well final 250 M to assert authority 150 M out. (Bled.) (Promoted.)
Prominent to 400 M. Weakened.
Niggled along early from widest draw. Settled outside leader approaching 1000 M. Quickened to hit front 300 M out. Kept on when outsprinted by winner 150 M out.
Rear. One-paced in straight.
Prominent early. Dropped towards midfield approaching home bend. Gave further ground in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always at the back.
Never in contention.
Settled just behind leader. Dropped out upon straightening.
Prominent early, then settled just better than midfield. Ran on final 200 M without threatening.
Prominent early, then settled behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Towards rear throughout. Raced wide on home bend and in straight.
Settled in midfield. Made ground final 200 M without threatening.
Made most. Kept on under pressure when headed final strides.
Settled behind midfield. Gained ground on fence to be just behind leaders turning for home. Shifted out into the clear inside final 200 M. Responded well to just get up on line.
Soon settled in prominent 3rd from wide draw. Failed to quicken under pressure upon straightening. Faded final 250 M. (Demoted.)
Settled in better than midfield. Made headway rounding home bend to be just behind leader turning in. Sustained progress to draw level closing stages only to be pipped at finish. (Promoted.)
Midfield early, then settled in rear. Dropped to last position rounding home bend and was wide turning in. Made some late progress closing stages.
Close up early. Taken back behind leaders approaching home bend. Weakened in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly, then clipped heels and knuckled. Settled in rear. Made some late impression closing stages.
Settled in rear from widest draw. Gained good ground on rails to be better than midfield turning in. Kept on before making further progress closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield when dipped approaching 1000 M. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Well there. Gave ground gradually from home bend.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well down straight doing best work at finish.
Prominent briefly and soon dropped to tail-end.
Settled in last few. Did not find much room early in straight. Switched to centre of track inside final 200 M and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly losing ground but soon in front. Joined around home bend. Kicked clear upon straightening for a comfortable victory.
Settled towards rear. No clear passage early in straight before producing good late run closing stages.
Raced wide in first few before dropping out shortly after straightening.
Prominent to straight then gradually weakened. (Bled.)
Soon outpaced. Remained well back to straight. Ran on past beaten horses inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Demoted.)
Prominent until finding no extra and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Ridden amongst leaders early, then settled in rear of midfield. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M to grab 3rd place final strides.
Well there. Disputed lead around home bend. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra inside final 100 M.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down straight to reach 2nd place closing stages.
Settled at the back. Made no impression in straight.
Prominent to 300 M then faded.
Rear early. Made good headway on outside rounding home bend reaching midfield into straight, then soon weakened.
Chased leaders in 3rd position. Quickened to challenge early in straight holding clear 2nd until failing to sustain effort inside final 100 M.
Held up in midfield. Not much room early in straight. Made up good ground inside final 200 M and just missed 3rd place.
Niggled at early. Settled towards rear. No clear run in straight. Produced late impression when clear closing stages.
Never far off until 200 M when overhauled.
Made all for a commanding victory. (Promoted.)
Never far off to 200 M then no extra.
Settled in rear. Steadied before making significant progress inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Always in rear. One-paced in straight.
Wide throughout. Midfield. Given reminders around home bend making some ground. Hung out into straight and soon weakened.
Midfield to straight then dropped out.
Settled in midfield. Steadied approaching 800 M. Kept on one pace in straight.
Pushed along early to be prominent. Remained in touch until dropping out from home bend.
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Soon moved up to prominent position. Weakened final 250 M.
Jostled at start. Always at the back.
Sluggish at start. Remained in rear to straight. Made steady progress before keeping on same pace final 200 M.
Prominent. Kept on early in straight before making late progress closing stages.
Settled in better than midfield. Ran on steadily inside final 400 M to claim 2nd place final stride without threatening winner. (Promoted.)
Settled behind midfield. Made progress final 250 M.
Midfield to straight, then weakened. (Demoted.)
Jumped awkwardly. Remained in rear until making up considerable ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled behind midfield. Checked after 1000 M, dropping towards rear. Improving when steadied twice in straight.
Made all. Kept on well to the line.
Always prominent. Kept on without quickening in straight.
In touch, kept on home straight.
Wide stable bend and never a factor.
Midfield or worse, gradual progress 600 M to 200 M then no extra.
Went forward from wide draw, disputed lead 400 M to 200 M, then weakened.
Around midfield, some improvement 700 M to 400 M then awkwardly placed, before keeping on home straight.
Wide stable bend, around midfield far side, beaten 800 M out.
Hung out stable bend and never got back into contention.
Around midfield, improved 600 M out and ran on home straight to dispute lead closing stages.
Prominent to home turn, then soon beaten.
Well back early, plenty to do 500 M out, ran on well home straight.
Towards rear, some improvement home straight, weakened close home.
Went forward to dispute lead, under pressure far out, gave ground final 200 M.
Prominent, disputed lead 200 M to 100 M.
Prominent, before giving ground over 200 M out.
From wide draw steadied back to rear at start. Improved gradually along inner from 600 M. Made good ground early in straight then one-paced last bit.
Around midfield. Failed to quicken when asked for effort early in straight. Made some ground final 200 M.
Prominent. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Behind midfield. Dropped to be near rear at 400 M. Remained towards inner in straight and continued to make ground to be closest at finish.
Failed to show pace and settled with rear. Remained at rear into home straight then only passed tired horses.
In front of midfield. Edged closer around home bend. Into clear early in straight and responded well to hold 3rd placing.
Midfield and 3-wide. Gave ground from the 500 M.
From inside draw held fence inside leader. Took lead at 400 M. Headed inside final 100 M then fought back to score narrowly. (Promoted.)
Midfield. Improved from 600 M. Lost some ground when hung out on home turn. Wide into home straight but responded well to be closest at finish.
Near rear after being slow to begin. Made some improvement early in straight then gave ground final 200 M.
Prominent and 4-wide without cover from outside draw. Under pressure at 500 M and did not respond.
Worked forward to lead but unable to cross to fence. Joined and headed at 400 M. Kept on strongly to take narrow lead inside final 100 M only to be pegged back on post.
From wide draw raced wide without cover behind midfield. Effort told and gave no response in straight.
Sat outside leader. Bumped by Eternal Fun at the 200 M. Kept on until no extra close home.
Ridden to lead and made all. Won comfortably.
Better than midfield. Kept on well in straight.
At back. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Just behind the pace. No further improvement. Hit on the head by whip of D Whyte near the winning post.
Soon in midfield. Inconvenienced at early part of straight. Not a factor in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, mainly midfield. No extra towards the finish.
Always well there, winner too strong.
Behind the leaders. One-pace in straight.
Dropped out at start, never a factor.
Jumped badly and raced ungenerously early. At back, never a factor.
Well there briefly, soon in midfield. Trapped wide along back straight. Failed to quicken in straight.
Worse than midfield. Over-raced in middle stages, never a threat.
At the back throughout.
Prominent and was soon 2nd until 250 M. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Around midfield. Dropped back steadily passing course proper.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch. Responded well final 400 M. Ran on strongly to take control final 100 M. Won well. (To Class 3.)
Jumped well and held narrow advantage to course proper. Kept on without quickening final 200 M.
In the front early. Remained prominent until weakening out of contention final 400 M.
Lost ground at start, remained at rear. Made up some good ground final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off. Kept on well final 200 M to snatch 3rd close home.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped out halfway.
Jumped awkwardly and raced behind midfield. Ran on a bit inside 250 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was in midfield early. Picked up from 800 M to reach lead 400 M. Unable to resist winner's strong burst final 100 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Unable quicken to challenge final 400 M.
Slowly away, never better than midfield. Hung in throughout.
Stood flat-footed and lost a lot of ground at start. Never a factor.
Travelled in forward of midfield. Commenced run upon straightening and finished well to assert authority close home.
Began badly. Always towards rear. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there with brief lead halfway out. Weakened soon after straightening.
Midfield early. Lost position around home bend. Made up good ground from towards rear into straight to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in last few. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening. (Demoted.)
Soon dropped to rear. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Ran on steadily along rails down home straight but hampered inside final 200 M. Sustained progress to the line. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)

Rear before improving to 3rd just behind leaders coming out of back straight. Quickened to take charge 200 M out while shifting ground. Unable to sustain effort and rider lost whip near finish. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.)
Wide in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Midfield to halfway then weakened.
Midfield. Hampered turning in. Made moderate headway early in straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Prominent. Lost position around home bend. Dropped out after straightening.
Slowly away. Always at the back. Never nearer.
Began well. Made most to 250 M then weakened.
Well there. Took lead 400 M and was always in command thereafter. (Promoted.)
Jumped well and soon cruised to the lead. Maintained advantage to 400 M, then kept on same pace to the line.
Left the gate awkwardly, raced in midfield before dropping out 200 M out.
Soon in midfield. Ran on steadily 250 M, just failing to get a minor placing.
Started badly and was behind midfield. Kept on steadily final 250 M.
Towards rear throughout. (Demoted.)
Soon behind midfield. Made some advancement from 300 M until one-paced closing stages.
Better than midfield. Dropped back 200 M out.
Midfield or behind. Ran on well from 300 M until finding no extra close home.
Prominent to 400 M. Kept on until weakening final 200 M.
Towards rear. One-paced.
Was 2nd last throughout.
Stood flat-footed and lost a lot of ground. Hung out badly and was last throughout.
Around midfield. Moved up from 600 M to be 2nd 200 M. Kept on well but unable to catch the winner.

Settled in midfield. Commenced move on outside rounding home bend. Quickened to gain narrow advantage inside final 200 M and fought on gamely to just defy runner-up's strong late challenge. (Promoted.)
Settled in rear of midfield. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Well back to straight. Kept on same pace. Never nearer.
Midfield to 500 M then weakened badly.
Midfield far side. Dropped towards rear around home bend. Last into straight. Made no further impression.
Around midfield to straight then dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.) (Demoted.)
Rear and wide into straight. Made moderate progress past beaten horses down centre of track.
Well there, joining leaders into straight. Fought on well but unable to match the late burst of speed of first two.
Began slowly then remained in rear. Took closer order around home bend and kept on strongly from midfield into straight. Never nearer.
Held up in 3rd or 4th position and never far off, holding some chance early in straight, but failed to quicken to threaten.
Took lead from wide draw crossing to rails gradually. Headed shortly after straightening and dropped out.
Always there. Quickened to tackle leaders upon straightening holding every chance the length of straight but just denied by the narrowest margin.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Never better than midfield. Wide turning in. Found nothing.
Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield, niggled along 700 M out, kept on under pressure home straight.
Led to 400 M, then dropped out.
Midfield or worse, weakened final 200 M.
Towards rear, inconvenienced 400 M and 200 M when attempting to improve.
Behind midfield, improved along inner turning in, kept on home straight.
In touch, niggled along 800 M out, under whip 400 M, then gave ground.
Tracked leader, hit the front 400 M out and went clear.
In touch, ran on home straight.
Always behind midfield.
Towards rear, attempted to improve around field home turn, ran on final 300 M.
Attempted to go forward from wide draw, caught wide stable bend and dropped behind midfield, never a factor thereafter.
Midfield or worse, gradual improvement from 600 M, ran on home straight.
In touch, every chance turning in, found nothing when asked to improve.
Midfield. Hampered at 1300 M. Remained on inner around home bend and only passed tired horses in straight.
Midfield. Hampered at 1300 M. Lost ground from 600 M to be at rear into home straight. No response in straight.
Behind lead. Kept on early in straight. One paced final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Checked at 1000 M. No response when asked for extra effort at 250 M after moderate improvement early in straight.
Ridden hard to lead but unable to cross to fence. Was joined on straightening and found no extra afterwards.
In front of midfield. Maintained same into home straight when failed to quicken.
Taken back to rear. Hampered at 800 M. 2nd last into the home straight. Taken to outside and made strong ground. Doing best work at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Into clear after straightening and responded fairly. Continued to make gradual ground in run to post.
Midfield and 4 wide. Crept closer after 500 M to be prominent on straightening. Responded well to reach lead at 200 M then went away and won well. (Promoted.)
Inside leader and held rail. Joined lead on straightening and took clear lead shortly afterwards. Kept on well despite being overtaken at 200 M.
Slow to begin then shortly after improved to midfield. Hampered at 800 M. Only moderate progress in straight when passing tired horses.
Rear after being slow to begin. Remained behind midfield until after 400 M. Made ground concluding stages.
In front of midfield after being slow to muster speed despite being hard ridden in early stages. Kept on early in straight then one paced final 200 M.
Steadied after the start, ridden early to be around midfield. Made ground steadily final 300 M, kept on.
Began awkwardly, at the back. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Slowly away, at the back throughout. Never a factor.
Pushed along early to sit behind leader. No extra final 100 M. (Demoted.)
Sent up to lead. Headed 200 M out, kept on until weakened close home.
Midfield or worse. Faded from 300 M.
Well away, settled in better than midfield. Sprinted clear final 200 M to win unchallenged. (Promoted.)
Quickly dropped to the back. Raced wide without cover throughout. Made up good ground final 300 M to take a distant 2nd.
Pushed along to sit behind leader. Steadily weakened from 250 M.
Soon in midfield. Progress from 900 M to be well there from 800 M. Dropped out from 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent early, then remained in touch to 200 M. Gradually weakened.
Checked at start and remained at rear. Slight progress rounding home bend. Never a threat upon straightening.
At rear. Ran past tiring horses in straight.
Soon took up running. Tearaway leader down back straight. Headed 600 M. Failed to quicken in straight and tired badly final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Soon dropped to the back of the field. Improved 700 M out to be behind midfield turning in. Made up good ground in straight to snatch 3rd place in the closing stages without threatening the first pair.
Soon midfield or better. Headway 800 M out to be 3rd turning in. Ran on determinedly in straight to win comfortably.
Jumped best before settling better than midfield from stable bend. Headway from 1000 M to be 4th turning in. Soon weakened and dropped out of contention.
Midfield or behind. Under pressure rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight but was always held off by the winner.
Soon forward of midfield. Distant 3rd turning into back straight. Headway from 900 M to take lead 600 M out. Kept on when headed at 300 M and weakened steadily.
Ridden forward and was soon 2nd. Steadied when giving ground 800 M out and soon tailed off.
Midfield or behind whilst racing freely in the early stages. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Mainly towards rear. Progressed rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on steadily in straight and was pipped for 3rd in the closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Widest turning for home. Made up good ground inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. Remained at the back until making up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Soon took up running. Headed approaching 200 M, then found no extra.
Soon towards rear. Saved ground on fence to be midfield turning in. Made no impression in straight.
Niggled along behind midfield early. Settled in mid-division rounding home bend. Not much room early in straight, then kept on one pace.
Led early. Settled behind leader rounding home bend. Quickened to hit front approaching 200 M then never in danger. (Promoted.)
Prominent early. Settled in midfield. Inconvenienced approaching 800 M. Ran on steadily final 300 M without threatening winner.
Never far off to final 200 M. One-paced.
Settled behind leaders. Found no response when asked for effort upon straightening. Soon weakened. (Demoted.)
Settled in rear. Came under pressure upon straightening. Ran on well final 250 M, never nearer.
Broke well but soon in midfield. Inconvenienced approaching 800 M. Made no impression in straight.
Towards rear. Made moderate late progress closing stages.
Settled in midfield or better. Ran on well after straightening to take charge close home.
Raced wide throughout. Soon towards rear. Made good progress final 300 M.
Led early from widest draw, then sat outside leader to straight. Soon dropped out.
Settled behind midfield. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly. Remained in rear until making up good ground final 300 M to be closest at finish.
Soon dropped to rear despite niggled along. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Missed the start. Trailed the field and only ran past well beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Slightly slowly away. Soon moved up to be better than midfield. Lost position when checked 900 M out. Weakened in straight.
Settled towards rear. Steadied twice after straightening before making up late ground inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Soon took up running. Headed at 200 M then found no extra.
Soon moved up to be in touch. Faded in straight.
In touch. Inconvenienced approaching 800 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Settled in better than midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend to be 3rd approaching 800 M. Ran on steadily in straight to hit front at 200 M. Kept on but was headed near finish.
Started badly, towards rear throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always there. One-paced.
Jumped awkwardly, never a factor.
In touch before dropping back steadily passing 800 M.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground final 200 M.
Towards rear. Steady progress rounding home bend. Ran on steadily from 6th early straight to be 2nd inside 150 M. No match with the winner.
Prominent. 1L behind winner final turn. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Cruised to lead from widest draw passing 1000 M. Held 1L advantage turning in. Won going away. (To Class 3.)
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent early. Steadied approaching 800 M, dropped to midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
Midfield. Crept closer order from 600 M, being 4th early straight. Soon weakened.
Around midfield. Remained wide when hung out badly middle stage. Kept on in straight.
Prominent. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and was rear to final turn. Made up good ground from outside final 300 M.
Never a factor.
Improved from behind midfield to become 5th passing 900 M. Kept on for a distant 4th in straight.
Soon 3rd or 4th until fading out of contention soon after straightening.
Mostly 4th until taking 3rd final turn. Ran on well under vigorous ride final 250 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Well there early before dropping to 6th 1000 M out. One-paced thereafter.
Very slowly away, last throughout.
Missed the start and was 2nd last to 450 M. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Rear from widest draw. Progressed to midfield rounding home bend. Unable to quicken while hanging in 400 M.
Never better than midfield. (Lame.)
Midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear along rail. Slightly improved to midfield turning for home. No further progress.
Midfield. Lost position to become 8th when raced greenly and unbalanced near 800 M. No improvement.
Soon led and made all. Just held off runner-up's late challenge close home. (To Class 3.)
Inside the winner to straight. Unable to quicken final 200 M.
Slightly slowly away. Towards rear until making up good ground final 200 M.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Was last approaching 1000 M. Ran past a few tiring horses in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Slightly improved from 800 M to be 9th final turn. No extra.
Always prominent. Came to tackle leader rounding home bend, gained upper hand 200 M out. Kept on but was unable to resist winner's challenge closing stages.
Midfield or better. Ran on early straight but was one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend on inside to be in midfield turning in. Switched in approaching 200 M and made up good ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Improved on outside final turn. Ran on from 7th 400 M to just get up close home.
Held brief lead early before racing in 3rd to 400 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Midfield. Progressed steadily from outside passing 1000 M to be 3rd turning in. Soon found no extra.
Soon led. Was joined 500 M before headed 200 M. Soon faded.
Jumped well, raced 4th or 5th before dropping to midfield 800 M. Crowded and lost running at 600 M. Soon faded. (Demoted.)
Towards rear throughout.
In touch early. Dropped to be better than midfield and was steadied approaching 600 M. One-paced upon straightening before finding no extra final 200 M.
Soon in rear and was never a factor.
Soon took narrow lead. Was joined from 600 M and headed turning in. Kept on one pace.
Jumped awkwardly and was towards rear early. Niggled along to be midfield approaching 800 M. Gained good ground on rail to be 3rd turning in. Responded well final 200 M to take charge closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent early, then dropped back gradually to be last turning into straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced wide throughout. Broke best from wide barrier and took lead briefly. Remained prominent despite unable crossing to inside. Ran on final 200 M until keeping on one pace closing stages.
Soon dropped to last. Gained ground on rail to be behind midfield turning in. Ran on inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly. Niggled along to be inside leader approaching 800 M. Quickened to hit front near 200 M but momentarily dropped rein. Kept on when headed closing stages.
Always prominent. Hit front upon straightening. Kept on when headed near 200 M.
Never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly but soon improved to be better than midfield. One-paced.
Mainly better than midfield to straight. Unable to quicken.
Jumped awkwardly. Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield, under pressure over 400 M out, no response. (Bled.)
Slow away, gradually improved from 600 M.
Never a factor.
Soon led, headed 300 M and weakened.
Midfield, under pressure over 500 M out and soon beaten.
In touch, under pressure turning in and weakened. (Demoted.)
In touch, led 200 M, kept on when headed about 100 M out.
Around midfield, progress from 600 M, ran on home straight to lead about 100 M out.
Forward midfield, in touch turning in, no extra final 200 M.
Wide and behind.
Around midfield and never likely to reach leaders.
Widest stable bend and behind midfield, gradually improved to be nearest at finish.
Tracked leader early, but free and hung out, disputed lead top of home straight, no extra final 200 M.
Forward midfield early, gave ground from 800 M.
Dropped to be near rear despite being hard ridden. Nothing extra when asked for response after 400 M.
Near rear after being slow to begin. At rear turning in and remained on inner. Made strong ground along fence to just miss third placing.
Midfield. Failed to quicken after 600 M and was with rear turning in. No response in straight.
With rear after being severely checked on first turn. Asked to improve from 1000 M. Continued forward to midfield turning in. Responded well until effort told last bit.
At rear. Was hampered on first turn. Improved from 600 M. Widest turning in. Continued to make ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Commenced to make ground early in straight. Was checked when disappointed for run near the 200 M. Was not persevered with.
Midfield and 3 wide. Improved from 800 M. Gave ground after straightening.
Behind midfield after being checked on first turn. Kept on early in straight then one paced final 200 M.
Wide in early stages. Continued forward to be behind lead at 1000 M. Remained prominent until finding no extra after 200 M.
Worked forward from wide draw to follow leader at 1000 M. Kept on fairly early in straight. No extra after 200 M.
Behind midfield. Midfield turning in and made ground in concluding stages to be closest at finish.
Led throughout.
Worked forward from outside draw to be prominent early. Dropped to be in front of midfield by 800 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Was crowded at 1000 M. Improved from 800 M to be prominent turning in. Gave ground shortly afterwards.
In touch early before settling around midfield. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend and was not a factor thereafter.
Soon midfield or worse. Towards rear from 1000 M. Under pressure from 800 M. Failed to quicken in straight.
Ridden along and went widest around field on the first turn. Sat outside the leader turning into back straight. Took lead 700 M out. Headed turning in and soon weakened badly.
Mostly forward of midfield. Headway rounding home bend and took lead turning in. Kept on well to win comfortably.
At rear. Held up rounding home turn and early part of the straight. Made up good ground when in the clear final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Threw its head about at start. Soon towards rear despite being niggled along. Swift headway from 700 M to be in touch turning in. Kept on until no extra final 100 M.
Jumped best and remained in touch from stable bend. Ran on steadily in straight but was always held off by the winner. (Promoted.)
Slowly away. Recovered from last to be behind midfield from 1000 M. Lost position when crowded 700 M out. Ran on in straight until not quickened final 100 M.
In touch early. Trapped wide stable bend and settled in midfield or better. Ran on in straight and lost 3rd place in the closing stages.
Mostly midfield. Under pressure 800 M out. One-paced in straight.
Jumped well. Trapped wide stable bend and settled towards rear. Steady headway around field 700 M out and wide. No longer a threat upon straightening.
Niggled along and soon sat inside the leader. 3rd from 1100 M. Lost position from 600 M to be forward of midfield turning in. One-paced in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon led. Headed 700 M out. Tired badly from 300 M.
Dipped at start. In touch early before dropping to the back of the field down back straight. Ran past well beaten horses in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Quickened well final 300 M to take command 100 M out. Kept on well.
Mostly around midfield. Kept on quite well to the line.
Prominent. Took up running at 500 M. Headed 100 M out, weakened close home.
Prominent to 600 M. Not in contention thereafter.
Close-up to 350 M. Gradually weakened.
In touch to 900 M. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend. Ran past tired horses closing stages. (Demoted.)
Pushed along to be close-up. Dropped to midfield at 900 M. Made up good ground final 300 M, kept on one paced.
Led comfortably to 500 M. Weakened steadily final 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly, lost ground and at rear. Made up some ground from 300 M, then was checked when disappointed for a run near the 200 M. Did not recover.
Began awkwardly, dropped to the back from wide draw. Was obliged to travel wide and without cover most of the race. Did not make any impression in the home straight.
Steadily taken back when over-racing. Hung out from 800 M, did not quicken in straight.
Always in touch. Kept on well final 200 M though not able to threaten the winner.
Wide in midfield. Crept closer on home bend. Crowded near the 200 M when making ground steadily. Kept on one-paced. (Lame.)

Ridden along early to be midfield. Raced ungenerously in the middle stages, then hung out approaching and rounding the home turn. Made up a little ground from 400 M out until one paced closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Soon led. Steadied to sit behind leader approaching home bend before joining lead from 600 M. Weakened final 250 M.
Close up early. Settled behind leaders in 4th approaching 1000 M. Quickened well inside final 300 M to hit front closing stages. Held on.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Gradually moved up to lead approaching 1000 M. Was joined from 600 M before regaining advantage 250 M out. Found no extra when headed closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, but soon recovered to be just behind midfield. Unbalanced when racing tightly near 700 M. Ran on well between runners final 250 M.
Close up early. Gradually dropped towards midfield approaching home bend. Kept on before giving ground final 250 M.
In touch early. Settled in midfield approaching home bend. Made progress final 250 M without threatening.
Prominent until finding no extra final 300 M.
Settled in midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Kept on before weakening final 200 M. (Bled.)
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily final 250 M.
Broke well from wide draw then was taken to rear. Inconvenienced early in straight and 200 M out when improving. Made up good late ground thereafter. (Finished 5th, placed 4th.)
Towards rear. Inconvenienced soon after straightening. Made ground final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Widest turning in. Made up good ground inside final 300 M. (Finished 4th, placed 5th.)
Began well from widest draw, then was taken to behind midfield. Raced keenly on outside and moved to forward of midfield passing 1000 M. Made no impression in straight.
Began well from wide draw, then was taken to behind midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
Niggled along early, then settled behind leader. Dropped to be 4th rounding home bend. Kept on one pace in straight.
Behind midfield. Made steady progress inside final 300 M without threatening.
Always prominent. Just held on for 2nd at finish.
Soon took up running. Was joined approaching 600 M. Hung on well in straight and asserted authority inside final 200 M.
Bumped at start. Settled towards rear. Made moderate improvement in straight.
Raced keenly in better than midfield before moving up to be outside leader approaching 600 M. Every chance turning into straight but was one-paced final 200 M.
Raced keenly and soon moved up to forward of midfield despite crowded near 1400 M. Kept on in straight.
Settled in rear. Clipped heels and stumbled near 1300 M. Made up a lot of ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon moved up to midfield. Weakened in straight.
Soon moved up to forward of midfield despite severely crowded near 1400 M. Faded final 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Bumped at start. Settled towards rear. Made short-lived progress approaching home bend. Wide turning in, then not a factor.
Always there. Ran on steadily in straight to gain narrow lead 150 M. Held on.
Never far off. Came 3rd far side. Kept on well on the rail 250 M to just miss narrowly.
Around 7th before weakening passing the Rock.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Unbalanced twice around 700 M and 600 M. Made up some ground in straight.
Mostly 8th before making some advancement on inside turning for home. Soon found no extra.
Slightly slowly away, last to 600 M. Made progress from 500 M until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Pushed along from outside draw to sit outside leader from stable bend. Kept on same pace while interfered inside 200 M. Hung out throughout.
Towards rear. Made progress from outside rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. One-paced thereafter.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace to the line.
Midfield or slightly better. Dropped back steadily from 400 M.
Led. Shifted out and caused interference when headed 150 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped to the rear group from stable bend.
Jumped awkwardly. Given reminders early and improved to prominent position before first turn. Came to join leaders rounding home bend. Hit front closing stages but was caught final strides.
Always close up until finding no extra final 100 M.
Missed the start slightly. Settled at the back. Commenced to make progress passing the Rock but went wide home turn. Continued to make ground to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Ran on well inside final 200 M to grab victory near finish. (Promoted.)
Very slowly away. Towards rear throughout with only short-lived progress rounding home bend.
In touch early. Settled in midfield far side. Kept on without quickening in straight. (Lame.)
Towards rear throughout.
Slightly slowly away. Soon in touch before settling in midfield turning into back straight. Dropped back rounding home bend.
Always towards rear.
Soon took narrow lead. Was joined rounding home bend. Kept on when headed closing stages.
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Unable to quicken after straightening. Slightly inconvenienced inside 200 M when finding no extra.
Towards rear. Made good progress from 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Made good progress on outside from the Rock to be 3rd upon straightening. Continued to run on to take lead closing stages.
Midfield. Pushed along from 1200 M to take lead 1000 M. Faded when headed 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Led field from 1400 M to around 1000 M. Kept on 2nd until regaining advantage passing 200 M. Was headed inside final 50 M.
Tardy start, made ground steadily to be prominent 1200 M. Dropped back to 4th far side before weakening passing 600 M.
Midfield to 500 M. Weakened. Raced wide without cover throughout.
Led early but soon raced in better than midfield. Kept on same pace from 5th rounding home bend.
Behind midfield. Steady progress 400 M out to be 6th final turn. Kept on well along rail in straight.
Never far off before dropping to behind midfield far side. Faded from 400 M. (See Racing incidents.)
In touch to early straight. Unable to quicken.
Last. Commenced to make ground passing 400 M. Never nearer.
Missed the start slightly. Recovered ground to just behind midfield. Made no show from home bend.
Checked just after start. Remained in rear until making headway rounding home bend. Sustained progress from 5th after turning in without threatening winner.
Settled in better than midfield. Came under pressure rounding home bend and improved to 2nd turning in. Kept on.
Settled behind leaders. Dropped back approaching 800 M to be behind midfield rounding home bend. Made no improvement in straight.
Settled in midfield. Gained ground on rail to be some 2Ls off pace turning for home. Kept on without quickening.
Prominent with narrow lead approaching 800 M to 500 M. Gave ground final 250 M.
Slowly away. Trapped wide around midfield stable bend. Settled in forward of midfield far side. Raced wide turning for home. One-paced. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always in rear. (Demoted.)
Settled towards rear. Made headway far side to be midfield approaching the Rock. Failed to make further impression in straight.
Prominent to straight, then one-paced.
Virtually made all. Held on well to the line.
Slightly slowly away. Behind midfield when checked turning into back straight, dropping to rear. Never likely to feature thereafter.
Made no show.
Never a factor. (Bled.)
In touch early, dropped to midfield far side, kept on home straight.
Around midfield, kept on home straight.
Well back, no clear run home turn to approaching 200 M then ran on well.
Went forward, pursued leader from 900 M, struggled final 200 M.
Went forward from wide draw, in touch turning in then soon weakened.
Around midfield, inconvenienced turning in, ran on final 200 M.
In touch early, around midfield 600 M, weakened final 200 M.
Midfield or worse early stages, attempted to improve home turn, soon under pressure and weakened.
Led 900 M out and then never headed. (Promoted.)
Tardy start, checked first turn and got back, some late improvement.
Prominent early, remained in touch to home straight then gave ground.
Behind midfield. Improved to be midfield on straightening. Made ground strongly in straight but still well beaten.
With rear. Hampered at 400 M when attempting to improve on inner. Responded well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield, 4-wide without cover. Widest on home turn. Stuck on early in straight but effort told final 100 M.
Went forward from outside draw to be outside leader. Started to give ground shortly after straightening.
With rear. Only passed tired horses in straight.
Followed leader. Kept on fairly early in straight then found no more final 200 M.
Behind midfield. One-paced in straight.
Led throughout and fought off strong challenge from 2nd horse.
In front of midfield. Gave ground from 500 M.
With rear and 3-wide. Taken to outside after straightening and continued to make ground in the run to the post.
In front of midfield. Gave ground from 400 M.
Behind leaders. Responded well when asked for effort after straightening. Just failed.
Ridden along to maintain prominent position from an outside draw. Wide on first turn. Led from 800 M to 600 M. Unable to quicken final 150 M.
Worse than midfield. Improved after Rock. Ran on strongly in straight to take command 100 M out. Won comfortably.
Dropped to the back soon after start. Last into straight. Made up late ground.
Ridden hard to maintain prominent position. Led from 600 M. Headed inside 200 M and then found no extra.
Well there to 200 M. Soon weakened.
Well there briefly. Soon in midfield. Taken wide on home turn where it hung in and again in straight. Difficult to ride and it made no improvement.
Towards the rear. Never a factor.
Midfield. Improved from 500 M. Behind leader into straight. Narrow advantage at 150 M. Winner too strong.
Mainly midfield. Made up good late ground.
Ridden along to maintain midfield position. Steadied near 1000 M. Soon in worse than midfield. No further progress in straight.
Crowded after start and lost position. At back. Closer order turning in. Did not quicken in straight.
Prominent. Steadied near 600 M. Behind leaders to straight. Weakened closing stages.
Pushed along to soon be prominent. Dropped back to midfield 500 M. Made no show in straight.
Dropped to the rear soon after start. Never in contention.
Raced keenly early, soon in midfield. One-paced.
Led until sharing the lead passing 600 M. Weakened when headed 300 M out.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Moderate progress in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Progressed well from 600 M to be 5th turning in. Ran on steadily to gain 2nd 200 M. Kept on without threatening.
Always there, 2Ls 4th final turn. Unable to quicken in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Short-lived effort rounding home bend. No extra.
Settled better than midfield from widest draw. Steady progress rounding home bend, taking lead 300 M. Won comfortably. (To Class 3.)
Soon prominent. Came to tackle leader 600 M, sharing lead until headed 300 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Slightly inconvenienced on straightening, then ran on a bit while hanging in closing stages.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily from 1000 M. Raced greenly throughout.
Travelled just worse than midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend and ran on determinedly down inside of straight to get up on line.
Began slowly. Travelled in rear to straight. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Mostly in midfield to straight then weakened.
Began awkwardly then travelled behind midfield throughout.
Never better than midfield. Produced modest late impression closing stages.
Niggled along but soon dropped to midfield. Found no extra upon straightening.
Held 2nd position outside leader. Took narrow lead turning into straight. Soon headed over 250 M out. Fought on but failed to peg back leader while inconvenienced in the run to the line.
Midfield early. Improved to 4th position rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight and inconvenienced nearing finish.
Slow into stride. Travelled in rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped best. Prominent when badly checked coming out of back straight and quickly dropped to rear.
Midfield early. Gradually improved to 3rd position coming out of back straight. Gained narrow advantage over 250 M out but unable to sustain effort while drifting inwards and grabbed nearing finish.
Soon outpaced. Never in contention.
Began well and led until headed approaching home turn. Dropped out upon straightening.
Began well then travelled better than midfield. Finished well inside final 250 M doing best work at finish.
Midfield or better. Hung out badly halfway. Kept on early straight but found no extra close home. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Was taken to inside to remain behind midfield. Made good progress passing 1000 M to be 3rd rounding home bend. Disputed for lead final turn until headed closing stages.
Pushed along to be prominent. Dropped back from about 900 M. Tailed off in straight.
Towards rear. Progressed to midfield rounding home bend. Kept on in straight.
Towards rear. Made progress from outside far side. Unable to quicken in straight. Mostly raced wide without cover.
Soon led until headed final turn. Kept on.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit 250 M.
Led briefly after start, soon settled 3rd. Moved up rounding home bend to dispute for lead final turn. Gained upper hand closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Jumped awkwardly but soon recovered ground to 4th. Dropped back slightly to 6th 1000 M. Re-gained 4th turning for home and then kept on.
Reared before start. Began slowly. Never better than midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Soon took up running and gradually crossed to inside rails. Hung on gamely to just defy challengers closing stages.
Mainly in midfield to 200 M then weakened.
Began slowly but soon recovered to prominent position. Lost ground and dropped to midfield halfway out. Dropped further back in straight.
Sluggish at start. Remained in last few before producing moderate late impression closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield early. Improving when wide around home bend and into straight. Just behind leaders turning in but soon faded.
Caught wide throughout. Prominent briefly but travelled mainly behind midfield. One-paced before finding no extra closing stages.
