Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Always thereabouts. Unable to sustain effort and gradually faded closing stages.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Midfield far side. Took closer order home bend joining leaders into straight. Failed to quicken to threaten but kept on well to the line despite inconvenienced.
Travelled just better than midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to just fail by the narrowest margin.
Soon in last. (Demoted.)
Began well. Settled in 2nd outside leader holding good chance the length of straight. Fought on determinedly but missed narrowly.
Rear and wide stable bend and never a factor.
Always around midfield.
Mostly forward midfield, kept on home straight.
Around midfield, attempted to improve home straight, weakened final 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch, under pressure 600 M and gave ground.
Rear and wide stable bend, modest improvement far side, under pressure 600 M and soon dropped out.
Tardy start and never likely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield, inconvenienced home turn, ran on under pressure final 300 M.
Behind midfield and never likely.
Midfield or better, in touch home turn, kept on.
Led, ran on when challenged about 100 M out and only headed close home.
In touch, dropped back from home turn.
Tardy start and well back early, inconvenienced home turn when attempting to improve, kept on home straight.
In touch, ran on to challenge about 100 M out and just got up.
Midfield and wide. Widest turning in and gave ground shortly after straightening.
Led. Kept on well in straight to hold dead heat 2nd.
Prominent. Into clear on straightening and responded well to reach lead in concluding stages.
Worked forward to be behind lead at 700 M. Kept on strongly in the straight and continued to make gradual ground to dead heat for 2nd.
Bounded in air at start then improved to be in front of midfield. No extra after 400 M.
Ridden to hold prominent position. Same into home straight where kept on one paced.
Prominent. Held same until giving ground final 200 M.
Soon at rear. Taken to outside after straightening. Only ran past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent but very wide. One paced in straight.
Midfield. Hung out making turn at 700 M. Gave ground from 500 M.

Began awkwardly then hard ridden to be behind midfield at 800 M. Remained on inner and continued to make ground to be in front of midfield turning in. Made strong ground in straight to finish on heels of placegetters.
Midfield. Accidentally clipped heels at 600 M and almost fell. Never recovered. (Lame.)
Near rear. Remained on inner turning in and was under pressure at 500 M. Made ground in straight but well beaten.
Behind midfield. Asked for effort at 500 M and responded fairly. Continued to make ground in run to line without looking likely.
Better than midfield. Saddle shifted back near 500 M. Dropped out from 400 M.
Better than midfield early. Crowded near 1400 M and shortly afterwards severely checked. Not in contention afterwards.
Well there to 250 M. Failed to quicken. Inconvenienced in the run to winning post.
Mainly better than midfield. Awkward on horse's heels about 1400 M. One paced in straight.
Checked at start. At the back. Never a factor.
At back. Hung out rounding home turn and in straight. Awkwardly placed on horse's heels for some distance near 500 M. Improved on inside steadily from 400 M. Nearest at finish.
At the back. Never a factor.
Prominent to 200 M. Soon weakened.
Jumped well. Settled in touch on far side from wide draw. Took command from 300 M. Won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Mainly midfield. Weakened from 300 M. Hung out on home turn.
Towards the rear. Never a factor.
Soon dropped to midfield. Further back at 1000 M. Under pressure around home bend and made up ground steadily in straight.
Prominent. Narrow advantage from top of straight to 200 M. Winner too strong.
Midfield or worse. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Travelled kindly behind the leader. Took lead 400 M and cruised to victory.
Led to 400 M. Kept on in straight without threatening and lost 2nd in the closing stages.
Settled in midfield or better after racing freely in the early stages. Under pressure 800 M out. Failed to make any impression upon straightening.
Missed the start but recovered to be 3rd from 1400 M. Kept on without threatening placed horses in straight.
Soon towards rear. Improved steadily rounding home bend to around midfield turning in. Ran on well to grab 2nd close home without threatening the winner.
Never far off. Under pressure turning in. Weakened badly final 200 M.
At back. Never a factor.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well after straightening to reach 2nd approaching 200 M. Kept on without threatening winner.
Jumped awkwardly and was towards rear early. Gradually improved to prominent position before home bend. Hit front upon straightening then never in danger. (Promoted.)
Led early. Steadied after 1200 M. Remained in prominent position to straight, then gave ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away. Raced keenly towards rear early. Went wide turning for home. No improvement.
Raced keenly in midfield early. Steadied approaching 1000 M and dropped towards rear. Made no impression thereafter.
Soon in rear. Never in the hunt.
Always thereabouts. Kept on well in straight.
Missed start badly. Remained in rear until making ground final 300 M.
Slowly away but quickly moved up to midfield. Ran on final 200 M without threatening.
Midfield when checked approaching 1000 M, losing position. Remained in rear of midfield to straight then weakened.
Sluggish at start but quickly improved to forward of midfield. Kept on in straight before making steady progress final 200 M.
Soon led despite leaving the gate awkwardly. Headed upon straightening. Kept on before finding no extra final 200 M.
Forward of midfield early. Improved to prominent position approaching home bend. Faded final 250 M.
Settled towards rear. Raced wide rounding home bend. Made ground final 300 M.
Never a threat.
Gradually moved up to be behind leader passing 1200 M. Kept on well without quickening in straight.
Always towards rear.
Soon settled in rear of midfield despite inconvenienced at start. Faded final 300 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Weakened inside final 300 M.
Settled towards rear. Made ground steadily inside final 300 M.
Settled in rear. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon moved up to midfield. Kept on after straightening until finding no extra closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Towards rear throughout.
Raced keenly in 4th far side. Maintained position until weakening inside final 200 M.
Ridden early to lead. Kept on when headed inside final 200 M. Found no extra close home.
Tracked leader early. Settled in 3rd passing 1200 M. Quickened well after 300 M to take charge inside 200 M.
Slightly crowded at start. Settled towards rear. Made steady progress final 300 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily final 250 M.
Made most. Headed 150 M. Kept on.
Midfield. Soon moved up to a prominent position. Kept on until finding no extra final 200 M.
Mostly 4th or 5th. Was checked near 500 M. Kept on well in straight.
Mostly 10th before progressing steadily from 1000 M on outside to be 2nd 400 M. Ran on in straight while shifting in 250 M. Took lead inside 150 M and kept on.
In touch. Dropped back rounding the home bend. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Dropped back steadily and was last 800 M. Soon tailed off.
Last. Given reminders approaching the Rock. Improved from outside to be midfield home turn. Stayed on.
Sat outside leader to 600 M when failed to hold place. Dropped out while bumped at final turn. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
Midfield. Pulled hard to avoid heels about 500 M. Made progress final turn to be 4th turning in. Ran on but was crowded 250 M. Renewed effort to recover some ground thereafter.
Mostly 2nd last. Stumbled and nearly fell when about to make progress 400 M out. Was 7th on inside final turn but unable to quicken in straight.
Never better than midfield. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield. Lost position to the rear group when crowded passing 600 M. No improvement.
Made running. Narrowly headed into straight. Kept on well. Hampered near finish.
Settled at the back. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Tracked leader. Hit front approaching home turn. Unable to sustain effort and outsprinted closing stages.
Never far off to 400 M then gradually weakened.
Never far off. Kept on steadily closing stages.
Mainly in midfield. Gave some ground after Rock but soon came under pressure passing 600 M to keep pace with field. Kept on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear. Snuck up on rails turning in. Quickened well from 3rd into straight to assert authority over 100 M out.
Settled in rear. Commenced run passing Rock. Kept on steadily from 3rd into straight.
Led field to 400 M. Faded in straight.
Towards rear. Last turning into straight. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Ridden along in better than midfield. Further improved to a close-up 4th turning in. Found no extra final 200 M.
Well there. Faded 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear. Ran past a few tiring horses in straight.
Rear. Made good progress from 400 M and was widest home turn. Ran on well in straight to take lead closing stages. (Promoted.)
Towards rear. Steady progress home bend to be midfield passing 400 M. Ran on early straight but unable quicken to threaten the quinella pair.
Midfield. Improved from 500 M to take lead early straight. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon recovered ground to be in touch stable bend. Progressed steadily from 800 M to gain a narrow lead 400 M. Weakened when headed soon after straightening.
Settled behind midfield. Moved up from final turn and responded well after turning in. Took charge passing 200 M but was beaten narrowly closing stages.
Prominent. Dropped back to 6th rounding home bend. Soon weakened out of contention.
In touch. Dropped back steadily to midfield far side. Towards rear turning in. Made up some ground 250 M.
Settled in rear. Made some late progress closing stages.
Forward of midfield. Found no extra final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Towards rear. Gained ground on rails turning in. Made moderate progress in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well while drifting out final 200 M. Asserted authority near finish.
Close up. Settled in 3rd turning into back straight. Quickened upon straightening to hit front 200 M out but outsprinted by fast-finishing winner close home.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well turning for home to hold every chance 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort and only kept on to finish.
Settled in midfield. Made no impression final 200 M.
Soon towards rear. Dropped to last position despite given reminders rounding home bend. Never a threat.
Settled in rear. Went wide turning for home. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Prominent. Settled outside leader turning into back straight. Kept on when forced to steady 250 M out. Gave ground thereafter.
Soon took up running. Headed 200 M out then faded.
Settled behind midfield. Made ground final 250 M to reach 4th closing stages.
Lost position first turn and then behind midfield.
Prominent, beaten when hampered inside final 200 M.
Prominent throughout.
Behind midfield, wide and never likely.
Long time leader, only just failed to hold on when challenged closing stages.
Behind midfield, ran on home straight.
In touch, no extra home straight.
Hampered and rear early, improved along inner turning in, kept on to line.
Around midfield, weakened over 200 M out. (Demoted.)
Around midfield, ran on home straight to just get up.
Midfield or worse.
Poor start and well back, ran on home straight.
Soon with rear and reluctant to stretch out. No response after 500 M. Not persevered with. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sat off leader. Reached lead momentarily after straightening. Kept on fairly until one-paced last bit.
Behind midfield and wide. Under pressure as far out as 700 M. Effort told and found no more after 400 M.
Led. Remained same until finding no extra after straightening.
Prominent after going forward from wide draw. Maintained same until giving ground after straightening.
Midfield. Shifted out into clear at 400 M. Sprinted quickly at entrance of home straight and went on to win comfortably after reaching lead at 200 M. (Promoted.)
Midfield. Carried wider after 400 M. Took a while to muster speed early in straight but doing best work late and secure quinella position.
Followed leader. Found no extra when asked for effort after 400 M.
Near rear. Gradually edged closer after 600 M but still behind midfield turning in. Made strong run through field in straight to just miss quinella placing.
Taken back to be in front of rear. Crowded at 600 M and dropped to be with rear. Taken wide after straightening but made no impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
In front of midfield. Loomed prominently after straightening, however run was short-lived and only one-paced final 200 M.
Rear. Improved gradually from 700 M but still behind midfield on straightening. Doing best work late to be nearest at finish.
Well there to 150 M. Weakened.
Steadily dropped to the back. Never a factor.
Midfield throughout. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Made the latter part of home turn awkwardly and clipped Fast Win's heels. One-paced in straight.
Always prominent. Failed to quicken close home.
Jumped awkwardly. In touch to 300 M. Weakened.
Slowly away. At the back throughout.
Restless in gate and missed the start. Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Well there. Led from 600 M and never headed. Won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Ridden but unable to get to the front. Settled in midfield. Ran on strongly final 200 M without threatening the winner.
Mainly behind leaders. Weakened final 100 M.
Towards rear. Improved 900 M out to be 6th rounding home bend. Hung out final turn and in straight. Made no impression thereafter.
In touch early. Dropped to the rear group after the first 200 M.
Led early. Was joined passing 1000 M and was close-up 3rd final turn. Kept on without threatening.
Better than midfield early. Dropped back to the rear and never in contention.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Jumped very awkwardly. At rear throughout.
Mostly 5th. Unable to quicken early straight but kept on quite well closing stages.
Midfield. Lost position when unbalanced 900 M. Very minor progress in straight.
Behind midfield. Faded in straight.
Soon prominent. Joined lead 850 M until 400 M. Kept on well early straight until one-paced final 200 M.
In touch, 2Ls 4th turning in. Kept on steadily early straight until running on strongly final 200 M to take command closing stages. (To Class 3.)
Prominent, sharing the lead passing 1000 M. Gained upper hand 400 M until headed closing stages. (Bled.)
Towards rear. Made ground far side to be midfield 800 M out, then one-paced.
Midfield or better. Kept on similar position throughout.
Settled towards rear. Took closer order home turn. Kept on well in straight.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily past beaten horses in straight.
Began well, then ridden and led briefly. Settled just behind leaders rounding home bend. Quickened well in straight to take charge inside final 200 M. (To Class 3.)
Never far off before hanging very wide into the straight. Never recovered.
Began well then held up in prominent position. Steadied and lost position coming out of back straight. Gradually faded from better than midfield into straight.
Better than midfield and wide far side. Took lead coming out of back straight but joined over 400 M out. Unable to sustain effort and headed closing stages.
Prominent far side. Improved around home bend joining leader into straight. Found no extra and gradually weakened passing 300 M.
Inconvenienced at start. Trailed field to straight. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish. Raced greenly throughout.
Settled in 5th or 6th just better than midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon in last few.
Missed the start but quickly recovered to midfield. Ran on down straight doing best work at finish.
Prominent briefly but gradually dropped to rear.
Midfield to straight then weakened.
Never better than midfield. Checked 600 M out. One-paced in straight.
Last to 800 M out. Made ground rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on to snatch 3rd close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Slightly progressed to midfield turning in. Was taken out and caused interference 250 M. Kept on.
Led field to inside 400 M. No extra.
Well there. Unable to quicken final 200 M.
Prominent. Hung out home turn. Weakened.
Better than midfield from widest draw. Made no show in straight.
Better than midfield. Ran on steadily from 4th final turn to be 2nd final 100 M. Unable to threaten the winner.
Towards rear early. Was making ground when unbalanced 1300 M. Dropped back to the rear group thereafter.
In touch. Responded well in straight to take charge 300 M out. Held on to the line. (Rider dropped whip near 200 M.) (Promoted.)
Jumped awkwardly, rear to straight. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Ran on steadily home bend. Continued to make ground in straight.
Never likely to feature. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield. Checked 200 M. Kept on.
Soon in rear. Kept on in straight and ran past beaten runners.
Wide in midfield far side. Dropped out home bend.
Checked and dropped to rear early. No further impression thereafter.
Travelled in better than midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Settled just better than midfield. Made some progress early in straight before keeping on steadily closing stages.
Chased leader to straight then weakened.
Lost considerable ground at start. Trailed the field to straight. Ran on past beaten runners closing stages.
Settled in rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Not much room early in straight. Quickened well inside final 300 M to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Missed the start but soon in prominent position before home bend. Disputed 2nd turning in and fought on well to claim position on line.
Towards rear throughout.
Niggled at early. Remained in midfield to straight. Failed to quicken to challenge. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made all to win unchallenged.
Jumped best then held up within striking distance. Commenced move rounding home bend just holding 2nd position into straight. Fought on doggedly under pressure but lost 2nd position late.
Mostly in midfield to home bend then weakened.
Always behind midfield.
Around midfield and never likely.
Rear, unbalanced 500 M and never likely.
In touch, alongside winner home turn, inclined to hang in and no extra closing stages.
Towards rear, making some progress when checked inside 200 M.
Tardy start, improved to midfield, in touch and 4-wide turning in, kept on to line.
Around midfield, niggled along over 500 M out and soon beaten. (Demoted.)
Went forward from wide draw, came under pressure and gradually gave ground from 400 M out. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
Well back, caught wide and never likely.
Led or disputed lead to about 300 M, kept on one pace.
In touch, every chance turning in, unable to go with winner but battled on to line.
Behind midfield.
Well back early, improved around field 600 M, kept on home straight.
In touch, hit front over 300 M out and went clear. (Promoted.)
Behind midfield. Found no extra when asked for effort after 400 M.
In front of midfield and 4-wide. Checked when held up for a run on straightening. Took a while to regain balance then finished race off fairly.
Outside lead and free early. Under pressure after straightening but found no extra and commenced to hang in.
Behind midfield and 3-wide after being slow to begin. Improved from 500 M. Was inconvenienced on straightening. Responded well but no match for winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Followed leader. Gained run through on straightening but only responded fairly. Checked when out of contention at 200 M.
In front of midfield. Inconvenienced and lost momentum on straightening. Made ground final 200 M.
Led until 300 M. Was checked when giving ground at 200 M.
Began awkwardly then improved to be midfield. Responded well in home straight to continue making ground and be closest at finish.
Taken back to rear. Made ground quickly around field from 500 M. Was inconvenienced on straightening. Responded well in straight until run ended last bit.
Prominent. Looked good chance after responding well early in straight. Kept on strongly and just failed to hold quinella placing.
Outside lead and 3-wide. Gave ground from 300 M.
Midfield and wide. Improved quickly to reach lead momentarily after straightening. One paced final 200 M.
Near rear. Blocked for run rounding home turn when travelling strongly. Into clear at 350 M and responded well to reach lead after 200 M. Scored strongly.
Outside lead and 4-wide. Gave ground from 600 M.
Behind midfield early. Towards rear from 1400 M. Took closer order along rail rounding home bend. Made up a little late ground.
Ridden forward and led briefly before settling in front of midfield. Under pressure rounding home bend and improved to be 3rd turning in. Kept on one-paced without threatening in straight.
Mostly behind midfield after being inconvenienced at the start. Kept on until weakened 150 M out.
Tardy start. At back. Under pressure rounding home bend and improved on the outside to around midfield turning in. Ran on doggedly and got up in the closing stages.
Led or disputed lead to 1100 M before tracking the leader. Dropped out of contention soon after straightening.
Bounded in the air. Towards rear. Never a factor.
Jumped well then steadily dropped to the rear. Ran on a bit upon straightening but effort not sustained final 100 M.
Jumped well before settling around midfield. Ran on until not quickened close home.
Travelled kindly in 3rd position. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Midfield or better. Ran on in straight and took lead 200 M out. Kept on but was unable to match speed with the first pair close home.
Rider lost his near side iron momentarily on jumping. Recovered to be behind midfield. Dropped to the rear from 1400 M and became tailed off from 800 M. (Demoted.)
Dropped back to the rear. Given reminder turning in. Not a factor upon straightening.
Soon towards rear. Behind midfield rounding home bend. Ran on steadily final 300 M but was outsprinted by the winner final 100 M.
Soon pulled to the front and led. Headed 200 M out. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Took lead from 1000 M to 300 M. Weakened steadily thereafter.
Behind midfield to 400 M. Made up good ground final 300 M to win comfortably.
Pushed to lead briefly to 1000 M. Regained lead from 300 M till weakened close home.
Behind midfield. Wide into straight. Kept on quite well to the line.
Settled behind leader. Weakened steadily from 300 M.
Mainly midfield. Weakened steadily in straight.
Slow away but soon improved to midfield. Ran on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind pace. Kept on quite well early in straight until weakened close home.
Settled in midfield or better. Under pressure from 900 M and dropped out steadily. Weakened further in home straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away and at rear. Last turning in. Ran on well final 200 M.
Settled behind pace. Ran on well in straight to take lead briefly at 100 M. Outsprinted by winner close home.
Mainly prominent 4th. Kept on well in straight.
Slow and at rear to 700 M. Gradual headway but raced wide on home bend. Made up further ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to 400 M. Stayed on steadily final 300 M.
Prominent. Outside leader rounding home bend. Held every chance early in straight. Kept on without quickening final 200 M.
Slightly slowly away and soon in rear. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Wide turning in. Made progress final 200 M.
Prominent early. Midfield when steadied approaching 800 M, losing position. Did not recover. (Saddle slipped.)
Ridden to muster early pace. Settled in forward of midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Jumped badly. Recovered to rear of midfield before home bend. Dropped back from 600 M. (Saddle slipped.)
Taken back to rear. Made moderate late progress closing stages.
Midfield early then settled towards rear. Made late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Quickened well after straightening to hit front 250 M out. Drew clear. (Promoted.)
Soon took up running. Kept on when headed 250 M out. Faded closing stages.

Jumped awkwardly from widest draw. Towards rear before making good headway on home bend to be better than midfield turning in. Sustained progress to reach 2nd closing stages without threatening winner.
Behind midfield early. Took closer order rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Settled in better than midfield. Gave ground final 250 M.
Prominent. Kept on one pace final 200 M.
Soon in midfield. Ran on well from 6th at 200 M to take command close home.
Jumped awkwardly, never a factor.
Never far off. Made gradual progress to 3rd 400 M. Kept on without threatening.
Slightly better than midfield. Was checked on the rail passing 600 M. Unable to quicken.
Led field until headed inside final 50 M. (Bled.)
Ridden along from widest draw to be in touch. Unable to quicken to challenge in straight.
Chased the leader before joining lead briefly approaching 600 M. Unable to hold place inside 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, was behind midfield until making up some ground 200 M.
Missed the start and was always in the rear. Hung out badly approaching the home turn.
Soon in touch. Became unbalanced early straight, dropping to the midfield. Eased down when found no clear run final 100 M. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield. Was widest turning into straight. Made no show.
Towards rear. Ran on quite well final 250 M.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Mostly 9th to final turn. Kept on same pace in straight.
Soon in rear. Never a factor.
Inconvenienced at start. Settled in rear. Made headway on outside rounding home bend to be midfield but widest turning in. Sustained progress until one-paced closing stages.
Slowly away. Ridden along early to be midfield. Found no extra final 200 M.
Close up. Settled behind leader from 1200 M. Weakened upon straightening.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Settled behind leaders within striking distance. Improved to be 2nd upon straightening. Kept on before no extra closing stages.
Prominent to 500 M then dropped out. (Demoted.)
Niggled along towards rear. Made headway on home bend but wide turning in. Sustained good progress and just failed to get up at finish.
Close up. Took up running approaching 1200 M. Kept on when headed closing stages.
Settled in forward of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight to hit front closing stages. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Mainly in midfield. Awkwardly placed on rails approaching home turn. Not much room early in straight. Kept on to finish.
Very slowly away. Towards rear. Gained ground on inside to be midfield turning for home. Made steady progress without threatening.
Forward of midfield to straight then weakened.
Mainly in midfield before giving ground from 500 M.
Rear and wide. Under pressure final turn. Moderate progress in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there. Took lead far side. Weakened soon after headed in early straight.
Soon 4th. Made progress 650 M to take lead upon straightening. Kept on when headed 150 M.
Prominent. Dropped out passing the Rock.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on without quickening.
Settled 5th. Pushed along rounding home bend. Did not respond.
Midfield or slightly better. Dropped back a bit passing the Rock. No progress in straight.
Mostly midfield before making progress rounding home bend to be 4th turning in. Then one-paced.
Midfield from a wide draw. Dropped to the rear group far side and never likely to feature.
Towards rear. Ran on quite well in straight, never nearer.
Rear. Improved from 550 M to be 3rd turning in. Ran on well to take control 150 M and was never in danger after. (Promoted.)
Midfield. Progressed slightly passing the Rock. Kept on.
Led early, remained in a prominent position. Weakened out of contention final turn.
Always prominent. Drifted wide in straight. Kept on well.
Towards rear. Made up good ground down straight.
Began well then settled in midfield or better. Took closer order around home bend and was behind leading pair when 3rd into straight. Quickened to lead over 200 M out and held on well. (Promoted.)
Towards rear. Produced late impression down centre of straight.
In similar position throughout.
Took up running turning into back straight. Joined around home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Wide and better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Prominent early stages. Lost ground and dropped to midfield after 1000 M bend. One-paced in straight.
Slowly away. Ridden along to muster early speed. Travelled just behind midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Never nearer.
Pulled up shortly after start. (Heart Irregularity.)
Tracked leader. Joined lead around home bend. Hit front briefly over 200 M out. Failed to sustain effort when headed.
Restless in stall. Slowly away. Always well behind.
Travelled in better than midfield. Ran on down straight to be nearest at finish without troubling winner.
Sent along early, dropped back to midfield, progress from 400 M out.
Behind midfield, under pressure far out, improved final 200 M.
Forward midfield, gave ground 300 M out.
Up with pace throughout.
Around midfield.
Soon dropped behind midfield. (Demoted.)
Led or disputed lead throughout.
In touch, no extra home straight.
Always in touch.
Forward midfield, rider momentarily dropped rein near 800 M, ran on home straight.
Well back and never likely. (Demoted.)
Never a factor.
Slow away and never a factor.
Poor start then mostly rear and wide.
Went forward from wide draw and was following leader at 1000 M. Gave ground from 500 M.
Little slow to begin then shifted to outside and ridden hard around field to reach clear lead at 1000 M. Effort told and gave ground gradually from 500 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Near rear turning in. Made ground early straight then ducked in at 200 M. Made ground again when balanced.
With rear. Dropped to rear at 700 M. No improvement. (Demoted.)
Behind midfield. Made ground wide after 400 M. Kept on without ever looking likely.
Midfield. Made ground after 400 M and was wide turning in. Continued to make ground and just got up for 2nd place.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Prominent. One-paced in straight.
In front of midfield. Gave ground from 600 M.
Began awkwardly then midfield. Some response to reach 3rd after straightening then one-paced last bit.
Prominent. Reached lead at 500 M and then kept on strongly.
Rear. Improved along inner from 700 M. Midfield turning in and kept on strongly to be closest at finish.
In front of midfield. Made ground from 500 M to be prominent turning in. Chased gamely but just failed to hold 2nd placing.
Jumped well and ridden to a forward position but was checked and clipped Supreme Cat's heels at 1000 M. Mainly midfield thereafter.
Always well there. Weakened final 100 M.
Midfield throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon moved up to the front and very wide turning the 1000 M bend. Led or disputed lead to 400 M. Soon weakened and crowded at 200 M.
Slowly away. At the back throughout.
Mainly better than midfield. Trapped wide turning in. Ran on well final 200 M without threatening the winner.
Left gates badly. Towards the rear. Closer order rounding home bend and wide. Made up some ground in straight.
Led briefly. Settled behind leaders. Disputed lead home bend. Kept on well.
Jumped very awkwardly and severely checked after start. At the back. Hung in in early stages and stuck rail at 1000 M. Never a factor.
Soon moved up to midfield. Wide turning in. One-paced in straight.
Always in touch. Kept on well in straight.
Jumped well. Settled worse than midfield. Improved from 500 M and made up further ground in straight. Nearest at finish.
Midfield or slightly better. Gave a little ground 1000 M. Remained the same thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly, remained in rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Stayed on quite well final 200 M.
In similar position throughout.
Never in contention.
Never far off, 1L 3rd turning in. Ran on steadily to take command closing stages. (To Class 3.)
Soon 2nd. Came to tackle leader approaching 800 M. Failed to hold place soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Made up some ground while hanging out in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly better than midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Behind midfield. Made no show final turn.
Tardy start, towards rear early. Moved up gradually to reach 3rd briefly 800 M out. Was one-paced when 5th 400 M.
Led field until headed closing stages.
Towards rear. Lost further ground when unbalanced 1400 M. Made progress rounding home bend to be widest in midfield final turn. Kept on in straight.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Checked at start then never featured.
Wide in midfield. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away but soon recovered to better than midfield. Found no extra upon straightening.
Soon in rear and trailed the field into straight. Ran on past beaten horses.
In similar position throughout. Wide into straight. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Began awkwardly. Raced in last few. Made up some ground down straight.
Slow into stride. Soon prominent. Weakened passing 200 M.
Close up to straight then gradually weakened.
Waited with. Finished race off strongly only to be denied by a narrow margin.
Prominent briefly. Gradually dropped to rear. (Demoted.)
Ridden and soon took up running. Still holding narrow advantage turning into straight but unable to sustain effort nearing home. (Lame.)
Midfield throughout. Failed to quicken in straight.
Wide throughout and just behind midfield to straight. Weakened.
Given reminders early. Well there. Disputed lead into straight. Gained upper hand closing stages.
Prominent early. Slightly inconvenienced near 1000 M, dropping to midfield. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Midfield. Pushed along to reach 3rd 800 M. Made no show in straight.
Midfield to home bend. Faded.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well from outside in straight but unable to reach the winner.
Led field before settling 4th 1000 M. Responded well turning in to take control 300 M. Held on well.
In touch early. Dropped out after being checked passing 1000 M. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Inconvenienced approaching 1000 M. Moved up rounding home bend. Ran on until one-paced closing stages.

Behind midfield. Steadied near 1000 M. Ran on a bit final 300 M.
Rear. Was making ground when steadied 200 M. Kept on.
Soon last. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon prominent. Took lead from 1000 M to 800 M. Kept on from 4th early straight until finding no extra final 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Found no extra 250 M.
Rear early. Made up some ground rounding home bend to be 4th 400 M. Found no extra 250 M.
Never a factor.
Settled in 4th within striking distance. Quickened well to assert authority over 100 M out. Won going away.
Chased leader. Weakened passing 200 M.
Soon outpaced. (Demoted.)
Mainly around midfield. Gradually gave ground from home bend.
Travelled in last few. Ran on steadily down inside of straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield to straight then no extra.
Midfield. Made modest progress down straight to reach 2nd closing stages without ever troubling winner.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out quickly. (Demoted.)
Always towards rear. Kept on one pace in straight.
Travelled wide behind midfield to straight. Ran on early on before keeping on one pace closing stages.
Well back. Made up some late ground past beaten runners closing stages.
Travelled towards rear. Made moderate progress in straight.
Began well and attempted to make all. Tired noticeably and headed over 100 M out.
Towards rear, short of space 400 M, progress over 200 M out.
Dropped back towards rear, last turning in, ran on well to hit front close home.
Prominent, every chance home turn, weakened 300 M out.
At rear, improved from 900 M, widest turning in, alongside winner 200 M, then no extra.
Sent up to forward midfield, under whip 300 M, no response.
Midfield or worse, ran on final 200 M. (Demoted.)
Around midfield from poor draw, niggled along far out, kept on to line.
Led to about 100 M out then weakened.
Prominent, under pressure 400 M out and soon gave ground.
Midfield or better, ran on final 300 M to dispute lead closing stages.
Behind midfield, niggled along far out, awkward home turn, ran on over 200 M out.
Around midfield, kept on without threatening leaders.
In touch, led 100 M to close home.
Behind leaders. Remained same into home straight when taken into clear. Responded well and just failed to hold off winner after reaching lead inside final 100 M.
Failed to show early pace despite riding. Hung in and got back to midfield. No response when asked for effort at 400 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
In front of midfield. Made gradual ground in run to line.
Stood flat-footed at start and lost a lot of ground. Remained detached throughout.
Behind midfield and 3-wide. Only slight improvement in straight and never looked likely.
Followed leader. Remained on inner after straightening and responded well despite being unable to match finishing efforts of quinella pair.
Led until headed inside final 100 M when unable to find any extra.
Behind midfield. Lost ground when checked at 700 M. Was making a little ground in straight until being steadied when crowded after 200 M.
Outside leader until finding no extra shortly after straightening.
At rear of main group throughout. Hung out badly in middle stages.
Outside lead and 3-wide. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
Near rear. Stayed same into home straight when remained on inner. Once balanced made ground quickly through field to arrive just in time.
Behind midfield. Found no extra after keeping on one-paced early in straight. (Saddle slipped.)
Worked forward from outside draw to be in front of midfield. Made gradual ground in run to line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly midfield. Wide turning in. Kept on until not quickened closing stages.
Better than midfield. Kept on well until no extra final 100 M.
Ridden to maintain midfield position to stable bend. Dropped to the back turning into back straight. Not a factor afterwards.
Prominent and wide on stable bend. Led from 1200 M. Headed at 500 M. Further weakened from 300 M.
Prominent briefly. Settled in midfield turning into back straight. Ran on strongly final 250 M without threatening the winner.
Well there to 1200 M. Soon dropped to midfield. One-paced in straight.
Jumped well. Caught wide on stable bend because of wide draw and steadily dropped towards the rear. No further improvement.
Jumped well. Caught wide on stable bend because of wide draw and steadily dropped to the rear. Taken wide again on home turn and made up some ground in straight.
Steadily dropped to the rear. Improved a little near 700 M. Midfield into straight. Weakened from 250 M.
Jumped awkwardly. At back to home turn. Ran on steadily. Doing best work towards the finish.
Led to 1200 M. Sat inside leader. Led again from 500 M and never headed. Kept on well to the line. (Promoted.)
Mainly midfield or a little worse. Inclined to lay out rounding home turn and wide. Faded from 250 M.
Well there to 250 M. Soon weakened.
At the back. Made up good ground from 250 M.
Settled towards rear early. Outpaced from 800 M. Last turning in. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly midfield or better. Shifted out to go forward upon straightening but had a tendency to lay in. Ran on steadily without threatening the winner.
In touch early. Distant 3rd or 4th down back straight. Under pressure and crept closer rounding home bend. Kept on to gain a remote 3rd place. (Promoted.)
Soon took up running. Headed rounding home bend. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Began awkwardly. Settled in midfield or worse. Dropped back towards rear down back straight. Took closer order along rail turning in. Never a threat in straight.
Settled at rear. Improved to behind midfield rounding home turn. Kept on well until one-paced close home.
Mostly at rear. Never a factor.
At rear. Never in contention.
Mostly thereabouts. Ridden forward rounding home bend. Kept on before weakening badly final 200 M.
Soon in touch. Mainly forward of midfield from stable bend. Under pressure rounding home bend. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Led early. Soon settled kindly behind the leader. Took lead rounding home bend. Kept on strongly in straight to win going away.
Mainly towards rear. Ridden along far out but little response. Dropped out badly home straight.
Prominent. Took up running from 1200 M. Headed 250 M out then weakened.
Settled in better than midfield. Dropped to midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well final 250 M only to be denied by the narrowest margin.
Settled towards rear. Made progress on outside rounding home bend to be midfield and wide turning in. Ran on while shifting out final 300 M. (Finished 5th, placed 6th.)
Soon tailed-off despite hard ridden early. Never in contention.

Prominent. Dropped to midfield rounding home bend. Gave further ground in straight.
Settled behind leaders to straight. Kept on one pace. (Demoted.)
Jumped awkwardly. Settled in midfield. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend. Made no improvement in straight.
Rear of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Sustained progress in straight to hit front 200 M out but unable to fend off place-getters' late challenge.

Jumped awkwardly. Settled in rear. Making ground when carried wide out final 300 M. Finished well to be nearest at finish. (Finished 6th, placed 5th.)
Settled towards rear. Gained ground on inside to be midfield turning in. Not much room before running on well final 250 M to gain upper hand final strides.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened to lead briefly 250 M out. Unable to sustain effort.
Settled towards rear. Made up good ground inside final 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly. At rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Led. Held 2Ls advantage final turn. Kept on when headed 100 M.
In touch early. Dropped to behind midfield far side. Made some progress from 400 M. Ran on closing stages.
Pushed along from a wide draw to be 2nd 1000 M. Responded well along rail in straight to take lead 100 M. Held on.
Held 3rd until failing to hold place soon after straightening.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily from 800 M. (Demoted.)
Better than midfield and was 4th from 1000 M. Kept on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Crept closer order final turn. Kept on without quickening. (Demoted.)
Midfield. Moved up gradually 800 M to be 4th turning in. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Rear. Hung out first turn and was widest turning in. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Slightly inconvenienced 250 M. One-paced.
Mainly in midfield. Stumbled and lost position over 800 M out before making steady headway around home bend. Sustained progress from 5th into straight to be nearest at finish while shifting in.
Midfield. Hampered and dropped to rear on 1200 M bend. Last into straight and ran past beaten runners.
Better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Always close up. Fought on doggedly down straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Moved up to join leader around home bend. Gained slender advantage upon straightening and hung on well.
Around midfield. Hampered and lost position home bend. Never recovered.
Wide and mainly towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
Led until joined into straight. Weakened passing 200 M.

Never nearer.
Midfield. Effort into straight. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Prominent to 400 M then dropped out.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear home bend.
Settled behind midfield while wide and without cover. Moderate progress final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly, rear to final turn. Ran on well to take control 100 M out. Won unchallenged.
Slightly behind midfield. Made slight progress far side. Made no show in straight.
Ridden to be 5th from widest draw. Unable to hold place from 4th final turn.
Towards rear. Made up good ground in straight to take 3rd close home.
Towards rear. Made steady progress rounding home bend to be 5th turning in. Kept on.

Soon led. Found no extra when headed approaching 100 M.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader 700 M. Maintained 2nd to 150 M, then one-paced.
Soon last. Made up some ground in straight. (Demoted.)
Better than midfield. Kept on without quickening.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent till fading out of contention final turn.
Slowly away. Remained in rear before gaining good ground on rails to be midfield turning in. Kept on without making further impression.
Always in last few.

Ridden hard from outside draw to be outside leader. Under pressure at 500 M and gave ground shortly afterwards.
Behind leaders and 3-wide. Prominent despite being under pressure on straightening. Kept on one-paced.
Around midfield throughout.
Near rear. Widest turning in. Made ground in run to line but never looked likely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Under pressure at 500 M. Wide turning in. Only ran past beaten horses.

Sat behind leader which was also the winner. Kept on well but winner too strong.
At the back throughout.
Quickly into lead. Never in doubt. Won comfortably. (Promoted.)
Worse than midfield. Progress along back straight to reach midfield at 700 M. Made up a little ground in straight.
In touch. One-paced in straight.
At the back. Improved from 700 M to be in midfield on outside turning in. Made up good ground towards the finish.
Restless, jumped in air and tightened at start. At rear. Improved a little along back straight. Under pressure near 500 M and weakened.
Prominent. Joined lead rounding home bend. Found no extra when unbalanced inside 200 M.
Slowly away, never in contention. Hung out badly on turns and in straight.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Never far off. One-paced in straight.
Behind midfield. No progress in straight.
Soon led until shared at 800 M. Kept on well until finding no extra 200 M out.
Moved forward from a wide draw to join lead from first turn. Weakened soon after straightening.
Missed the start slightly, towards rear. Made up some ground in straight, never nearer.
Jumped well and was in the front early. Soon stayed in midfield till running on well in straight. Unable to threaten the winner.
Raced greenly in midfield. Made no show in straight.
Always there, 2Ls 4th turning in. Sustained effort to take lead 250 M. Held on well.
Slowly away, towards rear and hung out throughout.
Mostly midfield before responding well from final turn to take 3rd 200 M out.
Always there. Kept on for a distant 4th.
Slightly behind midfield. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield. Made no show on straightening.
Soon led. Was sharing the lead rounding home bend. Gained narrow advantage passing 200 M but was soon beaten.
Rear to straight. Made up good ground final 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or behind. Weakened closing stages.
Led briefly after start, then raced in a forward midfield position. Ran on from 3rd early straight to claim victory 100 M.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch. Unable to quicken in straight.
Rear. Ran on a bit final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Moved up to 4th rounding home bend until dropping back to midfield final turn. One-paced.
Midfield early. Soon moved up to share the lead home bend. Took brief lead early straight. Kept on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or behind. One-paced.
Soon 2nd. Kept on until finding no extra final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Ridden along far side to be 5th 1000 M. Kept on without quickening.
Jumped well but settled in rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Responded well along rail in straight to assert authority closing stages.
Lost ground at start, at rear throughout.
Tardy start but soon moved forward to become 3rd. Weakened upon straightening.
Led field to 400 M. Kept on without quickening.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Unseated rider soon after start. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch but was inconvenienced by the riderless horse 1000 M. Maintained similar position until running on well from outside 400 M to take lead 300 M. Headed closing stages. (Promoted.)
Jumped awkwardly. Towards rear throughout.
In touch early but was soon behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Midfield or better. Kept on.
Soon led. Weakened when headed early straight.
Slightly slowly away, never in contention.
Pushed forward from widest draw to sit outside leader before taking over early straight. Kept on when headed 150 M.
Towards rear. Raced ungenerously approaching 800 M. Ran on closing stages.
Around midfield. Ran on a bit closing stages.
In touch. Ran on in straight but unable to match speed with the winner closing stages.
Midfield. Kept on well final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily final 300 M to miss 3rd narrowly.
Never a factor.
Held 3rd to straight. Ran on strongly to claim victory 150 M. (Promoted.)
Towards rear throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow away and behind midfield, improved from 600 M and kept on home straight.
Around midfield, weakened final 300 M.
Never a factor.
Around midfield, weakened final 200 M.
Behind midfield, kept on home straight.
Always behind midfield.
Around midfield, kept on home straight.
Around midfield, kept on home straight.
In touch, improved through home straight to lead about 100 M out and go clear. (Promoted.)
Never better than midfield, soon beaten home straight.
Prominent throughout, led 700 M to 100 M.
In touch to 400 M then found no extra.
Well back, last turning in, ran on home straight to be nearest at finish.
Led to 700 M then dropped out.
Behind midfield. Kept on one-paced in straight.
At rear after being checked shortly after the start. Remained at rear throughout.
In front of midfield. Blocked for running early in straight. Finished strongly when in clear after 200 M.
Near rear. Remained same into home straight and didn't find any extra.
Near rear. No response early in straight then made a little ground in closing stages.
Behind midfield. Remained same until unleashing powerful sprint final 300 M to just get up.
In front of midfield. Kept on early in straight. Gave ground quickly after being steadied at 200 M.
Midfield and 3-wide. Improved to be prominent turning in. One-paced last 150 M.
Led until closing stages. Kept on strongly but unable to hold off winner.
Midfield. Shifted out early in straight to go forward. Doing best work concluding stages to be closest at finish.
Followed leader. Kept on well in straight.
Behind midfield. One-paced in straight. Never looked likely.
Prominent. Kept on until finding no extra final 100 M.
Ridden to be behind lead after being a little slow to begin. Remained same until giving ground final 200 M.
In touch. Steadily improved passing 1200 M. Prominent entering straight until weakened after the 200 M.
Well there briefly. Soon dropped to worse than midfield. Made up some ground in straight.
Midfield or worse. Wide around home bend. Kept on until weakened final 150 M.
Tardy start. Soon moved up to a prominent position along rails. Behind leaders into straight. Unable to quicken.
Jumped well. Always well there. One-paced early straight and weakened after the 200 M.
Towards the rear early. Steadily moved up to the front by 1200 M. Inside leader into straight. Weakened from 250 M.
At the back. Closer order home bend. Ran on strongly final 250 M. Won comfortably.
Mainly midfield. Caught a bit wide turning in. Kept on until no extra final 150 M.
Jumped very awkwardly. At back. Ran on strongly final 300 M. Nearest at finish.
Midfield or better. Kept on well. Winner too strong.
Mainly midfield. Unable to obtain a clear run early straight. Checked at 300 M when disappointed for a run again. Not in contention afterward.
Crowded after start. At the back. Made up a lot of ground in straight.
Soon dropped to the back. Never a factor.
Jumped well and led narrowly to 150 M. Weakened.
Soon checked to rear. Faded steadily in straight.
Prominent 3rd early, 5th turning in. Kept on well in straight.
Settled towards rear. Headway and wide home bend. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Outpaced. Last turning in. Faded in straight.
Prominent 2nd before led from 1000 M. Kept on well but was headed near finish.
Midfield. Headway home bend to reach 3rd turning in. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield from 900 M. Towards rear and wide turning in. Ran on well final 200 M.
Led early. 2nd turning in. Weakened steadily.
Midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Midfield. Headway home bend. Ran on well final 300 M to take charge close home. (Promoted.)
Soon outpaced to midfield. Stayed on one-paced.
Settled behind leaders. Improved to 2nd at 200 M. Weakened close home.
Jumped well but soon outpaced towards rear. Ran on very well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early, 6th turning in. Weakened badly final 300 M. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Mostly in rear to straight where he ran on well to be nearest at finish. (Promoted.)
1st or 2nd to straight where he held narrow lead. Unable to hold place and dropped out of contention approaching 200 M.
Mostly midfield to straight. Stayed on well to challenge inside final 200 M, having every chance.
Midfield most of way. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Towards rear of closely bunched field into straight. Ran on from 250 M and was doing best work towards finish.
Rear early. Improved to be midfield 800 M. Loomed up to hold some chance 300 M. Found no extra close home.
Soon improved towards leaders, reaching 3rd 1100 M. Hit front briefly 250 M, but effort not sustained close home.
Towards rear before switching out early in straight. Kept on to be closest at finish.
Close up to straight where he made no show from the 300 M.
Last and wide turning for home. Made up some late ground final 200 M.
Well there before settling towards rear. Improved steadily home bend and ran on resolutely to take narrow advantage passing 150 M. Held on under pressure. (Promoted.)
Ridden early to be among leaders. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Prominent to straight where he faded rapidly.
Always struggling.
Never seen with a chance.
Mostly midfield to straight. Showed good turn of foot from the 300 M, taking command 150 M. Won easily.
Never far off to straight where he had every chance. Unable to hold first 2 closing stages.
Always at the back.
Well there to straight where he soon faded out of contention.
Towards rear before making up good ground in straight. No extra close home.
9th rounding home bend. Headway along rails and ran on well. Found winner too strong.
Well there early and was worse than midfield home bend. Plugged on final 250 M.
In touch to straight where he ran on to challenge. No extra final 300 M.
Worse than midfield into straight where he was baulked 350 M. Stayed on close home.
Never on terms.
Towards rear when checked 1000 M, losing ground. Remained in rear to straight where he ran on a bit.
Led soon after start and made running to 200 M where he could find no more.
Prominent till dropping out quickly on straightening.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered ground to midfield at course proper. Found no extra when raced greenly inside 200 M.
Well there. Commenced to give ground when crowded and unbalanced at 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly but was soon prominent. Took lead inside 600 M but was unable to withhold the winner final 100 M. Shifted out close home.
Prominent. Dropped back from halfway.
Prominent. Kept on but unable to quicken inside 200 M.
Midfield. Dropped out final 250 M.
Never far off. Weakened closing stages.
In touch, was about 2Ls 7th 400 M. Responded well final 250 M to take command 100 M out. Held on well.
Towards rear. Made ground from 400 M. Kept on.
Towards rear. Made up good ground final 300 M, never nearer.
Near rear. Ran on from outside 400 M.
Midfield. Moved up from 600 M to reach 2nd passing 300 M. Kept on but unable to quicken close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear until running on well final 200 M.
Disputed lead to 250 M then dropped out.
Began well. Settled in last few. Finished off race strongly.
Never in contention.
Always well back.
Jumped awkwardly. Travelled at the back. Ran on past beaten runners closing stages.
Bumped jumping out. Never on terms.
Made all. Always in command.
Always well there but never able to threaten. Winner too strong.
Travelled just better than midfield. Weakened from 200 M.
Midfield throughout.
Settled behind midfield. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Always prominent. Failed to quicken to challenge closing stages.
Began slowly. Soon recovered to midfield. Weakened soon after passing course proper.
Always prominent. Improved to hold some chance 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Missed the start. Never in contention.
Pulled to be in the front pair early, settling 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Shifted out when steadied 250 M, just kept on.
Always there. Looked to have some chance approaching 200 M, however run ended closing stages.
Towards rear. Made short-lived effort 700 M. Made no show in straight.
Never able to feature.
Midfield or behind. Ran on well from outside 300 M to claim 3rd closing stages.
Started awkwardly, behind midfield early. Recovered ground far side to be 5th 800 M out. Kept on same pace in straight. Weakened close home.
Last. Recovered some ground far side. Dropped back to the rear from 800 M. (Finished distressed.)
Jumped awkwardly. Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Made gradual progress from 600 M. Took lead briefly 250 M until headed 150 M. Kept on but unable to fight back.
Better than midfield. Ran on well from 7th early straight to take lead about 150 M. Held on to the line.
Settled towards rear from a wide draw. Made up good ground final 300 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Moved up gradually to join lead rounding home bend. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Led field soon after start. Was joined passing 800 M. Failed to maintain position passing 300 M.
Mainly in midfield. Made steady progress inside final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Finished strongly inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in midfield. Improved well to take charge nearing finish. Won readily.
Settled in last few. Given reminders over 200 M out. Kept on same pace to the line.
Began in midfield. Gradually dropped to rear before home bend.
Never nearer. Kept on well.
Settled some 2Ls off pace. No extra under pressure inside final 200 M.
Slowly away. Soon recovered to just behind midfield. Gradually faded in straight.
Disputed lead to 200 M then gradually weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well. Raced 3-wide throughout and in 5th position to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Midfield to straight then dropped out.
Attempted to make all. Broke some 1-1/2L clear passing 200 M and flattered. Fading when run down by winner nearing finish.
Wide in midfield. Towards rear upon straightening. One-paced in straight.
In similar position throughout. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Midfield. Hung out making the turn at 800 M. Ran off shortly afterwards and was eased down.
Followed leader. Into clear after straightening and kept on strongly but unable to match finishing effort of quinella pair. (Rider dropped whip 100 M.)
Near rear. Made some improvement early in straight but run ended at 200 M.
Near rear. Made ground along inside to be midfield on straightening. Kept on early straight then no more final 250 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Responded fairly after straightening. Continued with effort but just failed to hold third placing.
Midfield. Asked for effort after 500 M and continued to make gradual ground in straight.
Allowed to drop to rear. Remained same until straightening then responded strongly under mostly hands and heels riding to be closest at finish.
Near rear. Made sustained effort from 300 M, just failed to resist the winner's challenge close home.
Soon dropped to near rear. No improvement when asked for effort at 500 M.
Settled in midfield. Shaken up upon straightening. Responded well to snatch victory after ding-dong battle final 200 M.
Behind lead and 3-wide. Joined lead at 500 M. Drifted wider on straightening and then found no extra.
Led until after 200 M then kept on fairly until last bit.
Behind lead. Same until straightening then gave ground shortly afterwards.
Behind midfield. Widest into home straight. Took a while to gain momentum early in straight then made good ground late.
Well back despite being niggled along. Never a factor.
Better than midfield. Ran on to claim third final 100 M. Kept on.
Midfield or better throughout. No further progress in the home straight.
Ridden to be prominent. Weakened from 300 M.
Prominent and 4-wide. Weakened from 300 M, steadied when crowded 100 M out.
At rear throughout, never seen with a chance.
Midfield. Quickened well from 350 M to take lead 200 M out. Kept on well to the line.
Sent to the lead. Headed 300 M out. Steadily weakened.
Well back. Became unbalanced when crowded near the 600 M. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Always well there. Challenged for lead 250 M out. Kept on well though finding the winner too strong.
Always prominent. Steadily weakened final 150 M.
Waited with at the back from wide draw. Under pressure from 600 M. Made up a little ground in the straight when hanging in and proved difficult to ride.
Well there to 800 M where hampered and lost position. Was again checked near the 200 M.
Behind midfield to 300 M. Made ground steadily until no extra close home.
Prominent. Checked at 800 M. Eased down in the straight. (Lame off hind.)
Never better than midfield. Caught wide most of the way.
In touch to 200 M. Weakened.
Always well there. Kept on until no extra close home.
Ridden to dispute lead at 1000 M. Kept on quite well until no extra final 150 M.
Pushed along to be prominent early. Midfield from 900 M. No further improvement.
Steadily dropped to the back from wide draw. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Ran on well final 200 M.
Prominent early then midfield from 1000 M. Checked at 800 M. Responded well final 250 M to hit the front close home.
Near rear. Made ground steadily final 200 M.
Reared at start, well back. Taken wide home bend. Ran on strongly final 300 M, just failed to peg back the winner closing stages.
Midfield or better. Weakened gradually final 150 M.
Prominent and wide. Crossed over to lead 800 M out. Headed closing stages, kept on.
Well there early. Soon in better than midfield. Severely checked at 800 M. Not a factor afterwards.
At rear. Niggled along from 1200 M to be midfield or worse 800 M out. Responded well final 400 M and took lead final 100 M. Held on.
Worse than midfield. Slight improvement rounding home bend. Ran on final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Niggled early and soon settled around midfield. Steady headway rounding home bend but was caught 4 or 5 wide turning in. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon at rear. Kept on one-paced without threatening in the straight. Weakened close home.
Soon settled at rear from wide draw. Made up some ground upon straightening.
Soon led. Headed 1100 M and remained in 2nd place. Just kept on when severely hampered approaching 200 M. Never recovered. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped badly and remained at rear. Never a factor.
Always in touch. Ran on well in straight and took lead 300 M out. Kept on well despite being headed final 100 M.
Mostly midfield or better. Took closer order along rail turning in. Ran on steadily but was steadied approaching 200 M. Not a threat thereafter.
Took lead from 1100 M. Headed 300 M out. Severely checked approaching the 200 M and dropped right out of contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon behind midfield or worse. Slight improvement rounding home bend but caught wide. Kept on one-paced in straight until finding no more final 100 M.
Ridden along early and soon in midfield or better. Outpaced 500 M out.
Jumped best before settling in midfield or worse. Swift headway from 1000 M to be in touch 800 M out. 2nd or 3rd turning in. Kept on until weakened final 100 M.
Soon at rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Never far off to straight. Was tightened and eased passing 200 M.
In touch and was 2nd from 800 M to straight. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
About 10th, going well, approaching 600 M. Ran on well to take command inside 150 M. Won comfortably.
Midfield home bend. Kept on till fading final 150 M.
Jumped well before settling behind leaders. About mid-division into straight when he ran on quite well from the 300 M. One-paced near finish.
Always at the back.
Worse than midfield to straight where he kept on till failing to quicken near finish.
Never far away. Unable to sustain a clear run in straight.
Was midfield before making steady headway home bend. One-paced when tightened and eased passing 200 M.
Settled in rear to straight when he made up considerable ground.
Never in the hunt.
In rear to straight where he stayed on quite well.
Always prominent. Ran on to dispute lead passing 200 M. Found winner too strong.
Soon took up running and led field to 200 M when challenged. No extra when headed close home.
Pushed forward to be in touch. Dropped back to midfield or behind when racing tightly passing 900 M. No improvement.
Towards rear early. Improved gradually to 4th 900 M. Dropped out when rounding the home bend.
Pushed to the front and led field to 750 M. Remained 2nd or 3rd until finding no extra 150 M.
Midfield early, soon dropped to the back.
Behind midfield on outside. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Soon prominent. Took lead passing 800 M until headed 150 M. Just kept on for a 3rd.
Held 3rd before progressing to 2nd 400 M. Came to tackle leader early straight but was one-paced final 150 M.
Not far off to 200 M. Unable to quicken.
Behind midfield along rail before improving to 5th final turn. Ran on despite steadied passing 200 M. No match with the winner closing stages.
Towards rear from widest draw. Was improving when awkwardly placed home turn. Continued to make ground in straight, never nearer.
Towards rear. Made some progress far side to be midfield home bend. Responded well in straight to take command 100 M out. Won readily.
Always well behind before straight. Ran past beaten runners. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield.
Shared pace until overhauled nearing finish. Fought on for 3rd place.
Jumped in air. Raced wide in midfield to straight then dropped out.
Settled around midfield. Disputed 4th in straight. Kept on one pace without threatening.
Soon dropped to last few.
Always in last few. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear to straight. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Chased leaders in 3rd. Finished well inside final 200 M to take charge nearing finish.
Ridden along behind midfield. Dropped to rear into straight.
Began well. Joint leader until finding no extra near finish.
Midfield. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled just behind midfield. Took closer order home bend. Ran on in straight without threatening.
Travelled prominently in 4th. Ran on stoutly down straight to just fail to get up on line.
Settled 6th. Ridden along far side to be 4th rounding home bend. Ran on to gain slender advantage 150 M. Just beaten narrowly.
Towards rear. Made progress final turn to be 5th early straight. Ran on along rail to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Moved up from 800 M to be 3rd at the Rock. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Steady progress from 500 M to be midfield home turn. Continued to make ground in straight to become 2nd 150 M. Kept on well.
Around midfield to the Rock. Dropped out rounding home bend.
In touch to 700 M. Dropped back steadily.
Last or 2nd last to straight. Made up good ground final 250 M, never nearer.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Soon prominent, was 2nd 1000 M out. Ridden along to take lead 400 M. Found no extra when headed inside 150 M.
Midfield. Made some progress early straight to reach 4th briefly 150 M. One-paced thereafter.
Led field to 400 M out. Faded in straight.
Midfield at best. One-paced throughout.
Last. Was still in the rear when checked 500 M. Ran on well final 250 M to snatch victory at finish.
Held 3rd to approaching the Rock, then dropping steadily to midfield. Made no show in straight.
Wide throughout. Rear until effort from 500 M. Widest runner turning in. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Midfield or worse. Made moderate headway down straight without threatening.
Rear until making moderate progress on rails in straight.
Towards rear early. Short-lived effort around home bend and wide into straight. One-paced.
Always in rear.
Always prominent. No extra close home.
Midfield. No clear passage early in straight before steadied passing 200 M. No further impression.
Prominent until gradually faded passing 200 M.
Nearly made all.
Raced wide throughout. Towards rear early. Gradual headway far side and around home bend. No extra closing stages.
Always well there holding every chance in straight but failed to quicken to threaten.
Settled at the back. Responded well inside final 200 M to snatch victory close home.
Held up just better than midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Commencing to improve when hampered and lost momentum inside 200 M. No further impression.
Raced outside leader. Weakened in the straight.
Settled worse than midfield. Improved slowly and edged wide at 600 M. Sustained run around field to score good win.
Settled in handy position on the rail. Steadied and shifted out approaching 200 M. Made good ground when placed under pressure.
Raced in the lead. Weakened round home turn and in the straight.
Showed no early pace. Travelled midfield. Lost touch when field quickened at 600 M. Made fair ground in the straight.
Last or settling from outside barrier. Began to improve from 600 M when rounding entire field out wide. Ran on well in home straight making good ground.
Tailed off throughout.
Tailed off throughout.
Trapped wide at first turn. Settled in handy position with cover. Hit the lead at 200 M, but then quickly passed by the winner.
Raced in midfield position. Held up slightly round home turn and again on straightening. Never threatened the placegetters.
Settled behind leaders although racing three wide with no cover. Hit lead round home turn but began to weaken shortly after.
Began well. Raced 3rd throughout. Raced tight on straightening but never quickened.
Raced just behind the leaders. Given every chance. Unable to quicken under pressure and lay in slightly.
Behind midfield. Taken into clear after straightening and responded well to be nearest at finish.
Reared at the start. Remained at rear until 400 M. Continuously made ground afterwards without threatening.
Midfield after being steadied on 1st turn. Gave ground from 500 M.
Led. Gave ground from 350 M.
Midfield and 4-wide early. Worked forward from the 700 M but remained wide. Prominent on straightening. Kept on to reach lead at 100 M and went on to win strongly.
Near rear. Made strong run through field after straightening to just miss.
Went forward from wide draw to be outside lead. Took clear on straightening. Found no extra final 150 M.
Near rear. Dropped to rear at 600 M. Collapsed at 200 M.
In front of midfield. Dropped to midfield after making home turn wide. Kept on fairly early in straight then gave ground.
Midfield. Widest on straightening. Made gradual ground in run to line.
Went forward, crowded at winning post and settled in prominent position. Found no extra after 300 M.
Went forward from outside draw to be 3-wide outside lead until 1000 M when steadied to follow leaders.
Around midfield. Prominent on straightening. Kept on strongly until one-paced last bit.
Pushed forward to track leader from 1000 M. Kept on to hold 3rd closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, then was crowded. Well back, made the first turn awkwardly. Progressed to midfield at 900 M. No further improvement in home straight.
At the back, was crowded and checked on first turn. Never seen with a chance.
Taken to the rear. Made ground steadily final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield, caught wide throughout. Improved steadily to better than midfield at the Rock. Faded from 200 M.
Steadily improved from widest draw to be in touch at 1000 M. Weakened gradually final 200 M.
Niggled along to be better than midfield. Dropped out from 400 M.
Midfield throughout, unable to quicken in the straight.
Well there to 150 M, weakened.
Led, always in command. Kicked clear after straightening to win comfortably.
Well away, settled in behind midfield. Ran on steadily final 200 M, one-paced close home.
Better than midfield. Ran on well final 250 M though no threat to the winner.
Pushed along to take lead soon after start. Kept on when headed turning in until finding no extra 200 M out.
Always there. Slightly impeded around 1000 M. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Better than midfield. Moved up to 3rd 1200 M, dropping back to 5th passing 1000 M. Kept on until finding no extra soon after straightening.
In touch, was 3rd rounding home bend. Weakened final 250 M.
Midfield. Crept closer order to 5th turning in. Ran on quite well 250 M but unable to catch the winner.
Sat outside leader before taking advantage upon straightening. Kept on well to hold off challenge closing stages.
Around midfield throughout.
Missed the start, then remained in 8th far side. No improvement along rail in straight.
Missed the start, was last throughout.
Mostly behind midfield to straight. Made ground steadily to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Slightly inconvenienced while making up some ground inside 200 M. Raced greenly throughout.
Mainly 10th to straight. Made up good ground final 250 M, never nearer.
Quickly improved to 3rd. Soon faded upon straightening.
Never in contention.
Settled wide in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Travelled better than midfield. Hung on well between runners down straight.
Ridden to take up running over 1000 M out and led until overhauled passing 250 M.
Settled towards rear. Made modest progress down centre of straight.

Missed the start. Soon recovered to just behind midfield. Placed awkwardly behind runners approaching home bend. Made up good late ground down straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled behind midfield. Raced tightly between runners early in straight making moderate progress without threatening.
Ridden along travelling better than midfield. Took closer order home bend sharing 2nd into straight. Gained slender lead 200 M out and soon overhauled.
Never better than midfield.
Settled at the back. Finished well down straight to take charge closing stages.
Quickly into lead early but soon held up in 2nd position. Quickened to hold every chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Towards rear. Obliged to race wider when inconvenienced rounding home bend. Made up good ground from outside in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon led and was joined near 800 M. Weakened when headed early straight.
Prominent early from a wide draw, dropping back to midfield 1000 M. Faded upon straightening.
Soon prominent. Joined the leader passing 800 M. Gained upper hand inside 200 M but was headed close home.
Behind midfield. Was steadied final turn. Made up a little ground early straight but found no extra 200 M.
Better than midfield until dropping back from final turn.
Rear. Ran on in straight but was one-paced closing stages.
Prominent. Took lead briefly early straight. Kept on when headed inside 200 M.
In touch, soon settling midfield. Ran on steadily to reach lead momentarily final 50 M. Unable to contain the winner.
Towards rear. Raced awkwardly when tightened home turn. Ran on well final 300 M but unable to reach the leaders.
Rear. Ran on well in straight to claim victory close home.
Better than midfield, advancing to 4th passing 1000 M. Faded in straight.
Soon 2nd. Dropped back from 1000 M to be midfield rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Midfield or behind. Made up some ground in straight.
Travelled in midfield or better. Quickened well down straight to assert authority closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Ran on strongly down straight doing best work at finish.
Slow into stride. Made up good late ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Wide throughout. Never better than midfield.
