In front of midfield. Taken into clear on straightening and responded well to reach lead after 200 M. Went on score convincingly.
Always close-up. Kept on one-pace in the straight.
Midfield early. Gradually dropped towards rear at 1100 M. Shifted out for running on straightening then changed course after the 200 M. Made moderate progress.
Soon moved up to track the leader. Hit the front 200 M out, just pipped by the winner final strides.
Missed start, towards rear early. Niggled along to be better than midfield, wide and without cover early and middle stages. Weakened steadily final 100 M.
Attempted to make all. Headed at 200 M, kept on until no extra closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground.
Dropped to the back from start. Never a factor.
Settled at rear from wide draw. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be closest at finish.
Behind midfield. Ran on well final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, midfield. Faded from 200 M.
Handy. Asked for effort from 400 M. Ran on to get up near the line despite hanging in and proving difficult to ride out.
Led field briefly, remained in prominent position to home turn. Unable to quicken when under pressure in straight.
Midfield. Made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Was making ground when checked near 150 M. Soon recovered and ran on closing stages.
Never a factor.
Pushed along from widest draw to be among leaders passing 1000 M. Was headed 300 M and found no extra inside 200 M.
Among leaders until headed 300 M. Weakened final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch early, soon in midfield or behind. Improved to 4th turning for home. Responded well to take lead 300 M and won unchallenged.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Was hanging in when trying to make some improvement soon after straightening.
Midfield or better. Obliged to race wide while running on a bit final 300 M.
Always thereabout. Kept on quite well in straight.
Tardy start, never able to feature.
Midfield. Shifted out to obtain clear run early straight. Ran on without threatening the winner.
Ran well to 200 M. Made no further impression.
Travelled towards rear. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Began well. Raced prominently and wide without cover far side. Disputed lead early in home straight but unable to sustain effort and overhauled closing stages.
Held up in midfield. Steadied towards rear coming out of back straight. Ran on well in home straight to just fail to get up on line.
Raced prominently early. Lost position and midfield rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Soon outpaced.
Travelled just better than midfield to straight. One-paced.
Travelled in rear. Switched wide into straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Never in the hunt. (Bled.)
Raced awkwardly in the lead far side. Joined turning in but forged 1L clear passing 100 M. Sustained effort and just held off late challengers final strides.
Travelled towards rear. Ran on well between runners in straight to narrowly miss the place-getters.
Gradually improved to close-up 2nd on rails before home bend. Gave ground from halfway and weakened upon straightening.
Midfield to straight. No extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield early. Made swift progress around home bend. Gained 5th into straight then gradually faded.
Just behind midfield. Made up a little ground closing stages.
Midfield early, reached 3rd 1400 M. Sustained effort in straight to assert authority final 100 M.
Mostly 5th or 6th. Kept on when under pressure in straight. (Dropped whip 100 M.)
Led field until headed 100 M. Kept on but found no extra close home.
Sat outside leader soon after start. Found no extra inside 200 M.
In touch until weakening out of contention on straightening.
Soon midfield. Maintained in similar position while hanging in from 1000 M. Ran on in straight to claim 2nd closing stages.
Better than midfield. Made steady progress from 5th early straight to obtain a minor placing near finish.
Made no show.
Missed the start, never likely to feature.
Towards rear. Made progress from 700 M to be 6th on outside turning in. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Slightly behind midfield. Was awkwardly placed final turn. Unable to obtain clear run when trying to improve in straight. Ran on when in clear inside 100 M.
Never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Midfield when wide around home bend. Towards rear into straight. No extra.
In last few. No clear passage early in straight. Made up good late ground inside final 250 M to grab 2nd final stages.
Raced prominently on rail. Awkwardly placed behind leader upon straightening. Soon weakened.
Fell approaching 800 M.
Always well there. Held every chance early in straight but failed to respond when swamped closing stages.
In first few to straight then weakened.
Made running to 300 M then weakened.
Hampered and lost considerable ground at start, then checked approaching 800 M. Remained rear to straight. Finished well inside final 200 M.
Midfield around home bend. Hampered turning for home. Made no impression in straight. (Lame.)
Behind midfield. Gained midfield into straight. Ran on under pressure without threatening.
Behind midfield. Made steady headway in straight.
Midfield. Switched off rails upon straightening and moved up to lead over 200 M out, then never threatened.
Around midfield. Widest turning for home. Quickened early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Missed the start badly, then checked approaching 800 M. Never in the race.
Began quickly and travelled well in handy position. Held on well up the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled behind leader. One-paced in the straight.
Began well to settle in handy position. Improved on turn and made good ground in the straight.
No early speed to be behind midfield. Raced wide. Lost ground in straight.
Raced midfield but very wide. Weakened from home turn.
Raced midfield three wide. Plodded in the straight.
Began well and crossed to fence to be equal lead. Headed at 300 M.
Slow into stride then travelled forward to handy position. Did not quicken when pressure applied.
Began well. Settled midfield on the fence. Gained split for decisive victory.
Crossed and led from the start. Fought on gamely for good third. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow into stride and settled at rear of the field. Did not quicken in straight.
Slow into stride and settled at rear of the field. Made up good ground out wide.
Began well to settle behind the leaders. Every chance in straight but did not quicken.
Always at the rear.
Behind leaders. Responded well early in straight to reach lead briefly at 200 M. Unable to hold off quinella pair.
Rear. Widest turning in. Made steady ground in straight without ever looking likely.
Followed leaders. Made run through on inner after straightening. Reached lead after 200 M and went on to score strong win.
Slow to begin. Improved to be in front of midfield. Checked at 800 M. Gave ground quickly after straightening.
Midfield, 3 wide. Made a little ground early in straight then one paced final 200 M.
Outside leader into home straight. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
In front of midfield and wide. Worked forward to be 3 wide outside lead at 700 M. Effort told and commenced to give ground shortly after straightening.
Midfield. Into clear approaching 300 M and responded well to be closest at finish.
Behind midfield. Drifted back to be with rear and wide turning in. Continued to make gradual ground in the run to the line to nearest at finish.
Led. Went clear on straightening. Challenged approaching 200 M and unable to find any extra.
Behind midfield. Was steadied and shifted out when unable to find clear running early in straight. When in clear responded well and continued to make ground in the run to the line.
Behind leaders 3 wide. Kept on one paced early in straight then gave ground final 300 M.
Midfield. Gained nice run through after straightening and responded well despite not being able to peg back winner.
Slow to begin and with rear. Never held a chance.
Led briefly before settling in 2nd place. Kept on one-pace in straight. Weakened 150 M out.
Niggled along in midfield. Checked at 800 M. Ran on in straight and was just beaten for 2nd in the closing stages.
Soon towards rear. Quickened well final 300 M and took charge final 100 M. Comfortably.
Soon at rear. Unable to quicken upon straightening. Held up for a run in the run to the post.
At rear. Last turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Slowly away. Soon recovered to be in midfield or better. Never a threat in straight.
Never far off. Steadied 800 M out. Kept on until tiring badly final 150 M.
Jumped well before being steadied to be in midfield or worse. Ran on steadily in straight and grabbed 2nd place in the closing stages without threatening the winner.
Niggled early to settle in front of midfield. Hampered at 800 M. Dropped back a little rounding home bend. Soon weakened and dropped out of contention in early straight.
Dropped out from wide draw. Steadied near 600 M. Improved steadily final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon in touch. Unable to quicken in straight. Weakened steadily final 200 M.
Led briefly before settling mainly in touch. Steadied at 800 M. Ran on well upon straightening and led 200 M out. Kept on but got swamped for a place in the closing stages.
Led from 1200 M. Headed 200 M out. Kept on until no extra final 100 M.
Never far off. Improved from 1200 M to be 3rd at 800 M. Tired badly 300 M out.
Settled in midfield. Responded well final 200 M to snatch victory near the line.
Disputed lead to 300 M. Steadily weakened.
Jumped awkwardly, always at rear.
Given reminders to dispute lead. Just pipped by the winner final strides.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground.
Towards rear early. Steady progress to be prominent at 600 M. Every chance 200 M out and kept on well to the line.
Tracked leaders. Improved to challenge for lead 400 M out. Weakened closing stages.
Always at the back. Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Settled towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M. (Lame.)
Behind midfield throughout.
Worse than midfield. Ran on a little from 300 M. One-paced closing stages.
Always close-up. Gradually drifted out to race with another from 600 M. Weakened close to home.
Towards rear till making up good ground in straight to claim 2nd near finish.
Midfield to straight where he ran on well to lead 150 M. Won readily.
In touch to straight where he kept on same pace.
In rear to straight where he ran on a bit.
Worse than midfield to straight. Ran on well to be closest at finish.
Shared lead to 200 M where he faded steadily.
Settled in rear to home turn. Kept on quite well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Shared lead to 200 M. Found no extra.
Well there to straight where he failed to get a clear run 200 M out. Stayed on towards finish.
About 8th or 9th to straight where he made steady headway to line.
Always thereabouts. Disputed lead and held every chance inside 200 M.
Was midfield before moving up on straightening to challenge leaving 200 M. One-paced near finish.
Checked soon after start. Among the rear group until making up some good ground inside 250 M.
Midfield or behind. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Jumped well and held 3rd to straight. Sustained effort to take command 100 M out. Won readily.
Led field to final turn. Weakened final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made some progress to be midfield final turn. One-paced thereafter.
Soon 2nd. Took over upon straightening. Kept on when headed 100 M out.
Behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Checked early stages, towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Held 4th early stages. Dropped back when awkwardly placed and unbalanced 800 M and 600 M. Never recovered.
Attempted to buck soon after start. Never in the race. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly 3rd or 4th throughout. One-paced.
Slightly behind midfield. Improved gradually to 5th passing the Rock. Kept on well final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move passing Rock holding narrow advantage into straight. Broke 1L clear 200 M out and held on to the line.
Began fairly then given reminders to muster speed taking lead coming out of straight. Headed 400 M out and soon weakened.
Behind midfield to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear. No clear passage early in straight. Finished well inside final 200 M to draw level only to be pipped at post.
Chased leader in 3rd position to straight. Tired badly from 200 M.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in straight.
Settled at the back. Switched in for a run upon straightening but in vain. Had to switch out to obtain split inside 200 M. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never far off to home bend then gradually faded.
Tracked leader. Came to tackle for lead turning in. Found no extra to sustain effort passing 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear and wide throughout.
Travelled in midfield or behind. Kept on steadily in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up a little ground final 250 M.
Tardy start. Raced awkwardly and hung in around 1200 M. Never in contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Made progress far side to be just behind midfield 600 M. No further improvement.
Always 4th or 5th to straight. Ran on steadily but just missed the 2nd place.
Made all. Won unchallenged.
Prominent. Advanced to 2nd 600 M. One-paced in straight.
Midfield. Stayed on quite well from home turn.
Held 2nd until dropping to 3rd 600 M. Kept on to re-gain 2nd 200 M out but unable to reach the winner.
Not far off before dropping back gradually rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Kept on early straight but was one-paced closing stages.
Settled towards rear from the widest draw. Ran on well final 200 M.
Settled just better than midfield. Ran on stoutly down straight to win readily.
Travelled in last few. Made up ground in straight doing best work at finish.
Chased leader to straight. Found no response when asked 200 M out.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Always prominent. Made steady progress in straight to narrowly miss 2nd.
Midfield to straight then faded.
Well back to straight. Never nearer.
Settled in midfield. Gained ground on inside turning for home. Kept on strongly in straight.
Prominent to home bend then weakened.
Never in contention.
Always in last few.
Slightly slowly away then hampered. Made steady headway around field far side gaining midfield into straight. One-paced.
Began best to lead. Caught by winner inside 200 M.
Settled midfield but wide made steady ground.
Unable to maintain early speed. Settled rear. Made good ground along fence.
Unable to cross and raced wide with leaders. Weakened in the straight.
Race in midfield position but wide. Did not quicken.
Raced in handy position. One-paced when placed under pressure.
Always at rear.
Settled behind leader. Challenged in straight without serious threat.
Settled in handy position. Improved for an impressive win.
Raced in forward position. One-paced in the straight.
Raced in rearward position. Never quickened.
Raced behind. Never threatened.
Ridden to go forward from wide draw. Hung in early. Travelled 3-wide behind lead and gave ground from 350 M.
At rear after beginning poorly. Hung out middle stages and remained at rear.
Followed leader. Into clear on straightening. Kept on strongly and just failed to hold 2nd placing.
Began well and settled behind the lead. Remained same until giving no response after straightening.
With rear after failing to show early pace. Improved around field from 600 M. Widest turning in and made strong ground in straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on fairly in straight.
In front of midfield. Responded fairly early in straight then one-paced final 150 M.
Travelled comfortably in front of midfield. Gained run through on straightening and responded well but no match for winner.
Began quickly from outside gate, soon led and made all to win comfortably.
Behind midfield early. Dropped to be with rear on straightening. Kept on fairly in straight to be not that far away from main bunch.
Around midfield. Shifted wider after straightening and responded strongly to be closest at finish.
Behind midfield. Made run through field after straightening. Doing best work at finish.
Around midfield. Ran on well though no threat to the first pair.
Prominent briefly, midfield at 1000 M. No further improvement in the straight.
Led to 250 M. Gradually weakened final 100 M.
Steadily dropped towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Well there to 400 M. Faded.
Well away, settled in better than midfield. Wide most of the way, gave ground upon straightening.
Settled well back. Responded well after straightening, just failed by the shortest margin.
Pushed along to be midfield, trapped wide in back straight. Weakened from 200 M.
Always prominent, hit the front 250 M out. Kept on well, just lasted.
Jumped awkwardly, crowded and dropped to the rear. Switched out to improve on straightening. Made up good ground final 200 M despite hanging in.
Always close-up. Kept on well, no extra closing stages.
Midfield. Caught wide early and middle stages. Gradually weakened from 150 M.
Towards rear. Under pressure after turning in to make up some ground but soon found no extra.
Prominent. Raced awkwardly and was inconvenienced passing 600 M. Failed to quicken in straight.
Prominent briefly, soon dropped to midfield. Weakened final 250 M.
Bounded in the air at start, towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Raced freely and took time to settle middle stages. Kept on same pace in straight.
Towards rear. Made ground soon after straightening to claim 3rd inside 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly, never in contention.
Midfield. Steady progress from 850 M to be 4-wide 5th early straight. Responded well to take control 250 M out. Won unchallenged.
In touch. Ran on in straight to reach front briefly passing 300 M. Soon out-paced by the winner.
Inside the leader to 250 M. Soon weakened.
Soon led. Found no extra when headed 250 M out.
Settled at rear from widest draw. Was steadied passing 400 M while making ground along the rail. Shifted out and continued to make ground but without ever reaching the first three.
Towards rear. Inconvenienced final turn. Made no show in straight.
Obliged to race wide behind midfield from an outside gate. Forced even wider final turn and kept on fairly in straight.
With leaders. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Soon in rear.
Slowly away. Always in last few.
Slowly away. Soon in midfield. One-paced.
Midfield to course proper, then faded.
Never nearer.
Well there. Came to challenge but always held by winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield throughout. Kept on well.
Made all. Pushed out.
Rear early. Made steady progress passing course proper doing best work at finish.
Soon dropped towards rear.
Never a danger. (Bled.)
Always in last few.
Around midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Around midfield throughout.
Behind midfield. Steadied and shifted out to obtain clear run final turn. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Crowded for room after start, at rear throughout.
Towards rear. Ran on under pressure from 400 M to take 2nd 100 M out. Unable to threaten the winner.
Midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Soon behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield early, soon prominent. Kept on same pace in straight. Weakened closing stages.
Took lead until joined approaching 1000 M. Kept on fairly when headed 250 M.
Prominent. Shared lead approaching 1000 M. Unable to hold position turning in. Faded final 200 M.
Midfield. Moved up steadily to reach 5th 1000 M out. Ran on well in straight to assert authority 250 M and won unchallenged.
Prominent. Unable to hold position when 4th at 400 M.
Jumped awkwardly, near rear and was widest to straight. Made up some ground final 200 M.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Made no show in straight.
Held up in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Travelled mainly in 4th just better than midfield to straight then quickly weakened.
Chased leader to straight. Unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Always in rear.
Led until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on in straight doing best work at finish.
Steadied to rear early. Held for a run early in straight. Finished well to snatch 3rd final strides.
Waited with. Ran on strongly in straight to grab victory close home.
Settled in midfield. Produced short-lived effort upon straightening but could find no extra closing stages.
Never better than midfield and wide throughout.
Settled just worse than midfield. Ran on along rails to be nearest at finish.
Settled just worse than midfield. Quickened to hold every chance early in straight but outsprinted closing stages.
Behind midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Went forward from wide barrier to race outside leader. Fought on gamely when challenged.
Raced midfield but wide. Made steady ground in the straight.
Settled handy position. Did not quicken when asked.
Settled towards rear.
Led at good tempo. Did not respond when asked.
Over-raced when midfield. Made steady ground.
No early speed to settle at rear. Made steady ground.
Settled behind leaders. Ran on well when asked.
Raced wide and ran off in the straight.
Always at rear.
Settled third behind leaders. Given every chance but did not respond.
Raced midfield but weakened.
Led until 300 M when found no more.
Began only fairly then improved to be midfield. Kept on one paced when asked for effort after straightening.
Followed leader. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
Rear. Same into home straight. Laid in early in straight. Responded strongly when into clear at 200 M. Closest at finish.
Behind leaders. Kept on well until giving ground final 200 M.
Behind midfield. No response when asked for effort after straightening.
Near rear. Made ground around field from 700 M to be midfield on straightening. Kept on strongly in straight but unable to match quinella pair.
In front of midfield. Failed to quicken after straightening. One paced final 300 M.
Outside leader. Took clear lead approaching 300 M. Kept on strongly but unable to hold winner last bit.
Behind midfield. Made ground around field from 700 M to be midfield on straightening. Responded fairly early in straight then run ended at 100 M.
Near rear. Waited with until after straightening. Made ground through field and was doing best work late to be nearest at finish.
Midfield and wide. Some improvement early in straight. Effort told and gave ground final 200 M.
Midfield or slightly worse. Made ground gradually through the field after straightening to reach lead concluding stages and score narrowly.
Around midfield. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Jumped well. Soon in midfield and wide. Hung out approaching and rounding home bend and dropped to the rear. Not a factor thereafter.
Soon tracked the leader. Quickened to lead 200 M out. Kept on well to the line.
Mainly behind midfield. Faded from 350 M.
Settled towards rear. Closer order rounding home turn to be midfield turning in. Did not quicken in the straight.
Always well there, kept on well though being inconvenienced in the run to the winning post.
Always close-up. Ran on to challenge the winner final 200 M, just failed.
Very slowly away, losing a lot of ground. Ran past tired runners in the straight.
Made running to 200 M. Soon weakened.
Midfield early, steadily dropped to the rear at 1100 M. Not in contention afterwards.
Taken across to the back from widest draw. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon dropped to the rear from wide draw. Never a threat in straight.
Soon led. Headed 900 M. 3rd turning in. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield or better. Steady progress rounding home bend to be in touch turning in. Kept on until weakened final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly but soon recovered to be in touch. Took lead 900 M out. Kept on well in straight despite being outsprinted by the first pair in the closing stages.
Niggled along early and was soon forward of midfield. Progressed rounding home bend to be in touch turning in. Ran on well in straight but was always held off by the winner final 200 M.
Never far off. Soon weakened and dropped out of contention upon straightening.
Midfield or better. One-paced in straight.
Behind midfield or worse. Awkwardly placed at 600 M. Baulked repeatedly in home straight. Not tested out.
Soon at back. Steadied and shifted out for a run in the straight. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Always at rear. Last turning in. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Always there. 2nd rounding home bend. Ran on well upon straightening. Had every chance but was unable to match speed with placed horses in the closing stages.
Crowded at start and remained towards rear. Ran on final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon towards rear. Took closer order along rail to be in midfield turning in. Held up final 200 M and could not be ridden out in the run to the post.

Jumped well before dropping back to behind midfield. Slight progress rounding home bend to be in midfield turning in. Responded well final 250 M to get up in the closing stages whilst holding off challenge from 2nd horse.
Never a factor.
Led briefly early stages. Remained in prominent position to straight. Impeded and unbalanced near 200 M. One-paced thereafter. (Saddle shifted.)
Towards rear. Improved to midfield or behind far side. Weakened from home turn.
Mostly 4th to straight. Weakened when inconvenienced passing 200 M.
Better than midfield. Moved up to 2nd 800 M. Unbalanced when weakened inside final 200 M.
Around midfield to 200 M where he found not much room. Ran on when in clear closing stages.
Inconvenienced at start, was in rear. Moved up from 1000 M and was midfield on outside home bend. Ran on in straight to take lead 150 M. Just held on.

Was 3rd early, dropping back to be slightly better than midfield 800 M. Found not much room along rail early straight until shifted out and caused interference 200 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Towards rear. Was steadied when improving passing 400 M. Made up good ground along rail thereafter.
In the lead or 2nd before taking clear advantage from 1000 M. Found no extra when headed 150 M. (Hung in.)
Rear. Ran on from outside in straight.
Midfield from widest draw. Made progress from 900 M to be 5th turning in. Kept on but was steadied passing 200 M. Unable to quicken.
Never better than midfield.
Jumped awkwardly, never in contention.
Close up. Gained slender advantage turning into straight. Failed to sustain effort and gradually faded inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Made steady progress in straight.
Never nearer.
Gradually dropped to last few.
Ridden along on outside just better than midfield to straight, then weakened.
Mainly in prominent position to straight. Kept on one pace.
Attempted to make all. Narrowly headed into straight but re-gained lead shortly afterwards. Headed again passing 200 M but hung on for 3rd.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Ran on stoutly down straight to get up on line.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent early, dropping to midfield far side. Weakened further from home bend.
Began well and never far off. Ran on steadily from 3rd into straight to hit front closing stages but worn down final strides.
Always in last few.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
Never better than midfield.
Held 5th to 250 M. Ran on well to take command close home.
Soon 4th. Responded well final turn to take lead turning in. Held on well but unable to resist winner's late burst close home.
Never in contention.
Sat outside leader. Was 3rd early straight until finding no extra 250 M.
Settled midfield from widest draw. Unable to quicken in straight.
Mostly 8th before dropping out from 600 M.
Led field to final turn. Weakened from 2nd approaching 200 M.
Was 10th to straight. Ran on a bit from outside 200 M out.
Midfield. Made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear. Never a factor.
Checked soon after start, remained 9th to around 500 M. Ran on a bit in straight.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from 9th passing 400 M.
Checked soon after start. Towards rear throughout.
Mostly 3rd. Kept on but unable to match speed with the quinella pair.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Never nearer. Travelled well in straight.
Severely checked at start. Remained in rear until running on steadily in straight.
Niggled along 4-wide in prominent position. Quickened to gain 1L advantage early in straight but unable to resist winner's late charge closing stages.
Midfield to straight then dropped out.
Steadied and dropped to rear at start then never sighted.
Broke well. Settled in midfield. Quickened well inside final 300 M to assert authority closing stages.
Well there. Shared lead into straight but failed to quicken to challenge.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight. (Rider dropped whip 200 M.)
Slowly away. Quickly recovered to lead coming out of back straight. Crossed to rails home bend. Soon headed upon straightening and dropped away quickly.
Held up in rear. Kept on same pace in straight.
Soon dropped towards rear.
Always well there. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Always prominent. Awkwardly placed behind runners upon straightening. No extra closing stages.
Ridden hard to be with leaders. Weakened in the straight.
Raced handy but weakened from the 600 M.
Settled in handy position. Made best ground last 200 M.
Raced at rear and hung out.
Settled handy. One-paced in the straight.
Raced just off pace. Lost ground from 600 M.
Sat outside leader. Held its own up the straight.
Chased along to be midfield and wide. Made steady ground in the straight.
Always near the rear.
Showed good gate speed to lead throughout.
Checked at the start. Made steady ground in the straight.
Settled just behind leader. Made no ground on winner.
Ridden along to hold midfield. Made steady ground in the straight.
Always at the rear.
Behind lead. Took clear lead after 500 M. Kept on strongly in straight despite not being able to hold off quinella pair final 100 M.
In front of midfield early. Dropped to be behind midfield before straightening. No improvement under pressure.
Prominent. Held some chance early in straight then found no more final 250 M.
Behind midfield throughout.
Prominent after being ridden hard early. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
At rear into home straight. Taken to extreme outside and responded strongly despite wanting to lay out. Closest at finish.
Behind midfield. Improved gradually from 600 M, despite hanging out, to be prominent in straight. Kept on well without threatening placegetters.
Midfield. Made ground after straightening to reach lead at 100 M then held on strongly to score narrow win.
Near rear and beginning awkwardly. Long way off entering home straight. Made gradual improvement without ever threatening.
Followed leader. Gave ground from 500 M.
Near rear. Remained same into home straight. Responded strongly when asked for effort after straightening and just failed to pick up winner.
Behind midfield. One-paced in straight.
Led at good pace. Gave ground from 500 M.
Bounded in air at start and settled near rear. Only made gradual improvement in straight.

Never a factor.

In touch. Weakened steadily upon straightening.

Towards rear. Short-lived effort rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Slowly away, recovered some ground to travel better than midfield. Was held up early straight, kept on final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always thereabout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always prominent, 1-1/2Ls behind lead turning in. Unable quicken to threaten the winner.
Soon last. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Never far off. Hampered early in home bend and made steady progress down straight without troubling leaders.
Rear to straight. Made moderate progress past beaten runners.
Midfield to straight. Kept on one pace.
Settled just behind midfield. Took closer order home bend and widest runner into straight. No extra.
Settled in midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend and hit front early in straight. Worn down closing stages.
Prominent to straight then dropped out.
Well there to 400 M then dropped out.
Led field to 300 M then dropped out.
Settled at the back. Making headway under pressure when inconvenienced early in home bend. Produced steady run down centre of straight past beaten runners.
Never in contention.
Prominent until giving ground quickly from Rock. Checked and lost further ground home bend.
Settled behind midfield. Checked coming out of back straight. Quickly renewed effort and finished well to take charge closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Settled better than midfield. Made good progress home bend to take lead turning in. Responded well to hold 2Ls advantage passing 200 M. Held on when challenged by the place-getters.
Slightly missed the start, towards rear. Improved along rail from 500 M. Held up early straight and again at 250 M. Ran on when in clear.
Slowly away, soon in midfield. Made advancement from 400 M and was 2nd briefly 200 M. Kept on.
Prominent. Came to tackle leader turning for home. Weakened 250 M.
In touch before dropping to midfield 1000 M. Continued to drop back and was last from 450 M.
Towards rear from widest draw. Steady progress approaching the Rock. Ran on steadily in straight, just failing to catch the winner.
In touch. Dropped out rapidly from 500 M.
Midfield at best.
Towards rear. Made progress upon turning into straight.
Slowly away, last to 450 M. Made up good ground from outside to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. Took lead approaching 800 M. Held on until headed upon straightening. Unable to quicken.
Led field to 850 M. Remained in touch along rail until weakening out of contention from 350 M.
Behind midfield. Steady progress far side to be 5th rounding home bend. Found no extra in straight.
Settled in rear. Commenced run from Rock only making moderate progress in straight though doing best work at finish.
Travelled just better than midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Always at the back.
Made running until headed into straight. Kept on before finding no extra closing stages.
Midfield to halfway. Dropped out in straight.
Towards rear to halfway. Weakened.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in straight.
Prominent to straight then faded.
Made no show.
Settled in midfield or worse. Quickened well in straight to snatch victory final strides. Won going away.
Wide in midfield to straight. Ran on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there. Broke clear upon straightening but flattered and caught final strides.
Settled in rear. Never nearer.
Prominent early settling just better than midfield far side. Ran on down straight but outsprinted by winner final stages.
Chased along in midfield. Held on gamely.
Sat outside leader at very fast tempo. Weakened from 400 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in forward position. Took field up to leaders and held on well for 3rd.
Settled midfield. Improved in straight to just fail.
Always at rear.
Settled midfield. Made good ground to just miss place.
In handy position. One-paced in the straight.
Through to lead at very fast tempo. Weakened badly from 600 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow to begin. At rear and made steady ground in the straight.
Settled towards rear in fast tempo. Improved around field to decisive win.
Sat in forward position. One-paced in the straight.
Sat outside leaders. One-paced in the straight.
Raced well back. Made no ground.
Slow into stride and settled midfield. One-paced in the straight.
Settled midfield. Ran on gamely to just miss.
Began well to lead all.
Raced in forward position. Weakened badly in straight.
Settled in handy position. Unable to quicken when required.
Trapped wide in handy position. Made little impression in the straight.
Settled towards rear but wide. Made good ground in the straight.
Settled towards rear. A little green in the straight but made good ground.
Raced wide throughout but towards the rear.
Raced wide towards rear but wide.
Worse than midfield. Made up a little late ground.
At the back. Wide in back straight and around home bend. Never a factor.
Mainly 3rd or 4th. Kept on. Did not quicken close home.
Jumped badly and bumped side of gate. At the back throughout.
At the back. Made up ground from 400 M. Awkward on heels of TOYMARK near 200 M when finishing strongly.
Midfield. Steady progress from 800 M to be behind leaders into straight. Gone through a gap near 200 M and won well.
Always prominent. Steadily weakened after 200 M.
Prominent to 1000 M. Steadily dropped back to midfield. Brushed rail just before straightening. Not a factor afterwards.
Worse than midfield. Some progress from 500 M to be in midfield but a bit wide entering straight. No further progress.
Worse than midfield. Steadied at 600 M. Ran on in straight, doing best work at finish.
Mainly midfield. Made up some ground close home. Hung in throughout.
Soon led and then disputed lead. Kept on well in straight until not quickened close home.
Inconvenienced at start. At back. Never a threat.
Behind midfield. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Prominent early, soon raced just better than midfield. Ran on final turn to be 3rd 250 M. Found no extra towards finish.
Never far off. Kept on same pace to the line.
In touch before dropping back to midfield home bend. Made no show in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Made ground final 250 M to snatch 3rd near finish.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Never a factor.
At rear throughout.
Prominent early, dropped back a bit but still not far off. Steadied early straight when weakening, never recovered.
Rear. Ran past a few tiring horses final 200 M.
Midfield. Moved up gradually to be 3rd or 4th home bend. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly but soon pulled to the front. With 1L advantage early straight, won unchallenged.
Behind midfield. Towards rear and was widest turning in. Ran on a bit early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Tracked leader. Unable to hold place final 300 M.
Always towards rear and very wide into straight. Never seen with a chance.
Prominent taking lead home bend. Weakened from 300 M.
Well there to straight. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield early and soon dropped to rear.
Settled in midfield. Raced tightly on rails early in straight and only one-paced.
Wide in midfield. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Prominent. No clear passage early in straight. Came to challenge under pressure but only produced modest impression closing stages.
Settled in midfield or worse. Ran on down straight doing best work at finish.
Always well there. Came to tackle leader in straight and responded well to assert authority close home.
Led early settling behind leaders home bend. Quickened to lead over 200 M out but worn down close home.
Settled in midfield. Momentarily crowded near 300 M before running on well passing 200 M. Did best work at finish despite crowded again near finish.
Sluggish at start but quickly recovered to midfield then raced keenly to home bend. Soon dropped out from prominent position into straight.
Jumped badly then gradually recovered to midfield home bend. Hampered early in straight then quickly weakened.
Soon dropped to last position. Made steady headway in straight.
Towards rear. Made ground far side to soon be prominent. Dropped out upon straightening.
Prominent early, dropping back to midfield 1st turn. Moved up steadily when under great pressure in straight. Unable to reach the winner.
Never far off on the rail. Kept on in straight, unable to quicken closing stages.
Behind midfield, dropping back home bend to be last and widest turning in. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Never better than midfield.
Led briefly, soon raced 4th or 5th. Advanced from final turn to hit front momentarily early straight. Kept on but lost 2nd near finish. (Hung in.)
Soon led until headed approaching 1000 M. Failed to hold place soon after straightening. (Lame.)
Near rear. Steadied on straightening and near 300 M when improving. Ran on when in clear.
Midfield. Made progress from 600 M. Ran on early straight to take control 200 M out. Won readily.
Dropped gradually to the last from the widest draw. Made up some ground final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or behind. Steadied 800 M. Weakened closing stages.
Checked soon after start, raced amongst the rear group. Crept closer order turning in and kept on same pace to the line.
Towards rear early, then moved up to take lead 1000 M out. Headed passing 400 M and was then unbalanced. Soon faded.
Never in contention.
Crowded early then raced wide and mostly in midfield. Took closer order home bend. Hampered early in straight and weakened.
Quickly crossed to rails around stables bend to chase behind leader. Hit front entering straight but quickly overhauled over 200 M out. (Sore.)
Raced in last few. Made swift progress on outside rounding home bend joining leaders into straight but quickly weakened.
Crowded early then travelled behind midfield. Stumbled badly and lost momentum approaching home bend. Made no show thereafter.
Settled in last few. Commenced move entering home straight. Forced to switch out for a run over 300 M out before finishing well to miss narrowly.
Always prominent. Switched out upon straightening and quickened to hit front over 300 M out. Held on to the line.
Settled in rear. Kept on in straight.
Settled just better than midfield. Quickened inside final 200 M to claim 3rd position near finish.
Mostly in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Led to straight then weakened.
Travelled in midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish in straight.
Never far off in 4th position to straight then soon dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear. Effort when widest runner around home bend. Sustained progress down home straight to be nearest at finish.
Trapped wide midfield throughout. Made no impression in the straight.
In rear position. Made steady ground in the straight along inside.
Raced wide throughout. Always towards rear.
Ridden along throughout but always towards rear.
Ridden hard in early stages to settle just behind leader.
Settled in off pace position. Held on gamely.
Jumped best to go straight to lead. Never headed.
Raced handy. One paced in the straight.
Raced just behind leaders. Lost ground when under pressure.
Settled midfield position. One paced in the straight. Vet reported haemorrhaging eye.
Caught wide in early stages just off the pace. Weakened in the straight.
Ridden hard early when trapped wide in midfield. Hard ridden from 600 M making no ground. (Lame.)
Always at rear.
Prominent. Left flat footed when pace quickened after 500 M. Made some ground final 300 M.
Around midfield. Responded strongly in straight to be nearest at finish, without ever looking likely.
3 wide behind leaders. Remained same into home straight then kept on one-paced.
Slow to begin then ridden hard to be 3 wide in midfield at 800 M. Made no impression in straight after hard run.
Behind midfield. Dropped to be with rear turning in and no improvement afterwards.
At rear. Only moderate response when asked for effort after 450 M.
Behind leaders. Into clear on straightening and responded well to gain second placing final 50 M.
Followed leaders. Eased into clear on straightening and kept on strongly.
Slow to begin then hampered. Raced near rear after being inconvenienced twice in the middle stages. Remained on inner and made nice ground in straight. (Lame.)
Near rear. Taken to outside on straightening and only responded for short distance then one-paced.
Around midfield. One-paced when asked for effort after straightening.
Three wide outside the lead. Gave ground after straightening.
Led. Accelerated quickly after 400 M and went on to win easily.
Outside leader. Unable to go with winner early in straight but kept on strongly. Run ended final 50 M.
Soon moved up to take up running. Made the turn near 800 M awkwardly and hung out. Kept on in straight until weakened final 200 M and raced ungenerously.
Midfield after being bumped at start. Ran on in straight and was doing best work and nearest at finish.
Soon at rear. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and bumped another runner. At rear. Closer order inside 400 M. Weakened from 300 M.
Soon at rear. Last rounding home bend. Ran past beaten horses in the straight. Hung in throughout.
Niggled early in midfield or behind. Ran on in straight without threatening.
Disputed lead early before settling in midfield or better. Caught wide most of the way. Weakened badly final 300 M.
Jumped well and disputed lead early before settling in touch. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening the winner.
Moved up to 2nd position from 1100 M. Weakened upon straightening and soon tailed off.
In touch early before dropping back towards the rear from 1000 M. Not a factor upon straightening.
Tardy start but soon recovered to forward of midfield. Steady progress along rail rounding home bend to be 2nd turning in. Quickened well final 300 M and took charge 200 M out to win comfortably.
Jumped fairly before being outsprinted to the rear. Caught wide most of the way. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Jumped best before dropping steadily back to behind midfield from 1100 M. Caught wide most of the way. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Mainly midfield or worse whilst being hard to settle in the early stages. Awkward and hung out turning near 800 M. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Settled around midfield, was checked near 1400 M. Made some progress in home straight, one-paced closing stages.
Midfield. Behind leaders entering straight. Kept on well though not able to threaten the first three.
Midfield or behind. Made some progress in home straight. One-paced closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Widest into straight, made up good ground from 300 M. One-paced closing stages.
Behind midfield. Steadied when disappointed for running at 300 M. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Disputed lead, took up running at 1300 M. Headed and sat behind leader 800 M to 500 M. Led into straight, swamped inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Moved closer on home bend. Under pressure from 500 M, responded well final 300 M to be nearest at finish. (Objection to winner, overruled.)
Better than midfield. Ran on well from 300 M to take lead at 100 M. Lost 2nd place when found no extra close home.

Led briefly from widest draw, then settled within striking distance. Hit the front 200 M out, was overhauled inside 100 M but fought on gamely to grab victory close home. (Objection by 2nd, overruled.)
Settled at rear. Made gradual ground from 300 M, steadied and changed course at 200 M. Kept on well close home.
Tardy start, recovered to close-up position at 1400 M. Dropped out from 300 M.
Midfield early, pulled to the front at 800 M. Headed at 500 M. Faded.
Settled at rear. Made up some ground when disappointed for running 300 M, steadied at 200 M. Kept on one-pace.
Close-up briefly, then settled in midfield. Did not quicken in the straight.
Close-up. Gave ground steadily final 200 M.
Ridden along from widest draw to be close-up. Soon dropped to behind midfield and trapped wide. Under pressure when beginning to give ground from 700 M.
Midfield. Closer order and 5-wide on home turn. Kept on one-pace, weakened closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Steady progress on home turn to be midfield into straight. Ran on final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in forward midfield. Asked for effort at 700 M to be behind leader turning in. Ran on steadily to hit the front 100 M out, kept on well.
Well there to 200 M. Tired close home.
Well away but soon dropped to midfield. Made no show in home straight.
Midfield. Moved closer rounding home bend. Made gradual ground in home straight but unable to peg back the winner.
At the back throughout, never a factor.
Near rear, never near enough to be seen with a chance.
Pushed forward early to keep up but was never better than midfield. Dropped out from 200 M.
Pushed along to make running, headed at 500 M, dropped out from 300 M.
Settled towards rear. Crept closer rounding home bend. Ran on well final 200 M, but was hampered 100 M out, did not recover.
Soon sat behind leader. Took up running from 500 M. Headed at 100 M, kept on.
Waited with. Was 2nd last early in straight before showing great turn of foot under pressure to share lead on line.
Always there. Moved up to lead narrowly from the 200 M. Kept on under pressure.
Among rear group of compact field into straight where he ran on quite well passing 200 M.
Midfield most of way.
Sat behind leaders to straight when he failed to get a run on the inside approaching 300 M. Switched out 200 M and ran on strongly towards finish.
About 5th or 6th before home turn. Kept on till finding no extra inside 200 M.
Always prominent, having every chance under vigorous riding.
In rear throughout.
Never better than mid-division.
Worse than midfield to 600 M. Made good progress from the 300 M to challenge inside final 200 M.
Never on terms.
Was midfield before dropping out quickly half-way down the straight.
Made no show.
Led field to 200 M where he faded steadily.
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Rear. Made up good ground in straight.
Soon led until being caught early straight. Kept on but weakened final 150 M.
Prominent to home bend. Soon faded. (Lame.)
Never far off, advanced to 3rd final turn. Kept on until finding no extra close home.
Soon midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
Slightly missed the start, towards rear. Improved progressively far side to be 5th home bend. Kept on well in straight.
Midfield or behind and raced awkwardly stable bend. Ran on from 10th home turn to gain 2nd close home.
Midfield. Made steady progress 300 M, kept on without challenging.
Behind midfield throughout.
Raced 3rd from widest draw. Dropped out when turning in.
Settled 4th along the rail. Moved up from 500 M to join the leader turning in. Took over 300 M out and held on well to the line.
Wide and never better than midfield.
Travelled in rear. Improving in straight until baulked on rails inside final 200 M.
Towards rear early, improving to midfield halfway. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Broke well and settled outside leader. Found no extra upon straightening.
Prominent to straight. One-paced.
Settled towards rear. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and settled just behind leaders. Quickened inside final 200 M to claim joint victory.
Made running. Joined final stride.
Began fairly. Travelling in midfield until hampered on rails passing 600 M. No extra in home straight.
Ridden along to muster pace travelling wide in midfield to straight then found no extra.
Well back. Made up ground running past beaten runners in straight. (Saddle shifted.)
Lacked early speed and settled just behind midfield. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Midfield or better. Made no show in straight.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Made progress passing 600 M to be 5th turning in. Ran on steadily to snatch 2nd close home.
Better than midfield. Under pressure rounding home bend, advancing to 3rd 400 M. Ran on well in straight to take command 100 M out. Won readily.
Raced 2nd from 1400 M. Gained slender advantage final turn. Held on until headed 100 M. Winner too strong.
Mostly behind midfield. Made up a little ground final 250 M.
Led field from widest draw to 400 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Slowly away and was crowded after jump, towards rear. Steadied 400 M and then raced awkwardly final turn. Moved up to 6th early straight. Kept on.
Towards rear, last from 800 M. Tailed off final turn. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield far side. Found no extra final 400 M. Faded in straight.
Soon behind midfield. (See Racing Incidents.)
Held 3rd to 700 M. Dropped back steadily from the Rock.
Always there. Progressed to 3rd 600 M out. Kept on same pace in straight.
Tracked leader. Hit front into straight. Unable to resist challenges and headed near finish.
Settled towards rear. Took closer order under pressure home bend.
Midfield to 300 M then weakened.
Settled at the back. Commenced move entering straight and ran on well to grab lead final strides.
Made running. Came under pressure when headed into straight. Fought on for 4th.
Midfield until making moderate progress in straight.
Midfield. Lost position and dropped towards rear into straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Mainly in 4th racing keenly around stables bend and in back straight. Gave ground from 400 M.
Mainly in prominent position to straight then one-paced.
Rear to straight. Never nearer.
Wide in midfield to straight. Carried wider home turn and soon weakened.
Held up around midfield. Dropped out home bend.
Led early and then eased to sit behind leader. Held on gamely until final 100 M.
Settled behind midfield but racing wide on home turn.
Sat at rear. Made good ground in the straight.
Settled midfield racing wide early. Made good ground under pressure.
Raced in the lead. Weakened badly in home straight.
Settled at rear. Commenced run after 600 M and made good ground.
Sat behind leaders. Never quickened when asked for effort.
Began well to be in handy position. Made steady ground to just miss.
With leaders early to settle just off pace. Taken wide on home turn and made good ground.
Settled midfield on the rail. Severely checked at 200 M when improving quickly.
Beaten for early speed to be midfield. Made good ground along inside for impressive win.
Raced outside the leader. One paced in the straight.
Led until after 200 M. Kept on well in run to the line.
Rear into straight. Only passed tired horses.
Behind midfield. Remained on inner around home bend and made ground in straight to be closest at finish.
Midfield. Raced greenly early in straight. Once balanced at 200 M sprinted quickly to arrive in time.
Midfield. Inconvenienced early in straight. Made ground final 200 M.
Followed leaders. Kept on early in straight then gave ground quickly final 200 M.
Prominent and 3 wide. Responded well in straight but unable to match winner last bit.
Behind midfield and never looked likely.
Midfield. Widest turning in. One-paced when asked for effort after straightening.
3 wide outside lead. Lost a little ground prior to straightening then kept on fairly under hard riding.
Behind leaders. Kept on well in straight without threatening.
Outside leader. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
At the back, trapped wide without cover middle stages. Steady progress from Rock to be midfield turning in. Kept on one-pace, weakened closing stages.
Ridden to take lead at 1000 M. Headed 100 M out, steadily weakened closing stages.
Around midfield. Steadied and dropped to the back near 900 M. Inconvenienced at 400 M, not in contention afterwards.
Well there. Began to give ground from the Rock, further inconvenienced at 400 M. Soon tailed off.
Soon led from widest draw. Headed at 1000 M, remained in prominent position. Responded well in the straight to hit the front 100 M out. Won readily.
Began awkwardly, midfield. Dropped back from 600 M, inconvenienced at 400 M. Not a factor thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Closer order rounding home bend. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
Midfield despite being pushed along early. Made gradual ground final 200 M.
Niggled along to be in touch. Short of room on straightening. Made up some late ground when into clear. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled at rear. Under pressure from 500 M, made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
In touch, dropping to behind midfield briefly rounding the first turn when caught wide. Behind leader entering straight, kept on one-pace, tired close home.
At rear after jumping awkwardly. Steady improvement from 800 M to be prominent into straight. Kept on well though unable to threaten the placegetters.
Ridden hard early before settling around midfield. Steady headway from 600 M to be 4th turning in. Quickened well final 200 M to lead inside 100 M. Just held on.
Always there. 2nd from 600 M. Kept on in straight until no extra in the closing stages.
Mainly midfield or behind. Ran on well final 200 M to grab 3rd place.
Jumped well and disputed lead briefly before settling in midfield down back straight. Kept on without threatening upon straightening.
Soon settled at rear from wide draw. Last from 500 M. Ran on a bit final 300 M but got held up final 100 M.
Led briefly before settling in 2nd or 3rd place. Steadied 200 M out. Ran on but got outsprinted by placed horses in the closing stages.
Soon towards rear. Made the first turn awkwardly. Ran on final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Niggled along early behind midfield. Dropped back towards rear 800 M out. Made up good ground final 300 M to challenge the winner but just failed after steadying 100 M out.
Began awkwardly and lost position. Always at rear. Kept on final 300 M.
Soon led. Kept on in straight and was headed 100 M from home.
Soon towards rear despite being hard ridden. Progress from 800 M to be in touch rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Never far off. Kept on in straight whilst hanging in. Weakened final 200 M.
Near rear. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Ridden to track the leader. Shared lead into straight. Every chance final 200 M until finding no more close home.
Last most of the way, had difficulty obtaining clear running early in the straight. Made up some late ground.
Towards rear throughout, never in contention.
Made running to 200 M. Kept on quite well until no extra close home.
Midfield throughout. Unable to quicken.
Settled just worse than midfield. Ran on steadily final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly, then was severely checked, at rear. Was difficult to settle early stages and made the turn near the 100 M awkwardly. Made ground steadily final 200 M. (Bled.)
Never better than midfield. Did not quicken.
Never far off. Tired close home.
Within striking distance, hit the front 100 M out. Won readily.
Behind midfield throughout.
Was midfield before losing some ground 600 M, dropping to rear turning into straight. Renewed effort and ran on close home. (Lame.)
Always handy. Moved up to lead inside 200 M, holding on well pressure.
Worse than midfield into straight where he made up some ground close home.
Worse than midfield before short-lived effort 600 M and was beaten coming into straight.
Settled in last to straight. Never nearer.
Mostly in 5th to straight where he ran on quite well towards finish.
Soon took up running and led field before being challenged inside 200 M. Found winner too strong and lost 2nd final strides.
Always prominent, having every chance inside final 200 M.
Well there to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Made no show.
Midfield to straight where he plugged on under pressure.
Never a factor.
Jumped awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be 4th 700 M out. Dropped to midfield final turn. Faded 200 M.
Soon led and made all. Won unchallenged.
Missed the start, towards rear. No improvement in straight.
Never a factor.
Slowly away, remained at rear. Made up good ground from outside final 200 M. (Hung out throughout.)
Always prominent. 3-wide 2nd turning in. Kept on without threatening.
Midfield or behind. Steady progress passing 600 M to be 4th upon straightening. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Towards rear from widest draw. Gradually progressed to midfield final turn. Ran on in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent 2nd. Unable to hold place upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Not far off before dropping back to behind midfield passing the Rock. Towards rear early straight until running on a bit closing stages.
Midfield or better. Kept on in straight.
Prominent to straight then dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled in prominent position. Displayed a great turn of foot upon straightening to soon take change. Won easily.
Close up early then steadied to midfield far side. Produced only modest progress in straight.
Led until headed over 200 M out, then dropped away quickly.
Well there to 200 M then dropped out.
Well there to 200 M then no extra.
Never far off to straight then weakened.
Well back. Produced good late impression closing stages despite steadied 200 M out. (Saddle shifted.)
Travelled in rear. Ran on stoutly down straight doing best work at finish.
Settled just worse than midfield. Gained 5th into straight saving ground on rails. Baulked for a run early on and produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground in straight though hampered 200 M out.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
In touch early, was behind midfield stable bend. Maintained similar position throughout the rest of his trip.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Last 400 M out. Made up some ground closing stages. (See Racing incidents.)
Mostly 5th. Ran on a bit final 150 M.
Prominent. Took lead from stable bend until joined final turn. Unable to quicken when headed 200 M out.
Led early, becoming 3rd near 1300 M. Effort 500 M to reach front momentarily early straight. Found no extra closing stages.
Midfield to 400 M. Dropped out steadily.
Better than midfield, held 4th far side. Made no show in straight.
Rear. Made up good ground on outside early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Tardy start, towards rear. Recovered some ground stable bend to be 7th far side. Made good progress along rail home turn, taking lead 200 M out. Won going away.
Well there. Dropped back steadily from 4th 200 M. (Dropped whip 300 M.)
Rear. Crept closer order final turn. Ran on from 5th early straight to achieve 2nd close home.
Settled mainly in midfield. Ran on well along rails to hit front inside 200 M and win unchallenged.
Well there to 200 M than weakened.
Restrained in 4th or 5th position and never far off to straight. One-paced before finding no extra closing stages.
Midfield when hampered and lost position going up Rock. Ran on well inside final 300 M doing best work at finish.
Settled at the back. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. No clear passage when forced to switch in early in straight. Ran on but lost 3rd late.
Better than midfield to straight then dropped out.
Never nearer.
Began from poor draw. Took up running coming out of 1000 M bend. Led until headed just inside 200 M.
Broke well. Ridden to contest lead early but had to settle just behind pace. Swamped inside final 200 M.
Soon dropped to tail-end then never sighted.
Sluggish at start. Ran on well down centre of straight to snatch 3rd final strides.
Began well from inside barrier. Overraced early. Made good ground in the straight.
Restrained from wide barrier to be midfield. Improved around field after 600 M. Held on gamely.
Straight to lead. Weakened from home bend.
Raced outside leader but stopped quickly from 600 M, and finished well back.
Raced behind leaders but severely checked for some distance after 600 M, when carried back by weakening runner.
Raced behind leader. Never quickened and weakened badly in the straight.
Settled back to midfield from wide barrier. Made long run wide to finish off gamely.
Missed the start and raced at rear. Sustained long run from 600 M to make good ground.
Began well but caught wide early without cover. Hit front momentarily in straight.
Slow into stride to race near rear. Made good ground out wide.
Began well but crowded early to settle midfield. Ran home well.
Very wide in handy position early. One-paced in the straight.
Began well to race just behind leaders but overracing. Held position throughout.
Settled midfield. Improved around field for good finishing effort.
Slow to begin and settled rearward. Carried wide on turn when weakening.
Settled midfield on the fence. Made good ground.
Trapped wide in forward position. One-paced.
Settled midfield. One-paced in the straight.
Straight across to lead from wide barrier. Sprinted to good lead on turn.
Settled behind leader overracing. Weakened from home turn.
Settled rearward position. Made up good ground from well back.
Began well but restrained to race handy but wide. Took off wide from 600 M.
Midfield but wide early. Never quickened.
Went forward from barrier but trapped wide. Battled on gamely.
Worse than midfield. Steadied near 600 M when disappointed for running. Made up a little late ground.
Pushed forward to track the leader at 800 M. Weakened close home.
Steadied after start, behind midfield. Moved closer on home turn. Kept on well in home straight without threatening the placed horses.
Slowly away, soon last. Made up some ground final 150 M.
Niggled along early to be prominent. Ran on well at finish.
Around midfield. Had a tendency to lay out throughout. Weakened from 200 M.
Worse than midfield. Faded from 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, hard ridden but lacked early speed. At rear, checked at 600 M. Just before straightening was disappointed for running, never seen with a chance.
Well away from widest draw, always close-up. Failed to quicken in the straight.
Quickly crossed to the rails from wide draw and made all. Kept on well.
Prominent early, midfield from 800 M. Made ground steadily final 150 M.
Midfield early. Ridden along inside to be in touch 1200 M. Kept on until responding well closing stages to just miss. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led or joint lead from 1400 M. Took 1L advantage 250 M. Unable to contain the first two while beaten narrowly.
Never a factor.
Slowly away, soon made up some ground to remain in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to snatch victory on the line.
Held 5th or 6th to 600 M. Made progress to be 2nd upon straightening. Unable to hold place final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Mostly 4th to final turn. Found no extra.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily from outside in straight, never nearer.
Never better than midfield.
Missed the start, remained at rear. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on when obtaining a clear run inside 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, soon last. Little progress in straight.
Prominent. Kept on same pace early straight. Weakened final 200 M.
Joint lead to home turn. Dropped back steadily from 3rd early straight.
Midfield from widest draw. Made no show in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Broke well then held up in last few and wide. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden early then settled in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Always in last few.
Always well behind.
Always prominent to straight then faded.
Never recovered from the awkward start.
Travelled wide and behind midfield. Made no impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled wide without cover in mid-division to straight then dropped out.
Well there joining leader into straight. Went clear passing 200 M.
Travelled just better than midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and led until joined by winner into straight. Unable to sustain effort passing 200 M and faded.
Travelled mainly in midfield. Switched out for a run early in straight and made up good ground doing best work at finish.
Chased leader to straight then weakened. (Bled.)
Midfield. Made ground steadily 300 M but unable to catch the winner.
Led early, sat outside leader passing 1200 M. Re-gained advantage 400 M. Kept on same pace when headed 100 M.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily final 300 M, never nearer.
Behind midfield. Made up a little late ground inside 200 M.
In touch. Weakened inside 300 M.
Always at the rear.
Slowly away, raced greenly and hung out throughout. Never a factor.
Midfield. Made progress from 850 M to be 3rd home bend. Kept on until failing to hold place final 200 M.
Always there. Ran on well final 250 M but unable to match speed with the quinella pair closing stages.
Midfield or better. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. One-paced. (Lame.)
Towards rear from widest draw. Ran on well from outside in straight to take lead inside 100 M.
Led field to 400 M. Weakened 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Better than midfield. One-paced from 400 M. Faded closing stages.
Chased in 4th to straight then weakened.
In rear to straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Gradually improved far side to join leader rounding home bend. Weakened badly passing 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear to straight. Ran on well.
Led until joined into straight, then soon weakened.
Quickly moved up to 3rd and outside lead. Gained narrow advantage early in straight but swamped closing stages.
Settled at the back. Made up a lot of ground in straight.
Rear to straight. Ran on well.
Broke well then settled behind midfield. Bumped early in straight. Ran on until finding no extra closing stages.
Mainly in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Began well then travelled in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened well to take charge passing 200 M. Hung on well.
Broke well then held up behind midfield. Steadied between runners early in straight before making steady progress closing stages.
Never far off in 5th to straight then gradually faded.
Sat behind leader. Lost ground quickly.
Raced midfield but over-racing. One-paced in the straight.
Raced outside leader. Weakened badly.
Began well to be behind leaders. Every chance in straight. Tired last 200 M.
Missed start. Tailed off.
Always towards rear.
Settled behind midfield. Made good ground in the straight. Held up final 100 M.
Restrained from wide barrier to be midfield without cover. Came widest home bend to make good ground.
Raced wide early in handy position without cover. Made no impression on winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled worse than midfield but racing wide. Made good ground in the straight but never threatened winner.
Ridden hard from wide barrier to cross to lead. Held on for game win.
Raced outside leaders. Weakened when asked for effort.
Worse than midfield on settling. Steady ground in the straight.
Began well to race just behind leaders. Shuffled back at 600 M and then gained run to improve steadily.
Near rear. Dropped to rear at 600 M. Waited with at rear until near 300 M when shifted to outside and finished strongly to score narrowly.
In front of midfield. Maintained same until giving ground final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Went forward from 1200 M to be in front of midfield at 800 M. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
Prominent. Kept on early in straight then found no more final 250 M.
Near rear and wide after beginning awkwardly. Allowed to go forward along back straight to be prominent at 800 M. Kept on one-paced early straight then gave ground final 250 M.
Near rear. Went around field from 700 M to be midfield turning in. Continued to make gradual ground in straight under hard riding.
Followed leader. Went to clear lead shortly after straightening and kept on strongly to just fail to hang on.
Rear. Swept around field from 800 M to be prominent turning in. Loomed as good chance at 300 M then run levelled out last bit.
Behind midfield. Made run through field after straightening to be nearest at finish.
Led. Gave ground shortly after straightening.
Midfield. Hard ridden at 800 M and kept on one-paced until straightening then found no extra.
Rear. Waited with and eased to outside at 300 M. Ran home strongly final 200 M.
Midfield. Failed to quicken when asked for effort at 600 M and was near rear turning in. Remained on inner and made some ground final 200 M.
In front of midfield. Went up to be outside leader at 800 M. Kept on fairly until 200 M then gave ground.
Soon last despite niggled along. Shifted out from 500 M then shifted in at 250 M. Never a factor.
Settled at rear. Ran on well final 150 M to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent, kept on well.
Settled behind the leaders. Responded well final 200 M to take charge closing stages. (Rider dropped whip near 200 M.)
Not far off to 200 M. Gradually weakened.
Prominent. Took lead from 600 M. Found the winner too strong close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Disputed lead to 300 M, kept on one pace.
Led briefly, racing alone along standside. Faded from 400 M.
Soon led. Headed 300 M out. Kept on until effort not sustained final 100 M.
Soon midfield or worse. Ran on steadily in straight despite shifting out and got pipped for 2nd just before the line.
In touch. Dropped back a little 600 M out to be in midfield turning in. Ran on without threatening placed horses in straight.
Missed the start. At rear. Not much room near 1500 M. Wide from 1200 M. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear. Took closer order along rail turning in. One-paced until no extra 100 M out.
In touch early before settling in midfield or better from 1400 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Soon dropped to the back from wide draw. Made up some ground in straight until not quickened final 100 M.
Never far off. 3rd turning in. Responded well final 300 M. Took charge 250 M out to win comfortably.
Soon settled towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Soon towards rear whilst over-racing. Behind midfield from 1000 M. Soon weakened upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon behind midfield or just worse. Ran on well final 250 M to snatch 2nd when doing best work at finish.
Tardy start but soon recovered to be in touch. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened steadily 100 M out.
Soon 2nd. Took lead briefly at 300 M before dropping right out of contention inside 100 M. (Bled.)
Midfield. Weakened badly 200 M out.
Jumped awkwardly, trapped wide and over-raced early in behind midfield. Was inconvenienced at 1000 M. Ran on well final 300 M though no threat to the quinella pair.
Soon led, steadily shifted across from widest draw. Joined at 500 M, gradually weakened from 200 M.
Prominent. Shared lead at 500 M. Kept on strongly to the line to score solid victory.
Settled at rear. Under pressure from 600 M and responded fairly to make steady progress final 250 M. One-paced closing stages.
Travelled around midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight. Weakened closing stages.
Never better than midfield, raced ungenerously in middle stages. (Rider dropped whip near 300 M.)
Midfield. Bumped with another runner early in straight, then dropped quickly. (Bled.)
Behind midfield throughout. Never in contention.
Dropped towards rear from wide draw. Made good progress final 200 M.
At rear. Made up good ground from 300 M. One-paced close home.
Near rear. Made ground steadily final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Joined lead 3-wide at 500 M. Found no more and steadily weakened from 200 M.
Niggled along to be behind leader at 1300 M. Kept on well until losing a place near the finish.
Forward midfield, over-racing in middle stages. Made gradual ground from 300 M, posing brief threat to the winner. No extra close home. (Swollen hind cannon.)
Midfield, 4-wide, turning into straight. Found little when asked closing stages.
About 8th into home turn. Ran on to take 2nd towards finish.
Never on terms.
Prominent to straight where he held some chance. Unable to hold position 200 M.
Soon dropped to rear and remained there to straight. Made up some ground from the 300 M and was one-paced close home.
Never a factor.
In touch to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Soon led and made rest. Went clear final 200 M and won impressively.
In rear to straight where he stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Never far off to straight where he kept on steadily.
Settled at back early. Improved to be 5th or 6th early in straight where he failed to make further progress.
Worse than midfield to straight. Ran on a bit near finish.
Midfield to home turn and was 4th 300 M. Did not sustain effort final 200 M.
Well there to straight where he chased winner unavailingly. Lost 2nd place near finish.
Soon led. Kept on without quickening when headed final 200 M.
Prominent, 3-wide 5th early straight. Ran on 250 M out to snatch victory final strides.
Behind midfield early. Improved gradually to be in touch until weakening out of contention final 200 M.
Midfield or better. Made progress from 600 M to be 3rd turning in. Ran on under pressure 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Not far off early, soon in midfield. Dropped back 600 M out. Trailed off in straight. Hung in badly throughout and performance unacceptable.
Jumped awkwardly. Kept on fairly in straight.
Last. Improved from 500 M. Ran on quite well from 8th 250 M but unable to reach the first three.
Behind midfield. Slightly unbalanced passing 800 M. No progress.
Well there. Sat outside leader until gaining slender advantage passing 200 M. Held on well but was caught at finish.
Around midfield throughout.
Jumped well from widest draw. Soon dropped behind midfield. Wide turning into straight without any improvement.
Towards rear. Made progress from 700 M to be midfield home bend. One-paced in straight.
Settled at the back. Snuck up on rails turning in. Ran on to narrowly miss 3rd place.
Midfield early. Prominent rounding home bend. Sustained effort from 2nd into straight to prevail closing stages.
Well there. Took up running coming out of back straight. Went 1L clear home turn but caught near finish.
Raced behind leaders to straight then dropped out.
Given reminders early. Travelled behind midfield. Took clear order on rails around home bend. Sustained progress in straight to claim 3rd place.
Towards rear to straight. Made modest progress.
Well there to straight then dropped out.
Squeezed out to rear early. Remained there until making good late progress closing stages.
Wide behind midfield. Hampered and knuckled early in straight and kept on.
Just better than midfield to straight then gradually faded.
Raced wide in midfield throughout. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Held narrow lead to 400 M. Dropped away passing 250 M.
Trailed field most of way.
Began well then held up in rear. Kept on one pace in straight.
Towards rear. Severely checked 600 M to avoid the fallers. Never recovered.
Well there. Was 1L 2nd turning in. Soon beaten.
In touch, pulling hard before clipping heels and fell at 600 M.
Not far off along rail. Remained similar when unbalanced 600 M. Weakened final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Badly checked 600 M to avoid the fallers. Made up some ground in straight.
Midfield from widest draw. Kept on moderately in straight.
Prominent. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Slight progress from 700 M to be midfield and widest turning in. Ran on well to take control 150 M. Held on.
Behind midfield. Pulled up when nearly fell at 600 M.
Towards rear. Fell over the fallen horse at 600 M.
Well there. Dropped back a little in 3-wide 5th far side. Ran on steadily in straight without ever reaching the quinella pair closing stages.
Towards rear. Made progress from the Rock to be midfield final turn. Responded well early straight to lead briefly passing 200 M. Unable to match speed with the winner.
Slightly slowly away and was checked near the winning post first time. Inconvenienced at 600 M. Never in contention.
Among front runners. Took clear lead passing 1200 M until 200 M. Faded.
Prominent to 200 M then weakened.
Never in the hunt.
Travelled behind midfield. Effort turning for home but did not find clear passage the length of straight.
