Towards rear. Produced moderate late impression in straight.
Towards rear. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Towards rear when tightened 200 M out then kept on steadily to the line.
Tracked leader. Not much room upon straightening. Ran on dourly to gain upper hand final strides.
Began awkwardly then quickly recovered to stalk behind leader. Weakened badly upon straightening.
Raced wide just better than midfield to straight then soon faded.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield to straight then weakened.
Midfield or better. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Nearly made all.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress down centre of straight.
Showed good early speed to be just behind leaders. Every opportunity in straight but weakened badly.
Hard ridden early but no speed to settle at rear. Beat home only tiring runners.
Very slow to muster speed to settle at the rear. Unable to improve when asked.
Raced very wide midfield but hanging out. Lost ground in the straight.
Beaten for early speed and settled towards rear. One-paced in the straight.
Ridden along from wide gate but then steadied across to find rail. Gained run along inside but never quickened.
Sat in handy position on the rail. Made good ground around home turn but never threatened winner.
Raced midfield but wide out. Placed under pressure in the straight and made no ground.
Good early speed to be just behind leaders. One-paced up the straight.
Beaten for early speed to settle behind midfield. Made good ground round home bend for good finishing effort out wide.
Showed early speed to settle behind leader. Shifted out on turn but unable to catch the winner.
Settled just behind leaders. Every chance on straightening but was then one-paced and never threatened.
Sat in handy position but without cover. Made steady ground out wide.
Jumped well and showed good speed to cross to lead. Sprinted well on turn to be never headed.
Behind lead and 4-wide without cover. Remained same into home straight and kept on strongly until one-paced final 100 M.
Behind lead and 3-wide without cover. Gave ground shortly after entering home straight.
Near rear. Hampered and carried wider turning at 600 M. Failed to make any impression in home straight.
Near rear. Hung out making turn at 600 M. Remained with rear throughout.
Behind lead, kept on early in straight then gave ground final 200 M.
Despite being hard ridden soon at rear. Remained same until entering home straight then commence to make nice ground. Difficulty getting clear running 200 M.
Little slow to begin then hard ridden to be behind midfield. Had difficulty getting into clear on straightening. When clear finished strongly final 200 M.
Midfield. Finished strongly when asked for effort after straightening and would have been much closer except for having difficulty obtaining clear run in straight.
In front of midfield. Asked for effort at 400 M however only kept on one-paced.
Followed leader. Kept on early in straight then started to give ground final 150 M.
Prominent. Asked for effort after straightening but failed to make any impression and gave ground from 200 M.
In front of midfield. Taken into clear on straightening and responded well to beat all but winner.
Led. Hung in in the early stages. Made all.
Midfield. Hung out in middle stages. Wide turning in then once balanced made strong ground final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Every chance 200 M out. Weakened closing stages.
Towards rear. Never a threat.
Midfield. Ran on strongly final 200 M, winner too strong.
Mainly midfield. Kept on well until failed to quicken final 100 M.
Better than midfield. Steadily dropped out after the 600 M.
Well there to 600 M. Not a factor afterwards.
Towards rear. A bit wide along back straight and entering straight. Ran on well in the straight despite hanging in.
Always prominent. Weakened from 200 M.
Soon led. Headed at 200 M. Weakened steadily.
Handy to early straight. Soon weakened.
Settled behind midfield. Progress from 600 M to be midfield turning in. Tightened near 400 M. Failed to quicken in the straight.
Ridden from behind, wide along back straight and turning in. Ran on strongly final 200 M to win going away.
Tardy start, at the back. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Midfield or better. Ran on from 5th early straight to assert authority passing 200 M. Held on well to the line.
Jumped awkwardly, soon moved up to be prominent far side. Joint lead final turn, kept on until weakening out of contention final 200 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Crept closer order or the rail final turn. Ran on well 300 M to be 2nd 150 M out. Kept on.
Slightly better than midfield. Faded soon after straightening.
Moved up to be prominent soon after start. Dropped back to 5th rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Pushed along to soon be prominent. Dropped out from final turn.
Rear. Was still last turning into straight. Made up good ground final 300 M but unable to threaten the winner.
Behind midfield. Faded in straight.
Towards rear. Made ground early straight. Kept on steadily final 200 M.
Rear. Held up 600 M. Was steadied early straight before running on a bit under pressure closing stages.
Midfield early, soon moved up to track the front runners. 2Ls 3rd turning into straight. Found no extra final 100 M.
Led field until joined home bend. Kept on without quickening when headed inside 200 M.
Midfield and kept on steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. No clear passage early in straight. One-paced.
Slowly away. Never in contention.
Always in last few.
Settled in midfield or behind. Ran on well down straight doing best work at finish.
In similar position throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Broke well. Settled wide behind midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Attempted to make all. Broke clear upon straightening but swamped closing stages.
Close up far side. Lost position and dropped to 4th some 3Ls back around home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Never far off. Produced good late impression doing best work at finish.
Rear early. Improved to midfield before home bend. Finished well inside final 300 M to grab victory near finish.
Slightly sluggish at start but quickly recovered to just worse than midfield. Kept on before fading over 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never nearer. Kept on.
Chased leader to 200 M then no extra.
Prominent. Weakened inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Was steadied 200 M out. Recovered some ground closing stages.
Around midfield. Kept on quite well along rail in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Rear. Widest turning in. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Prominent. Unable to hold position from home turn.
Midfield. Made no show in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd turning in. Kept on without ever reaching the winner.
Soon led and made all. Won easily.
Lost ground at start, last to 450 M. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
In the front briefly, soon dropped to the rear group. Recovered some ground in straight, just missed a minor placing.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Ran on moderately in straight.
Around midfield. Moved up to be in touch final turn. Ran on to take 3rd 200 M out. No threat to the first two.
Midfield. Steadied on straightening. Weakened closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always there. Came to tackle leader turning into straight and hit front over 200 M out. Caught near finish.
Never better than midfield. Made some moderate progress late.
Ridden to muster speed early settling behind midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend and sustained effort to get up on line.
Travelled just better than midfield to straight then dropped out.
Prominent to straight then dropped out.
Well back. Made up good ground down centre of straight to narrowly miss first two.
Always in last few. Dropped out into straight. (Saddle shifted.)
Midfield briefly and soon dropped towards rear.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Never in the hunt.
Led to 250 M then weakened.
Settled wide in midfield. Jostled between runners turning into straight. Forced to switch out for a run and produced good late effort inside final 200 M.
In similar position throughout. Made no show in straight.
Went forward to lead. Battled on gamely in the straight.
Settled rear of midfield racing four wide. Unbalanced near 700 M. Never quickened in the straight.
Went forward from wide barrier to be three wide equal without cover. Weakened in the straight.
Raced in a forward position but very wide. Checked at 900 M. Raced very wide throughout and weakened badly.
Went forward from wide barrier to be equal lead without cover. Got to lead at 200 M but unable to hold off winner.
Settled at rear of field, three wide. Improved in home straight to fill placing.
Settled at rear of the field. Made good ground in the home straight to just miss placings.
Unable to show early speed and settled at rear on the rail. Clear running on straightening, but did not quicken.
Began fairly but worked up outside lead at 900 M. Lost ground quickly from 400 M.
Ridden hard early to lead then steadied to be third at first turn. One-paced in the straight.
No early speed to be rearward ridden along. Remained in same position throughout.
Slow early but improved through to sit just behind leaders. Quickly sprinted when asked for effort in straight.
Began well but then settled midfield and wide. Never threatened in the straight when pressured.
Settled just behind leader, but then shuffled back when crowded at 800 M. Never quickened when placed under pressure.
With rear. Eased to outside after straightening. Responded well when asked the question after 300 M. Closest at finish.
Behind midfield. Made good ground through the field after 350 M. Run ended short of the line.
Near rear after being taken back at start. Into clear after straightening. Tried to make run with winner but unable to match him. Responded well and kept on until post.
Outside lead and 3-wide. Gave ground quickly final 300 M.
Midfield. Into clear shortly after straightening and responded well to wear leader down on the line. (Inquiry into improved performance.)
Behind leaders and 3 wide but with cover. Went to clear lead at 250 M and looked winner. Caught in final stride.
Outside leader. Kept on fairly early in straight. Found no more final 200 M.
Behind leaders. Waited with early in straight. Asked for effort after 300 M and despite responding well, was unable to match finishing efforts of placegetters.
In front of midfield and 3 wide. Wide on home bend but held ground until running out of puff at 150 M.
Midfield or little worse. Made good ground after 300 M but run ended 150 M out. Ridden hands and heels to post.
Led. Gave ground from 300 M to be well beaten.
Outside lead and 4 wide. Kept on fairly until final 100 M when started to give ground.
Followed leaders. Remained on inner around home bend and had some difficulty getting run early in straight. When in clear at 200 M kept on without ever looking likely.
Rear after losing ground at start. Made ground after straightening then badly held up for a run for some distance approaching 200 M. When clear made some ground after late.
Soon well there. Led approaching 600 M. Headed turning in. Weakened upon straightening.
In touch to stable bend. Midfield or better from 1200 M. Weakened upon straightening.
Well there. Led from 1200 M. Headed 900 M. Regained lead briefly upon straightening before weakened badly final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Trapped wide most of the way. Ran on gamely final 250 M to be nearest at finish without troubling the winner.
Began badly. At rear. Last from 900 M. Made up some ground in straight until checked when held for running after the 200 M. No further progress.
Always at rear. Improved from 800 M to be midfield but wide turning in. Ran on steadily to grab 3rd place on the line without threatening the first pair.
Led to stable bend before settling behind the pace. Ran on steadily in straight until not quickened close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden forward to lead from stable bend. Headed 1200 M. Soon weakened and dropped out of contention final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon midfield or better despite being trapped wide at stable bend. Ran on a bit final 300 M until steadied when crowded after the 200 M. Never recovered.
Towards rear. Steady headway on the outside from 1000 M to be in touch but 5-wide turning in. Ran on until effort not sustained in the closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always in touch. Quickened well final 300 M to take lead 250 M out. Kept on to win comfortably.
Mostly around midfield. Dropped back towards rear rounding home bend. Made up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Mostly midfield or worse. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Soon midfield or worse. Dropped back towards rear down back straight. Under pressure rounding home bend. Never a threat in straight.
Missed start, gradually recovered to be better than midfield at 1100 M. Dropped back a bit rounding home turn. Made steady progress final 200 M, one-paced close home.
Steadily dropped to rear, caught wide throughout. Made moderate progress final 200 M.
Raced keenly in prominent position. Held some chance upon straightening. Weakened from 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly and became unbalanced shortly afterwards. Behind midfield throughout, failed to quicken in the straight.
Close-up early, then settled in midfield or worse. Ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Niggled along early to be around midfield. Ran on steadily final 250 M until no extra closing stages.

Hampered at start, travelled in behind midfield. Proved difficult to settle and unbalanced on heels several times running to first turn. Unbalanced when crowded near 600 M. Made gradual ground 250 M, one-paced closing stages.
Led from 1300 M. Quickened clear from 300 M to win unchallenged.
Always prominent, kept on well.
Steadily dropped towards rear. Never a factor.
Disputed lead early, then sat behind leader. Gradually weakened from 100 M.
At rear. Made a little late ground after difficulty obtaining clear running final 300 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Gave ground from 250 M.
Worse than midfield and wide. Closer order on home bend. Steadied when crowded at 200 M, weakened gradually.
Steadily dropped to last. Disappointed for running early in the straight. Ran on well when into clear final 250 M, was checked to avoid another runner near finish.
Behind midfield, was difficult to settle and checked near 1300 M. Ran on steadily after straightening. Checked when hampered at 150 M, did not recover.
Waited with at rear. Widest into straight, ran on strongly final 300 M to get up near the line.
Slowly away, recovered to midfield at 1200 M. Made steady progress from 300 M.
Well back. Made gradual ground final 200 M.
Settled worse than midfield. Checked when disappointed for running 300 M out. Recovered to make up some late ground.
Jumped awkwardly, prominent, hung in early stages. Gradually weakened from 150 M.
Led briefly then settled in prominent position. Quickened to lead 300 M out. Just collared by the winner final strides.
Prominent, soon took lead and steadily shifted across towards rails. Headed at 350 M, dropped out.
Pushed along to be around midfield. Was held up for a run near 200 M, dropped out steadily.
Settled near rear from widest draw. Ran on well from 300 M whilst hanging in.
Mostly forward of midfield. Steadily weakened final 100 M.
Worse than midfield throughout. Did not quicken.
Better than midfield. Short-lived effort from 300 M to 150 M. Weakened.
Well there before steadily giving ground approaching 200 M.
Never better than mid-division.
Ran 2nd to home turn and held every chance 200 M out. No extra.
Well there before dropping to rear 800 M. Not in contention thereafter.
Settled in rear to straight. Ran on quite well closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running and led field to 250 M where he could find no more.
Mostly 6th to home turn. Doing best work close home despite not reaching winner.
Never troubled leaders.
Settled worse than midfield to straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Never far away to straight. Looked dangerous 200 M but outpaced by first two near finish.
Well there before jumping shadow 1000 M, losing ground. Made no show after.
Never in the hunt.
Worse than midfield to straight where he made some progress. Found no extra towards finish.
Always well there. Quickened to lead passing 200 M, holding on well under pressure.
Checked just after start, towards rear. Made ground moderately in straight.
In touch. Weakened in straight.
In touch early, dropped back 800 M out. Clipped heels passing 600 M and was awkward on straightening. Kept on without quickening final 300 M.
Midfield. Improved to 4th home bend. Faded upon straightening.
Better than midfield. Made no show in straight. Hung in throughout.
Led field soon after start. With 1/2L advantage turning in. Kept on well to hold off challenge in the straight.
Always prominent. Came to tackle leader final turn. Always held by the winner in the straight.
Travelled wide without cover in midfield. Weakened inside 400 M.
Towards rear. Improved well 400 M out to be 3rd home turn. Kept on without threatening.
Jumped well and was in the front briefly. Soon settled just behind midfield. Kept on moderately from final turn.
Jumped well from widest draw, soon towards rear. Ran past a few beaten horses final 300 M.
Checked soon after start, remained at rear. Made ground steadily inside 400 M.
Settled at the back. Commenced move rounding home bend on outside and ran on well from midfield in centre of straight to fail narrowly.
Around midfield. Dropped to rear into straight. Produced some late impression in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly around midfield before making rapid progress to take lead from Rock. Unable to sustain effort and headed 200 M out.
Trapped wide in mid-division early. Improved to close-up position turning into straight the first time. Gradually weakened from home bend.
Midfield to Rock then weakened.
Slowly away settling at the back. Made swift progress far side but had no more to give inside final 400 M.
Settled in rear. Commenced to make headway under pressure from Rock gaining 4th position upon straightening. Was keeping on steadily while shifting ground when unbalanced inside 200 M. Kept on.
Close up taking lead passing winning post the first time. Headed around Rock and dropped out from prominent position into straight.
Raced 3 or 4-wide in mid-division early. Took closer order stables bend and sustained progress into straight to hit front 200 M out. Pipped at post.
Settled towards rear. Made moderate progress down straight without threatening.
Settled just behind midfield. Shaken up and improved from Rock. Sustained effort down straight to gain upper hand final stride.
Prominent briefly travelling mainly in midfield position to home bend then weakened.
Restrained and in leading position before obtaining cover passing winning the post the first time. Dropped out after Rock.
Broke well settling just better than midfield. Gradually faded from Rock.
Towards rear. Improved slightly rounding home bend. Ran on from 7th early straight to claim victory inside final 100 M.
Led field to 1000 M. Held 2nd until weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
Jumped very awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be better than midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Prominent. Took lead from 1000 M. Held on until headed inside 100 M.
In touch. Dropped back when crowded for room near 500 M. Made no show in straight.
Midfield or behind. Improved to 5th 400 M. Found no extra after turning in.
Soon last. Made ground under pressure soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Widest turning in. No significant progress.
Towards rear. One-paced in straight.
Always prominent. Kept on.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Progressed to 8th early straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Around midfield. Dropped out from 400 M.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on steadily to grab 2nd near finish.
Pushed forward to midfield from a wide draw. Faded upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to straight. Ran on.
Wide and better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Made most to straight then gradually weakened.
Midfield. Took closer order home bend and hit front into straight. Headed wide final 200 M.
Never far off. Kept on before finding no extra in straight.
Settled at the back. Gained midfield into straight on inside rails. Sustained good progress to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Well there with brief lead approaching Rock. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Wide in midfield. Dropped out from Rock.
Settled at the back. Ran on in straight.
Settled in rear. Ran on down straight to claim 3rd final stride.
Settled towards rear. No clear run early in straight. Ran on well closing stages to just get up on line.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to hit front briefly closing stages and caught near finish.
Prominent. Kept on one pace in straight.
Midfield to straight then weakened.
Travelled just behind leading division with cover.
Ridden early to be midfield rail. Saved ground on home bend to make up good ground in the straight.
Began quickly from wide gate to be racing 3-wide in lead. One-paced in the straight.
Ridden along early stages but only able to maintain midfield. Slight inconvenience in the straight.
No early speed to settle rear of midfield. Made up steady ground but never a threat to placegetters.
Slow to begin and was unbalanced on several occasions. Weakened from 400 M and never in contention.
Began best to speed through from inside gate. Unable to resist challengers in the straight.
Ridden along early stages to be handy position 3-wide. Ran on widest making steady ground.
Began well to settle just behind leader. Shifted out on turn to score impressive win.
Began well from wide gate to be racing outside leader. Weakened in the straight.
Ridden along hard early but no early speed to be midfield. Only moderate ground in the straight.
Began fairly to be travelling midfield but wide. Hung out home bend.
Chased along for some distance but no early speed to be rearward. Made steady ground in the straight.
Near rear. Remained same into straight and then showed no improvement.
Behind midfield. Hard ridden at 400 M but failed to respond. Well beaten.
Wide without cover early, went forward to be prominent at 900 M. Had difficulty getting a clear run early in straight and showed no response when in clear after 200 M.
Led. Remained same until headed at 200 M. Kept on strongly but unable to hold off quinella pair.
Outside lead early then settled into trail at 1000 M. Followed leaders into straight and asked for effort shortly afterwards but unable to quicken and kept on one-pace.
Midfield. Remained same throughout after only responding one-paced in straight.
In front of midfield. Into clear after straightening and responded well to reach lead at 200 M. Kept on strongly to score narrow win despite hanging in concluding stages.
Behind midfield and 3-wide. Improved gradually from 700 M to midfield on straightening. Failed to quicken after straightening.
Taken back to near rear from wide barrier. Raced awkwardly in middle stages. Never likely.
At rear. Improved from 400 M when taken to the outside of the field. Responded fairly in straight and made ground without ever looking likely.
In front of midfield. Asked for effort after straightening and kept on one-paced.
Prominent and 3-wide early. Went forward to be outside lead at 900 M. Remained same until unable to find any extra final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Crept closer from 700 M. Eased to the outside when midfield on straightening. Responded well and failed to gain victory by the narrowest of margins.
Near rear. Dropped to rear to at 600 M after being crowded. No response afterwards.
Attempted to make all. Headed 100 M out, weakened steadily close home.
Settled around midfield, trapped wide early stages. Ran on steadily final 200 M, unable to match speed with the winner.
Better than midfield. Closer order rounding home bend to be behind leader turning in. Kept on.
Well back. Ran past tired runners final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Ran on strongly on outside final 300 M to win going away.
Soon better than midfield, trapped wide early stages. Steady progress from 800 M to be behind leaders into straight. Faded from 250 M.
Better than midfield. Steadily weakened from 250 M.
Chased leader to 500 M. Weakened and became tailed off from 250 M.
Disputed lead briefly, then sat behind leader. Checked and lost ground at 600 M, never recovered.
Behind midfield. Made ground steadily final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground from 250 M, one-paced closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, midfield. Checked near 500 M and was then held up for a run until 300 M out. Made gradual ground final 200 M. One-paced close home.
Settled at rear. Not clear run early in the straight. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Led field to 300 M. Weakened.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Ran on under pressure in straight until one-paced closing stages.
Sat outside leader. Failed to respond in straight.
Jumped well and was in the front briefly, soon raced behind midfield. Was awkward home turn and early straight before making up some ground 250 M.
Jumped very awkwardly, at rear. Checked at 250 M and again at 200 M. Never in contention.
Soon in touch. Ran on from 3rd final turn to take lead 300 M out. Held off challenges from placegetters.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily final 300 M.
Midfield. Moved up steadily turning in. Kept on but unable to catch the winner.
In touch. Mostly 5th before finding no extra final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Midfield early. Pushed forward to soon be in touch. Dropped out soon after straightening. (Bled.)
Better than midfield. 5-wide 5th upon straightening. Made ground steadily to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Was checked when shifted in to make ground 250 M. No progress.
Travelled just better than midfield. Made up good ground on inside doing best work at finish.
Prominent to straight and weakened.
Midfield to straight then weakened.
Never far off to straight. Kept on without quickening.
Never nearer.
Ridden to prominent position early disputing lead home bend. Soon dropped out after straightening. (Bled.)
Broke well travelling 3-wide in close-up position. Went clear 2Ls clear early in straight but unable to sustain effort and swamped close home.
Broke well settling some 2 or 3Ls off the pace. Commenced move early in the straight making steady headway before swamped near finish.
Always towards rear. Ran on well down centre of straight producing good impression closing stages.
Towards rear to straight. Made up some late ground.
Narrow lead or disputed lead to straight then gradually overhauled.
Began awkwardly. Never in contention.
Wide throughout. Rear early taking closer order coming out of back straight. Ran on well inside final 200 M to win readily.
Never better than midfield. Hampered and lost ground on inside home bend.
Last to inside 200 M.
Settled towards rear from a wide draw. Made progress final turn to be midfield early straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Pushed along to soon be in touch. Dropped back steadily in straight.
In touch, soon dropped to just better than midfield. Widest turning in and faded. (Hung out.)
Towards rear. Ran on well final 300 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Crept closer order along rail final turn. Kept on same pace in straight.
Always there. Kept on well in straight.
Made ground along rail after a moderate start and was in the front 950 M. Joint lead at 600 M before going clear early straight. Just held on.
Jumped awkwardly, behind midfield. No progress.
Midfield or better. Moved up to challenge 250 M out but was one-paced closing stages.
Led field to 950 M. Remained prominent during the rest of the journey.
Behind midfield. Steadied near 300 M before running on final 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground inside 200 M.
Prominent. Joint lead from 600 M to early straight. Steadied approaching 200 M when giving ground.
Soon took up running. Won easily.
Rear. Widest into straight. Made moderate progress past beaten runners in straight.
In similar position throughout.
Rear. Some progress before finding no extra passing 300 M.
Around midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Always in last few.
Broke well settling in 2nd outside leader. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Settled just behind leaders. Ran on without troubling winner in straight.
Never far off to straight. Dropped out. (Bled.)
Midfield. Hampered and dropped to rear home bend. Made up ground down centre of straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield to home bend. Dropped out.
Always in rear.
Travelled just better than midfield. Kept on one pace under pressure in straight.
Ridden along early to be in touch with leaders.
Unable to show early speed and gave leaders 4 lengths. Picked up well final 200 M to just miss. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in forward division out wide. Unable to catch the winner.
Raced with leaders in middle of the track with no cover. Placed under pressure from 500 M but weakened.
Began well from wide gate to lead outside division. Held off challengers final 100 M.
Good early pace to be leading inside division. Unable to hold off challengers inside final 200 M.
No early speed to be about 4 lengths of lead in middle of track with no cover.
Settled 4 lengths behind leaders of inside division. Never in contention.
Not much early pace to be 3 lengths behind leading division. Always there and one-paced.
Jumped best to be leading inside division. Failed to hold on final 200 M.
Began very awkwardly and lost ground. Made good ground final 400 M.
Began well from wide gate to be just behind leaders. Remained there throughout.
About 5 lengths from leaders always under pressure.
Raced inside division about 3 lengths behind leaders. Always under pressure.
Near rear throughout. Failed to respond when asked for effort after 400 M.
Near rear. Waited with until eased to outside on straightening. Responded well but unable to catch quinella pair.
Behind lead. Into clear on straightening and looked good chance when responded well early in straight. Kept on fairly despite run ending short of line. Crowded on winning post.
Rear. Waited with well into home straight. Made good ground final 200 M when being ridden out hands and heels. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield and 3 wide. Remained same turning in. Responded well after straightening to race away at leaders and arrive in final stride.
Behind leaders. Gave ground quickly after straightening.
Followed leader. Gave ground from 250 M.
Behind midfield. Kept on fairly when asked for effort on straightening. Made gradual ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Outside lead after beginning badly. Kept on well until condition gave out final 200 M.
Midfield and 3 wide. Responded well after straightening but run ended short of line. Crowded on winning post.
In front of midfield after beginning poorly. Kept on fairly early in straight then one paced final 100 M.
Behind midfield. Asked for effort after straightening and responded well despite having some difficulty obtaining clear running. Nearest at finish.
Led. Gave ground from 300 M.
Around midfield. Improved from 500 M to be prominent turning in. Responded well after straightening to reach lead at 200 M. Just failed to hold on.
Settled towards rear. Brought to the outside rounding 600 M. Ran on from 300 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled better than midfield. Responded well from 300 M to hold every chance 200 M out. Found winner too strong near finish.
Behind midfield. Crept closer rounding home bend. Effort not sustained and weakened from 200 M.
Settled last. Ran on well from 300 M. Just overhauled by the first pair final strides.
Midfield. Ran on steadily upon straightening, every chance from 200 M, overhauled by placed horses closing stages.
Settled at rear. Quickened well from the outside final 300 M to take charge final strides.
Behind leader. Shared lead into straight while hanging out. Weakened from 250 M.
Well there to straight. Soon weakened. (Lost a plate.)
Led field to 200 M. Kept on well.
At rear. Made up good ground final 200 M when doing best work at finish.
Outpaced early and remained at the back. Made up some late ground when finishing nicely. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield. Checked at 700 M. Not a factor in straight. (Bled.)
Never far off. Soon weakened upon straightening and dropped steadily out of contention final 200 M.
Soon towards rear. Made a little late impression final 200 M.
Thereabout to 800 M and then dropped back to midfield. One-paced in straight until effort not sustained close home.
In touch early before dropping back to midfield despite being ridden along. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Soon moved across from wide draw to be towards rear. Ran on steadily final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Led from 1000 M. Headed 800 M. Kept on in straight until weakened badly final 200 M.
Niggled along in midfield or worse. Swift headway 800 M on the outside to be 6th turning in. Made up good ground in straight without threatening the first pair.
Soon sat outside the leader. Led from 800 M. Kept on well in straight to win comfortably.

Jumped well from wide draw before dropping back to midfield or better from 900 M. Steadily headway rounding home bend to be in touch turning in. Ran on without troubling the winner. (Hung in throughout.)
Led briefly before settling in 3rd place. Awkwardly placed at 700 M. Stayed on upon straightening but was no match for placed horses.
Midfield. Hampered at 700 M. Unable to quicken in straight and had to be steadied 100 M out.
Disputed lead early, behind leader from 1000 M. Dropped out from 300 M.
Pushed forward to be in touch. Hung in from home bend. Weakened from 200 M.
Never far off. Failed to quicken in the straight, weakened closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear. Never a factor.
Prominent. Every chance 100 M out, no extra closing stages.
Settled just behind midfield. Accelerated well from 300 M to snatch victory close home.
Ridden forward to muster pace but never better than midfield.
Settled in midfield. Found nothing upon straightening, weakened from 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Made gradual ground final 300 M.
Settled in midfield. Responded well to make ground steadily final 300 M. Just overhauled by the winner near the line.
Slowly away, well back. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Steadily dropped to the rear. Made only moderate headway final 200 M.
Pushed along to lead from 1000 M, gradually shifting across from wide draw. Headed 100 M out. Kept on until tiring close home.
Settled at rear. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
Was 8th rounding home bend. Improved from 300 M and led 150 M out. Unable to hold winner towards finish.
Towards rear till making some late progress final 200 M.
Was 8th or 9th when severely checked 1200 M. Never in race thereafter.
Worse than midfield to straight where he ran on well to lead close home.
Led field to 200 M where he dropped out steadily.
In rear to straight where he stayed on well despite not reaching first two, having to switch in for run near finish.
Mostly in 5th to straight where he failed to run on.
Midfield to straight where he made no show.
Never far off to straight where he kept on till only one-paced close home.
Never a factor.
In touch into straight where he failed to hold place approaching 200 M.
Never in the hunt. (Bled.)
Tracked leader. Hit front briefly 200 M. Found no extra.
Sat behind leaders in 4th to straight. Found little under pressure.
Maintain a similar position throughout.
Towards rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Soon led until headed 800 M and dropped back steadily. Tailed off in straight.
Never in contention.
Pushed along from widest draw to be 3rd 1300 M. Came to tackle leader far side and took over 800 M. Just held on when being challenged final 200 M.
Always prominent. Kept on strongly in straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Among the rear group to straight. Just ran past a few beaten horses.
Around midfield throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Made ground soon after straightening to take a remote 4th close home.
Always there. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Made progress final turn to be 4th turning in. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Soon prominent gaining narrow advantage rounding home bend. Headed passing 200 M and weakened.
Travelled in midfield or behind. Ran on steadily down straight.
Broke best settling just behind leaders. Switched out for a run early in straight and ran on to hit front over 150 M out but swamped close home.
Midfield when tightened on rails and lost position approaching home bend. Made up some late ground in straight.
Travelled just better than midfield to straight then weakened badly.
Missed the break. Remained in rear to straight. Never nearer.
Slow into stride. Never in contention.
Soon led. Narrowly headed home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Towards rear. Ran on well down straight to just fail to get up on line.
Shared 5th just better than midfield. Ran on in straight to just defy runner-up.
Niggled at early but always in rear.
Prominent briefly. Hampered and dropped towards rear coming out of back straight. Kept on same pace in home straight.
Niggled at when hampered and dropped to the back early. Finished race off strongly doing best work at finish.
Swiftly improved from rear to be prominent behind leaders home bend. Just kept on same pace in straight.
Mostly 5th. Unable to quicken closing stages.
Prominent 3rd. Found no extra final 300 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Led field to 600 M. Remained prominent until failing to hold place 200 M out.
Towards rear soon after start.
Around midfield. Found no extra 350 M. (Hung out.)
Always there. Kept on. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Jumped very awkwardly, never a factor.
Prominent. Took lead near 600 M and never headed. Won well.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily passing course proper but unable to reach the winner.
Tardy start, remained at the back. Ran on 300 M.
Around midfield to 400 M. Weakened.
Bounded in the air at start, losing ground. Improved gradually to midfield half-way. Ran on well final 200 M but no match with the winner.
Reared and unbalanced after being boxed. Saddle shifted on jumping. Never able to feature.
Travelled just better than midfield. Improved to hold some chance early in straight but soon overhauled.
Around midfield to straight then dropped out.
Prominent to straight. Kept on before finding no extra closing stages.
Never in contention.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
Led until headed into straight then dropped out.
Settled towards rear. Commenced run entering straight. Quickened well to hit front momentarily before outstayed by winner nearing finish.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on steadily.
Well back. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Settled at the back. Quickened well in straight to hit front closing stages. Won going away.
Tracked leader. Took over entering straight but overhauled closing stages.
Travelled behind leaders to 200 M then no extra.
Slow to begin to rearward on the rail. Gained inside run from home bend to hit front at 100 M but unable to hold challenger.
Ridden along for some distance early to be midfield. Improved widest home bend to score impressive win.
Settled handy position early. In similar position thereafter.
Behind midfield and trapped wide early. No effort raised in the straight.
No early speed to be rearward. Never quickened when pressured after the 600 M.
Settled midfield on the rail. Every chance from home bend but no effort.
Worked hard from wide gate to race 3-wide equal lead without cover. Improved from 600 M but unable to hold challengers final 200 M.
Slow into stride to be rearward. Similar position throughout.
In handy position early. Began to tire badly on home bend.
Ridden hard early to be forward of midfield. Travelled wide throughout and no improvement in the straight.
Jumped best from inside gate to be front at post first time, then eased to settle behind leader. One-paced in the straight.
Ridden hard early but rearward of midfield. One-paced in the straight.
Began quickly to work forward and lead out of straight first time. Led into straight before weakening shortly after.
Worked across to be travelling outside leader comfortably. Placed under pressure on home turn and weakened badly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Into the clear and hard ridden on straightening. Took time to respond then finish the race off strongly.
Near rear and wide after being slow to begin. Carried wider on turn near 700 M. No response when asked for effort at 400 M.
Ridden to be behind midfield after being slow to begin. Remained same into straight then made good ground through field and was nearest at finish.
Midfield. Remained same into straight then kept on one-paced early in straight. Gave ground final 100 M.
Rear. Remained near rear into home straight. Took time to wide up when asked for effort after straightening. Started to make nice ground late.
Prominent. Remained same into straight and then one-paced when asked for extra effort.
Midfield and 4-wide. Wide on home bend and kept on one-paced in straight after covering a lot of ground in the run.
Outside leader. Remained same and issued strong challenge in straight but unable to peg back leader.
Led. Kept on strongly when challenged in straight and held on to score narrowly.
Near rear after being slow to begin. Hung out middle stages. Remained near rear into home straight. Some response after the 400 M then effort told and gave ground final 150 M.
Near rear and widest after being slow to begin. Carried wider on turn near 700 M. Dropped out from home turn.
In front of midfield. Asked for effort on straightening and kept on one-paced until finish.
Behind leaders. Held 3rd clearly well into the straight. Kept on well until one-paced final 100 M.
Midfield. Remained same into home straight then gave no response.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground from 250 M. One-paced closing stages.
Soon pulled to the front. Headed near 800 M. Kept on until weakening 150 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Gradually dropped to the rear from wide draw. Ran on strongly final 200 M to miss narrowly.
Never far off. Ran on to hit the front 200 M out. Every chance until no extra and overhauled closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Crowded at start, well back. Ran on steadily final 200 M. Steadied and shifted out when disappointed for running near the finish.
Jumped awkwardly, at rear. Never in contention.
Towards rear early, steadily improved to midfield at 1300 M. No further improvement in the straight, weakened final 200 M.
Prominent to 200 M. Dropped out.
Well there from widest draw, caught wide without cover early and middle stages. Brief lead near 300 M but hung in badly and proved difficult to ride. Kept on, weakened closing stages.
Around midfield throughout. Did not quicken in home straight.
Tardy start, settled mainly worse than midfield on the rail. Responded well to improve through field from 300 M to get up closing stages.
In touch early, then settled around midfield. Improved on home bend to be behind leaders turning in. Unable to quicken, weakened after 200 M.
Ridden to be prominent. Took lead from 800 M. Headed at 400 M, weakened gradually final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Ran on well from 250 M, one-paced close home.
Pulled to the front soon after start. Faded out of contention when headed final turn.
Always there. Moved up from 600 M to gain slender advantage home turn. Kept on same pace when headed 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Found not much room early straight. Ran on moderately when in clear 250 M.
Midfield or behind. Only moderate late progress.
Raced 5th from a wide draw. Was 4-wide 2nd final turn. Responded well to take command 200 M out. Won unchallenged.
Slowly away, never in contention.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear throughout.
Mostly midfield. Made some progress early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Always at the rear. (Bled.)
Never better than midfield. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Soon in touch. Raced 3rd rounding home bend. Unable to hold place upon straightening.
Midfield. Ran on from early straight to take 2nd inside 100 M. Unable to threaten the winner.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Always there. Ran on steadily along rail 300 M out to snatch 3rd near finish.
Broke well settling just off the pace. Ran on steadily down straight to fail narrowly.
Chased leader to 300 M then weakened.
Settled just behind midfield. Not much room early in straight but continued to make ground to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield throughout. Plodded on.
Began well then held up in midfield 4-wide. Kept on in straight.
Squeezed out at start. Remained in rear to straight. Ran on well inside final 200 M doing best work at finish.
Ridden in prominent position early. Dropped to midfield home bend. Faded further in straight.
Midfield early. Swift progress to join leaders home bend. Kept on in straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Quickly took up running and led until overhauled close home.
Midfield to home bend then gradually weakened.
Trailed field to straight. Ran on past beaten runners.
Settled just better than midfield and some 3L 5th entering straight. Switched out for a run early on and ran on only to find winner too strong.
Always towards rear.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down straight to score comfortable victory.
In touch. Came to tackle leader passing 200 M. Gained slender advantage very briefly but effort not sustained.
Soon led. Was momentarily headed when being strongly challenged inside 150 M. Kept on gamely to pick up a narrow victory final stride.
In the middle throughout.
Towards rear. Made up some ground passing 400 M.
Jumped awkwardly, was soon prominent. Improved to 3rd 300 M but unable to match speed with the quinella pair.
Tardy start, soon made ground to be 5th. Made no show 300 M.
Towards rear. Moderate progress closing stages.
Always towards rear.
Prominent. Found no extra final 250 M.
In touch briefly early. Dropped back steadily.
Behind midfield. Ran on in straight.
Never better than midfield. Faded in straight.
Midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Mainly in midfield. One-paced before producing late impression closing stages.
Well there to straight then dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well from poor draw racing wide to straight and dropped out.
Checked and lost ground at start. Remained in rear before producing good late impression in straight.
Settled at the back. Widest turning in. Ran on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to 200 M. No extra.
Settled towards rear. Ran on early in straight but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Held up in prominent position early. Lost some ground before coming under pressure home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Settled just off the pace. No clear run early in straight. Kept on close home.
Settled at the back. Made up a lot of ground in straight to get up close home.
Attempted to make all. Headed inside 200 M but fought on for 2nd place.
Behind leading division after going 400 M. One-paced in the straight.
Ridden along for some distance early to take lead. Quickly passed on straightening.
Travelled behind midfield. Eased down shortly after straightening. (Irregular heart beat.)
Towards the rear. Shifted to outside rail when placed under pressure.
Ridden for some distance to go through and lead at fast pace. Weakened soon after turning in.
No early pace to behind midfield. Attempted run along rail but made no ground.
Ridden along for some distance but not able to hold lead. Hit front at 300 M but unable to hold off challenger.
Beaten for early pace to settled behind leaders. Weakened quickly after turning in.
Raced forward in handy position but over-racing. Made run out wide in straight but died on its run last 200 M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground to be rearward. Never made up any ground.
Worked forward to avoid being wide settling in handy position. Remained in similar position thereafter.
In handy position. Unable to quicken when pressured.
Midfield ridden along. Made run out in centre of track but unable to match placegetters.
Settled easily to be behind midfield. Wound up from home turn and gained split at 200 M for decisive win.
Slow to begin and remained at rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Remained on inner around home bend. Took time to pick up early in straight then responded well last 200 M. Doing best work at finish.
Followed leader. Took clear lead at 200 M. Kept on strongly to hold onto equal second placing.
Behind midfield. Over-raced in early and middle stages. Under pressure after straightening and only made moderate headway. Never looked likely.
Hard ridden to lead from wide gate. Maintain same until 200 M then kept on fairly despite being unable to hold off challenge.
Began awkwardly then hard ridden to be midfield. Remained same throughout after keeping on one paced in straight.
Prominent into clear on straightening and took some time to gather momentum. Finished strongly final 200 M to arrive just in time.
Midfield and 3 wide. Kept on early in straight then gave ground gradually final 250 M.
Near rear after being a little slow to begin. Asked for effort after straightening and initially only responded fairly. Made some ground late to be nearest at finish.
Taken back to be behind midfield and 3 wide from outside draw. Waited with into home straight then taken to outside and made good ground without ever looking likely.
With rear. Remained same into home straight then taken to outside and failed to make any impression despite being hard ridden.
Prominent. Gave ground quickly after straightening.
Near rear after being crowded shortly after the start. Taken out into clear after straightening and when asked for effort shortly after made only moderate headway.
Midfield. Sprinted quickly when asked for effort after straightening. Run levelled out final 100 M but continued to make ground and just failed.
At rear. Tightened rounding home turn. Found nothing in straight.
Mainly behind midfield or just worse. Ran on 300 M out to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Swift headway from 1000 M to be 2nd rounding home bend. Kept on until weakened rapidly final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Missed the start and remained at rear. Ran past beaten horses in the straight.
Mainly forward of midfield. 4th turning in. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening placed horses.
Soon dropped to the rear. Never a threat in straight.
Towards rear. Improved to behind midfield from 1200 M. Made up good ground final 250 M to just miss 2nd.
At rear. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Towards rear. Took closer order rounding home turn to be behind midfield turning in. Made up a little ground towards the finish.
Jumped well. Mostly in touch. 5th turning in. Kept on one-pace.
Began awkwardly. Always at rear. Tailed off final 200 M.
Soon sat behind the leader. 3rd rounding home bend. Quickened well final 250 M and took lead 100 M out. Kept on well to win comfortably.
Soon led. Kept on well upon straightening. Headed 100 M out. Just held on for 2nd.
Midfield or better. Ran on steadily upon straightening until not quickened final 100 M.
Made running to 200 M. Steadily weakened.
Better than midfield, caught wide early and middle stages. Kept on well final 200 M.
Settled off pace. Ran on to hit the front 200 M out. Shifted out in the run to the line, just held on.
Towards rear. Was checked near the 800 M. Moved closer rounding home bend. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Midfield early. Improved to be outside leader at 900 M. Every chance 200 M out, no extra and weakened close home.
Always prominent, weakened final 100 M.
Around midfield and proved difficult to settle. Lost position when steadied near 800 M. Made ground steadily final 200 M. Just failed to peg back the winner.
Midfield early, progressed to prominent position at 1000 M. Checked and lost running near 800 M. Did not recover.
Slowly away from widest draw, at rear. Ran on steadily final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away, at the back. Over-raced, hung out and made the home turn very awkwardly. Never a factor.
Behind midfield despite niggled along early. When making some ground in the straight, had trouble obtaining clear running inside final 200 M.
Behind midfield or worse. Became unbalanced at 1000 M and bumped with another runner twice on the home bend. Never in contention.
Settled towards rear. Became unbalanced when steadied near 1300 M. Made gradual ground from 300 M. One-paced close home.
In handy position to 400 M. Faded.
Forward midfield. Ran on to hold some chance final 200 M. Kept on well.
Rear of midfield. Made up some ground from 300 M. Kept on same pace final 150 M.
Jumped awkwardly, prominent to straightening. Dropped out.
Mostly midfield. Did not quicken in the straight.
Behind leader. Took lead from 300 M. Headed 100 M, unable to match strides with the winner.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Was checked near 300 M when disappointed for running. Never seen with a chance.
Settled at rear. Made up good ground from 300 M. Found no more near finish.
Steadily dropped towards rear from widest draw. Made up some ground from 300 M until run ended 100 M out.
Waited with near rear. Responded well from 300 M to improve through field. Sprinted clear 100 M out to win going away.
Jumped awkwardly, midfield throughout. Failed to quicken in home straight.
Towards rear. Asked for effort from 500 M and ran on steadily after straightening. No extra closing stages.
Led field to 300 M. Kept on until weakening final 100 M.
Jumped well before settling in 3rd and 4th to straight. Soon beaten.
Soon took up running after being slow at the start. Was headed 200 M and faded steadily.
Mostly 5th or 6th to straight where he ran on well to claim victory final strides.
Mostly midfield to straight where he made no show.
Worse than midfield to straight when he held every chance closing stages, doing best work towards finish.
In rear to straight. Made up good ground from 300 M despite hanging in under pressure close home.
Never on terms.
Always prominent. Led briefly 200 M and was one-paced near finish.
Soon improved towards leaders and was 3rd on straightening. Moved up to lead passing 200 M but unable to hold the first two near finish.
At back to straight. Never nearer.
Midfield into straight where he failed to quicken under pressure.
Rear early and was midfield early in straight. Plugged on before giving ground inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up considerable ground final 150 M.
Prominent. Found no extra when 2nd at 150 M.
Led field to around 700 M, then remained in a prominent position. Kept on but lost 2nd close home. (Hung in throughout.)
Slowly away and was soon checked. Never a factor.
In touch before dropping to midfield 500 M out. One-paced thereafter.
In touch early, was soon midfield. Dropped back a bit when inconvenienced 600 M. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on well closing stages.
Midfield from a widest draw. Ran on 200 M out.
Midfield to straight. Faded final 200 M.
Well there. Took lead approaching the Rock. With 2Ls advantage 200 M, held on to the line.
Slowly away, always at the rear.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent. Dropped to 4th when checked 600 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Prominent to straight then dropped out.
Always well back before running past beaten horses in straight.
With leaders early stages. Dropped to midfield at 1200 M bend. Faded further into straight.
Settled in rear. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Came to challenge upon straightening but only one-paced.
Travelled wide and behind midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Well back. Last into straight. Ran on down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Hit front over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort and swamped closing stages.
Towards rear. Save ground on inside turning in. Found no extra in straight.
Settled in midfield. Finished well to win readily.
Attempted to make all but headed passing 200 M.
With leaders early. Midfield far side. One-paced in straight.
Midfield or better. Weakened on straightening.
Slowly away. Always at the rear.
Towards rear. Widest turning into straight. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Tardy start, behind midfield. Made up considerable ground final 200 M.
Always well there. Kept on well closing stages.
Rear. Made some progress final turn. Difficult to find clear run before making ground inside 200 M.
Jumped very awkwardly, never better than midfield.
Prominent. Dropped back from 600 M and was midfield home turn. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield or better. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
In touch. Came to tackle leader passing 800 M. Found no extra when 3rd 400 M. Faded in straight.
Better than midfield along the rail. Improved to 4th upon straightening. Ran on to take lead near 100 M. Won narrowly.
Led field until joined near 1000 M. Regained advantage 600 M, having 2Ls clear early straight. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
Made no show.
Held up wide behind midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never rearer. Kept on in straight. (Rider lost whip 400 M.)
Raced wide better than midfield to straight then dropped out.
Led to 200 M then unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled at the back. Improved to midfield saving ground on inside turning in. Sustained steady progress in straight though without threatening.
Mainly in midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening but only produced moderate progress.
Behind leaders. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M. Caught final strides.
Began from poor draw and pushed to stalk behind leader. Shaken up upon straightening ran on but failed to draw level.
Never far off in 4th place to straight then dropped out.
Midfield. Commenced run entering straight. Ran on determinedly to get up at finish.
Mainly in midfield. No clear passage turning in. Made modest progress in straight.
Restrained from widest gate to be rearward. Settled well and travelled on home bend. Clipped heels of runner at 300 M then made good ground.
Began moderately to be midfield on rail. Made up good ground in the straight to just fail.
Travelled in midfield with cover. Always there and received heavy bump when weakening at 300 M.
Raced wide midfield. Ridden hard from 600 M to be widest home. Made little impression in the straight.
Raced in handy position with cover. Only one-paced in the straight.
Began well from wide gate to settle outside leader. Hit lead before 200 M out but unable to hold off challengers.
Not best away but ridden along early to be just behind leaders. Weakened quickly after straightening.
Began best from inside to settle just behind leader. Eased out home bend to prove too strong.
Given run of the race from inside barrier to be handy on the rail. Never quickened when asked.
Tailed off throughout.
Began best to establish lead quickly in the early stages. Unable to hold off challengers inside 200 M.
Always rearward. Made no ground in the straight.
Prominent and 3-wide. Kept on when asked for effort on straightening. Run ended at 100 M.
Prominent. Hard ridden from 400 M and kept on well to hold position in the run to the line.
Prominent and 4-wide without cover. Remained same into home straight then gave ground shortly afterwards.
With rear. Asked for effort at 400 M and showed no response. Made a little ground late.
Around midfield after losing position of 1st turn. Remained on inner and crept a little closer around home bend. Mainly one-paced in straight.
Followed leader. Into clear on straightening and kept on well without ever making impression on leader.
Led comfortably and made all.
Failed to show pace and dropped back to be with rear and wide. Remained same into home straight then, when balanced, finished very strongly to be nearest at finish.
Around midfield. Hung in in the early and middle stages. Had some difficulty getting clear run early in straight. Finished strongly when clear final 200 M.
With rear throughout.
Behind midfield. No response when asked for effort after 400 M.
Prominent and 5 wide without cover. Remained wide into home straight. Kept on fairly until after 200 M then the effects of hard run showed.
Slowly away, well back. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Began awkwardly, at the back. Never seen with a chance.
Around midfield. Dropped out from 500 M.
Soon led from widest draw. Kept on well until overhauled final strides.
Always prominent, shared lead into straight. Kept on until no extra close home.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Crept closer on home bend. Effort not sustained, only kept on one-pace in straight.
Settled better than midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to just miss narrowly.
Mainly midfield, tended to over-race and was wide without cover. Weakened steadily after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped awkwardly, midfield or behind. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Led briefly then sat behind leader. Ran on under pressure final 200 M to get up closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly, soon moved forward to be better than midfield. Kept on until weakening inside 200 M.
Soon led and made all. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped well and was in the front early. Dropped back gradually to midfield or behind. Ran on well from 6th early straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Not far off from widest draw. Faded soon after straightening.
Prominent. Found no extra 200 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on final 200 M.
Tardy start, remained in rear to 400 M. Made up considerable ground in straight.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Soon faded.
Towards rear. Made progress far side to be midfield home bend. Unable to quicken when under pressure 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground.
Better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Midfield or behind. Made up good ground 300 M out. Unable quicken to challenge closing stages.
Prominent until weakening out of contention final 200 M.
Travelled behind midfield. Ran on well down centre of straight to claim 2nd place near finish.
Prominent. Kept on steadily before finding no extra closing stages.
Wide and around midfield to straight then dropped out.
Began awkwardly. Soon picked up to first few. Quickened to reach 2nd over 100 M out but swamped final strides.
Travelled towards rear. Ran on well in straight to narrowly miss 2nd.
Began from wide draw and made all to win easily.
Restrained just better than midfield early. Chased leader to straight then soon dropped out.
Began well. Steadied to midfield approaching home bend. Kept on in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon in rear. Made up ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield far side. Lost position and dropped to last few into straight. Produced good late progress past beaten runners closing stages.
Began slowly but soon in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Tailed off from home bend. (Heart irregularity.)
Soon 4th. Ran on well inside 250 M to get up on the line.
Prominent. Ran on solidly final 200 M. Just failed when pipped on the line.
Always well there. Came to tackle leader early straight, gaining upper hand 200 M out. Held on but was just beaten narrowly at finish.
Slightly better than midfield. Found no extra 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Slightly improved to midfield home bend. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Improved slightly to midfield far side. Unable to quicken rounding home bend.
Soon led. Weakened when headed 200 M out.
Never a factor. (Saddle shifted.)
Towards rear. Made up some ground along rail in straight.
Rear. Made up good ground under pressure from outside 400 M to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Around midfield throughout. Kept on.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield rounding home bend. Kept on.
Settled in joint 5th just better than midfield. Gradually faded into straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly in last few with moderate effort early in straight.
Led until joined into straight then dropped out quickly.
Tracked leader, joining lead entering straight. Gained 1L advantage over 200 M out but overhauled nearing home.
Settled joint 5th just better than midfield. Moved up to grab lead inside 100 M. Won readily.
Lost ground at start then travelled in last few. Kept on well in straight.
Settled behind leader. Shifted out for a run upon straightening but only keeping on at the one pace.
Mainly just behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well to snatch 2nd final stages.
Prominent to straight then gradually weakened.
Settled in midfield. Made modest progress without threatening.
In last few until producing good late impression closing stages.
Made no show.
Niggled along far side. Awkwardly placed on rails behind runners around home bend and into straight. Kept on one pace.
Pulled its way towards front, three wide turning out of straight. Just failed to hold off challenger.
Settled midfield on the rail. Made up good ground towards inside to just miss placings.
Settled in handy position, although shuffled back near 600 M. Checked severely on straightening then flashed for unlucky third. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rearward. Did not quicken when asked and only beat home tiring runners.
Straight to lead turning out of home straight first time. Never quickened when asked for effort.
Raced in handy position but wide. Began to lose ground on home bend and weakened badly.
Settled in handy position. Gained clear running from home bend to win convincingly.
Over-raced in early stages to settle behind the leader. Weakened in the straight.
Over-raced in early stages but settled behind midfield. Improved out widest in the home straight.
Raced in handy position but mostly three wide. Lost ground when placed under pressure on home bend.
Settled about midfield. Made ground on home bend but then was one-paced shortly after.
Always at the rear. One-paced in the straight.
Settled in handy position on the rail just behind leader. A bit one-paced in the straight.
Raced wide and rearward. Never travelled and was urged most of the way. Made steady ground in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led until being passed after 200 M. Kept on fairly afterwards but unable to hold placegetters.
In front of midfield. Asked for effort after straightening and kept on well, despite failing to dash, to be nearest at finish.
Outside lead. Tried to go with winner when it made its run through. Kept on strongly but unable to peg back winner.
Behind midfield after being crowded at 800 M. Had difficulty obtaining clear running on several occasions in straight and was not properly tested.
Near rear. Waited with until after 400 M then edged out to outside. Made good ground final 200 M to be closest at finish.
In front of midfield. Asked for effort after 400 M and kept on fairly all the way to the post but didn't have the zip of some of the late finishers.
Rear. Waited with into home straight. Remained on inner but failed to make any impression on leaders in straight.
Taken back to near rear first 200 M then allowed to improve to be midfield at 800 M. Found no extra when asked for effort after straightening.
Behind lead and 3 wide. Asked for effort after straightening but failed to respond and gave ground from the 300 M.
Behind midfield. Remained on inner around home bend and crept a little closer. Responded strongly when asked for effort after 400 M. Continued to make ground and was closest at finish.
Followed leader. Gained run through between leaders after straightening. Responded well to reach lead after 200 M. Held on to score narrowly.
Midfield. Had difficulty finding clear running early in straight. Finished strongly when in clear final 200 M.
Behind lead. Gave ground gradually from 400 M.
Near rear. Eased to outside on straightening. Responded fairly after 400 M and continued to make gradual ground without ever looking likely.
Never far off. Weakened final 100 M.
Better than midfield to 450 M. Dropped out.
Midfield. Made gradual ground final 200 M.
Niggled along to be prominent. Gradually weakened from 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on well from 400 M but unable to match speed of the winner.
In touch to 350 M. Dropped out.
Handy. Ran on well but was inconvenienced by the winner twice final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. Ran on gradually from 400 M, one-paced final 100 M.
Pushed along to be prominent. Gradually weakened from 200 M.
Restless in stall then slowly away. Well back, made up a little late ground. (Saddle shifted back.)
Midfield or better to 300 M. Faded.
Prominent, took lead from 700 M. Kept on well despite drifting in final 300 M. Hung in most of the way.
Missed start badly, at rear. Became unbalanced at 400 M when awkward on heels. Made ground steadily final 200 M.
Soon led. Kept on until headed 200 M out. Weakened.
Jumped awkwardly and remained at rear. Made up good ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Mostly in touch. Kept on in straight until effort not sustained final 100 M.
Midfield. Given reminders rounding home bend. Failed to respond in straight and was eased down 200 M out. (Heart irregularity.)
Midfield or worse. Ran on a bit final 250 M but not persevered with last 100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
At rear. Waited with until 300 M out before quickening well to be nearest at finish without troubling the winner.
Behind midfield or worse. Kept on in straight and had to switch course 200 M out when running on.
Around midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Never far off. Ran on well upon straightening and led briefly 200 M out before being outsprinted by the first pair. Hung out in the run to the post.
Always in touch. Ran on in straight until not quickened close home.
Jumped well from wide draw before dropping towards the rear whilst proving difficult to settle. Progressed from 800 M to be behind midfield turning in. Ran on final 300 M until no extra close home.
Soon settled at back. Slight progress rounding home bend on the outside. Responded well in straight and took lead 100 M out. Kept on to win comfortably.
Soon 2nd. Kept on in straight until weakened final 100 M.
Began awkwardly. Soon midfield or better. Checked at 800 M when pulling. Kept on to 200 M and weakened badly.
Gradually dropped to the rear. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Slowly away, soon recovered to be midfield. Was hampered near the 1000 M. Did not quicken in home straight.
Towards rear. Made gradual ground final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Always at the back.
Dropped to rear despite being niggled along, wide without cover throughout. Steady progress on home bend to be better than midfield into straight. Stayed same until weakened close home.
Within striking distance. Every chance 150 M out until outsprinted by the winner close home.
Reared at start and lost a lot of ground. At rear until running past tired runners closing stages.
Wide in midfield from poor draw. Failed to make any progress in the straight.
Midfield to 400 M. Dropped out.
Steadily dropped towards rear from outside draw. Ran on strongly on outer from 300 M. No extra closing stages.
Made running to 400 M. Steadily weakened final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Made move from 300 M, cruised to the front 100 M out to win convincingly.
Towards rear early, worked forward to track leader at 1100 M. Took lead 400 M out, headed at 150 M, steadily weakened.
Never far off. Became unbalanced when racing awkwardly on heels near the 1000 M. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Mostly about 6th to home turn. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
At back to straight where he made some late progress closing stages.
Well there to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Well there to 200 M where he dropped out steadily.
About 9th into home bend. Was staying on when checked 100 M.
1st or 2nd to straight where he weakened out of contention from the 250 M.
Never in contention.
In touch before finding no extra close home.
Settled in rear to straight where he failed to get a clear run on the inside. Switched out inside 200 M and kept on strongly when clear close to finish.
Was prominent before taking narrow lead into straight. Headed 200 M and faded.
Midfield to straight where he ran on well to lead 200 M. Won readily.
Was midfield, pulling hard, rounding home bend. Kept on steadily inside 200 M.
Worse than midfield to straight where he ran on a bit.
Never near to challenge.
Jumped very awkwardly, never in contention.
Behind midfield. Improved along rail to be 4th upon straightening. One-paced.
Better than midfield. Weakened final 200 M.
Checked soon after start, remained at rear until making up some late ground closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch. Dropped back steadily from 600 M. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Not far off to 800 M. Lost touch thereafter.
Midfield. Made ground gradually to be prominent 800 M. Advanced to 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on.
Midfield. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Pushed along to take lead from 850 M. Unable to quicken when headed 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Crept closer order turning in. Ran on well from 5th 200 M to snatch victory close home.
Jumped well from widest draw, dropping back gradually to midfield near 800 M. Maintained similar position thereafter.
Always prominent. Sat outside leader turning in. Took over approaching 200 M, maintaining advantage until headed near finish.
Stumbled and almost fell at start, remained at rear throughout.
Settled just better than midfield. Quickened well to assert authority closing stages.
Midfield before dropping out home bend.
Soon dropped to rear of field. Picked up some late ground in straight.
Began well and niggled along but gradually dropped behind midfield. Lost ground around home bend but made modest progress in straight.
Broke well then travelled in close-up position. Hit front upon straightening but unable to sustain effort and headed over 100 M out.
Narrow lead early then travelled just behind pace home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Sluggish at start and never a danger.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Slightly slowly away but recovered rapidly to lead around home bend. Headed upon straightening and gradually faded.
Prominent to straight then tired quickly.
Midfield briefly then remained towards rear.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily for 4th closing stages.
Slowly away but picked up quickly to be with leaders home bend. Fought on to hit front over 100 M out but caught near finish.
Raced behind midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Was 2nd early, settled 4th along the rail. Asserted authority final turn to take clear lead early straight. Held on well.
In touch to 1400 M before dropping back to the rear.
Never a factor.
In touch, 3rd from 1300 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Never better than 8th.
Slowly away and was last early. Recovered ground gradually to be in midfield. Stayed there until running on a bit closing stages.
Around midfield throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Led field to 400 M. Kept on for a 2nd without troubling the winner.
With early speed from the widest draw and was soon 2nd. 4th turning into straight, kept on to fight back the 3rd place passing 200 M.
Better than midfield. 5-wide 5th turning in. Maintained similar position thereafter.
Midfield. Eased down from final turn. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield early, dropped to the rear ground 1400 M. Very wide turning in with moderate progress in straight.
Trailed field to straight. Made up ground past beaten runners.
Midfield throughout. One-paced in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Chased leader to straight then dropped out.
Wide towards rear. Ran on down centre of straight. Just pipped for 2nd.
Soon in rear.
Never far off. Dropped out passing 200 M.
Mostly in midfield to straight then gradually faded.
Chased leader to straight then dropped out.
Never in contention.
Midfield. No clear passage early in straight. Ran on closing stages.
Made all to win in a canter.
Wide in midfield. Took closer order home bend gaining distant 2nd into straight. Kept on before swamped final stages.
Settled behind midfield. Not much room early in straight. Ran on to claim remote 2nd final strides.
Led briefly before setting just off the pace. 3rd or 4th turning in. Kept on without quickening. Weakened final 200 M.
Always at rear. Never a factor.
Soon towards rear. Progressed from 600 M to be around midfield turning in. Made up some ground in straight to be a distant 3rd.
Jumped well. Clipped heels and knuckled turning out the straight the first time and then settled in midfield or better. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Soon at rear. Never a threat.
Midfield. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Soon travelling kindly in 2nd place. 3rd turning in. Kept on without threatening in straight and lost remote 3rd when no extra close home.
Jumped well from widest draw and then trapped wide rounding stable bend to be in midfield or better. Eased down final 300 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon at rear. Hampered turning out of the straight the first time. Never a factor.
Midfield early. Trapped wide rounding stable bend and dropped towards the rear down the back straight despite being niggled along. Not a factor in straight.
At back. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
Soon travelling kindly in 3rd or 4th position. Under pressure rounding home bend. Weakened from 250 M.
Ridden forward and led from stable bend. Headed 200 M out. Kept on well but was always held off by the winner.
Always in touch. 2nd turning in. Ran on well to hit front 200 M out and held off the runner-up to the line.
In front of midfield. Dropped to be behind midfield at 1000 M. Gradual improvement over final 400 M but was passing mainly beaten horses.
Outside lead. Maintained same until giving ground shortly after entering the home straight.
In front of midfield. Dropped to midfield 1000 M. Remained on inner around home bend. Made gradual ground in straight but never looked likely.
Prominent. Improved to be 3-wide outside the lead on straightening. Kept on strongly in straight but not able to match first two.
Behind midfield. Very wide throughout. Dropped out from 600 M and finished tailed off.
With rear throughout and never looked likely.
Prominent. Moved up to challenge 4-wide on home bend. Kept on strongly in run to line but unable to match the winner.
Behind midfield after being checked at the start. Asked to go forward after 600 M but only responded one-paced.
Led. Went clear on straightening and held on for comfortable win.
Ridden hard to go forward early. Raced 3-wide outside lead. Kept on one-paced early in straight then gave ground final 200 M.
Midfield after being crowded at the start. Worked forward after 1000 M when wide. Effort told and found no more after 400 M.
