Rear. Hard ridden but still behind midfield on straightening. Remained on inner and finished strongly although still a fair distance from the winner.
Near rear. Improved along back to be behind midfield. Hard ridden final 600 M but kept on mainly one-paced.
Midfield. Responded to riding after 400 M and was prominent entering straight. Kept on early straight then gave ground quickly final 200 M.
Around midfield. Wide on first turn and along back straight. Made up some ground in straight until weakened closing stages.
Ridden along and given reminders to be midfield. Crept closer rounding home turn to be prominent turning in. Hit the front 100 M out, unable to resist winner's challenge close home.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out from 300 M.
Checked at start, towards rear. Hung in middle stages. Made up some good late ground.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground from 300 M. No extra final 100 M.
Midfield. Dropped out from 600 M.
Soon sat behind leader. Hung out from 600 M. Dropped out from 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
At the back. Ran on well final 400 M.
Worse than midfield throughout. Never in contention.
Bounded in the air, midfield. Dropped steadily from 1000 M to be at the back at 600 M. Not a factor afterwards.
Jumped awkwardly, well back. Steady progress on home bend to be midfield into straight. Ran on strongly final 200 M to take charge closing stages.
Made running to 100 M. Kept on quite well until beginning to tire closing stages.
Towards rear. Wide and hung out throughout. Never a factor.
Well there to 400 M, faded.
Jumped well, held 4th from 1000 M. Dropped back to midfield or behind far side. Found no extra in straight.
Pushed along from widest draw to be 2nd 1200 M. Outsprinted by the winner 250 M. Just held on for a 3rd.
Led field to 400 M. Faded badly final 300 M.
Towards rear. No progress in straight.
Slowly away, behind midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield but was widest turning in. Made up some ground final 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly better than midfield. Made progress to 2nd or 3rd upon straightening. Kept on but no match with the winner.
Jumped badly, never a factor.
Around midfield. Made some progress rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Held 6th along rail. Shifted out to improve from 800 M, reaching 4th or 5th 200 M out. Unable to quicken thereafter.
Always there. Responded well rounding home bend to take lead 400 M. Won going away.
Jumped awkwardly, remained at rear until making up considerable ground final 200 M.
Broke well. Niggled along in prominent position and remained wide from poor draw. Crossed over to dispute lead home bend. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
With leaders. Quickened to hit front passing 200 M. Held on well. (Bled.)
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Soon took up running holding narrow advantage to 200 M and faded.
Never far off. Kept on steadily in straight to claim 3rd close home.
Broke well. Never far off. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Slow to begin. Travelled behind midfield. Plodded on.
Settled in midfield. Kept on well.
Sluggish at start. Never in contention.
Towards rear. Produced good late progress at finish.
Towards rear most of way.
Jumped fairly and soon dropped to rear.
Rear. Made up some ground from outside inside 150 M.
Remained 7th or 8th throughout.
Soon led. Was joined upon straightening. Headed 200 M out and was soon faded.
Was last throughout.
Midfield. Progressed to 5th 500 M. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Midfield or behind. Ran on a bit inside 200 M.
Mostly 9th to straight. Made up good ground inside 200 M to take 2nd close home. No threat to the winner.
Always prominent. Looked to have some chance 250 M. Kept on.
In touch. Dropped back to 6th home bend. Made no show in straight.
Settled 5th. Improved to 4th 700 M. Sustained effort in straight to assert authority 200 M. Held on well to the line.
Prominent. Joined the lead final turn. Weakened passing 200 M.
Around midfield. Not much room 200 M out. Ran on well.
Well back. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Tracked leader. Gained slender advantage upon straightening. Wandered about and headed 200 M out then dropped out.
Rear. Made up a lot of ground down centre of straight doing best work at finish.
Travelled just better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Held lead until headed into straight. Weakened passing 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Lost position around home bend. Ran on doggedly in straight.
Never far off to straight. Kept on before weakening under pressure inside 200 M.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Raced behind midfield. No clear passage 200 M out. Finished well to grab 3rd final strides.
Jumped awkwardly and travelled well back. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Prominent. Quickened to lead 200 M out. Hung on well under pressure.
Settled in handy position just behind leading division. Never made ground in the straight.
Began well from wide draw to sit outside leader. One-paced in the straight.
Went forward from wide barrier to be three wide without cover. Always one paced in the straight.
Restrained from wide gate and settled at rear. Came widest on home bend to make good ground out wide.
Beaten for early speed to be rearward of midfield. Rearward at home bend under hard riding. Made good ground in straight.
Began best to go forward from wide gate to settle in lead. Headed from 600 M and only weakened in the straight.
Settled midfield on the rail. Well back at 600 M and ridden to make up good ground over concluding stages.
Slow into stride and settled at rear. Went forward after 1000 M to be in front at 600 M. Gained break home turn but unable to hold off challengers. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden along early from inside gate to settle behind the leader on the rail. Obtained clear running in straight to finish best.
Beaten for early speed to settle behind midfield. Always well back and made no ground.
Settled three wide in forward position out of straight first time. Got back in middle stages. Made good ground in straight.
Allowed time to settle early to be rearward of midfield. Improved wide to make good ground but not able to match winner.
Three wide behind lead early. Got in to be two wide making the 600 M turn. Under pressure on straightening and kept on one paced until giving ground final 150 M.
Followed leader. Lost position at 600 M turn and dropped to around midfield. Remained on inner around turn then only one paced in straight.
Behind midfield after being crowded on first turn. Dropped to near rear on straightening and despite being hard ridden failed to make headway.
Near rear and wide early. Improved a little along back straight but remained wide. Only one paced when asked for effort after straightening.
Midfield and three wide early. Worked forward along back to be outside lead and 3 wide at 600 M. Hung out on home bend and lost some ground.
Midfield. Free early. Behind midfield entering straight then made good ground to be closest at finish.
Behind leaders. Moved to second on straightening and then kept on fairly without making headway.
Led until after the 100 M. Kept on well after setting good pace to hold onto minor placing.
Taken back to rear from wide draw. Remained on inner and made ground under good hold around home bend. Made strong run through field after straightening and arrived just in time.
Behind midfield after failing to show early pace. Remained same into home straight then continued to make gradual ground under hard riding.
Midfield. Eased into clear on straightening and responded strongly down centre of track. Just failed to match effort of the winner.
Near rear. Dropped to rear at 400 M and made no improvement afterwards.
Mainly in touch. Niggled along from 500 M. Ran on well when in the clear 200 M out. Held narrow advantage briefly only to be caught just before the line.
Towards rear. Improved rounding stable bend to around midfield from 1000 M. Ran on final 200 M until not quickened close home.
Slowly away. Soon midfield. Awkwardly placed at 1000 M whilst difficult to settle. Dropped steadily back towards rear along back straight. Not a threat in straight and inconvenienced 100 M out.
Sat behind leader rounding stable bend. Kept on in straight until no extra in the closing stages.
Ridden forward to lead. Kept on upon straightening. Headed 100 M out when one-paced.
Soon towards rear. Ran on steadily final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield early. Improved from 1200 M to be in touch turning into back straight. Ran on well to hit front briefly 100 M out but was outsprinted by the first pair in the closing stages.
Always in touch. Sat outside the leader from 1000 M. Drifted out in straight and weakened final 100 M.
Began awkwardly and took some time to settle at the rear. Improved from 600 M but was trapped wide turning in. Never a threat in straight.
Mostly midfield or better. Unbalanced when crowded at 600 M. Held up in straight. Steadied and shifted out for running before the 200 M. Ran on well to just get up before the line.
Niggled along to go forward but was checked when crowded turning out of the straight the first time and then remained in midfield or better. Dropped back steadily in straight.
Settled at rear. Last from 1100 M. Shifted in to improve final 200 M but the rider had to stop riding to avoid causing interference 100 M out.
Always close-up. Quickened to lead inside 200 M. Drew clear and won comfortably.
Began awkwardly, at rear. Made up some ground final 200 M. One-paced close home.
Pushed along to be behind leader. Dropped back slightly rounding home bend. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Close-up briefly, then dropped to the rear. Made no show in home straight.
Better than midfield. Improved to be behind leaders from Rock. Weakened steadily final 150 M.
Best away, led field to 200 M. Kept on quite well until no extra closing stages.
Bounded in the air and missed the start, niggled along to be midfield. Made only moderate progress final 200 M.
Around midfield. Ran on well final 200 M though not able to threaten the winner.
Worse than midfield throughout. Disappointed for running near the 200 M. Did not quicken.
Pushed forward to sit outside leader from 900 M. Kept on well in straight. Lost 2nd place closing stages.
Behind midfield throughout. Failed to make any progress in the straight.
Slowly away, trailed the field. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Worse than midfield and was widest of all into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
In touch before losing some ground 500 M. About 6th into straight where he plugged on under pressure.
Close up when steadied 1000 M, losing ground. Was midfield coming into straight where he was baulked 200 M. Ran on when clear towards finish.
Prominent to 200 M where he failed to hold place.
Sat behind leaders in 4th or 5th to straight where he failed to obtain a clear run approaching 250 M.
Mostly midfield to home bend. Found nothing when asked in straight.
Never far off to 250 M. Soon beaten.
In touch. Held every chance 200 M but soon outpaced.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on well for 2nd despite not threatening winner.
Last or 2nd last to home turn. Came with strong run down centre of track to take command 150 M.
Was prominent before dropping out of contention passing 200 M.
Among rear group to straight. Was steadied 250 M before making up some ground close home.
Midfield. Crept closer order along rail final turn. Ran on under pressure but unable to match speed with winner closing stages.
Always there. Wide turning in. Kept on while shifting in throughout the straight.
Never a factor.
Slightly behind midfield. Hung out home turn. Difficult to find clear run in straight when improving. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent. Took lead from the Rock. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Settled 5th or 6th. Made progress to 3rd turning in. Sustained effort to take control inside 100 M. Held on well.
Led field from the widest draw. Was headed approaching 600 M. Hung out home turn. Faded in straight.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Made up good ground though racing ungenerously and shifting in in straight.
Behind midfield. Moderate progress along rail in straight.
In touch. Unbalanced while weakening inside 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent to 400 M. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Midfield to 400 M then weakened.
Attempted to make all. Swamped closing stages.
Always in rear. Dropped out from 400 M.
Chased leader to straight but failed to quicken to threaten.
Prominent to straight and weakened.
Midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well back. Made up good late ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Finished well to claim victory closing stages.
Towards rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on same pace in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never nearer.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Towards rear and wide throughout.
Soon last. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Slowly away, rear to straight. Made up considerable ground from the extreme outside but was unable to catch the winner.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on steadily 250 M.
In touch. Dropped to midfield 650 M. Not a factor thereafter.
Slightly better than midfield. Advanced to 4th on outside passing 800 M. Kept on but unable to quicken in straight.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily final 400 M.
Midfield at best.
Midfield. Improved to a handy position far side. Kept on well from 3rd early straight to hit front briefly 150 M. However effort not sustained.
Jumped awkwardly, behind midfield. Crept closer order along rail turning in. One-paced.
Rear. Was steadied 400 M. Made up some ground when under pressure in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on from 9th early straight to assert authority 50 M out.
Led or shared lead until taking slender advantage near 500 M. Held on until failing to maintain position closing stages.
Led or shared lead to 500 M. Remained in prominent position until finding no extra closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on stoutly in straight to claim 3rd close home.
Always well behind. Tailed-off from home bend. (Heart Irregularity.)
Always in rear.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on strongly in straight doing best work at finish.
Travelled better than midfield. 4th into straight. Weakened passing 200 M.
Towards rear most of way.
Set good pace, holding narrow advantage until headed into straight. Kept on before finding no extra closing stages.
Settled in 3rd, though some 7Ls behind fast pace far side. Quickened well under pressure in straight to hit front closing stages despite hanging in. Won well.
Broke well. Held up in 4th just better than midfield. Made no show in straight.
Always in last few.
Mainly in midfield or behind. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Shared strong pace. Hit front into straight. Unable to sustain close home.
Towards rear. Made steady progress in straight without threatening.
Raced wide in midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Gained split near 200 M for convincing win.
Midfield on the rail early. Checked severely at 600 M off weakening runners. Steady ground.
Settled at rear of the field. Made good ground in straight.
3-wide at the rear early. Improved from well back.
Towards rear early. Gained clear run on home bend but unable to match winner's sprint.
Behind midfield 3-wide early. Equal lead at 200 M. Weakened.
Stirrup leather of rider loosened at the start. Led throughout and eased down in the straight.
Settled in a forward position just behind leaders. Improved up outside leader at the 1000 M. Weakened quickly.
Equal lead throughout, but hampered constantly by Zabette.
Trapped wide at first turn and restrained to just off pace. Lost ground from 600 M.
Settled on rail just behind leaders. Went to equal lead near Rock. Hit front 200 M.
Settled midfield. Loomed up at 200 M but could not match winner.
Settled in handy position on the rail. Hampered by weakening runners at 600 M and taken right back through the field. Lost ground.
Last on the rail early stages. Made little impression.
Behind midfield. Dropped to rear at 500 M and showed no improvement afterwards.
Prominent. Taken into clear on straightening and responded well to reach lead at 200 M. Kept on for strong win.
Near rear. Remained same into straight and stayed on inner. Gained nice run through on rails and finished strongly.
Worked forward from draw to be outside leader. Responded well early in straight and kept on until unable to go with winner at 200 M. Gave ground quickly last bit.
Midfield and 3-wide. Lost ground when unbalanced at 1000 M. Remained near rear into home straight and shortly afterwards was checked. Did not recover afterwards.
Rear. Taken to outside at entrance to straight. Once balanced responded strongly and continued to make ground to be nearest at finish.
Midfield throughout. One-paced when asked for effort after straightening.
In front of midfield. After straightening responded fairly to hold position without ever looking likely.
Led. Gave ground quickly final 200 M.
Midfield. Failed to respond when asked for effort at 400 M. Rider reminded to ride also mounts out to post.
Prominent. Made some ground early in straight then finishing effort levelled out after 200 M. Kept on fairly.
Behind midfield. Dropped to near rear on straightening. Shifted out to go forward early in straight but failed to respond and only passed tired horses.
After being wide early worked forward to be in front of midfield but remained 3-wide. Kept on one-paced in home straight.
Behind midfield after being checked on first turn. Remained same into home straight. Took time to gather momentum when asked for effort at 300 M. Made ground late when doing best work final 100 M.
Settled at rear. Disappointed for running after 200 M. Did not quicken when switched out into the clear.
Slowly away, last to 200 M. Made up some late ground.
Severely checked at start, well back. Ran on steadily from 250 M, unable to peg back the winner.
Always handy. Held some chance inside 200 M, kept on one-paced closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Weakened closing stages.
Prominent, soon took up running. Headed at 250 M, dropped out steadily.
Worse than midfield. Widest into straight. Made up a little ground.
Soon outside leader. Dropped out from 200 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on to dispute lead after straightening. No extra close home.
Led briefly, then sat behind leader. Weakened steadily from 200 M.
Settled around midfield. Closer order rounding home bend. Wide entering straight. Ran on well to lead 100 M out. Kept on.
Better than midfield throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Settled at rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Dropped out from early straight. (Bled.)
In touch. Kept on early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Rear. Ran on from outside final 250 M.
Near rear. Made up good ground 350 M out to be nearest at finish.
In touch but was wide without cover. Unable to quicken in straight.
Sat outside leader to straight. Responded strongly to take control 200 M. Won comfortably.
Lost ground at start, always at the back.
Towards rear. Moderate progress early straight but soon found no extra.
Led, still holding 1-1/2Ls advantage 250 M. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on from 6th 400 M but unable to reach the winner.
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Improved from outside rounding home bend. Continued to make ground in straight, never nearer.
Midfield. Progressed to be handy rounding home bend. Faded soon after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.) (Bled.)
Towards rear. Recovered some ground to be 5th turning in. Kept on well along rail in straight.
Midfield or behind. One-paced.
Held narrow lead. Joined into straight and soon headed. No extra.
Always towards rear to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening in straight.
In similar position throughout.
Never in the hunt.
Restrained just better than midfield. Wide into straight. Finished well inside final 300 M only to be denied narrowly.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily past beaten runners in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in midfield. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails just behind leaders. Raced tightly inside runners early in straight. Kept on under pressure.
Always well there from poor draw, sharing pace into straight. Unable to sustain effort inside 200 M.
Missed the break but soon recovered to midfield. Faded upon straightening.
Held up just off the pace. Joined lead turning in. Went 1/2L clear 200 M out and held on well against fast-finishing 2nd.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
In touch to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily final 300 M, never nearer.
Prominent. Dropped out of contention halfway.
In touch. Found no extra closing stages.
Always prominent. Came to tackle leader 250 M but effort not sustained.
Led early. Kept on gamely for a 3rd when headed inside 150 M.
Towards rear. Made good progress passing course proper, doing best work final 200 M.
Inconvenienced at start, towards rear. Made up some ground when under pressure 400 M.
Behind midfield. Faded from 500 M.
Rear. Ran past a few tiring horses closing stages.
Not far off. Responded well 400 M to take command inside 150 M. Kept on strongly to hold off placegetters' challenges close home.
About midfield. Ran on well final 250 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Towards rear. Ran on moderately 250 M. Found no extra close home.
Never able to challenge.
Better than midfield when checked approaching home bend. Recovered to midfield on rails turning in but soon found no extra.
Mostly in midfield. Gave ground from approaching home turn.
Showed speed early then held up behind leaders. Quickened to challenge upon straightening holding every chance though denied a place.
In similar position throughout. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Towards rear early. Improved around field to be mid-division turning in. Sustained good progress down straight to just fail to get up on line.
Never in contention.
Sluggish at start but soon in midfield. Hampered and lost position approaching home bend and made no impression in straight.
Broke well settling behind pace. Hit front turning in and fought on well to defy challengers closing stages.
Never far off. Improved to hold some chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Broke well, settling in midfield on outside. Ran on under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. Travelled in last few. Finished strongly inside final 300 M to snatch 3rd final stride.
Never nearer.
Prominent. Took lead coming out of back straight. Headed approaching 400 M and soon dropped out. (Bled.)
Settled behind midfield. No clear passage 200 M out. Kept on same pace.
Crossed the field from wide gate to race outside SUNLINE. Caused some interference at 1400 M. Held on gamely in the straight.
Settled midfield on the rail. Weakened on straightening.
Raced midfield. Under pressure from home bend and one paced in the straight.
Restrained from wide gate to be at rear. Shifted in on straight to get clear running and made some good ground.
Began best from wide out to cross to lead. Allowed own way throughout and held on for game win.
Slow into stride then improved to midfield. Checked near 1300 M. Always rearward.
Raced in forward position but crowded near 1400 M. Made steady ground out wide.
Raced in handy position but wide without cover. Lost ground when under pressure.
Restrained to midfield in early stages. Made good ground in straight.
Restrained early to be rearward. Never made any impression.
Restrained from wide draw to race midfield. Improved out wide to narrowly miss victory.
Began well from inside gate but crowded near the 1400 M. One-paced in the straight.
Slow in early stages but then improved to midfield but racing wide. Hung out home bend. Then hung in on straightening.
Began well from inside gate to settle just behind leader. Crowded at 1400 M. Gained third at 200 M but weakened final stages.
Jumped best before dropping back to the rear. Never a threat in straight.
Led briefly before settling in 2nd place. Kept on upon straightening until weakened badly final 200 M.
Jumped well but soon settled towards the rear. One-paced in straight before weakened in the closing stages.
Midfield or worse. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Niggled along early to be in touch. Kept on in straight until one-paced close home.
Mainly forward of midfield. Ran on nicely 350 M out until not quickened close home.
Dropped steadily across to settle towards the rear from wide draw. Held up in the early part of the straight. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Soon prominent in 3rd place. Ran on in straight but was not able to trouble the winner and lost 2nd on the line.
Towards rear. Never a factor.
Soon 2nd. Took lead from 1100 M. Kept on strongly for a commanding victory in straight.
Never far off. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Stumbled on jumping and got well back. Recovered to be midfield from 1000 M. Ran on a bit final 250 M until effort not sustained close home.
Steadied from wide draw to settle at rear. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Mostly midfield or better after proving difficult to settle in the early stages. Failed to make any impression upon straightening.
Settled at rear. Ran on well from 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Closer order rounding home bend. Challenged leader from 400 M, no extra close home.
Midfield, checked soon after start. Dropped back slightly from 1400 M. Not a factor in home straight.
Around midfield. Steadied near 800 M when disappointed for running. Became unbalanced when attempting to take a narrow run near 200 M. No further improvement thereafter.
Always handy. Ran on well final 200 M though unable to peg back the winner.
Settled within striking distance. Quickened to lead upon straightening. Kept on well to the line.
Checked soon after start, mainly worse than midfield. Wide into straight. Did not quicken.
Missed start, recovered to sit behind leader. Took up running from 900 M. Headed on straightening, dropped out from 300 M.
Midfield or worse. Made ground gradually upon straightening to be closest at finish.
Well back. Held up approaching and rounding home turn. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Pushed forward to make running. Headed at 900 M. Weakened from 300 M.
Forward midfield. Weakened from 200 M.
Towards rear. Caught wide most of the way. Never seen with a chance.
Behind midfield or just worse. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Settled at rear. Ran on a bit 300 M out until not quickened final 100 M.
Never far off. Kept on one pace in straight.
Trapped wide on first corner but always thereabout. 4th from 1600 M. Ran on in straight until not quickened final 100 M.
Soon towards rear. Made up some ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
In touch. 2nd from 1600 M. Responded well upon straightening and took lead 350 M out. Kept on well to win comfortably.
Led briefly before settling in 3rd place. Kept on well in straight without threatening placed horses.
Midfield or worse. Held up upon straightening until 300 M out. Ran on well to grab 2nd place on the line.
Mostly midfield. One-paced in straight.
Soon sat outside leader. Took lead from 1700 M. Headed 350 M. Kept on until no extra final 100 M.
Forward of midfield. Ran on gamely in straight only to lose 2nd place on the line.
Behind midfield. Unbalanced and lost position near 1500 M and dropped towards the rear. Never a threat in straight and weakened badly final 200 M.
At rear. Last from 1200 M. Wide turning in. Never a factor.
Midfield early. Improved to be 4th 1000 M but quickly gave ground coming into straight.
Never troubled leaders.
Among rear group to home bend. Improved on straightening and was doing best work at finish.
Mostly midfield to home turn. Ran on strongly to lead close home.
Always prominent. Took command 200 M out but found winner too strong near finish.
Mostly 5th to straight. Kept on till finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Worse than midfield into straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Last into straight. Never nearer.
Towards rear till making up some good ground in straight.
Mostly midfield to straight. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
In touch before dropping out under pressure early in straight.
Made no show.
Ridden to lead soon after start. Was headed approaching 200 M and faded.
Never in contention.
Sat outside leader to straight. Shared lead passing 200 M but effort not sustained. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)
Midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Towards rear. Made ground rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Ran on in straight. (Finished 4th, placed 3rd.)
Missed the start, never in contention.
Towards rear. Dropped to the last when inconvenienced at the first turn.
Soon 5th. Ran on well from 4th final turn to take command final 50 M.
Always prominent. Was inconvenienced on the rail early straight and near finish. (See Racing Incidents.) (Finished 5th, placed 4th.)
Jumped awkwardly, towards rear. Only ran past beaten horses final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd passing 600 M. Kept on same pace from final turn.
Soon led until headed 50 M. Shifted in early straight and near finish to cause interference. (Finished 2nd, placed 5th.)
Midfield or better. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Around midfield. Kept on in straight.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Maintained similar position in straight.
Held up behind pace. Came to tackle leaders in straight and responded well to take charge final 200 M.
Never far off to straight then gradually faded.
Well there to straight. One-paced when steadied 100 M.
Prominent early settling behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Never nearer.
Made no show. (See Racing Incidents.)
In last few. Ran on to be nearest at finish in straight.
Attempted to make all. Found winner too strong when swamped final 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Held up wide behind midfield. Faded upon straightening.
Always wide towards rear. Dropped further back home bend.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Well there. Was severely checked passing 400 M when giving ground. Dropped out in straight.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield or better from 1100 M. Made no show inside 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Moved up approaching the Rock to be 2nd early straight. Kept on without threatening. Hung in closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Inconvenienced at 400 M, then one-paced.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group 800 M out. Recovered some ground final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, slightly behind midfield. Dropped towards rear far side with no further progress.
Never in contention.
Prominent. Was 2nd from 1000 M to early straight. Soon beaten.
Jumped awkwardly and was soon checked. Towards rear until making up good ground final 300 M.
Pushed along to be better than midfield. Improved to 4th far side and was 3rd 500 M. Found no extra inside 150 M.
Jumped well and made all.
Behind midfield. Improved to midfield final turn. Ran on in straight.
Always there. Unable to obtain clear run when improving 400 M. Ran on along rail when in clear 250 M out.
Soon 2nd last from widest draw. Made up some ground in straight.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Led to 300 M then dropped out.
Settled in 5th just better than midfield. Commenced run passing 600 M gaining narrow advantage early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Towards rear to straight. Produced some late impression.
Midfield throughout.
Settled some 2Ls off pace most of way. Niggled at home bend. One-paced in straight.
Around midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening. (Rider lost whip home turn.)
Settled behind pace. Quickened to take charge passing 200 M. Won well.
Midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Always last few. Kept on well.
Never better than midfield.
Never nearer.
Towards rear and wide. Made swift headway from Rock to be first few into straight. Fought on dourly for 2nd.
Never nearer.
Settled midfield on rail from inside gate. Never a threat in the straight.

Settled around midfield with cover. One-paced in the straight.
Worked across from wide gate to lead. Led until 200 M when unable to match placegetters.
Gradually worked to outside lead. Placed under pressure from home bend. One-paced in the straight.
Restrained from wide gate to be rearward. Placed under pressure from home bend after being held up slightly.
Settled midfield on the rail. Made up moderate ground from home bend.
Raced in forward position on rail. Unable to obtain run about 200 M. Made good ground over final stages.
Allowed time to settle to be at rear. Commenced to go forward after 800 M. Never a threat to placegetters.
Settled midfield. Improved from the Rock to make good ground. Unable to catch the winner.
Allowed time to settle behind leader. Travelled there until gaining split on straightening.
Raced in rearward position early. Placed under pressure from the Rock to make good ground.
Restrained from widest gate to be at rearward. One-paced in the straight.
Sat three wide equal lead for considerable distance. Began to weaken from 600 M.
Near rear. Ridden to improve around field from 600 M but did not respond. Remained with rear into home straight and showed no improvement.
Prominent. Followed leaders into home straight. Responded well to go into clear second at 200 M. Unable to maintain run and one-paced last bit. (Lame.)
Prominent. Hard ridden to keep up from 600 M. Midfield turning in and gave ground shortly afterwards.
Began well and followed leader. Improved to be outside leader at 600 M. Went clear on straightening and kept on to score comfortably.
Midfield throughout. One-paced when asked for effort after straightening.
Wide in midfield. Improved along back straight to be 3 wide outside lead at 600 M. Under pressure at 400 M and gave ground shortly after straightening.
Behind midfield and 3 wide. Improved along back straight to be prominent and 4 wide at 600 M. Remained wide into home straight then responded strongly to beat all but winner.
Behind leaders. Went forward to clear lead at 900 M. One-paced early in straight then no extra final 200 M.
In front of midfield. Improved after 900 M to be 3 wide behind leaders at 600 M. Remained prominent into home straight then one-paced.
Near rear. Remained same into home straight. Stayed on inner and made nice ground in straight without ever looking likely. Closest at finish.
At rear after being slow to begin. Waited with until after straightening when balanced after 300 M taken into clear. Responded strongly final 200 M to make good ground and be closest at finish.
Midfield. Lost ground when wide making home bend. No improvement in straight.
Behind midfield. Stayed same into home straight then made strong run through field to be closest at finish.

Slow to begin then ridden along to reach lead on first turn. At 1000 M was steadied to allow another to go to lead. Remained on inner ground home bend. Kept on one-paced early in straight then no extra final 200 M.
Led briefly before settling in touch. Unbalanced 800 M out and dropped to behind midfield or worse. Under pressure rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Jumped awkwardly but recovered to be forward of midfield from 1000 M. Improved to 4th 800 M out. Ran on final 200 M without threatening the winner.
At rear. Last from 800 M. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Soon dropped to the back from wide draw. Made up good ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Jumped best before dropping back steadily to forward of midfield from 800 M. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Soon led. Headed 900 M and then maintained 3rd position from 700 M. Dropped quickly out of contention final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly midfield or behind. Ran on in straight until not quickened final 100 M.
Always well there. Took lead turning in. Kept on strongly for an easy victory.
Midfield early. Dropped towards rear from 1000 M. Ran on final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to 1000 M before dropping towards the rear. Ran on a bit without threatening final 200 M.
Went forward whilst hanging out and took lead from 900 M. Kept on in straight until weakened badly 100 M out.
Soon midfield or better. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Bounded in air at start, losing a lot of ground. Tailed off throughout.
Ridden to lead, hanging in throughout. Headed inside 200 M. No extra and weakened close home. (Made abnormal breathing noises during race.)
Behind midfield or worse. Never seen with a chance.
Midfield. Ran on steadily final 250 M but found the first pair too strong.
Never far off, kept on one-pace closing stages.
Began awkwardly around midfield. Ran on gradually final 200 M.
Settled in better than midfield. Ran on well final 200 M to lead inside 100 M. Just held on.
Pushed forward to dispute lead, then sat behind leader from 1000 M. Kept on quite well in straight.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
At the back throughout, never on terms.
Behind leader. Steadily weakened from 200 M.
Steadily dropped to the back from widest barrier. Made up good ground final 250 M to just miss.
Worse than midfield. Crept closer rounding home bend. Quickened well in home straight to hold every chance inside final 100 M. Just collared by the winner close home.
Well back. Made up some ground final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent, shared lead from 400 M. Steadily weakened final 150 M.
Bounded in the air at start, pushed along to be prominent briefly, then remained midfield. Improved from 800 M to be prominent on home turn. Gradually weakened from 200 M.
Prominent, took up running from 1100 M. Joined at 400 M. Headed inside 200 M, steadily weakened.
Never far off, looked a chance inside 200 M. Unable to go with the placed runners close home.
Waited with near rear. Switched to outside on straightening and ran on strongly final 200 M to assert authority closing stages.
Trailed field to 600 M. Improved slightly when wide on home bend. Unable to further improve in home straight.
Pushed along to lead briefly, stayed in prominent position from 1200 M. Under pressure from 800 M, dropped out quickly at 600 M. (Bled.)
Behind midfield. Made gradual ground final 200 M. One-paced closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to hit the front 100 M out. Kept on well until overhauled by the quinella pair close to finish.
Ridden along from wide barrier to be prominent. Dropped to midfield from 1200 M. Became unbalanced at 600 M, dropped to the rear at 500 M.
Midfield throughout, weakened closing stages.
At rear, inclining to pull in early stages. Improved after Rock to be midfield rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Very slowly away. Never in contention.
Always there. Ran on well to lead close home.
Always at the back.
Worse than midfield to straight. Stayed on strongly to dead-heat for 2nd.
Well there. Improved to be 2nd before home bend and held every chance under pressure 200 M out. Did not sustain effort close home.
In rear to straight where he ran on a bit.
Never troubled leaders.
In touch before dropping out quickly coming into straight.
Always thereabouts. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Soon took up running and led before being headed near finish.
Made no show.
About 5th into straight where he switched out 150 M, doing best work towards finish.
Among rear group to straight. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
About 6th rounding home bend. Kept on same pace final 300 M.
Was 2nd or 3rd to 200 M out. Weakened.
Soon midfield. Made no show from half-way.
Midfield or behind. Wide without cover throughout.
Midfield. Dropped back from 800 M. Tailed off in straight.
Towards rear. Made up good ground stable bend to be 2nd far side. Well beaten upon straightening.
In touch before dropping from 900 M.
Settled towards rear. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 4th turning in. Kept on for a remote 2nd from 250 M.
Towards rear. Held up for a run home turn when improving. Made no show final 200 M.
Missed the start, towards rear. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Passed some tiring horses early straight. (Bled.)
Mostly 4th or 5th. Achieved 3rd briefly passing 200 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Soon led and made all. Won going away.
Missed the start, towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to claim 3rd closing stages.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Lost position when tight between runners turning in. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Never better than midfield and raced tightly between or behind runners most of way. One-paced in straight.
Never far off to straight. Found nothing.
Mainly in midfield early stages. Took closer order home bend. Ran on steadily but unable to match pace alongside winner.
Never a factor.
Led field. Joined into straight. Soon dropped out.
Broke well settling behind leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening and led over 100 M out. Just held on.
Tracked leader. Gained 1L advantage early in straight. Unable to sustain effort and overhauled 100 M out.
Raced wide from a difficult draw, improving to midfield on outside home bend. Made modest impression early in straight but had no more to give closing stages.
Broke well but held up behind midfield. Raced wide throughout and made moderate progress down centre of straight. No further impression.
Settled on rails in midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening but no clear passage. Obtained split 100 M out and finished off race strongly to just fail to get up.
Sluggish at start but quickly picked up to midfield. Gave further ground home bend joining leaders into straight only to drop away shortly after upon straightening.
Mainly behind midfield. Made steady headway in straight.
Settled at the back. Made moderate progress past beaten runners early in straight.
Never able to feature. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch until dropping back from 300 M.
Led field from 1250 M and never headed. Held on well to the line.
Very slowly away, last to straight. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd turning in. Kept on but found no extra closing stages.
Led early stages, then sat behind leader to straight. Unable to hold place inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made up good ground early straight to be 2nd 200 M. Kept on without threatening.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit rounding the home bend.
Midfield or behind. Towards rear when difficult to find room turning in. Made ground final 250 M when in clear.
Towards rear early, soon recovered ground to better than midfield. Ran on 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent. Checked along rail 200 M. Unable to recover. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear throughout.
Broke well and raced amongst leaders. Fought on doggedly to gain upper hand inside 200 M then never threatened.
Prominent to home bend when lost position. Finished well from towards rear into straight.
Soon in rear.
Broke well and remained well there to 300 M then weakened.
Never a danger.
Midfield to straight then weakened.
Prominent. Hit front upon straightening. Swamped by winner inside final 200 M.
Midfield to straight then no extra.
Prominent. With leaders to 200 M. Weakened.
Soon in rear. Ran on late.
Broke well. Remained wide from bad draw dropping behind midfield before home bend. Made significant progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well then raced among midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Prominent to straight then dropped out.
Soon in rear. Produced good late effort in straight doing best work at finish.
Raced midfield at first bend. Never threatened.
Restrained early to be rearward. Placed under pressure after 600 M and made good ground.
Ridden hard to be rear of midfield. Checked at 700 M off heels of weakening runner. Only moderate ground in the straight.
Raced in handy position on the rail early stages. Always thereabouts.
Chased along early but no early speed to be rearward. Always thereabouts.
Settled midfield at first bend. Never threatened afterwards.
Pushed along early but no early pace to be rearward. Made steady ground on straightened but did not threaten winner.
Wend forward from wide gate but then caught wide outside the leaders. Lost ground from home bend.
Went forward from wide gate to race in handy position with cover. Made steady ground when placed under pressure.
Went forward at first bend but caught wide without cover. Went backwards from 500 M.
Raced forward to be handy position at first bend. Began to weaken badly after 800 M.
Ridden along from wide gate to lead at first bend. Led throughout.
Rear of midfield at first bend. Hampered at 700 M when runner ahead was weakening. Made steady ground along rail.
Good early speed to be racing outside leader but over-racing. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Near rear throughout and never likely.
Behind leader. Kept on well early in straight to remain prominent until after 200 M then one-paced.
Behind midfield and wide from barrier. Allowed to improve around field from 800 M and was prominent turning in. Effort told and commenced to give ground shortly afterwards.
Prominent. Remained same into home straight then found no extra and gave ground shortly afterwards. Was steadied at 100 M.
Slow to begin and at rear. Improved gradually from 800 M but remained behind midfield. Into clear after straightening then made nice ground to be nearest at finish without threatening.
In front of midfield. Midfield turning in and remained on inner. Made steady progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Behind leader. Dropped to prominent at 700 M. Into clear on straightening and responded strongly to reach lead after 200 M. Kept on strongly to score narrowly.
Taken back to be with rear. Improved around field 700 M to be wide in midfield on straightening. One-paced early in straight then condition gave out concluding stages.
Led until after 200 M. Kept on strongly but unable to hold off quinella pair.
Near rear. Dropped to rear at 800 M then was checked at 700 M. Remained at rear into home straight then taken to outside and responded strongly to fail by narrowest of margins.
Midfield. Remained same into home straight then responded fairly however run finished short of line.
Midfield. Failed to respond when under pressure at 600 M and was at rear turning in. No response afterwards.
Behind lead. Remained same into home straight and gave ground shortly afterwards.
Behind midfield. Over-raced early and middle stages. Only responded one-paced when asked for effort after straightening.
Began fairly, ridden along to lead from 1200 M. Kept on well in straight until overhauled by the first two close home.
Behind midfield. Made up some late ground.
Began awkwardly, always well there, kept on well.
Jumped fairly. Soon in midfield on rails. Lost some ground near 800 M. Last near 600 M. Made up ground steadily mostly under hands and heels riding in straight.
Towards rear, was inconvenienced when pulling near the 800 M. Made up some ground from 350 M, one-paced closing stages.
Chased leader to 300 M. Gradually weakened.
Prominent early, dropped to midfield at 1200 M. Weakened from 300 M. (Bled.)
In touch. Hung in momentarily near 800 M. Ran on to threaten the leader 250 M out. Weakened closing stages.
Gradually dropped to rear of midfield from widest draw, and caught wide most of the way. Ran on well from 300 M to just miss after ding-dong battle with the winner.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily final 250 M. One-paced close home.
Around midfield. Made gradual ground final 250 M.
Jumped awkwardly, well back. Steadily improved to midfield at 1100 M. Made sustained run from 300 M to win on the line.
Well there to 300 M. Dropped out.
At the back throughout, racing ungenerously early stages. Tailed off from 300 M.
Niggled along and took lead from 1200 M. Kept on in straight until no extra 200 M out.
Soon moved across from wide draw to settle towards rear. Took closer order along rail turning in. Ran on steadily but was checked after the 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Soon settled in midfield. Ran on well final 300 M to be nearest at finish without troubling the winner.
Mostly around midfield. Kept on in straight until finding no more final 100 M.
Well there. Took lead from 1400 M. Headed 1200 M. Ran on final 300 M until effort not sustained close home.
Midfield early before dropping back towards rear from 1300 M. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Forward of midfield. Not a threat in straight. Weakened badly final 100 M.
Jumped well but soon settled towards rear. Ran on a bit final 300 M until not quickened close home.
At rear. Checked when making a move 300 M out. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Led to 1400 M before settling in 3rd position. Kept on without threatening in straight.

Soon midfield or better. Improved along rail rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Quickened well final 300 M and took lead 200 M out. Kept on strongly for a commanding victory. (Lay out throughout.)
Always at rear. Never a factor. Not ridden out last 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mainly midfield or worse. Ran on strongly to snatch 3rd in the closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Soon raced forward of midfield. Dropped right out of the race final 300 M.
Jumped awkwardly, settled at rear. Made up good ground final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began awkwardly, quickly recovered to be close-up. Kept on one pace in the straight, weakened close home.
Jumped awkwardly, almost unseated rider and was near rear. Made steady progress in home straight.
At rear throughout, never in contention.
Sat behind leader, took lead from 300 M. Headed 100 M out but kept on gamely to just miss.
Towards rear. Tailed off from 250 M.
Midfield. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
In touch. Improved to be outside leader from 1000 M. Steadily weakened from 300 M.
Better than midfield. Made gradual ground from 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Inconvenienced at start, settled towards rear. Steadily improved to midfield at 1100 M. Ran on from 400 M to hit the front 100 M out. Held on well.
Made running to 400 M. Kept on quite well until beginning to tire closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear of midfield. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Short-lived effort from 300 M. One-paced final 150 M.
Towards rear till running on a bit in straight.
Among rear group to home bend. Improved steadily into straight, doing best work at finish.
Never on terms despite staying on a bit in straight.
In rear to straight. Kept on till finding no extra close home.
Well there and ran 2nd from 1100 M. Was beaten when tightened 250 M out.
In touch before losing ground quickly from 700 M.
Worse than midfield to straight where he stayed on steadily under pressure.
Never troubled leaders.
Effort from rear home bend, continued to make steady headway in straight.
Soon led and made running to 250 M where he faded rapidly.
Always handy. Moved up to lead 250 M, holding on under pressure when challenged final 200 M.
Midfield to home bend. Held some chance 200 M out and was one-paced under pressure towards finish.
Well there before failing to hold place approaching 250 M.
Mostly 5th or 6th to straight. Kept on well to challenge inside final 200 M.
